title: A kind of method adjusted into Mobile state of being known together based on business degree of belief to block chain
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of method known together and adjusted into Mobile state to block chain based on business degree of belief; in block catenary system; node is divided into checking node and common recognition node; data only need to be transparent shared between checking node; weak trust or completely incredible business pass through the specified node set for participating in checking and common recognition; the trust of cooperation part can be reached, the privacy of business datum can be protected again.Compared with prior art, the present invention specifically has following beneficial effect：In block catenary system, trusted by combining business, dynamic adjustment is known together, block catenary system is set to be directed to the application scenarios that different business is trusted, the whole network popularization for reducing data transfer and storage is required, both system trust had been can guarantee that, the minimum of energy cost of implementation, enables block chain technology to be widely accepted and uses again.

title: Block chain transaction method and device and electronic equipment
abstract: One or more embodiments of the present specification provide a blockchain transaction method, an apparatus, and an electronic device, which are applied to a remitter device, where the method may include: selecting a plurality of blockchain assets from the remitter blockchain account according to a transaction amount to be remitted from the remitter blockchain account to the receiver blockchain account, wherein the asset amount represented by the selected blockchain asset is not less than the transaction amount; wherein the asset amount represented by each selected blockchain asset is registered on the blockchain as a corresponding asset amount commitment; generating the transaction amount as a corresponding transaction commitment; and submitting a transaction to the blockchain, wherein the transaction comprises the information of the selected blockchain asset and the transaction commitment, so that the remitter blockchain account deletes the selected blockchain asset after the transaction is completed, and the recipient blockchain account adds the blockchain asset corresponding to the transaction commitment after the transaction is completed.

title: Method and system for providing a transaction forwarding service in blockchain implementations
abstract: A method of providing a transaction forwarding service in a blockchain includes executing a smart contract in the blockchain so as to determine whether a respective full node is eligible to execute the smart contract. The smart contract specifies eligible full nodes, a filter of a respective light client and a reward for executing the smart contract. The respective full node forwards data relating to a transaction that matches the filter of the respective light client to the respective light client with a proof that the transaction is included in the blockchain. The respective full node receives a signed acknowledgement from the respective light client verifying the transaction. Then, the respective full node claims the reward using the acknowledgement.

title: Blockchain
abstract: The present invention relates to secure, efficient, confidential and / or outsourced blockchain networks, which can enable a group of participants mistrusting each other to securely share a state and then accept a linear history of operations on this shared state.

title: Registration / authorization method, apparatus and system
abstract: A registration / authorization method, apparatus, and system for solving a technical problem with low security of a conventional authorization technique are provided. The method is applied to an authorization server, and the authorization server is a node in a block chain network, and stores a block chain composed of a plurality of blocks for storing authorization information, and the method is performed by a user apparatus. Transmitting the received registration request message including identity confirmation information for performing identity authentication for the user; assigning authorization information for indicating a service accessible to the user to the user; Writing the identity verification information and the authorization information into a block of the blockchain by an authorization server.

title: Medical record sharing system and implementing method thereof
abstract:
Medical record sharing system and implementing method thereof are disclosed, and the system connects to a blockchain network, wherein the system mainly comprises multiple retrieving terminal devices and a medical data center server, wherein the retrieving terminal devices can respectively establish and publish an electronic medical record (EMR) to 
the blockchain network and also store in the medical data center server. After that, the medical data center server will transmit a piece of encryption key information corresponding to each retrieving terminal device, and when one of the retrieving terminal devices requests to fetch the EMR from the medical data center server, the medical data center server will verify the identity of the retrieving terminal device who wants to fetch the EMR. If there is a match to the encryption key information, the identity of the retrieving terminal device is considered valid, and after that the retrieving terminal device can retrieve the EMR thereof from the medical data center server.

title: Blockchain payment system
abstract: A method for converting cryptocurrency into real, spendable currency includes receiving, from a first electronic device, a peer-to-peer payment request including a payment amount and a unique identifier of a recipient, generating a cryptocurrency payment invoice in response to receiving the peer-to-peer payment request, generating an invitation in response to payment of the cryptocurrency payment invoice, the invitation to be transmitted wirelessly to the recipient using the unique identifier, receiving, from a second electronic device, an acceptance of the invitation and one or more items of new user information associated with the recipient, generating a digital payment card in the name of the recipient in response to receiving the acceptance and the new user information, the digital payment card including a card number pulled from a bank identification number (BIN) range, and, after said generating the digital payment card, crediting the payment amount to the recipient.

title: Distributed blockchain with delayed transaction
abstract: A method for delaying a transaction to a recipient in a blockchain network may be provided. The blockchain network comprises a plurality of nodes for managing a distributed ledger for a crypto-currency. The method comprises also receiving a token and a time period value. The token represents an asset value transferrable from a sender identifiable by a sender identifier to the recipient identifiable by a receiver identifier. The method comprises additionally confirming a related asset value transfer by appending information about the asset value transfer as transaction information to a block in the blockchain network, denying the recipient's access to the transferred asset value by the recipient until the time period expires, and upon receiving a stop message within the time period defined by the time period value, permanently denying the recipient's access to the transferred asset value by the recipient.

title: Token transaction system using blockchain technology and method thereof
abstract: The present invention provides a token transaction system and method using blockchain technology, wherein a user does not need to prepare a secret key and additionally prepare an ether currency to pay a commission fee, the system can enable an application program of a user communication device to be connected with an enterprise in a more compact and real-time manner, and on the other hand, the user does not need to learn how to enter a blockchain network (e.g., ether house) transaction node webpage for direct operation. In the system, a user only needs to directly pay a commission charge by using the encrypted token of the transaction, and in the process of the transaction, the system establishes an intelligent contract of the encrypted token on a blockchain network to assist the user to verify the transaction content.

title: Blockchain-based set exchange method and apparatus for available resource quotas
abstract: Disclosed are a blockchain-based set exchange method and apparatus for available resource quotas. A blockchain network comprises a management node and object nodes, wherein each object node performs copyright use transactions by taking virtual resources issued by the management node as transaction media. One object node may serve as a user party to provide the virtual resources in some copyright use events, or may serve as a creation party to receive the virtual resources in some copyright use events. For any object node set, when the object node set is selected as a target object by the management node, each object node in the object node set is capable of acquiring certain available resource quotas for determining earning increments corresponding to the object node itself. In addition, the available resource quotas distributed to one object node need to be exchanged by using the virtual resources possessed by the object node.

title: Credit record sharing method and device based on block chain and electronic equipment
abstract: One or more embodiments of the present specification provide a block chain-based credit record sharing method and apparatus, and an electronic device, where the method may include: target node equipment in the block chain collects user credit records which are broadcast and issued to the block chain by each node equipment in the block chain in the current accounting period and are verified by each node equipment in the block chain together; initiating consensus processing of the collected user credit records in the blockchain to determine a billing node device; and if the target node device is determined to be a billing node, issuing a block broadcast created based on the collected user credit records to the block chain for storage in a distributed database of the block chain.

title: Generate the method and device of key
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of method and devices for generating key.Wherein, this method comprises: generating the target data of block chain Accounting system according to predetermined target mnemonic word；Private key data is generated based on above-mentioned target data；Public key data is generated based on the basic point in above-mentioned private key data and Target ellipse curve；The target cipher key data of above-mentioned block chain Accounting system are determined according to above-mentioned private key data and above-mentioned public key data, wherein above-mentioned target cipher key data are used to carry out encryption and decryption processing to the target account address in above-mentioned block chain Accounting system.The technical issues of present invention solves that the key data safety generated in the prior art is lower and key data inconvenient memory.

title: Binding block chain e-ticket and e-ticket trading system Trading Method
abstract: An electronic ticket transaction system combined with a blockchain and an electronic ticket transaction method for electronic consumption by at least one consumer to at least one operator. The electronic ticket transaction system includes a transaction server, an encryption server group, At least one operator's operation unit and at least one consumer's operation unit, first receive a set of commodity data by the transaction server, and generate a set of corresponding blockchain tickets from the encryption server group and provide them to the consumer operation unit. When a consumer conducts a commodity transaction, the operator obtains the blockchain ticket from the consumer operation unit through the operator operation unit. Finally, the transaction server performs decryption verification to determine whether the blockchain ticket obtained by the operator is correct. If it is correct, the transaction The server asks for payment cancellation of the blockchain ticket.

title: Method of prevention of forgery and theft of photo
abstract: The present invention relates to a method of preventing the forgery and piracy of photos capable of securing the reliability of a secondhand article to be traded while securing convenience for both a seller and a purchaser on the trade of the secondhand article. To achieve the purpose, the method of preventing the forgery and piracy of photos includes the following steps of: obtaining a first photo of a product through an exclusive application; creating a first hash key with the first photo and encrypting metadata of the first photo with a private key; storing the first hash key and the encrypted metadata in a server of a blockchain network; creating a second hash key with a second photo; obtaining a public key and the metadata stored in the server with the second hash key; decrypting the metadata with the public key; and outputting the decrypted metadata and information about whether the second photo is genuine through a display including a webpage.

title: SQL data real-time processing method and device based on Flink, computer equipment and medium
abstract: The application belongs to the field of data processing, and discloses a method and a device for SQL data real-time processing based on Flink, computer equipment and a readable storage medium. Storing data input by a user in a tidb through a client, classifying SQL sentences in an SQL data table in a flink cluster to obtain classified SQL sentences, and correspondingly packaging the classified SQL sentences to generate operation operators; and then, generating an arithmetic sub-stream after the operation operators are connected in series according to the inherent logic of the SQL statement, and submitting the arithmetic sub-stream to a taskmanager for execution, thereby realizing the real-time processing of the SQL data. By adopting the method to package the SQL statement, a user can write a large amount of Java codes by replacing fewer SQL codes, and the technical problem that the implementation of SQL data processing through flink in the prior art is complex is solved. The application also relates to blockchain techniques, and the user-entered data may be stored in blockchain nodes.

title: A program for processing information
abstract: A program according to an embodiment of the present invention is stored in a medium to perform the functions of: being connected, as a node, to a blockchain network providing a cryptocurrency transaction; receiving account information and transaction amount information of a remittee for the blockchain network-based cryptocurrency transaction, and receiving use information for indicating a use designation or restriction of the transaction amount information; and generating a use restriction code corresponding to the use information, and sharing, on the blockchain network, the cryptocurrency transaction information including node information of the remittee and the use restriction code.

title: Method for Providing Asynchronous Reverse Direction Payment by using Affiliated Store's Mobile Device with Radio Signal Sending and Blockchain
abstract: The present invention relates to an asynchronous reverse payment method using a blockchain and a wireless terminal of an affiliated store transmitting a wireless signal. The method executed through a management server able to communicate with a wireless terminal of a user includes: a first step of interconnecting a pre-formed blockchain network; a second step of receiving a one-time identification (OTID); a third step of linking and storing transaction registration information and the OTID; a fourth step of receiving recognition information including the OTID; a fifth step of confirming transaction registration information able to be identified through the OTID; a sixth step of providing transaction information including a transaction amount; and a seventh step of generating a transaction book record including a payment result of payment result information.

title: Healthcare transaction validation via blockchain proof-of work, systems and methods
abstract: Healthcare transaction validation systems and methods are presented. Healthcare transactions associated with a stakeholder are compiled into a chain of healthcare transaction blocks. The chain can be considered a chronicle of person's healthcare path through life. When a transaction is conducted, the corresponding healthcare parameters (e.g., inputs, outputs, clinical evidence, outcomes, etc.) are sent to one or more validation devices. The devices establish a validity of the transaction and generate a new block via a proof-of-work principle. Once the new block has been calculated it can be appended to the stakeholder's health care blockchain.

title: System and methods to ensure asset and supply chain integrity
abstract: A system for tracking and recording the chain-of-custody for assets within a supply chain that creates a non-repudiatable electronic log of each custody transfer at each transfer point from initial creation, to final transfer or disposal. In one embodiment, the system uses encryption technology to register assets that are to be transferred and whose chain of custody is to be ensured. Through use of encryption key pairs and blockchain encryption technology, an electronic document is created in an encrypted transaction log updated at each change of custody point. At each such change of custody point, the new custodians who receive the product are provided with the information generated by the originator. By way of one example, because the system tracks all inputs and outputs to the system at each change of custody point, any alteration in product quantities are immediately identified, and a chain-of-custody integrity problem is identified.

title: A kind of data transmission method based on block chain, device and storage medium
abstract: The embodiment of the invention discloses a kind of data transmission method based on block chain, device and storage medium, the data to be transmitted of transmission node on the available block chain of the embodiment of the present invention, and determine the corresponding authorization node of the data to be transmitted；The data to be transmitted is divided into sensitive data and nonsensitive data according to preset strategy；The symmetric key of the sensitive data is generated, and the sensitive data is encrypted according to the symmetric key, obtains ciphertext data；The public key of the authorization node is obtained, and the symmetric key is encrypted according to the public key of the authorization node, symmetric key after being encrypted；Data are transmitted after generating encryption according to symmetric key after the ciphertext data, encryption and nonsensitive data；The authorization node is transferred to by the block chain by data are transmitted after the encryption.It is realized in the program and the sensitive data of block chain transmission is encrypted, reduce the risk of sensitive data leakage, improve the safety of data transmission.

title: Database malicious peer identification
abstract: An example operation may include one or more of receiving, by each of one or more peripheral peers of a blockchain network, a new block from an orderer peer, calculating a hash of the new block, determining the calculated hash is different than hashes from a majority of peripheral peers, determining that one or more blocks that correspond to the different hashes from the majority of peripheral peers are different from the new block, and in response ceasing committing blocks to the blockchain network.

title: Method and system for managing medical information platform by using blockchain, and non-transitory computer-readable recording medium
abstract: An aspect of the present invention provides a method for managing a medical information platform by using a blockchain, the method comprising the steps of: dynamically calculating an exchange ratio between tokens and points by making reference to at least one of an amount of points that a user is to exchange for tokens in a medical information platform, an amount of tokens that the user is to exchange for points in the medical information platform, an amount of tokens existing in a token pool managed by the medical information platform, and an amount of points pre-exchanged for tokens in the medical information platform; and providing the exchanged tokens or points to the user by making reference to the calculated exchange ratio therebetween.

title: A kind of digital encryption currency transfer method for block chain
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of digital encryption currency transfer methods for block chain, it include: user terminal to block chain network transmission digital encryption money transfer request, request includes first time stamp, the first private key signature of one or more and source transaction address and purpose transaction address；First private key signature is the private key signature of other users terminal；Block chain network reads digital encryption currency transition strategy according to source transaction address, and verifies to digital encryption money transfer request；Digital encryption currency transition strategy includes one or more first public keys and jump condition；First public key is the public key of other users terminal；If verifying is legal, digital encryption currency is transferred to purpose transaction address from source transaction address, and record trading activity, transaction terminates；Otherwise, transaction terminates.The present invention enables to user that digital encryption currency still can be used in the case where private key is lost, and avoids user by digital asset trustship in third-party platform, to improve safety.

title: System and method for processing tour event via block chain
abstract: The present invention relates to a blockchain-based tourism event processing system and method. The system comprises: a user terminal for receiving tourism event information, providing mission course route location information of a user, and receiving a blockchain point; a tourism event processing server for requesting rewards of the blockchain point for the user terminal to a blockchain network when tourism event mission execution is confirmed by creating and registering tourism events and receiving information on start and end locations of a tourism event mission course in which the user has participated; the blockchain network for generating a local blockchain point, providing the generated blockchain point to the user terminal, and storing and managing information on blockchain point transaction details; and a tourism company terminal for transmitting, to the blockchain network, blockchain point usage transaction information when a transaction using the provided blockchain point occurs in the user terminal. According to the present invention, tourism services and products can be activated, and advertising effects can be provided.

title: Blockchain-enhanced database
abstract: A blockchain processor may be coupled to a database. The blockchain processor may accept data for entry into the database. The blockchain processor may hash a first previously entered data block stored in the database at a first row address. The blockchain processor may combine the accepted data, the hash of the first previously entered data block, and an address of the previously entered data block into a new data block. The blockchain processor may store the new data block in the database.

title: Method for providing secret electronic voting service on the basis of blockchain with merkle tree structure by using zero knowledge proof algorithm, and voting coin minter server, voting token distributor server and voting supporting server using the same
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for providing a secret electronic voting service. Specifically, the invention relates to a method for registering voters and candidates, minting voting coins, distributing voting tokens, converting voting tokens into secret tokens, supporting secret voting with the secret tokens, and calculating the number of votes, and a voting coin minter server, a voting token distributor server, and a voting supporting server using the same. It is possible to make unauthorized copying or counterfeiting impossible.

title: Method, apparatus, and computer storage medium for blockchain system
abstract: Embodiments of the present disclosure provide methods, apparatuses, and computer storage media for a blockchain system. For example, a method performed in a node of a blockchain system is proposed. The method comprises the following steps: executing a distributed application in the blockchain system; obtaining data for the distributed application from outside the blockchain system through an application program interface provided in the distributed application; performing consensus on the acquired data with other nodes in the blockchain system to determine consensus data; and continuing to execute the distributed application using the identified data. By using the embodiment of the disclosure, the latest data can be obtained, and the cost of application execution is reduced.

title: Blockchain-based shared resource rental method and apparatus, and computer device
abstract: A blockchain-based shared resource rental method and apparatus, which are used in a shared rental system comprising a shared rental initiator terminal, a shared rental participant terminal, and a shared rental server terminal; the shared rental initiator terminal, the shared rental participant terminal, and the shared rental server terminal are all node devices of a blockchain. Said method comprises: a node device of a shared rental server acquires a first transaction transmitted by a node device of a shared rental initiator, the first transaction comprising information about target shared resources and identity information about the shared rental initiator; and invitation responses of other users are pushed to the node device of the shared rental initiator, so as to cause the shared rental initiator to transmit a second transaction to the blockchain.

title: Privileged entity consensus for digital asset creation
abstract: Embodiments of the present invention provide techniques for generating digital tokens corresponding to determined generated real-world assets in a consensus-based authorization framework. In various embodiments, a client device coupled to a real-world asset generating device can determine that a real-world asset has been generated, and based on the determination, generate a request transaction for a digital token corresponding to the determined generated real-world asset. The request can be stored on a distributed ledger so that privileged entities can determine that the request is pending approval. Privileged client devices associated with the privileged entities can then generate approval transactions for generating the digital token corresponding to the determined generated real-world asset. A smart contract stored on the blockchain can determine that each of the privileged entities have authorized the generation of the digital token so that the smart contract can generate the new token, and issue the token to the client device or a public key associated with the client device.

title: Blockchain-based invoice creation method apparatus, and electronic device
abstract: Computer-implemented methods, non-transitory, computer-readable media, and computer-implemented systems for creating blockchain-based invoices are provided. In a computer-implemented method, an invoice creation transaction for a target payment order is received by a node device in a tax blockchain. The invoice creation transaction includes an identifier of a first collection confirmation transaction whose certificate has been stored in the tax blockchain. The first collection confirmation transaction includes an identifier of a second collection confirmation transaction whose certificate has been stored in a payment blockchain. The first and second collection confirmation transaction are identified based on the identifiers of the first and second collection confirmation transaction, respectively. In response to detecting that collection confirmation data in the first collection confirmation transaction matches collection confirmation data in the second collection confirmation transaction, invoice creation logic declared in a predetermined smart contract is invoked to create an invoice for the target payment order.

title: Method and system for transferring data in a blockchain system
abstract: Embodiments of the present disclosure provide a method and system for transferring data in a blockchain system. The method may include: encrypting, by a first network node in the blockchain system, data into a first blockchain message using a first public key; providing, by the first network node, the first blockchain message to a blockchain; establishing, by the first network node, a computer protocol as an intelligent contract for the data transfer; receiving, by the first network node, a request from a second network node in the blockchain system to obtain the first blockchain message; encrypting, by the first network node, the data in the first blockchain message into a second blockchain message using a second public key according to the request.

title: Block chain supporting multiple one-way functions used for verification of blocks
abstract: This specification includes obtaining one or more transactions that are not stored in the blockchain; Determining whether a new hash function for the one or more transactions is needed; Preparing the new hash function; Generating block data for the one or more transactions; Calculating a hash value for the block data by the new hash function; Generating a block comprising the hash value and the block data; And transmitting the block to store the block in the block chain.

title: Systems and methods for providing block chain-based multifactor personal identity verification
abstract: Block chain-based multifactor personal identity verification is disclosed. A verification address (i.e. an address indicating a particular location on a blockchain) may be assigned to an individual having a previously verified identity, an identifier for the individual and unique data associated with the individual may be stored in the blockchain at the assigned verification address. A request to verify an individual’s identity is received from a client-side device, the request containing a received identifier and received unique data, the request indicating the verification address associated with the blockchain. The stored identifier and unique data in the blockchain are retrieved from the specific address and upon successful matching of the supplied and retrieved identifier and supplied and retrieved biometric information and a supplied private key matching the private key identity verification is successful. A verification transaction may be signed upon successful verification. The unique data information stored in the blockchain and received from the client may be biometric information or hashed biometric information. The signing step may utilize a private key related to the verification address. Previous verification may be performed using government issued identification of the individual. Another verification address storing second unique data may also be assigned.
text: Systems and methods for providing block chain-based multifactor personal identity verification Block chain-based multifactor personal identity verification is disclosed. A verification address (i.e. an address indicating a particular location on a blockchain) may be assigned to an individual having a previously verified identity, an identifier for the individual and unique data associated with the individual may be stored in the blockchain at the assigned verification address. A request to verify an individual’s identity is received from a client-side device, the request containing a received identifier and received unique data, the request indicating the verification address associated with the blockchain. The stored identifier and unique data in the blockchain are retrieved from the specific address and upon successful matching of the supplied and retrieved identifier and supplied and retrieved biometric information and a supplied private key matching the private key identity verification is successful. A verification transaction may be signed upon successful verification. The unique data information stored in the blockchain and received from the client may be biometric information or hashed biometric information. The signing step may utilize a private key related to the verification address. Previous verification may be performed using government issued identification of the individual. Another verification address storing second unique data may also be assigned.

title: Method, device and system for executing blockchain transactions in parallel
abstract: Disclosed are a method, device and system for executing blockchain transactions in parallel. According to an embodiment provided in the specification, if each of transactions in a block to be written is not a transaction for updating information stored in more than one storage address, each node in a blockchain network can organize the respective transactions in the block into at least two transaction queues, and simultaneously execute the transactions in each transaction queue.

title: Consumption-based licensing of network features based on blockchain transactions
abstract: Consumption-based licensing of network features based on blockchained transactions includes receiving, at a server having connectivity to a network including a plurality of network devices, a request from a particular network device of the plurality of network devices for a feature that is licensed in the network on a per-use basis. Feature-specific key blockchain elements and a feature-specific template are generated for the feature and at least one message that includes the feature-specific key blockchain elements and the feature-specific template is sent to the particular network device. The message enables the plurality of network devices to generate one or more blockchain transactions related to consumption of the feature when a usage interval associated with the feature expires.

title: Method and contract rewriting framework system for supporting smart contracts in a blockchain network
abstract: A method for A method for supporting smart contracts in a blockchain network, wherein the blockchain network is a distributed blockchain network having nodes, wherein each node that validates transactions runs a virtual machine for executing a smart contract, wherein a contract rewriting framework system is provided, wherein said contract rewriting framework system comprises a vulnerability detection tool, a rewriter tool and a deployment component, the method comprising: obtaining, by the deployment component, a permission to upgrade a smart contract, wherein said permission is granted to the deployment component by a creator and/or owner of the smart contract during a creation phase of the smart contract; retrieving, by the contract rewriting framework system, the smart contract from the blockchain network, wherein the smart contract is passed to the vulnerability detection tool; detecting, by the vulnerability detection tool, a vulnerability in the smart contract, wherein the vulnerability detection tool determines a type of the vulnerability and an instruction location of the vulnerability; rewriting, by the rewriter tool, the smart contract to include a patch for fixing the vulnerability, wherein a patched smart contract is generated by the rewriter tool based on the type of the vulnerability and the instruction location of the vulnerability; issuing, by the deployment component, an upgrade transaction including the patched smart contract to the blockchain network, such that the patched smart contract is deployed in the blockchain network. Furthermore, a corresponding contract rewriting framework system is disclosed.

title: Managing access by third parties to data in a network
abstract: Systems and methods for managing access to data in a network are provided. In embodiments, a method includes: receiving, by a computer device, a search request regarding data of a participant, the search request including participant parameters associated with the participant; generating, by the computer device, a record of data associated with the participant based on the search request; sending, by the computer device, a request for data to third party nodes of a blockchain system based on the search request and the record; receiving, by the computer device, results from the blockchain system, the results including at least one set of data from a first node of the third party nodes; and determining, by the computer device, that the set of data requires updating based on the results.

title: Offloaded chaincode execution for a database
abstract: An example operation may include one or more of determining, by a first blockchain peer, a chaincode transaction execution needs to be offloaded, receiving bids from one or more second blockchain peers to execute the chaincode transaction, selecting a bid corresponding to a second blockchain peer, executing, by the second blockchain peer corresponding to the selected bid, the chaincode transaction, receiving, by the first blockchain peer, executed chaincode transaction results, and updating a reputation for the second blockchain peer corresponding to the selected bid.

title: Systems and methods for organizing and sharing contact and calendar information
abstract: Some embodiments provide a system or a method to facilitate communication between people. The user can have control over which contact information fields are initially shared and subsequently updated with each contact. The system may also store information about when and how a contact was created. The system may also use blockchain to secure and store user information.

title: Server for determining issue amount of cryptocurrency based on block chain
abstract: The present invention relates to a server for determining an issuable quantity of cryptocurrency based on blockchain. The server obtains information on payment reserves prepared in advance for payment of a real economic value exchangeable in cryptocurrency, obtains market price information for the real economic value, and calculates an issuable quantity of the cryptocurrency based on the obtained information on the payment reserves and the market price information for the real economic value. The cryptocurrency is issues in a condition that the cryptocurrency may be converted from the other cryptocurrency and the cryptocurrency may be incinerated by payment of the real economic value.

title: Method for providing one-stop order, reservation, and payment service with non-face-to-face channel using qr code on blockchain based easy payment platform
abstract: A method of providing a non-face-to-face one-stop order reservation payment service using a blockchain simple payment platform-based QR code is provided, and when a user terminal scans a QR code located in a table in a store, it is mapped to the QR code and stored in an affiliate store, menu board, And extracting a table number, when selecting and ordering any one of the at least one menu list included in the menu board in the user terminal, performing a payment process using simple payment, and the result of the payment process. When the approval event is received with respect to, it includes the steps of transmitting the ordered and paid menu data and table number to the extracted affiliate store terminal.

title: An operation support system for donation based on block chain
abstract: The present invention relates to a blockchain-based donation operation support system, and more specifically, provides information about various donation foundations to donors who want to make a donation between the donor and the donation foundation that operates the donation, and at the same time, donation from the donor The donated money is converted into tokens on the blockchain network through a designated financial institution and transferred to the donation foundation, and the donation foundation distributes the tokens thus delivered to each beneficiary or beneficiary company, and the beneficiary or beneficiary company that received the token By establishing a donation operation support system that is operated to convert and use the tokens received at the time of use of the donations into cash at the designated financial institution, the donation history and donation foundation of the donor on the blockchain network in which token-type donations are distributed It is related to a blockchain-based donation operation support system that can clearly check the overall flow of donations at any time by transparently recording the donation usage history.

title: System and Method for Transaction of Block Chain Based Cryptocurrency
abstract: The present invention relates to a blockchain-based cryptocurrency trading system and trading method, and more particularly to a trading system and a trading method in cryptocurrency trading through a cryptocurrency exchange.   The blockchain-based cryptocurrency trading system according to the present invention provides a price information management unit that manages exchange rate information between the first reference cryptocurrency and the second reference cryptocurrency, and the transaction between the first reference cryptocurrency and the second reference cryptocurrency. It includes a cryptocurrency trading unit that performs or manages. In this case, the first reference cryptocurrency is a blockchain-based cryptocurrency in which the exchange rate with the first real currency is fixed, and the second reference cryptocurrency has a fixed exchange rate with the second real currency different from the first real currency. It is a blockchain-based cryptocurrency.

title: Symmetric encryption for private smart contracts among multiple parties in a private peer-to-peer network
abstract: Features for providing a secure method of symmetric encryption for private smart contacts among multiple parties in a private peer-to-peer network. The features include a master key representing a unique blockchain ledger. The master key may be shared among multiple participants in a private peer-to-peer network. Sharing of the master key may include communicating the master key in an encrypted message (e.g., email) using public key infrastructure (PKI). In some implementations, more complex distribution features may be includes such as quantum entanglement. The features support instantiation of a smart contract using a specific master key. The request may be submitted as an entry to the ledger with appropriate metadata and/or payload information for identifying and processing the request.

title: Blockchain and dnssec-based user authentication method, system, device and medium
abstract: Provided in the present application are a blockchain and DNSSEC-based user authentication method, system, device, and medium, the method comprising: when a service end and a user end need to carry out Internet encrypted connection, identity authentication for the user end is carried out by the service end on the basis of an authentication mechanism of a blockchain, and identity authentication for the service end is carried out by the user end on the basis of a DNSSEC mechanism. According to the blockchain and DNSSEC-based user authentication method provided in the present application, bidirectional verification for an Internet encrypted connection process is achieved on the basis of blockchain and DNSSEC verification mechanisms without relying on CA authentication. Thus, neither the problem of CA single point faults nor the problem of multi-CA intercommunication risks exists. In addition, the blockchain and DNSSEC-based user authentication method provided in the present application is relatively convenient to implement.

title: Power transaction system
abstract: [Problem] To perform charging or trading by freely matching a supplier and a consumer while suitably evaluating the value of power. [Solution] According to the present invention, a user system 4 is provided with a smart meter 41 which measures a power amount that each user generates or consumes in each power usage period, and generates result data. A relay server 2 is provided with: a token issuing unit 24a which issues a power transaction token including a power usage period, a power amount, and a compensation amount; a token cancellation unit 24b which cancels the power transaction token; and a guarantee system cooperation unit 25b which cooperates with a guarantee system 6 that stores data pertaining to the issuance and cancellation of the power transaction token, wherein the guarantee system 6 is provided with a plurality of nodes 90a–90f for storing at least a portion of data generated by the user system and the relay server 2, aggregates and makes the stored data into blocks at a prescribed timing, forms a blockchain by using the blocks, and shares the blockchain in a plurality of nodes to store as a distribution ledger.
text: Power transaction system [Problem] To perform charging or trading by freely matching a supplier and a consumer while suitably evaluating the value of power. [Solution] According to the present invention, a user system 4 is provided with a smart meter 41 which measures a power amount that each user generates or consumes in each power usage period, and generates result data. A relay server 2 is provided with: a token issuing unit 24a which issues a power transaction token including a power usage period, a power amount, and a compensation amount; a token cancellation unit 24b which cancels the power transaction token; and a guarantee system cooperation unit 25b which cooperates with a guarantee system 6 that stores data pertaining to the issuance and cancellation of the power transaction token, wherein the guarantee system 6 is provided with a plurality of nodes 90a–90f for storing at least a portion of data generated by the user system and the relay server 2, aggregates and makes the stored data into blocks at a prescribed timing, forms a blockchain by using the blocks, and shares the blockchain in a plurality of nodes to store as a distribution ledger.

title: Bookkeeping method, mining pool server, terminal apparatus, mining node, and mining pool
abstract: A bookkeeping method, a mining pool server, a terminal apparatus, a mining node, and a mining pool, pertaining to the technical field of blockchains. The bookkeeping method comprises: a mining pool server receiving and storing a hash value of a main body of a block header and a target difficulty value sent by a mining node; the mining pool server receiving a bookkeeping request sent by a terminal apparatus; the mining pool server sending the hash value of the main body of the block header and the target difficulty value to the terminal apparatus, such that a slave TEE determines whether an accumulated unused duration is greater than a lower accumulated unused duration threshold, and if so, signs bookkeeping right confirmation information; and the mining pool server receiving the bookkeeping right confirmation information sent by the terminal apparatus and a signature of the bookkeeping right confirmation information, and sending the two pieces of information to the mining node, such that the mining node generates a bookkeeping block and adds the bookkeeping block to a local blockchain. The method prevents waste of computational resources in slave TEEs, and reduces electrical energy consumption thereof.

title: Blockchain-based system and method for federated automated teller machine management
abstract: A server, a method and a distributed ledger network for processing a transaction request at an Automated Teller Machine (ATM) are disclosed. The ATM is a node in a distributed ledger network. The server is managed by an issuer who is a party in the distributed ledger network. The distributed ledger network is configured to maintain a distributed ledger. The server comprises at least one processor and at least one memory including computer program code. The memory and the computer program code configured to, with the one processor, cause the server at least to receive, from the ATM, the transaction request comprising an encrypted identifier associated with an account and a transaction amount, decrypt the encrypted identifier using a decryption key that is associated with the distributed ledger network to identify an issuer which issues the account, and process the transaction request in response to the decryption.

title: Method and system for referral fraud prevention via blockchain
abstract: A method for preventing account referral fraud includes: receiving a referral request, the request including a referring account identifier; transmitting a digital signature corresponding to the referral request to a processing server; verifying, by the processing server, the digital signature using a public key; identifying a plurality of blockchain data values included in a blockchain using the public key, wherein each data value is related to a blockchain transaction involving a blockchain wallet associated with the public key; generating an authenticity score for the blockchain wallet based on data included in the plurality of blockchain data values; receiving, by the referral server, the authenticity score from the processing server; and processing the referral request based on the authenticity score, wherein processing the referral request includes one of: declining the referral and awarding a referral reward.

title: A kind of resource transaction method and electronic purse system
abstract: The embodiment of the present invention provides a kind of resource transaction method and electronic purse system, is related to block chain and biometrics field, which includes：After this transaction initiation of target resource, second terminal sends resource request to first terminal；Trading order form of the first terminal according to resource request generation for target resource, signs trading order form using the first private key used with the pairing of the first public key, and the trading order form signed is sent to block scm cluster with broadcast mode；Block scm cluster carries out signature verification using the first public key to the trading order form that is received, in signature verification by rear, generates and stores transaction journal record corresponding with trading order form；After transaction journal records successfully storage, resource management server is completed to be directed to the resource transaction of target resource in sender's stored value card and recipient's stored value card.The security of the stored value card of user in electronic transaction process is improved using scheme provided in an embodiment of the present invention.

title: Blockchain logging of data from multiple systems
abstract: In some examples, a first node is able to communicate with one or more second nodes for participating in a consensus system. The first node may receive a plurality of pieces of sequential data from a plurality of data sources. The first node may generate a block for a first blockchain that includes a plurality of the pieces of sequential data in the block. Based at least partially on determining that the data source of the last piece of sequential data entered in the block for the first blockchain is different from a data source of the next piece of the sequential data, the first node may generate a block for a second blockchain that includes the next piece of the sequential data, and may further associate an indicator with the block generated for the second blockchain that indicates the block in the first blockchain.

title: Dynamic compression and access method of block chain
abstract: The invention relates to digital cash, such as Bitcoin wallet software, in particular to a dynamic compression and access method of a block chain. The dynamic compression and access method comprises the following steps: operating a digital cash wallet program; when new block data is written into the block chain in an operation process of the digital cash wallet program, dynamically compressing the block data; creating identification information on the compressed block data; and then, when the digital cash wallet program is operated, storing the compressed block which creates the identification information into a block chain database. In the operation process of the digital cash wallet program, the block is dynamically decompressed through an embedded compression function, meanwhile, the compressed block is decompressed through the embedded decompression function, the volume of the whole block chain data becomes small under a premise that data is not damaged, and a storage space is greatly saved; and in addition, the transmission speed of the block chain data is improved, and transmission time is shortened.

title: Trust network system based block-chain
abstract: When inflow of traffic, the connection information of the sender is compared with the white / black list previously stored in the distributed ledger, and the connection or blocking is determined. If the connection information does not match the white / black list, the connection or blocking is determined through traffic analysis. Consensus Participation on a plurality of trust network devices and a fast diagnosis result (white or black) corresponding to connection or disconnection by the traffic analysis As a result of the first agreement of the trust network device, whether or not according to expert judgment and the participant trust network And an infrastructure support system for determining a second agreement result according to the agreement of the device, wherein the plurality of trust network devices record in the distributed ledger upon receiving the first agreement result, and then distribute the received second agreement result. The blockchain-based trust network system, characterized in that it is additionally recorded and updated in the ledger All.

abstract: This application discloses a kind of block verification methods, are applied to block chain technical field, comprising: receive new block, the new block includes the location information for generating the node of the new block；The location information of the node is verified for confirming the new block.Method disclosed by the invention can reduce the influence for calculating the decentralization block chain network that power is concentrated to dependence proof of work mechanism.

title: Method and system for offline data transfer via machine-readable code
abstract: A method for offline transmission of blockchain details, comprising: storing, in the computing device, the first private key and the monetary amount; receiving a first destination address and a transaction amount associated with a blockchain network; generating a second private key; generating a second destination address associated with the blockchain network using a second private key; generating a blockchain transaction including at least the first destination address, the transaction amount, the second destination address, and a remainder amount based at least on the currency amount and the transaction amount; signing the generated blockchain transaction using a first private key; performing the query to replace the first private key with a second private key, wherein replacing the first private key comprises deleting the first private key from the computing device; and transmitting the generated blockchain transaction.

title: Decentralized marketplace and ecosystem powered by blockchain-based document delivery, collaboration, and dissemination
abstract: Disclosed herein are system, method, and computer program product embodiments for managing documents using a blockchain. A token server system may facilitate the creation of a document. The token server system may encrypt and store an encrypted version of the document and create a link to the encrypted version of the document. The token server system may also create a cryptographic hash of the document as well as a document token for depositing in a digital wallet to designate ownership of the document. The token server system may publish the link and the hash to a blockchain using one or more smart contract functions. In some embodiments, the document may be a contract. The token server system may facilitate modifications to the document from other parties. The modifications may represent counteroffers or a negotiation process.

title: System for managing serializability of resource transfers in a process data network
abstract: Systems, computer program products, and methods are described herein for a system for using the block chain distributed network for managing serializability of resource transfers in a process data network. The present invention is configured to electronically receive an indication from a computing system associated with a first user that the first user has executed a transfer of resources with a second user; retrieve information associated with the transfer of resources from the first user; retrieve information associated with a block chain of user information associated with the first user; transmit a notification to a computing system associated with the second user to validate the transfer of resources; receive an input from the second user validating the transfer of resources; and update the block chain of user information with the validated transfer of resources based on at least receiving the input from the second user.

title: Alchcoin advertisement apparatus and method based on block chain
abstract: The present invention relates to a distributed ledger device, a distributed ledger method, a transaction information broadcast device and a method thereof for blockchain-based altcoin advertising. To this end, a blockchain-based altcoin advertising method comprises: a token holding confirmation step of checking whether an altcoin account has a token; a mining information reception step of receiving mining information tracked for mining performed by a particular cryptocurrency user for the altcoin account; a reward calculation step of calculating reward information which is a token to be remitted to the cryptocurrency user account based on a reward condition information included in the mining information and the altcoin information; and a reward transfer step of generating a reward transfer transaction for transferring the token corresponding to the reward information from the altcoin advertisement account to the cryptocurrency user account and storing the reward information in the altcoin advertisement account. Accordingly, users can acquire altcoin only by installing and using the mobile application. In addition, the present invention allows users to secure the altcoin only by investing time without prior knowledge, initial capital investment and separate mining equipment. Moreover, the altcoin developers can acquire a genuine user by advertising the altcoin without executing the advertising fee.

title: Blockchain-implemented method and system
abstract: The invention provides a computer-implemented control method and corresponding system. The method may control or influence a device, system or other resource such as a technical process. The invention can provide a mechanism for emulating or otherwise executing the functionality of a logic gate via a computer-based distributed ledger (blockchain). This may be the Bitcoin blockchain or an alternative network/protocol. The invention provides logic embedded within a redeem script such that it determines which particular private keys have been used to sign an unlocking script, and then interprets the provision of those keys in accordance with a predetermined function. In a preferred embodiment, the method may comprise the steps of providing a blockchain Transaction comprising a redeem script for an output, wherein the redeem script: i) specifies a plurality of public keys, each associated with a corresponding private key; and wherein each public key is uniquely associated with a potential state of at least one data source; and ii) comprises logic arranged to provide a result based on which of the plurality of associated private key(s) is used to sign the unlocking script; wherein a minimum number of said private keys must be used to sign an unlocking script of a further blockchain Transaction in order to spend the output. Preferably, the logic is arranged to implement the functionality of a logic gate such as a NOT, AND, OR, NOR, XOR, IMPLY, NAND, NONIMPLY or XNOR gate.

title: A method for providing marketing services based on influencers using blockchains
abstract: A method for providing an influencer-based marketing service according to an embodiment of the present invention includes the steps of performing a smart contract-based marketing contract execution processing between an influencer terminal and an advertiser device and registering it on a blockchain; Collecting step-by-step behavior information of a user terminal that has received the target application information of the marketing contract through the content provided from the influencer terminal; And providing compensation information corresponding to the marketing effect calculated according to the approval process corresponding to the stepwise action information to the influencer terminal through the block chain.

title: Sample collection method, device, equipment and medium based on distributed system
abstract: The embodiment of the application discloses a sample acquisition method, a sample acquisition device, sample acquisition equipment and a sample acquisition medium based on a distributed system, and relates to the technical field of data acquisition. The method comprises the following steps: receiving a sample acquisition instruction, and setting a timing acquisition task; acquiring equipment information of acquisition equipment and synchronizing the equipment information to locally stored equipment information of historical acquisition equipment; triggering a timing acquisition task; reading equipment information of target acquisition equipment to acquire an equipment identifier; identifying target acquisition equipment, establishing communication connection, accessing the target acquisition equipment to acquire a video stream of the target acquisition equipment, and capturing a plurality of sample data from the video stream for storage. The application also relates to a blockchain technique for storing sample data to a blockchain network. According to the method, through reasonable time period arrangement in a real scene and the fixed-time starting of the sample data of the distributed task snapshot scene, not only is automatic sample collection realized, the operation amount of workers is reduced, but also the speed and the quality of sample collection are greatly improved.

title: Block chain data storage method and device
abstract: The application discloses a method and a device for storing blockchain data, wherein in response to transaction data obtained, a blockchain light node processes the transaction data, and submits the processed transaction data to a blockchain network through a data interface of the light node; responding to the data interface of the block chain whole node to receive transaction data, processing the transaction data by the block chain whole node, and sending the processed transaction data to a consensus verification node in the block chain; in response to the verification result of the block chain consensus verification node indicating that the verification is passed, the block chain full node stores and broadcasts the blocks passing the consensus verification; and updating the storage mode of the transaction data by the block chain light node. And further solve the technical problems of low data storage efficiency and low storage utilization rate of the block chain in the related technology.

title: Database private document sharing
abstract: Example operations include one or more of: generating, by a first blockchain client, a transaction for delivering a document to a blockchain network; transferring, by the second blockchain client, the first key to the first blockchain client through a private channel, the private channel providing a point-to-point connection between the first blockchain client and the second blockchain client; encrypting the document using the shared key; transmitting, by the first blockchain client, the encrypted document through the private channel; generating, by the second blockchain client, a transaction for confirming receipt of the encrypted document; and passes the shared key encrypted with the first key.

title: Future forecast platform service system in which block chain money is generated by the activity of participant
abstract: The present invention relates to a future prediction platform providing service system in which a blockchain currency is generated by the activity of a participant. According to the present invention, a blockchain server providing a future prediction platform; An administrator terminal interworking with the blockchain server to manage a future prediction platform; In connection with the blockchain server, the platform uses a terminal that purchases the time and space of the future prediction platform through auction and proposes a game, and works in the future prediction platform in connection with the blockchain server, in the proposed game It includes a participant terminal that receives one of the prediction provision information including the bet amount and voting information for the prediction provision information and transmits it to the blockchain server, wherein the blockchain server uses the platform terminal and the participant terminal to receive coins. A coin trading module that allows purchase; Generating the coin according to the activity of the participant terminal, distributing the generated coin to the manager terminal and the participant terminal, and distributing the coin to the participant terminal according to one of the game result and the prediction provision information and voting information Coin distribution module; Time and space distribution module for providing auction information of the future prediction platform to the platform using terminal and distributing the use time and space of the platform using terminal according to the final coin for the auction information, and the distributed platform using terminal Blockchain currency by the activity of the participant, including a game management module that provides a proposed game from the platform using terminal according to the usage time and space, and receives one of the prediction provision information and voting information from the participant terminal. It is possible to provide a future prediction platform providing service system.

title: Method and device for medical information sharing privacy protection based on blockchain technology
abstract: The invention discloses a method and device for medical information sharing privacy protection based on a blockchain technology. According to the method, in aspects of privacy protection based on a blockchain technology, medical data on-chain and off-chain storage and forced privacy protection safety multiparty calculation, illegal medical data obtaining, use and tampering are avoided, and medical information sharing, big data analysis and utilization and patient privacy protection are implemented. The device comprises a data storage module, a service module provided based on the blockchain technology and a call service module provided externally, wherein a three-layer data storage frame is adopted for the data storage module; and the service module provided based on the blockchain technology mainly comprises forced privacy protection safety multiparty calculation. The method and device for medical information sharing privacy protection based on the blockchain technology are mainly applied to the fields of method and device for medical information sharing privacy protection based on a blockchain technology and medical big data analysis and the like, and technical guarantee is also provided for patient privacy protection while medical information sharing is achieved based on the blockchain technology.

title: Systems for regulating authority of the private key in blockchain and method thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to a system for regulating authority of a private key of blockchain and a method thereof. The method for regulating authority of a private key of blockchain performed by a blockchain system including a state database for storing results of transactions of blockchain comprises the steps of: a) adding an account hash for storing an address of a smart contract to the state database; and b) paying money according to a preset condition from a multi-signature wallet when a transaction request is occurred from the account hash if a smart contract address is stored in the account hash and performing general payment if the smart contract address is not stored in the account hash.

title: Method for applying transaction rules of cryptocurrency based on block chain, terminal device and computer program using it
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for applying a transaction rule based on blockchain and a terminal device and a program for performing the same. The method comprises the steps of: receiving a request for transmission for transaction of cryptocurrency; checking rating information of a trader requesting the transmission; checking a transaction rule corresponding to the checked rating information according to content of a smart contract related to the cryptocurrency; and determining whether to permit the transmission of the cryptocurrency based on the checked transaction rule.

title: Systems and Methods for Charitable Giving Using Blockchain Cryptocurrency
abstract: Systems and methods for storing and managing blockchain transactions may include receiving a transaction request on a distributed ledger transaction machine that is part of a distributed ledger network including distributed ledger transaction machines, each storing an identical copy of a blockchain. The method may include extracting percentage allocations for each transaction in the transaction request as well as a set of identifying information indicating a charitable owner for at least one of the transactions. The method may further include recording a first transaction in a block on the distributed ledger transaction machine, which can be freely exchanged and transferred on the distributed ledger network and is unmarked, and a second transaction on the block on the distributed ledger transaction machine, including restricting the second transaction via a marking in the second transaction's data where the marking enables a centralized machine to control access and use of the second transaction.

title: Computer-Implemented Method And System Of Tamper-Evident Recording Of A Plurality Of Service Data Items
abstract: A computer-implemented method and a corresponding system of tamper-evident recording of a plurality of service data items are provided. Each service data item is associated with a data item verification fingerprint. A processing routine is conducted, in which an aggregated verification fingerprint is computed from at least a plurality of data item verification fingerprints using at least one one-way compression function, so that the aggregated verification fingerprint has a bit length, which is less than a bit length of a concatenation of the data item verification fingerprints. The aggregated verification fingerprint is then stored in at least one blockchain, so that a tamper-evident verification of each service data item is possible, while the storage of the aggregated verification fingerprint is decoupled from the service data items.

title: Systems, methods, and devices for reducing and/or eliminating data leakage in electronic ledger technologies for trustless order matching
abstract: The disclosure herein relates to systems, methods, and devices for reducing and/or eliminating data leakage in electronic ledger technologies, such as centralized ledger, distributed ledger technology (DLT) or blockchain-based platforms, for trustless order matching. In particular, in some embodiments, the systems, methods, and devices described herein utilize cryptographic commitments to assign priorities to orders without disclosing the contents of the actual order or plaintext data. In some embodiments, the plaintext data is revealed only after the priorities are assigned to the cryptographic commitments, thereby reducing and/or eliminating potential data leakage that can arise in such electronic ledger platforms or networks. Further, in some embodiments, the subsequently revealed plaintext data can be used to regenerate the cryptographic commitment to verify its correlation. As such, some systems, methods, and devices described herein can provide a trustless order matching system for electronic ledger technologies, such as DLT or blockchain-based platforms.
text: Systems, methods, and devices for reducing and/or eliminating data leakage in electronic ledger technologies for trustless order matching The disclosure herein relates to systems, methods, and devices for reducing and/or eliminating data leakage in electronic ledger technologies, such as centralized ledger, distributed ledger technology (DLT) or blockchain-based platforms, for trustless order matching. In particular, in some embodiments, the systems, methods, and devices described herein utilize cryptographic commitments to assign priorities to orders without disclosing the contents of the actual order or plaintext data. In some embodiments, the plaintext data is revealed only after the priorities are assigned to the cryptographic commitments, thereby reducing and/or eliminating potential data leakage that can arise in such electronic ledger platforms or networks. Further, in some embodiments, the subsequently revealed plaintext data can be used to regenerate the cryptographic commitment to verify its correlation. As such, some systems, methods, and devices described herein can provide a trustless order matching system for electronic ledger technologies, such as DLT or blockchain-based platforms.

title: Apparatus and method for providing blockchain-based cryptocurrency transaction service linked to stem cell service value
abstract: Disclosed are an apparatus and a method for providing a blockchain-based cryptocurrency transaction service linked to a stem cell service value, the apparatus and the method enabling a membership value by which a stem cell storage and use service can be used to be linked to a cryptocurrency value during the distribution transaction of blockchain-based cryptocurrency data. The disclosed apparatus, as an apparatus for providing a cryptocurrency transaction service on the basis of a blockchain network, comprises: a first cryptocurrency management unit for issuing first cryptocurrency; and a transaction service unit for providing a transaction service of the first cryptocurrency, wherein the first cryptocurrency management unit performs holding amount management processing according to the transaction service, and the first cryptocurrency can be exchanged with a membership use ticket issued under a condition that can be cancelled by providing a membership service corresponding to a stem cell service value according to a reserve requirement process on the basis of holding amount information according to the holding amount management processing.

title: Blockchain database-based method and terminal for authenticating user non-face-to-face by utilizing mobile id, and server utilizing method and terminal
abstract: The present invention, with respect to a method for executing a non-face-to-face authentication by utilizing a mobile ID, is characterized in that, in the state in which a user authentication certificate is registered in a blockchain database and a transaction ID corresponding thereto is being managed, an authentication server, when a mobile ID authentication request data is acquired, confirms the user authentication certificate, supports so that a non-face-to-face authentication is requested by a user terminal from a service server, and transmits results of the particular mobile ID verification, which is in accordance with whether a user signature value is valid, to the service server, thus supporting so that the verification results are referenced by the service server to execute a non-face-to-face authentication of the user.

title: Crypto taint tracking
abstract: A method for detecting and tracking tainted cryptographic wallets. The method measures a wallet's propensity to engage in criminal or suspicious activity. Naturally, transacting with a criminal is tantamount either to funding crime or laundering its proceeds, so it is in our collective interest to identify—and then monitor or quarantine—any wallet with criminal association. The method also automatically flags risky withdrawal requests in real-time for further review before committing them to the blockchain. In some embodiments, the exchange can quarantine wallets at a certain Walletscore.

title: Method for distributing profit of contents using block chain network and computing device performing the same
abstract: The present invention discloses a method of distributing content revenue using a blockchain network and a computing device performing the same. The content revenue distribution method using a smart contract of the blockchain network includes a plurality of steps of allowing content revenue distribution to proceed according to an operating procedure linked with a smart contract operating in the blockchain network, and among the plurality of steps In at least one step, a request packet that receives a content settlement request from a content contributor or a content user, and causes the node of the blockchain network or the smart contract to perform an operation corresponding to the settlement request from the content contributor or the content user Is generated and transmitted to the blockchain network, wherein the plurality of steps include registering content received from a content provider in the smart contract, and setting contribution information for each contributor for the profit distribution of the content in the smart contract Receiving a request for use of the content from the content user, and transmitting a token corresponding to the content usage time of the content user to the account of the smart contract; and the token accumulated in the account of the smart contract And dispensing.
