title: Data interaction system based on block chain technology
abstract: The invention relates to an internal data interaction system based on a blockchain technology, which comprises a blockchain network and a data interaction platform established based on the blockchain network, wherein the platform at least comprises a first terminal wallet and at least one second terminal wallet; the functionality of the first terminal wallet is configured to: generating and storing a first pass certificate, and distributing the first pass certificate to a second terminal wallet according to a preset rule; the functionality of the second terminal wallet is configured to: receiving a first pass certificate distributed by the first terminal wallet according to a preset rule, and generating and storing the first pass certificate; when data interaction is carried out in the data interaction platform, the first terminal wallet can acquire the first certificate transferred by the second terminal wallet in a converted form, and the first certificate in the first terminal wallet cannot be transferred to the second terminal wallet in a converted form. The system can be suitable for multiple dimensions in the data interaction process in an enterprise, and meets the requirements of all data interaction of the enterprise.

title: Financial Transaction Platform Based on Block Chain Technology
abstract: The present invention relates to a financial transaction platform based on blockchain technology, and it is expected to provide a decentralized service through a blockchain, so that remittances can be made very quickly and at a significantly lower commission rate than before. If you move to a cashless society, you can expect to see a dramatic change in the global financial system, so the existing fees are high, and it takes much longer than the domestic remittance to complete or remittance when the transaction stops due to hacking of the cryptocurrency exchange. This is to solve the problem of the impossibility of service and severe price volatility of existing cryptocurrency.   That is, the present invention is an investment made by each user so that the user can check the details of the activity on the platform in remittance through the interbank swift system, remittance through his own bank network, and overseas remittance using cryptocurrency (ex) Bitcoin. , E-wallet configured to aggregate shopping and show related information in detail, various services can be processed through a single website to enable users to perform various economic activities using the assets of the wallet, and to prevent confusion Platform configured to be processed through the banner on the homepage, platform server configured as a decentralized information processing system by forming a node block through blockchain technology to enable users to conduct transactions requested by the platform, and information processed by the platform server You can recommend to each service user using existing information. A behavior prediction system configured to analyze data through a separate server so that it can automatically analyze big data and produce results.It is a currency that can be used in a blockchain platform, and the price is constant and can be exchanged on the platform. Exchange system configured to exchange between real currency and currency available on the platform using a self-certification system, domestic and foreign stock and bond investment (including peer-to-peer investment), shopping, and remittance through the money transfer service using 130 currencies It is composed of a blockchain-based fintech service that allows domestic and foreign branches to take charge of financial business through a network so that they can exchange money, etc., and introduces an automated system to quickly process major tasks.   Therefore, the present invention provides a decentralized service through a blockchain, so it is possible to send money in a very short time with a significantly lower commission rate than before, and also the check time and frequency are expected to be significantly reduced. Existing fees are high by making it possible to expect a breakthrough in the system, and it takes much longer than domestic remittance until completion or remittance service is not possible when the transaction is stopped due to hacking of the cryptocurrency exchange, severe price of existing cryptocurrency It has the effect of solving the problem of variability.

title: Communication method, device and system for digital asset transaction
abstract: The application discloses a communication method, a device and a system for digital asset transaction. According to the technical scheme, a transaction initiator and a transaction receiver communicate with each other, the transaction initiator sends related information of digital asset transaction to the transaction receiver, when the transaction receiver confirms that the transaction can be carried out, the transaction initiator completes the transaction of the digital asset in a blockchain, the transaction initiator sends transaction information to the transaction receiver, and after the transaction receiver confirms that the transaction is completed, a transaction receipt is sent back to the transaction initiator. Therefore, the technical scheme of the application can confirm whether the digital assets and the transaction meet the supervision requirements or not in the process of communication between two transaction parties, and confirm whether each message or data is fictitious or not through the serial numbers in the communication information of the two transaction parties, so that the safety of the digital asset transaction is ensured from multiple aspects.

title: System for external validation of secure process transactions
abstract: A closed-loop system is operatively connected with a block chain distributed network for using the block chain distributed network for facilitating operation of a transaction record sharing system between member institutions comprising a host system and a source system. Host and source institutions function to share the transaction records from member institutions such that a host institution that is a member of the block chain may obtain the transaction records of all source institutions of the block chain. The transaction records are validated on the block chain such that the transaction records are secure represent a source of truth.

title: System for security enforced crypto currency based on block chain
abstract: The present invention relates to a blockchain-based security-enhanced cryptocurrency system, which tracks transactions of cryptocurrencies in the blockchain-based cryptocurrency system so that anonymity is guaranteed because individuals cannot be specified, thereby safely using the service. It is about a cryptocurrency system with enhanced security based on a blockchain that enables it.

title: Method and apparatus for issuing reward to work publisher based on blockchain
abstract: A method and apparatus for issuing a reward to a work publisher based on a blockchain. A blockchain network comprises multiple service nodes, wherein each of the service nodes has permission to publish a work to a blockchain; and the multiple service nodes take virtual resources as transaction media therebetween to perform copyright-related transactions. For a service node that publishes a work, a reward is issued to the service node by means of a consensus mechanism in a blockchain network, such that virtual resources corresponding to the service node are increased.

title: Carbon footprint blockchain network
abstract: An example operation may include one or more of storing a plurality of transactions in a carbon footprint blockchain, each stored transaction including one or more items and a carbon footprint associated with the one or more items included in the transaction, receiving a transaction processing request from a merchant terminal, the transaction processing request including an identification of an item and a user identification, executing chaincode which determines an aggregate carbon footprint of the user based on a carbon footprint of the item and a carbon footprint of one or more previous purchases of the user stored in the carbon footprint blockchain, and transmitting information about the determined aggregate carbon footprint of the user to the merchant terminal.

title: Operating system for blockchain IOT devices
abstract: The invention provides a generic operating system for coordinating, controlling and/or influencing the activities of a device. The invention is implemented using a blockchain platform with which the operating system is arranged to interact. The blockchain may be the Bitcoin blockchain. In a preferred embodiment, the device is an Internet of Things (IOT) device. The invention provides a computer-implemented control system and corresponding method for controlling a device, the system comprising a device configured for wireless communication with a network and having an IP address and a public-private key cryptographic key pair associated with the device; a software-implemented control component arranged to monitor the state of a blockchain network and/or transmit blockchain Transactions to the blockchain network; and a set of instructions arranged for execution by the control component to control the functionality of the device. The control component is arranged to access the set of instructions from a stored location which is separate to the device. The instructions may be stored in a Distributed Hash Table (DHT) and accessed for download and installation by the control component from the DHT as and when needed. The location of the DHT and/or instructions may be indicated or provided using metadata provided within a blockchain transaction. The set of instructions may be accessed by the control component using a look-up key which is related to a cryptographic key pair. The control component is provided on or in the device, or in other embodiments can be provided in an off-device location and arranged for wireless communication with the device.

title: Private data processing method, device, equipment and storage medium of block chain
abstract: The application discloses a method, a device, equipment and a storage medium for processing private data of a block chain, relates to the technical field of block chains, and can be used for cloud computing and cloud services. The specific implementation scheme is as follows: acquiring a data authorization request sent by a data owner; the data authorization request comprises data to be authorized and a block chain account address of a data user, and the data to be authorized at least comprises encrypted data; in a trusted computing environment, according to a block chain account address of a data user, performing authorization processing on encrypted data in data to be authorized to obtain a data use certificate of authorized data or data to be authorized; and sending a uplink transaction request of the data use certificate comprising the authorized data or the data to be authorized to the blockchain network for uplink storage. To reduce the complexity of the management of the rights to the private data.

title: Method and system for interacting public and private blockchains with controlled participation
abstract: A method for controlling participation in a blockchain based on time includes: storing participant profiles, each including a public key of a cryptographic key pair and a period of time; storing a blockchain comprised of a plurality of blocks, each including at a block header and data values; receiving a block submission from a specific computing system including a digital signature and a new data value; verifying the digital signature based on the public key stored in a specific participant profile related to the specific computing system; verifying that the specific computing system is eligible for participation in the blockchain based on the period of time included in the specific participant profile and a present time; generating a new block comprised of a block header and the new data value; and transmitting the generated new block to nodes associated with the blockchain.

title: Reward systems and methods that employ blockchain and digital crypto tokens to reward users within an organization
abstract: A system is provided that includes a distributed database system (DDS) and a cloud computing platform that includes a reward system. The DDS includes a network of blockchain nodes that collectively store a distributed ledger of a blockchain. The DDS can also store a pool of digital crypto tokens for an organization and control distribution of the digital crypto tokens to users associated with the organization via a smart contract module that validates transactions involving the digital crypto tokens using smart contracts for each transaction to directly control peer-to-peer transfer of transferrable digital crypto tokens between the users under certain conditions. The reward system includes a reward module that can issue granted digital crypto tokens to users as a reward when they perform certain tasks. Each granted digital crypto token quantifies time spent performing a certain task and serves as a currency within the organization.

title: Shop platform using blockchain
abstract: Disclosed herein are system, method, and computer program product embodiments for tracking shop information using blockchain. In an embodiment, a shop application system may gather information related to a shop using various sensors within the shop. For example, the shop application system may identify a flow rate of traffic within the shop or outside of the shop. The shop application system may securely transmit this information to a blockchain cloud platform to be stored onto a blockchain. The blockchain may also maintain store information from a client application system related to shop ownership or tenancy. In this manner, the blockchain may provide a public means for accessing transactions related to a shop as well as provide confidence in the information provided.

abstract: The present invention relates to a server for controlling the readiness rate for payment of a blockchain-based cryptocurrency, which server is prepared in advance for obtaining market capitalization information of the first cryptocurrency and to exchange real economic value that can be exchanged for the second cryptocurrency. Whether to process the sale of the internal holding amount among the first cryptocurrency issued based on at least one of the market capitalization information of the first cryptocurrency obtained and information about the reserve amount of the second cryptocurrency obtained, It is characterized by determining.

title: A method and system for verifying ownership of a digital asset using a distributed hash table and a peer-to-peer distributed ledger
abstract: A computer-implemented method (600) and system (1) for verifying ownership of a computer software for installation using a distributed hash table (13) and a peer-to-peer distributed ledger (14). This may be the Bitcoin blockchain or an alternative blockchain implementation. The method includes determining (610) a second user public key associated with a second user (24) from a transaction record stored on the peer-to-peer distributed ledger (14). A second public key associated with the second user may be determined (620) from an entry on the distributed hash table (13). The method further includes comparing (630) the second user public key and the second public key, and verifying (640) the ownership of the computer software based on the comparing of the second user public key and the second public key.

title: Decentralized Autonomous Edge Compute Coordinated by Smart Contract On A Blockchain
abstract: The systems, apparatus, methods, and computer program products described herein provide the capability for an entity to identify and autonomously contract via a blockchain database with an unknown and anonymous host device for access rights to a high volume raw data stream generated by a sensor of the host device. The systems, apparatus, methods, and computer program products further provide the capability for the entity to push or upload a software module to the host device to allow the entity to process the high volume raw data stream into a low volume data stream directly on the host device, i.e., at the source of the high volume raw data stream.

title: Methods and systems for blockchain smart contract in Hotspot 2.0 network for user authentication while roaming
abstract: Methods and systems of user authentication for roaming access to a wireless communications network, using blockchain, is described. A wireless access point (WAP) can provide roaming connectivity to a Wi-Fi network for a mobile device, for example at a public hotspot. The disclosed WAP is blockchain-enabled, allowing connectivity to a blockchain network. Accordingly, when a WAP receives a connection request to the Wi-Fi network, the WAP can execute a smart contract in the blockchain to determine whether a user of the mobile device is authenticated for roaming access to the Wi-Fi network. In some cases, the smart contract verifies that service providers of the mobile device and the Wi-Fi network have a roaming agreement. Also, the smart contact can verify that the user is authenticated by the service provider of the mobile device. In some cases, the WAP device functions in accordance with a Hotspot 2.0 (HS2) networking standard.

title: System and method for blockchain-based simple payment service
abstract: The present invention relates to a system for a blockchain-based simple payment service and, more particularly, to a system for a blockchain-based simple payment service in which a service server comprises: a payment request confirmation module for confirming a payment request generated in a user account; a point management module for subtracting a pay point corresponding to a payment request amount from the user account according to the payment request confirmed by the payment request confirmation module; a virtual currency transaction module for purchasing a blockchain-based virtual currency having a value corresponding to the payment request amount and selling the purchased virtual currency; and a payment module for paying the payment request amount to a member store. In addition, the present invention relates to a method for a blockchain-based simple payment service, more particularly, the method comprising the steps of, by a service server : (1) confirming a payment request generated in a user account; (2) subtracting a pay point corresponding to a payment request amount from the user account according to the payment request confirmed in step (1); (3) purchasing a blockchain-based virtual currency having a value corresponding to the payment request amount; (4) selling the virtual currency purchased in step (3); and (5) paying the payment request amount to a member store. According to the system and the method for a blockchain-based simple payment service, proposed in the present invention, by subtracting the pay point corresponding to the payment request amount from the user account according to the payment request, purchasing and selling the blockchain-based virtual currency, and paying the payment request amount to the member store, it is possible to have excellent security and be linked with various virtual currencies due to transaction information constructed on the basis of blockchain, price volatility may be stabilized through the purchasing and selling of virtual currencies, and it is practical and convenient to use pay points in actual payments.

title: System for controlling reserve ratio of cryptocurrency based on block chain
abstract: The present invention relates to a system for controlling a reserve ratio of cryptocurrency based on a blockchain. The system includes: an information acquisition unit for acquiring market capitalization information of first cryptocurrency and acquiring information on payment reserves prepared in advance for payment of actual economic value exchangeable in second cryptocurrency; a transaction decision unit determining whether to process the sale of the central bank holding amount among the first cryptocurrency issued based on at least one of the obtained market capitalization information of the first cryptocurrency and the payment reserves information of the second cryptocurrency; and if the sale of the central bank reserve is determined, a withdrawal processing unit processing a portion of the central bank reserve of the first cryptocurrency to be withdrawn and converted into the internal reserve, wherein the second cryptocurrency is convertible from the first cryptocurrency and is issued based on a condition that is burnable by payment of a real economic value.

title: Media ledger for sharing consumer data
abstract: Linking a consumption history of media to a consumer, including: creating a profile of the consumer using a blockchain-based media ledger; enabling the consumer to subscribe to advertisement networks; recording at least one of consumptions of the media and transactions by the consumer as a media consumption history on a content catalog of a digital right management (DRM); and ingesting the media consumption history into the blockchain-based media ledger from the content catalog of the DRM. Keywords include blockchain, advertising, cryptographic tokens, and DRM.

title: Routing Based Blockchain
abstract: Disclosed are various embodiments for implementing a blockchain utilizing routed packets to generate blocks. A given packet can be signed and analyzed to determine whether the signed packet satisfies root packet criteria. Packets that satisfy root packet criteria can be analyzed to determine whether they collectively satisfy a predetermined block criteria. A block can be added to the blockchain when the block criteria is met.

title: Webpage data automatic evidence obtaining and storing method based on block chain
abstract: The invention discloses a webpage data automatic evidence obtaining and storing method based on a block chain. The user sends the uniform resource locator of the webpage needing evidence obtaining to all evidence obtaining nodes in the block chain network, and the evidence obtaining nodes automatically obtain evidence of the webpage; the evidence obtaining node generates a security certificate and a data compression packet for the evidence obtaining data, signs the data compression packet and stores the data compression packet in the server, calculates the hash value of the data compression packet, adds a timestamp and signs the data compression packet and broadcasts the data compression packet to the blockchain network; the evidence obtaining node verifies the time stamp of the hash value, if the condition is met and the hash value is not signed, the hash value is signed and broadcasted to the block chain network; the rule node receives data with all the signatures of the evidence obtaining node, verifies the signatures, forms blocks of the data after the verification is passed and broadcasts the blocks to the block chain network; the forensics node anchors the blocks to the public block chain. The invention can be used for automatically obtaining evidence and storing evidence of the webpage data, and ensures the authenticity of the obtained evidence data and the safety of the stored evidence data.

title: System and method for cryptocurrency trading
abstract: A system and method that relies upon smart contracts to facilitate cryptocurrency trades through a plurality of different exchanges. The system and method preferably operate on the blockchain.

title: Secure smart note
abstract: An example operation may include one or more of conecting, by a smart note, to a blockchain configured to store an asset of a user on a ledger, acquiring, by a smart note, a value of the asset from the ledger, displaying, by a smart note, the value on a display screen located on the smart note in response to a detection of a smart note button press event, generating, by a smart note, an asset address key pair, checking, by a smart note, a status of a private key associated with the smart note, and displaying, by a smart note, a trusted symbol next to the value on the display screen, if the status of the private key indicates that the private key has never been used.

title: A System Providing Virtual Money Managerial System
abstract: A security-enhanced virtual currency management system according to the present invention includes a virtual currency mining module mining virtual currency through a program loaded in a network server; a wallet generation module provided for a user and including a wallet generating unit generating a virtual currency wallet having a 30- to 40-digit wallet address and a wallet providing unit providing the virtual currency wallet to each user; a currency exchange processing module including a purchase request unit receiving quantity information of the virtual currency to be purchased by the user and transmitting the information to the network server, a currency exchange guide unit grasping the currency exchange amount of a first currency with respect to the quantity information from the network server and guiding the amount to the user, and a currency exchange processing unit generating trading history information after providing the user′s virtual currency wallet with the virtual currency corresponding to the quantity information and being paid with the currency exchange amount from the user; and a blockchain management module including a blockchain-based block including corresponding trading transaction information as the trading history information is generated and forming a blockchain in which the plurality of the blocks are connected.

title: Blockchain transaction safety using smart contracts
abstract: A method includes acquiring, at a node server, blockchain data for a blockchain address on a blockchain network. The blockchain data includes a plurality of transactions for the blockchain address. The method includes generating a local node trust score for the blockchain address based on the blockchain data. The local node trust score indicates a likelihood that the blockchain address is involved in fraudulent activity. The method includes receiving, from a plurality of remote servers, a plurality of additional local trust scores for the blockchain address. The method includes determining a consensus trust score based on the local node trust score and the plurality of additional local trust scores. Additionally, the method includes monitoring a ledger on the blockchain network for a contract trust request that specifies the blockchain address and sending, to the blockchain network, the consensus trust score for the blockchain address specified in the contract trust request.

title: System, Method, and Computer Program Product for a Distributed, Cryptographically Secured Proof-of-Intent Transaction Network
abstract: Provided is a computer implemented method of authorizing transactions in a blockchain network of participant systems including a first system that sends transaction data to a second system that generates a notary request including the transaction data, at least one notary system and at least one witness system. The method includes the notary system: accepting the notary request from the second system; transmitting the transaction data to the witness systems; determining a subset of responsive witness systems; determining that a required number of affirmative responses has been received from the responsive witness systems; generating a block based on the transaction data; and publishing the block to a ledger of the blockchain network.

The method includes the notary system: accepting the notary request from the second system; transmitting the transaction data to the witness systems; determining a subset of responsive witness systems; determining that a required number of affirmative responses has been received from the responsive witness systems; generating a block based on the transaction data; and publishing the block to a ledger of the blockchain network.

title: Selective exchange of transaction data
abstract: An example operation may include one or more of receiving, by an account manager node, a request to register a client application executed on a peer connected to a blockchain network of a plurality of participants, wherein the client application generates a transaction data, registering, by an account manager node, the client application, deriving, by the account manager node, a webhook URL from a registration data of the client application, receiving, by the account manager node, a notification of a commitment of the transaction data on the blockchain, and in response to the receiving of the notification of the commitment of the transaction data, sending, by the account manager node, a decryption key for the transaction data to an authorized subset of the participants based on the webhook URL.

title: block chain-based digital currency issuing method and device
abstract: the embodiment of the invention relates to a digital currency issuing method and device based on a block chain. The method comprises the following steps: generating an intelligent contract according to the identification of the digital currency, the total amount of the digital currency, the transaction rule, the stable currency account and the stable currency preparation fund; the total amount of the digital currency and the stable currency reserve money have a corresponding relation, the stable currency account is used for storing the stable currency reserve money, and the transaction rule is used for defining a transfer rule; issuing the smart contracts in the blockchain for trading the digital currency based on the smart contracts. The digital currency is issued by taking the stable currency as the guarantee fund through the block chain, and when the digital currency is issued, the issued digital currency is ensured to accord with the preset rule by setting the intelligent contract, so that the data processing efficiency and the data security can be improved when the digital currency is issued, and the user experience is improved.

title: Blockchain based alias interaction processing
abstract: A blockchain based alias directory may be utilized. Encrypted lists of aliases may be stored on the blockchain and may be accessible to network computers and secure gateways. Embodiments are directed to secure gateways and user devices for accessing the alias directory stored in the blockchain during a financial transaction. The user device may be provided with a list of aliases from which a user may select a payment account. Upon selection the user may be redirected to an identity verification system of the associated payment network.

title: System, method, and apparatus for online content platform and related cryptocurrency
abstract: A system, method, and apparatus for an online content platform and a related cryptocurrency may provide a blockchain-backed cryptocurrency and an online content platform, wherein users may be compensated in the cryptocurrency for the user's engagement with content provided on the online content platform. The cryptocurrency may be supported by a blockchain database distributed across one or more nodes. A user may also earn cryptocurrency when one or more users designated as a "friend" of the user interact with the content. The present invention may further comprise one or more additional blockchain-backed components, such as a Digital Rights Management tool.

title: An activated luminescence material and a method for preparing the same
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of fluorescent material, specifically to an activated luminescence material and a method for preparing the same. Different biomolecules are combined to tetraphenyl ethylene through condensation reaction, so the biocompatible activated luminescence material having AIE/AEE features can be obtained. The biomolecules contain water soluble activated luminescence molecules with high fluorescent quantum yield, which have excellent biocompatibility in a solution state and a solid state, and crystalline polymer which can form nanosheets in a water-soluble medium. The obtained activated luminescence material can be applied to living cell fluorescence staining, sensitive explosive detecting and the like.

title: A kind of energy-efficient multiloop evaporator
abstract: The present invention discloses a kind of energy-efficient multiloop evaporator, including cylinder, and cylinder both ends are equipped with tube sheet, end cap is installed on the outside of tube sheet, cylinder body bottom is equipped with refrigerant inlet, and top is equipped with refrigerant exit, and inner barrel is equipped with feed liquor baffle, the first return-air baffle and the second return-air baffle；Heat transfer zone is formed between feed liquor baffle and the first return-air baffle, the heat exchanger tube being mounted on tube sheet is evenly equipped in heat transfer zone, and end cap is equipped with the inlet and outlet connecting with heat exchanger tube both ends；First return-air baffle and the second return-air baffle are used for the gas-liquid separation of refrigerant, and form overheated zone between the second return-air baffle and cylinder roof, the superheater tube being mounted on tube sheet are evenly equipped with inside overheated zone, end cap is equipped with high-temperature gas entrance and cryogenic gas exports.The present invention is compact-sized simple under the premise of guaranteeing evaporation endothermic effect, small in size, and the problem of can effectively solve the problem that refrigerant incomplete evaporation, improves evaporating temperature and heat-exchange unit efficiency, energy conservation and environmental protection.

title: Improvements relating to electric cookers
abstract: 839,551. Switches held set and freed mechanically. SIMPLEX ELECTRIC CO. Ltd. Aug. 12, 1957 [Aug. 11, 1956], No. 24635/56. Class 38 (5). [Also in Group XXXV] An energy regulator of the type which periodically breaks the circuit for variable intervals is further provided with an additional means to modify the on-off ratio to increase the initial flow of current. The regulator which may be of the thermal or motor-driven type comprises contacts 13a, 13b, which in the latter case are axially displaced by a cam 18 driven from a synchronous or clockwork motor through a gear train. A further gear train rotates. a clutch member 36. The other clutch member 42 rotates freely on a shaft 28 and is pushed into engagement by a spring 43, and a peg 33 transmitting thrust from an inclined track on a cam 34, 35, the two parts of which are connected by a ratchet, part 35 being rotated by a knob 29. In addition, knob 29 determines the on-off ratio by the axial positioning of contact 13a through a further cam 27. The sequence is established by rotating knob 29 fully anti-clockwise and then clockwise to the setting required. This rotates cam member 34 unidirectionally causing peg 33 to ride up the track engaging the two parts of clutch 36, 42, which drives the peg back to its original position, during which time a pair of contacts 14a, 14b in parallel with contacts 13a, 13b and coupled to clutch assembly 30, 42, 43 are closed. Contacts 13a, 13b may alternatively be actuated by a thermally responsive bimetallic element. A thermostatic switch is provided to open the circuit should the oven temperature become excessive due to manual operation of knob 29 when the oven is hot. Contacts 14a, 14b may be eliminated if a suitable linkage is provided to hold contacts 13a, 13b closed during the initial warming period, and the variable time setting may be replaced by a fixed time setting by incorporating a further ratchet to give a fixed angular displacement of member 34 irrespective of the angular rotation of knob 29. Specification 818,371 is referred to.

title: Driving assistance device
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To relieve a driver of a feeling of strangeness when reversing a vehicle while turning, and give the driver a sense of security by displaying an image of the turning direction.SOLUTION: A driving assistance device which comprises: a rearward photographing means; a reversing determination means; a display means; and an image creation means which creates a display image by correcting distortion of a rearward image, is provided with: a turning angle detection means; a vehicle position estimating means for estimating a vehicle position after a lapse of a delay time based on the turning angle; and a virtual camera setting means for setting a virtual camera in the estimated position, the image creation means converting a photographed image such that the position of the virtual camera becomes a viewpoint. Or, the driving assistance device comprises: the turning angle detection means; a vehicle speed detection means; and a database showing corresponding relationship between pixel positions of an image of the virtual camera and an image of a real camera in accordance with the turning angle and the vehicle speed, the image creation means converting a photographed image according to the turning angle and the vehicle speed with reference to the database such that the position of the virtual camera becomes a viewpoint.

title: Kids cafe themed nursery
abstract: The present invention relates to a children's cafe theme playroom, in which a shock-absorbing pad is attached to an inner wall of a building, and a supermarket playroom and a toy playroom are provided to allow children to enjoy the children up and down freely, It is divided into the lower layer and the upper layer in the vertical direction by attaching the shock absorbing pad, and divided into three spaces in the horizontal direction so that at least six theme play rooms from the first to sixth rooms are moved up and down or up and down in the vertical direction And a stairway passage room is connected to one side of the supermarket playroom and the toy playroom so as to be able to move through the connecting stairs in the left and right horizontal directions, and an impact absorbing pad is attached to the inner wall surface and inflated by blowing air. Air mattress and air mattress with connecting passage on one side And an air bounce chamber provided with a front wall is connected to the side wall of the stairway, and an impact absorbing pad is attached to the inner wall surface and the bottom surface of the building, A ball-pool having a rubber ball or a plastic ball at least 50 cm in height inside and outside, and a fence fence for preventing an entrance and a ball from being separated from each other is connected to one side of the air bounce chamber, A floor having a so-called shock absorber pad attached to the floor of the building, an indoor wall having a doorway, a rest room with feeding and a sofa or a bed for sleeping the baby can be installed on one side of the air bounce room And a wall surface sole in a straight direction is installed on the inner wall surface, and one surface of the wall surface sole is milled on the outer wall surface of the supermarket playroom And the other opposite side surface is closely attached to the outer wall surface of the reading room. In the above reading room, an impact absorbing pad is attached to the inner wall surface and the bottom surface of the building, and an indoor wall surface is installed. And the inner wall surface facing the air bounce room constitutes a kitchen for cooking tea, drinks, and ordered food. [0031] In the present invention, A kids' cafe theme playroom equipped with a table and chairs and a rest area for reading and relaxing tea and food.

title: Semiconductor device
abstract: PURPOSE:To keep the threshold voltage from going up too high, by orientating the crystal plane of the semiconductor substrate to the direction of [111] for the IG FET using the metal of high fusing point as the gate electrode materials. CONSTITUTION:When such metal of high fusing point as Mo is used as the gate electrode, the semiconductor substrate with crystal plane of the [111] direction is used. By so doing, the difference in work function between the metal of high fusing point and the semiconductor is offset by the fixed charge between the insulation film and the direction of the crystal plane [111] of the semiconductor. Therefore, it is possible to obtain the required threshold voltage by fixing the concentration of the channel part substrate required for the short channel MOS transistor as a standard.

title: Pattern Recognition System for Classifying the Functional Status of Patients with Chronic Disease
abstract: A method employing pattern recognition techniques for identifying the functional status of patients with chronic disease is described. This method describes a process by which sets of cardiopulmonary exercise gas exchange variables are measured during rest, exercise and recovery and stored as unique data sets. The data sets are then analyzed by a series of feature extraction steps, yielding a multi-parametric index (MPI) which reflects the current functional status of a patient. The method also employs a description scheme that provides a graphical image that juxtaposes the measured value of MPI to a reference classification system. An additional description scheme provides a trend plot of MPI values measured on a patient over time to provide feedback to the physician on the efficacy of therapy provided to the patient. The method will enable physicians to gather, view, and track complicated data using well-understood visualization techniques to better understand the consequences of their therapeutic actions.

title: Portable transceiver
abstract: A portable transceiver having a module housed and fixed in a module housing having a waterproof structure formed in a main body case, and an antenna arranged outside the main body case, wherein a circuit board of the module is provided. The means for conducting to the antenna is not affected by moisture or sweat.   A pin-shaped conductive member (13a) for connecting an annular antenna (13) and a circuit board (14) of a module is formed integrally with the annular antenna (13). The pin-type conductive member 13a penetrates the conductive through-hole 11e formed in the main body case 11, and its end is exposed in the cylindrical module storage portion 11a. One end of the spring member 22 is fixed to the circuit board 14 of the module, and the other end is in elastic contact with the end surface of the pin-type conductive member 13a. A waterproof adhesive 23 is injected into a gap between the pin-type conductive member 13a and the conductive through-hole 11e.   [Selection diagram] Fig. 1

title: Detecting device for drying agent packaging
abstract: The utility model discloses a detecting device for drying agent packaging. The detecting device comprises an idler wheel capable of freely rolling on a drying agent bag to be detected, a connecting rod and a photoelectric sensor, wherein the connecting rod is connected to the idler wheel through a rolling shaft and can drive the idler wheel to move in the vertical direction, and the photoelectric sensor is located at the upper end of the connecting rod and comprises at least one photoelectric detection switch. When the drying agent bag to be detected passes through a machine table, the idler wheel freely rolls on the packaging bag, and through detecting whether the photoelectric switch is triggered or not, whether the drying agent bag is am empty bag or does not meet the thickness requirement is judged. According to the designed detecting device for the drying agent packaging, the connecting rod is controlled through the photoelectric sensor, the packaging bag is automatically detected, so that whether the packaging bag is filled with sufficient particles or powder or not is judged, and then a stepping motor is controlled to continuously operate or stop rotating. The detecting device has the advantages of being simple in structure, low in false detection rate, high in detection speed and the like, it is avoided that the hand directly makes contact with a drying agent, and secondary pollution is not prone to being caused.

title: High-trafficability bionic sand-passing wheel face structure
abstract: The utility model discloses a high-trafficability bionic sand-passing wheel face structure. A plurality of identical wheel face structures are formed on the surface of a reference wheel, and the wheel face structures are formed by stretching curved sections with seven arc sections smoothly overlapped along the width of the wheel. Compared with a sand-passing wheel of a smooth wheel face structure with the same size, a bionic sand-passing wheel manufactured based on the high-trafficability bionic sand-passing wheel face structure enables the drawbar pull to be increased by 3.2%-6.5% and the traction efficiency to be increased by 3.9%-7.1%. The high-trafficability bionic sand-passing wheel face structure effectively enlarges the distribution range of a sand oil stress field under the wheel, and enhances the acting force of a wheel face on sand oil, in addition, the relative flow speed of the sand oil under the wheel face is also reduced, compared with a smooth wheel face, the bionic wheel face enables the side flow speed of the sand oil under the bionic wheel face to be decreased by 11.1%-13.7%, and the superior sand-fixing flow-limiting effect of the bionic sand-passing wheel face is represented.

title: Method for correcting mode pattern of cross-flow type laser device and the same device
abstract: PURPOSE:To improve quality of a beam, by correcting the asymmetrical mode pattern of laser light into the symmetrical pattern in a cross-flow type laser device. CONSTITUTION:In a cross-flow type laser device, two laser exciting units 10 and 11 are provided in order to obtain symmetrical laser light. Each of the laser exciting units 10 and 11 has a driving part for driving the light in a laser medium, a discharge electrode part, and a laser medium cooling part in the unit independently. The output light beams from the laser exciting units 10 and 11 are synthesized by a rear mirror 13, reflecting mirrors 14 and 15, and taken out by a front mirror 12. At this time, optical resonators are constituted so that the distributions of the excited media are different by 180 deg. between the mirrors 12 and 13 and between 13 and 15. Therefore the asymmetry of the distributions of the laser media are compensated in the resonators. As a result, the symmetrical laser light can be oscillated.

title: Reticular kneepad
abstract: The utility model discloses a reticular kneepad which is characterized by comprising a cylindrical net cover and elastic bands positioned at the upper edge and the lower edge of the net cover; the net cover comprises a thickened layer; and a plurality of cotton elasticity balls are uniformly arranged on the inner side of the thickened layer. the reticular kneepad adopts the cylindrical net cover structure, the net cover is made of an elastic woven fabric, the elastic bands with proper elasticity are arranged at the upper edge and the lower edge of the net cover; the net cover adopts the thickened layer, and the cotton elastic balls are uniformly arranged at the upper part on the inner side of the thickened layer. Therefore, a better protective effect is played, the reticular kneepad has a light weight, is comfortable to wear and excellently protects children's knees, and the flexibility of the action of the knee can not be influenced. With the advantages of light weight and comfort in wearing, the reticular kneepad can protect knees of juveniles.

title: End use transparent email attachment handling to overcome size and attachment policy barriers
abstract: Email server side or client side components either remove email attachments from the relevant email, or identify the attachment while the email is being composed and makes the attachment available from a secure website or file hosting site. The recipient then receives instructions in the email and links to access the attachments rather than the attachments themselves. Email attachment size limitations are overcome for sender/recipient mail systems. Also, file type limitations related to email attachments are overcome, provides improved attachment security, and reduces email bandwidth costs.

title: Electrical deployment control system for underwater ordnance
abstract: Control apparatus for separating a mine casing from its anchor having a series of switches located in an explosive programmer which activates a main power source for the mine. The power source is serially connected to a normally open explosive switch in the explosive programmer, a hydrostatic pressure responsive switch, an electrically energizable explosive casing release, a tilt switch which is normally open whenever the mine is not vertically oriented, and a normally closed explosive switch also in the explosive programmer for sterilizing the system by opening after a predetermined time period.

title: Method for precisely measuring and processing profile of disc cam
abstract: The invention discloses a method for precisely measuring and processing the profile of a disc cam. The method comprises the following steps: measuring the primary data of discrete points of a primary wheel profile through a delicate cam measurement instrument; determining the tangent point deviation angle of each discrete point of the primary wheel profile and a measuring head through a tangent point deviation angle determination method; obtaining the real approximate data of the primary wheel profile through a lift compensation method as per the tangent point deviation angle of the primary wheel profile and the measuring head; determining the tangent point deviation angle of each discrete point of the cam profile and a grinding wheel through the tangent point deviation angle determination method as per the real approximate data of the primary wheel profile; calculating to obtain the data of each discrete point of the cam profile for processing through the lift compensation method as per the tangent point deviation angle of the cam profile and the grinding wheel; and inputting the data of the discrete points of the cam profile for processing into a numerical control grinding machine to process a cam blank to obtain a cam finished product. The precise cam profile data can be obtained through the method, and the cam with good synchronicity same as the primary wheel can be processed.

title: FET Gating circuit with fast turn-on capacitor
abstract: A fast turn-on FET circuit is provided by a constant current source and fast turn-on capacitor combination in the gate circuit of the FET. At turn-on, a bypass capacitor momentarily short-circuits a control resistor in the current source such that a momentarily higher current is supplied by the current source to the FET gate until the capacitor is charged, whereafter constant current as controlled by the resistor is supplid to the FET gate circuitry to maintain conduction.

title: Office panel element configuration
abstract: An element of an office panel includes a back support member closed at either end by molded end pieces. The molded end pieces in combination with the back support member define a front opening recess into which a filler material is inserted. A decorative facing material is applied over the filler material and attached to the back support member and the molded end pieces, whereby the facing material forms a finish face of the element. With this arrangement, the back support member is more easily manufactured, as it is open at either end and the molded end pieces can easily be inserted within the back support member to effectively close the member and provide a complete support for the element. According to an aspect of the invention, the molded end pieces include molded components thereon by means of which the element can be effectively supported by an office panel frame.

title: Conveyor for bundled papers from printing press - has bins moved on track by linear induction motors, inclined track portion for emptying
abstract: The conveyor is intended for a rotary printing press or similar, to move bundled newspapers or magazines to a storage or despatch point. The arrangement comprises a number of bins to receive a number of bundles. The bins are moved along the conveyor track by means of linear induction motors. The bins are provided with a discharge opening on one side parallel to the track, and, at the discharge point the track is inclined laterally, such that the bundles emerge sideways through the openings. The linear induction motor may be a laterial flux motor which, during transport, lifts the bins off the track and keeps them central relative to the track.

title: Circulating aquaculture system for eel fertilized egg hatching and fry culture and use method thereof
abstract: The invention provides a circulating aquaculture system for eel fertilized egg hatching and fry culture. The system comprises circulating water treatment facilities and at least one incubator, wherein the circulating water treatment facilities comprise a water storage pond, a main water inlet pipe, a main water outlet pipe and a filtering pond, a first water pump is arranged in the water storage pond, a second water pump is arranged in the filtering pond, the incubator comprises a machine body, a water inlet mechanism, a pollutant discharge mechanism, a water injection mechanism and a water drainage mechanism, the water inlet mechanism, the pollutant discharge mechanism, the water injection mechanism and the water drainage mechanism are arranged on the machine body, the water inlet mechanism and the water injection mechanism are communicated with the main water inlet pipe through pipelines, the water drainage mechanism is communicated with the main water outlet pipe through a pipeline, and the lower portion of the pollutant discharge mechanism is connected with a pollutant discharge groove. The invention further provides a use method of the circulating aquaculture system for eel fertilized egg hatching and fry culture. The circulating aquaculture system for eel fertilized egg hatching and fry culture and the use method of the system are easy and efficient, large-scale hatching can be achieved in small space, and hatching efficiency is high.

title: Shading correcting device
abstract:
PURPOSE: To suppress the influence of the partial change of a reflection factor on a reference plate by moving a carriage, on which an image sensor and a light source, etc., are mounted, at the same time that light strikes the image sensor when luminance information on the reference plate is read.  
     CONSTITUTION: A lamp 53 is lit, and the carriage 54 is moved at speed faster than ordinary moving speed. The image sensor 51 on the carriage 54 reads the luminance information on the white reference plate 2. Data to be stored in a RAM 12 and the RAM 14 is only one line portion of main scanning, but since the data is fetched as moving a read line, the data averaged extending over area on a subscanning line comes to be stored. White reference data and black reference data stored in the RAM 12 previously, are inputted to an adder 15, and the normalized data is outputted.

title: Cable having hauling, electrical and hydraulic lines and elongated tensile elements
abstract: A reinforced cable having hauling, electrical and hydraulic lines. The cable has a substantially rectangular cross section and includes at least one internal support to protect these lines by resisting external compressive forces, and yet is bendable about one of its transverse axes for easy storage on and deployment from a drum. The internal support also protects the hauling lines from compressive forces applied longitudinally thereof by resisting radial displacement of the hauling lines. In one embodiment, the cable comprises an armor layer, a pair of engaged channels inside the armor layer, and a pair of corrugated supports inside the channels and fixedly spaced apart. The hauling lines, in the form of wire ropes, are located inside the corrugated supports, while the electrical lines are located inside the channels between the corrugated supports. The hydraulic lines can alternatively be located inside the channels between the corrugated supports, or inside the wire ropes. Any spaces inside the channels are filled by elastomeric material. In another embodiment, the cable comprises a rigid tubular support located between and engaging the wire ropes, and an armor layer engaging and enclosing the tubular support and the wires ropes. In this embodiment, the electrical conductor is located inside the tubular support.

title: Motor drive control method and motor drive control device
abstract: (57) [Problem] To provide a drive control method of a sensorless brushless DC motor capable of realizing an effective torque ripple suppression effect without assuming a motor having a special structure requiring a sensor. A driving control method for a sensorless brushless DC motor to which a bipolar driving method is applied is disclosed. This is a motor drive control method in which when the applied current pattern is switched on the basis of the positive / negative reversal point (zero cross point) of the back electromotive force of each phase (for example, three phases), two or more predetermined times are switched at regular intervals.

title: Injection molding of thermoplastic polymers
abstract: An injection molding of thermoplastic polymers comprising loading thermoplastic polymers into a hopper for mixing, feeding the thermoplastic polymers from the hopper into barrel, activating a screw-type plunger to move the thermoplastic polymers to a heated chamber for melting, forcing the molted plastic through a nozzle, allowing the melted plastic to enter a mold cavity, and cooling the mold to finish a polymeric foam product. Additionally, another mold having a number of cavities may be disposed in the mold so as to manufacture a polymeric foam product having multiple spaces.

title: Sentence producing device
abstract: PURPOSE:To speed up indent processing in a document making device having an indenting function, by easily changing indents with the same format. CONSTITUTION:A character code key and a control code key inputted through an input part 1 are discriminated in a code discriminating part 2 respectively and sent to a line position controlling part 3. If the code indicates the setting position of an indent, in the line position controlling part 3, the code stores in a setting value storing part 4. When a line is to be fed before the display of a character code after referring to whether the code is a line feed code or a character code in a line position storing part 5, a line feed command is applied to a display part 6. When the character code is transferred to the controlling part 3, the character code is directly sent and displayed to/on the display part 6.

abstract: The utility model relates to a public transport vehicle mounted mobile information terminal, belonging to the fields of electronic information and communication technology, comprising a core main control unit, a wireless communication unit, a voice broadcast unit, a human-machine interface unit, an electrical source management unit, an extended interface unit and a storage location. The public transport vehicle mounted mobile information terminal is provided with the function of stops reporting for public transport vehicles, adopting the automatic position settings of the distance vector and the index point adjustment localization ; through the industrial standard interface and the imitation or cipher input interface, a vehicle sensor is connected with other vehicular equipments, forming the vehicle mounted network ; making use of the public communication network, the public transport vehicle mounted mobile information terminal is communicated with the public transport executive system, realizing exchanging, sharing and comprehending between the data from different sources, providing with valuable data resources for the public transport executive system, solving the long-time obsessing problem of the data live collection for public transport executive system with a low price, effectively decreasing the cost of investment and use for users, raising the service quality and the informationalized control level of the public transport industry.

title: Centrifugal air precleaner for internal combustion engines
abstract: An air precleaner for internal combustion engines having a central conduit for conducting precleaned air to the air intake of the engine. A housing is disposed around the central conduit and forms an air intake opening, an arcuate wall spaced radially outwardly from the conduit and substantially concentric therewith for conducting the incoming air stream from the intake opening around the conduit so that any dust in the air stream is collected along the housing wall by centrifugal action, and a dust outlet for discharging dust from the housing at the downstream end of the arcuate wall. The conduit forms clean air port near the downstream end of the arcuate wall for discharging clean air from the inner region of the space between the arcuate wall and the conduit. An internal baffle integral with one side of the intake opening extends between the arcuate wall and the conduit and forms a restricted passageway that increases the velocity of the incoming air at the upstream end of the arcuate wall. The internal baffle also forms a dust-receiving chamber at the downstream end of the arcuate wall, with the dust-receiving chamber communicating with the dust outlet for discharging dust from the housing. A suction fan withdraws air through the dust outlet so as to draw ambient air into the housing through the intake opening. The inlet to the dust-receiving chamber is spaced a substantial distance away from the innermost end of the restricted passageway so that the volume of the air passageway within the precleaner is increased between the restricted passageway and the dust-receiving chamber, thereby reducing the velocity of the air stream before it reaches the opening in the central conduit. The internal baffle is continuously spaced away from the central conduit to permit the relatively clean air that does not enter the opening in the conduit to recirculate around the conduit. The central conduit, the internal baffle, and the side and bottom walls of the housing are all formed as a single unitary molded plastic structure.

title: Transportation type eccentric water distribution blanking plug
abstract: The utility model relates to a delivery type eccentric water restrictor for pressurized construction operation of zonal injection allocation in a water injection well, which comprises an upper joint, an upper claw, an upper shear pin, an upper main body, a back cap, a rubber cup, a mandrel, a pipe slip, a return prevention sleeve, pins, a lower shear pin, a claw spring, a lower claw, a claw pin, a lower main body, and a guide shoe. The upper claw is arranged on the upper part of the upper main body and is fixed with the upper shear pin, and the upper joint is arranged above the upper claw; the upper end of the lower main body is fixed with the mandrel via the lower shear pin, and the upper end of the mandrel is connected with the upper main body; the back cap and the rubber cup are sleeved at the upper end of the mandrel, and the clip is arranged on the outer side of the upper part and is in threaded connection with the lower main body; the return prevention sleeve is arranged on the middle part of the mandrel, the return prevention sleeve and the clip are fixed on the lower body via pins, and the lower shear pin is arranged on the lower part; and the lower claw and the claw spring are arranged on the lower part of the lower main body and are fixed with the claw pin, and the guide shoe is in threaded connection with the lower end of the lower main body. The water restrictor has the advantages of simple structure and reliable operation, and can be used for pressurized construction operation in a high-pressure oil well, gas well or water well, especially for restriction of multistage water injection allocators in a multi-restriction multi-allocation water injection well, so as to remarkably improve operating efficiency.

title: High-activity composite micro powder and production method and application thereof
abstract: The invention discloses high-activity composite micro powder and a production method and application thereof, belongs to the technical fields of environment-friendly utilization of three-waste materials and building materials, and relates to high-activity composite micro powder produced by using phosphorus slag, manganese slag, aluminum slag and steel slag as main raw materials. The composite micro powder is characterized by comprising the following components in percentage by weight: 35 to 60 percent of phosphorus slag, 10 to 30 percent of manganese slag, 10 to 25 percent of aluminum slag and 5 to 10 percent of steel slag. The raw materials are vertically milled and crushed till the specific surface area of the micro powder is 420 to 470 m<2>/kg. The industrial waste slag and the aluminum slag from which cryolite and carbon powder are reclaimed by the inventor are used as the raw materials, and all the raw materials are the waste slag, so the composite micro powder is low in cost, easy to produce and beneficial to industrialized production, popularization and application. When concrete is prepared, the composite micro powder can equivalently replace 40 to 70 percent of cement. The composite micro powder can be used in multiple other purposes.

title: Novel sock structure
abstract: The invention discloses a novel sock structure which comprises a sock body. The sock body is made of elastic blended yarns, the sock body comprises a sock leg portion, a sock heel portion, a sock foot portion and a sock head portion, and at least one suspension buckle is arranged on the outer surface of the sock leg portion. In this way, the novel sock structure is suitable for being dried on an ordinary clothes rack, and has the advantages of being attractive in appearance and novel in structure.

title: Monocomponent epoxide-resin rubber adhesive and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention provides a single-component epoxy resin binder. The raw materials comprise latent curing agent and epoxy resin. The latent curing agent is para-acetyl-phenyl-biguanide of amount 10-22 phr. The epoxy resin and the para-acetyl-phenyl-biguanide are mixed evenly under 30-50 DEG C to get the single-component epoxy resin binder. The binder is prepared by the following procedures: (1) weighing the raw materials in proper proportions; (2) mixing the weighed raw materials; (3) mixing under 30-50 DEG C evenly. As the materials are selected properly, the preparing process is simple and environmental friendly. The single-component epoxy resin binder is of low curing temperature (100-140 DEG C), excellent storage property (storage period is up to 300 days if storing under 4 DEG C; storage period is 120 days if storing under 25 DEG C) and mechanical properties (the shearing strength is more than 17 MPa after curing).

title: Metal plate press forming method
abstract: [PROBLEMS] To change the shape of a press-molding die to a different one or change the shape and material of a blank to a special one in a press-molding method in which a wrinkle retainer is arranged and a metal plate is clamped with a punch and a die. Even if the shape of the part is complex or the material metal plate is high-strength, the metal plate does not require any measures such as micro-vibration using ultrasonic waves etc. It is possible to improve the forming limit at which cracks occur, and to provide a low-cost method that can be easily applied to a large press forming machine.   In a state where a metal plate (100) is sandwiched between a crease presser 30 and a die 20, a punch 10 first contacts the metal plate and molding is started, and then the punch reaches the end of the stroke to complete the molding. title: Detection method of multi-touch for touch panel and related detecting apparatus thereof
abstract: A detection method of detecting multiple touch points on a touch panel, wherein the touch panel includes a plurality of first sensing axes and a plurality of second sensing axes on a first dimension and a second dimension, respectively. The detection method includes: generating a preliminary sensing data according to touch points of the touch panel; determining a plurality of first specific sensing axes and a plurality of second specific sensing axes within the first and the second sensing axes, respectively; driving the first specific sensing axes individually and sequentially, and receiving a sensing data corresponding to each first specific sensing axis on the first specific sensing axes respectively to generate a first sensing data; and determining the multiple touch points according to the first sensing data.

title: Amplification primer and amplification method of complete mitochondrial genome sequence of nibea miichthioides chu
abstract: The invention discloses an amplification primer and an amplification method of a complete mitochondrial genome sequence of nibea miichthioides chu. The amplification primer comprises 4 klenow fragment amplification primer pairs and 19 genome walking primers. According to the amplification primer and the amplification method provided by the invention, the complete mitochondrial genome sequence of nibea miichthioides chu, which is obtained by conducting PCR amplification on genome of the nibea miichthioides chu, can provide a material base for conservation genetics and evolutionary genetics of the nibea miichthioides chu and for marker-assisted selection of high-quality breeding varieties.

title: Refractory  powder comprising coated mullite grains
abstract: A powder is disclosed having a coarse fraction representing more than 60% and less than 85% of the powder, as a weight percentage on the basis of the oxides, and that is constituted of particles having a size greater than or equal to 50 μm, referred to as “coarse particles”, the powder comprising at least 5% of coated grains having a size greater than or equal to 50 μm, as a weight percentage on the basis of the oxides of the powder, and a fine fraction, forming the balance to 100% as a weight percentage on the basis of the oxides, constituted of particles having a size of less than 50 μm, referred to as “matrix particles”. The powder can be applied in combustion chambers in which the temperature may reach 1400° C.

title: Method for managing a real-time clock in a portable tamper-resistant device
abstract: The invention is a method of managing a real-time clock (10) embedded in a portable tamper-resistant device (20) that receives applicative data (30) when performing a banking transaction with another device. The method comprises a step of extracting a time (50) from the applicative data (30) and a step of updating the real-time clock (10) based on said time (50).

title: Long-term storage of controller performance
abstract: A memory controller having a non-volatile memory is disclosed herein. The memory controller forms part of a computer system that includes a program for accessing the non-volatile memory. When memory errors are detected, data correlative to the detected memory errors, such as error syndromes, is stored in the non-volatile memory. Preferably, during each operating session, the area of the non-volatile memory designated for this type of storage is copied into volatile memory. The volatile memory is updated during the operating session and then copied back to the non-volatile memory when the operating session is terminated. Technicians may access the non-volatile memory to study the error history for diagnostic or design purposes.

title: Luminous bottle cover
abstract: The utility model discloses a luminous bottle, relates to a bottle cover structure and in particular relates to a luminous bottle cover structure. The luminous bottle cover comprises a bottle cover body (3), a closed circuit formed by a light-emitting diode (	LED) light source (1) and a button battery (2) is arranged at the top in the bottle cover body (3), a layer of transparent plastic film (4) is arranged below the closed circuit, and the edge of the transparent plastic film (4) is connected with the inner wall of the bottle cover body (3) to pack the LED light source (1) and the button battery (2) in the bottle cover body (3). The luminous end of the LED light source is downwards arranged in the center position of the bottle cover body (3). The luminous bottle cover solves the problem that a traditional bottle cover cannot have the function of promote sales of products. The luminous bottle cover has the advantages of being simple in structure, low in cost and easy to popularize. The bottle cover is novel, can form a selling point easily and helps products to be the champion in drastic market competition.

title: Improvements in apparatus for the automatic moulding of articles made of polystyrol and similar material which can be foamed
abstract: 922,690. Moulding foamed synthetic resins. F. VETTER, [trading as JAKOB VETTER TONWARENFABRIK]. Nov. 15, 1961 [Nov. 16, 1960], No. 40784/61. Class 87(2). In a method of moulding articles from foamed polystyrol the sequence of operations is controlled by an electric programming switch 13 which may be adjusted manually. The charging slide 12 is filled with material and pushed over the open moulds formed by the core 2, the rings 9 and the outer surface 4. A predetermined amount of material is either sucked into the mould by connecting the hollow porous core to a vacuum system or forced in by air pressure applied to the top of the charging slide. The slide is withdrawn and the tops of the mould 7 descend to close the mould. Steam is then supplied to the hollow core and the moulding performed. After curing, the steam supply is cut-off and a cooling water supply connected, after which any excess water left in the mould is forced out by compressed air or sucked out by a vacuum. After removing the top 7 the articles are removed by raising rings 9 and are pushed into a container (not shown) by the leading edge of the slide 12 which is returning to fill the now empty moulds.

title: Systems and methods for implementing cyclic redundancy checks
abstract: The present invention provides systems and methods for implementing cyclic redundancy checks to improve link initialization processing and to exchange system error information. In one aspect, a cyclic redundancy check (CRC) checker is provided that includes a unique pattern detector, a CRC generator, a CRC initializer and a CRC verifier. The CRC checker prepopulates the CRC generator for a unique pattern. Upon receipt of the unique pattern within a data stream received over a digital transmission link, the CRC checker proceeds to check CRCs without the need to queue and store data. In another aspect, a CRC generator system is provided that intentionally corrupts CRC values to transmit system error information. The CRC generator system includes a CRC generator, a CRC corrupter, an error detector and an error value generator. In one example, the digital transmission link is an MDDI link.

title: Pin press fitting device
abstract: The utility model discloses a pin press fitting device. The pin press fitting device comprises a rack. A lower die plate and an upper die base which is elastically and fixedly connected to the lower die plate in a floating mode are connected to the rack. The upper die plate is provided with a workpiece locating mechanism and is further provided with a spring pin penetrating hole. The rack is further provided with a press fitting air cylinder which is correspondingly arranged above the workpiece locating mechanism, and a press fitting head is fixedly connected to the end of a downward stretching piston rod of the press fitting air cylinder. The pin press fitting device has the advantages of being high in safety factor, good in workpiece forming quality and high in labor efficiency.

title: Device for cracking tree and hazelnuts

The impact with a hammer (9) destroys only the shell (15) and frees the core (17) of the nut (5, 5 ') undamaged.

title: Thenylguanidines, the preparation thereof, and pharmaceutical compositions containinghem
abstract: The invention comprises compounds of the formula <FORM:1020611/C2/1> and their acid addition salts, wherein Y is a hydrogen atom or a methyl group, and R1, R2, R3 and R4 are the same or different and each is a hydrogen atom or an alkyl group containing one to four carbon atoms and the preparation thereof by reacting a less-substituted guanidine, which is of Formula I above except that one of the groups 3-Y-thenyl, R1, R2, R3 and R4 i absent and its place taken by a hydrogen atom, with a compound R10X, wherein R10 is a group which is absent from the less-substituted guanidine and is a group 3-Y-thenyl or a G-4 alkyl group, and X is a reactive proton-accepting atom or group; or (where R1 and R2 are both hydrogen atoms) by reacting a cyanamide R16R17NCN with an amine R18R19NH wherein R16 and R17 are the same or different and each is a hydrogen atom or an alkyl group of 1 to 4 carbon atoms and the amine R18R19NH is thenylamine or 3-methylthenylamine, or alternatively the cyanamide R16R17NCN is thenyl cyanamide or 3-methyl cyanamide and R18 and R19 are the same or different and each is a hydrogen atom or an alkyl group of 1 to 4 carbon atoms; or by reacting ammonia or a primary or secondary amine R11R12NH or a salt thereof with an S-substituted isothiourea QSCNR13(NR14R15) or a salt thereof wherein NR11R12, NR13H and NR14R15 taken in any order represent an NR1R2, NR3R4 a NH(3-Y-thenyl) group and Q is a lower alkyl group; or (wherein R and R3 are hydrogen atoms) reacting ammonia or a primary amine R18NH2 with an S - substituted isothiourea QSCNR19(NR20H) wherein R18, R19 and R20 taken in any order represents a 3-Y-thenyl, R2 and R4 group. N,S - Dimethyl - N1 - 2 - thenylisothiourea hydriadide is prepared by reacting thenylamine with methylisothiocyanate to form N-methyl-N1-2-thenyl thiourea and reacting the thiourea with methyl iodide.  Similarly is prepared N - methyl - N1 - 3 - methyl - 2 - thenylthiourea and N,S - dimethyl - N1 - 3 - methyl - 2 - thenylisothiourea hydriodide.  Pharmaceutical compositions comprise the guanidines I and an acceptable carrier therefor. The compositions may be in the form of fine powders, granules, capsules, cachets, tablets, suspensions, solutions, suppositories or pessaries. The compounds I selectively depress sympathetic nerve function.

title: Heat dissipation device of electronic circuit modules
abstract: A heat dissipation device of electronic circuit modules has a substrate, a heat dissipation element and a housing. The housing is hollow and has an airflow passage therein. Heat generated when electronic components of the substrate is operated is conducted to the heat dissipation element and is guided out of the device by heat convection generated inside the housing by the design of the airflow passage.
