title: Mobile communication device combined data reading apparatus
abstract: The utility model provides a mobile communication device combined data reading apparatus comprising a first insertion and connection portion and a second insertion and connection portion which are in electrical connection through cables. The first insertion and connection portion comprises a USB male head. The second insertion and connection portion comprises a MicroUSB male head. The first insertion and connection portion or the second insertion and connection portion is provided with a reading device. The reading device comprises a memory card insertion interface. The reading device further comprises a chip and a PCB. The memory card insertion interface is a SD card insertion interface or a TF card insertion interface. The utility model provides a portable reading apparatus which not only can be used to read information of a PC computer provided with a standard USB interface and but also can be used to read information of small electronic apparatuses, such as a mobile apparatus provided with a MicroUSB interface, etc. Moreover, the device can be used as a data line to connect a PC computer and a mobile apparatus.

title: Rotor supporting apparatus
abstract: PURPOSE:To effectively absorb vibration, allowing the variation of position of a rotary shaft which is generated during revolution of a rotor by permitting the protruded part of a rotor revolving shaft to be rotatably supported by a transfer pedestal supported on a foundation through dampers and springs. CONSTITUTION:A longitudinal shaft 19 is connected to the protruded part 9 of the rotary shaft 7 for rotors 6 and 6', and further supported by a transfer pedestal 18 through a bearing 20. Said transfer pedestal 18 is supported on a foundation 1 through compression coil springs 15 and 15a and dampers 16 and 16'. Therefore, the vibration having a low frequency which is generated from the protruded part 9 of the rotary shaft 7 is absorbed by dampers 16 and 16', when rotors 16 and 16' revolve, and the vibration having a high frequency is absorbed by the inertial force of the transfer pedestal 18. Also in the case when the supporting position for the protruded part 9 of the rotary shaft 7 is varied by the bearings 4 and 5, variation of the thickness of oil membrane, and thermal expansion during revolution, the transfer pedestal 18 can follow the above-mentioned variation.

title: Regenerative monopropellant airbag inflator
abstract: A regenerative monopropellant inflator having improved initiation of the regenerative cycle and improve operating efficiency. The inflator may direct the flow of the monopropellant into a localized volume to create a "hot spot" to increase combustion. This serves to ensure that the regenerative cycle is initiated. Various arrangements are provided to increase the residence time of the combusting monopropellant within the inflator, to ensure complete combustion of the monopropellant, and thus increased efficiency. These arrangements include inducing a helical gas flow to increase the length of the path traveled by the gas. Various barriers may also be placed within the gas flow to force direction changes, which reduce the velocity of the gas.

title: Semiconductor memory
abstract: PURPOSE:To enable to obtain the III-V group component semiconductor memory by a  method wherein the first conductive type region, on which a transfer transistor and a  charge accumulating part will be formed, is formed in the second conductive type region which was provided on a semi-insulating substrate, and the leakage current running to the semi-insulating substrate is reduced. CONSTITUTION:A fixed value of negative voltage is applied to an accumulation gate 15,  and the Schottky barrier to be formed on the interface between the accumulation gate  15 and an N type semiconductor region is brought into the state of inverted bias. When information is going to be written in the memory, the transfer transistor is  brought in a conductive condition, and then when the potential of a bit line 17 is set  at the desired level at which the information will be written in, the electric charge in  the amount, which will be determined by the potential of the bit line 17, will be accumulated in a memory capacity part 14. Also the N type semiconductor region 14,  wherein electric charge will be accumulated and maintained, comes in contact with a P type semiconductor region 18, and a P-N junction is formed at this part. Accordingly,  the leakage current coming from the N type semiconductor region 14, which is the  charge accumulation part, can be reduced remarkably by applying a fixed current on the P type semiconductor region 18 so as to obtain the condition of inverted bias at  the junction.

CONSTITUTION:A fixed value of negative voltage is applied to an accumulation gate 15, and the Schottky barrier to be formed on the interface between the accumulation gate 15 and an N type semiconductor region is brought into the state of inverted bias. When information is going to be written in the memory, the transfer transistor is brought in a conductive condition, and then when the potential of a bit line 17 is set at the desired level at which the information will be written in, the electric charge in the amount, which will be determined by the potential of the bit line 17, will be accumulated in a memory capacity part 14. Also the N type semiconductor region 14, wherein electric charge will be accumulated and maintained, comes in contact with a P type semiconductor region 18, and a P-N junction is formed at this part. Accordingly, the leakage current coming from the N type semiconductor region 14, which is the charge accumulation part, can be reduced remarkably by applying a fixed current on the P type semiconductor region 18 so as to obtain the condition of inverted bias at the junction.

title: Tissue box with disposal compartment
abstract: A tissue box with disposal compartment includes a conventional compartment for the holding and dispensing of new tissues, and a second compartment for the disposal of used tissue which folds out from a side of the new tissue compartment. The used tissue disposal compartment is integrally attached to the new tissue dispensing compartment, having a common side wall therewith, and may be arranged in a folded position against the common side wall when not in use, or in an extended position for receiving used tissue. Two foldable side walls unfold into the extended position, with the fourth side wall being attached to the outer edge of the two folding side walls. A bottom wall is foldingly attached at the lower end of the common side wall so that when bent up, into the folded position, it lies against the common side wall, while in the extended position it rotates down to form the bottom of the used tissue compartment. The bottom wall may be attached to the lower end of the fourth side wall by a tab extending from the bottom wall and a tab opening in the lower portion of that lower side wall. Attachment of one or more narrow strips of flexible material between the two foldable side walls at their lower edges provides support for the bottom wall and also holds the foldable walls from bowing outwards. The tissue box with disposal compartment may be formed from a single paperboard blank.

title: Fabry-perot tunable filter systems and methods
abstract: A spectral filter includes a two-dimensional array of Fabry-Perot cavity structures, a controller, and a sampling circuit used to switch the Fabry-Perot cavity. The filter receives an incoming image, the sampling circuit switches the cavity to generate a filter image, and the filtered image is detected by the photodetectors to convert a filtered image into digital data. The controller coordinates all the image captures functions of the spectral filter.

title: Manufacturing method of dry rice flour having soft mouthfeel and original nutrition
abstract: The invention relates to a manufacturing method of dry rice flour having soft mouthfeel and returned nutrients, rice bran and starch used for increasing viscosity are taken as raw materials, and the manufacturing method comprises the following steps: immersing, crushing, kneading powder dough, boiling, compacting to squeeze filament, cooling and drying; wherein the step also comprises pulp refining and press filtration after immersion, or also comprises a step of washing rice. title: Grid power storage and frequency regulation
abstract: An apparatus to capture and store electricity, and then instantly retransmit it on demand, is disclosed. An electric motor transfers rotational energy to at least one energy storage spring that rotationally connects to an electric generator via a variety of rotational energy connecting elements. Utilizing energy storage springs in this manner enables intermittent generation from renewable energy sources, such as wind and solar power, to provide base load electric power as well as providing frequency regulation to the national electric power grids. Electric grid power may be utilized when the price is low to compress the springs, and then released and transferred to an electric generator when the price of electricity is higher. Rotational energy storage may be utilized to provide backup power for applications of all sizes. It is efficient, scalable, and deployable almost anywhere.

abstract: A disc drive comprises an improved electrical interconnect for connecting the head to read/write circuitry on a printed circuit board. title: III-V Quaternary alloy photodiode
abstract: A III-V quaternary alloy photodiode comprises an n-type III-V binary alloy body; a III-V quaternary alloy layer chosen to have about the same lattice constant as that of said body grown on a major surface of said body; an electrically insulating layer grown on said quaternary alloy layer and having an opening therein extending through said second layer; a p-type layer of the same III-V binary alloy as said body, grown on said quaternary alloy layer in the area contiguous with the opening in said electrically insulating layer; a p-type region in said quaternary alloy layer in the region contiguous with the opening in said electrically insulating layer; and electrically conducting layers overlying a portion of said p-type binary alloy layer and of a second major surface of said body to provide electrical contact to the photodiode. The III-V quaternary alloy layer may be of n-type conductivity, electrically insulating, or have n-type and electrically insulating regions.

abstract: A multiple contact switch including an elongate contact member mounted for sliding movement. CONSTITUTION:A U-shaped glass tube of 4-16mm. in outside diameter is again bent into a double bent U shape, in such a way that its both ends is perpendicular to the plane including the U-shaped glass tube as original, to form a fluorescent lamp 7, in which the inner surface shall be covered with a rare earth fluorescent substance 9 and rare gases are encapsulated together with quicksilver. This shall be accommodated in a globe 12, which is fitted with a base 15 so as to be replaceable with a candescent lamp. title: Fixing structure used for preventing die excessively-large thermal deformation
abstract: The utility model relates to the technical field of automobile die manufacturing and discloses a fixing structure used for preventing die excessively-large thermal deformation. The fixing structure comprises an outer ring fixing structure used for connecting a die and a bottom plate in a fastened mode, wherein the outer ring fixing structure is arranged at the outer end of the die, and the fixing structure further comprises at least one inner ring fixing structure. The inner ring fixing structure comprises at least one connecting part and an extending part, wherein the position, close to the center, of the bottom surface of the die extends downwards to form the connecting part, and the extending part is arranged on the bottom plate and corresponds to the connecting part. The connecting part and the extending part are fixedly connected through a fastening part. The fixing structure has the advantages that the outer ring fixing structure and the inner ring fixing structure are matched, so that the die and the bottom plate are connected more stably and firmly to resist to upward action force generated by a molten aluminum crucible and a liquid lifting tube connecting device, the deformation amount of a bottom die of the die is reduced to 0.1 mm-0.3 mm, and the precision of the product size is improved; operation is easy, and maintenance is convenient.

title: Non-interferometric optical gyroscope based on polarization sensing
abstract: This patent document relates to optical devices and optical sensing techniques including optical gyroscopes and optically sensing rotation. Sensing of rotation can be used in a wide range of applications, including, e.g., navigation, motion sensing, motion control including object stability control, game console controllers, hand-held devices such as smartphones. Optical gyroscopes can be designed to use rotation-induced changes in the optical interference pattern of two counter-propagating optical beams to measure the rotation. Many optical gyroscopes are based on an optical Sagnac interferometer configuration including various interferometric fiber-optic gyroscopes (IFOGs). Such optical gyroscopes can be designed without moving parts and thus eliminate the wear and tear in other gyroscopes with an oscillating proof mass or a moving component.

title: Structural vibration and noise control device based on energy recovery
abstract: The invention discloses a structure vibration and noise control device based on energy recovery. The device comprises a piezoelectric driving unit, a piezoelectric energy unit, a piezoelectric sensing unit and a system circuit, wherein the piezoelectric driving unit consists of piezoelectric elements which are attached to the surface of a controlled structure; the piezoelectric energy unit consists of piezoelectric elements which are attached to the surface of the controlled structure; the piezoelectric sensing unit consists of piezoelectric elements which are attached to the surface of the controlled structure; and the system circuit comprises a switching unit, an extreme value detecting unit, an energy recovery unit and a power supply management unit. The device does not need energy feed from the outside, uses piezoelectric materials to recover vibration energy, provides power supply for a semiactive control method based on nonlinear synchronous damping switching technology, realizes technology of SSDS, SSDI and SSDV, has the advantages of simple structure, small volume and good robustness, and has wide application prospect in structure vibration noise control.

title: Adjustable positioning welding clamp
abstract: The invention discloses an adjustable positioning welding clamp which comprises a clamping board, wherein the upper surface of the clamping board is transversely and vertically provided with moving slots; clamping blocks which are pushed by a piston rod of a moving air cylinder are mounted in the moving slots; a bolt fixing block is further arranged on the clamping board in an inclined mode; an adjustable locking bolt is arranged on the bolt fixing block; the clamping board is divided into two parts which are connected by virtue of an adjusting rod; one end of the adjusting rod is fixed to the clamping board, and the other end of the adjusting rod extends out of the clamping board and is fixed by a nut; and a groove is formed in the clamping board for mounting a positioning sensor. According to the adjustable positioning welding clamp, the clamping blocks which are pushed by the piston rod of the moving air cylinder are mounted on the moving slots in the upper surface of the clamping board, and the adjustable locking bolt is arranged on the bolt fixing block, so that by virtue of three-point stress, a product is fixed and conveniently subjected to rotary welding; the product is properly positioned conveniently by virtue of the positioning sensor; the clamping board can be moved and regulated through the adjusting rod, so that the processing is convenient, and therefore, the product welding efficiency and the product welding quality are greatly improved.

title: Power junction box
abstract: The utility model discloses a power junction box which comprises a box made of insulating material and a socket installed in the box. A slot is formed on the box body; a box cover is inserted into the slot and can be opened through drawing; a hole for a power wire to pass in and out is formed in the box; and a button switch and a power indicator can also be installed on the box.

title: Coordinates signal detecting system
abstract:
PURPOSE: To improve the detecting accuracy of a coordinates signal by comparing the coordinates valid signal of a tablet device with the reference signal in response to the corresponding for detection of said coordinates valid signal and deciding the coordinates signal as valid one when the coordinates signal exceeds the level of the reference signal.  
     CONSTITUTION: A ROM9 which stores th reference voltage for each coordinates to detect the valid signal of a tablet device and a D/A converter 10 which converts the reference voltage in the ROM9 into the analog value are provided between a coordinates detecting circuit 5 and a comparator 8. The circuit 5 retrieves the ROM9 by means of the coordinates data and supplies the corresponding reference voltage to the comparator 8 after converting it into the analog value for detection of the valid signal. Thus it is possible to detect accurately the valid coordinates signal regardless of the position of the tablet coordinates.

title: Method and system for storing data using a continuous data protection system
abstract: A method and system wherein data is structured so that writes may be continuously duplicated and a protected volume may be restored to a particular point in time as desired. Writes are continuously duplicated on a secondary volume and organized into delta maps. The delta maps indicate which memory blocks were written to during a particular time frame.

title: Rubber injection machine product moving-out bracket device
abstract: The utility model relates to a rubber injection machine product moving-out bracket device, which comprises a horizontal bracket positioned between dies and capable of being moved in a lifting way, wherein two longitudinal beams of the horizontal bracket are parallel guide rails; cross beams capable of being moved horizontally are positioned on the two guide rails and used for fixing products or core rods; a guide sleeve and a vertical support rod are respectively arranged on outer sides of the two guide rails; the guide sleeve is sleeved on a tiebar for supporting the dies; and the vertical support rod is connected with a die lifting device. The utility model provides the rubber injection machine product moving-out bracket device for realizing installation of wider dies under the condition of the same tiebar internal spur; and the technical effects that the product moving-out bracket device is simple and convenient to operate, has a compact structure, and is safe and reliable, and wider dies can be adapted are achieved.

title: Bumper device of automobile
abstract: An object of the present invention is to reduce the amount of displacement of a bumper reinforce 11 even with the same collision energy, to prevent damage to a vehicle body, and to improve occupant safety.   A bumper device includes a bumper reinforce (11) and a reinforcing member (12) fixed to a longitudinally central portion of a front side thereof. The bumper reinforce 11 is made of an extruded aluminum alloy having a rectangular cross section, and the reinforcing member 12 is made of an extruded aluminum alloy having a rectangular cross section and protruding walls 12e, 12f extending rearward from above and below the rear wall 12b. Consists of The rear ends of the protruding wall portions 12e and 12f of the reinforcing member 12 are welded to the upper wall portions 11c and 11d of the bumper reinforce 11 along the longitudinal direction (welded portions; Wc and Wd). The front wall portion 11a of the bumper reinforce 11 comes into surface contact with the front wall portion 11a, and the protruding wall portions 12e and 12f come into surface contact with the upper wall portions 11c and 11d of the bumper reinforce 11.   [Selection diagram] Fig. 1

title: Equipment pressure test adapter tube and pressure test method
abstract: a pressure test connecting pipe and a pressure test method for equipment belong to the field of pressure test for manufacturing large pressure vessels and heat exchanger equipment and overcome the defects that pressure test allowance needs to be considered for ordering pressure test connecting pipes, seal head pressure test materials are thick, waste is large, and welding workload is large in the prior art. The pressure test connecting pipe is provided with the pressure test end socket connecting port which is smaller than the pressure test connecting pipe body in outer diameter and thickness in forming and machining, and is formed in one step. The pressure test method using the pressure test adapter tube comprises the following steps: the pressure test end socket is selected or manufactured, and the outer diameter and the thickness of the pressure test end socket are suitable for the connecting port of the pressure test end socket; performing heat treatment on the joint pipe body which is welded with the equipment shell and qualified in flaw detection; the pressure testing end socket is connected with the port and is welded with the pressure testing end socket; gas cutting pressure testing end sockets after the hydrostatic test is qualified; the boring machine is used for machining and removing the connecting port of the pressure testing seal head, so that the design size is met. The invention is suitable for pressure test of large pressure vessels, saves the material cost and welding cost of connecting pipes and end sockets, ensures the quality, and has simple and convenient operation, safety and reliability.

title: Fixed base of portable electronic apparatus
abstract: A portable electronic equipment fixing mount used in vehicles comprises a support frame (2) and sticky vertical-plate rubber pads (3, 1), wherein the support frame (2) is composed of a vertical plate (21) and a bottom plate (22), the two sticky vertical-plate rubber pads (3, 1) are respectively adhered to the bottom faces of the vertical plate and the bottom plate, and the vertical plate and the vertical-plate rubber pads are provided with through holes uniformly distributed. The rubber pad can be made of polyurethane, thermoplastic elastomer or organic silicone composite without chemical adhesive but with a sticky surface. The rubber pad of the fixing seat is strongly adsorptive with shore hardness less than 20 degrees, can provide adhesion above 30g/cm2 for planar articles, and further can adsorb articles directly. Besides self adsorption onto a convenient position in vehicles, the vertical plate can temporarily and conveniently support portable electronic equipment as a mobile phone and the like via adsorption. The adsorption position can be changed at any time or the portable electronic equipment can be withdrawn at any time from the vertical board without any other auxiliary components during adsorption, the utility model does not interfere with the electronic equipment, and the rubber pads can adsorb the energy generated during vibration, thereby effectively protecting the electronic equipment.

title: System for managing contacts based on home locations of contact numbers in mobile phone
abstract: The utility model discloses a system for managing contacts based on the home locations of contact numbers in a mobile phone. The system comprises a mobile phone central processing unit (CPU), a display screen, a microprocessor, a contact information memory and a home location data memory, wherein the contact information memory and the home location data memory are connected with the microprocessor respectively; and the microprocessor is connected with the mobile phone CPU. The contacts are classified and managed according to the locations of the contacts in the mobile phone, contacts in the same region are classified into the same management catalogue, and during lookup, contacts at a corresponding regional address can be correspondingly displayed only by clicking the address. Compared with the prior art, the system has the advantages of greatly lowering difficulty in the lookup of a user for the contacts in the same region and greatly facilitating the mass texting of the user to the contacts in the same region.

title: Hydraulic cylider, hydraulic buffer system, excavator and concrete pump truck
abstract: The utility model discloses a hydraulic cylinder which is sleeved by a buffer sleeve that can slide along an axial direction of an additional segment of a piston rod at a piston rod addition segment in a rodless chamber. A cylinder chamber between an oil passing orifice of the rodless chamber and a terminal point position of a piston rodless chamber end face in which the piston rod performs retracting movement, is provided with a rodless chamber sealed end face which can block the buffer sleeve and can joint with a first end face of the buffer sleeve for forming a sealed surface. Furthermore the cylinder chamber is provided with at least one throttling oil duct. In a retracting movement process of the piston rod, between a time point when the first end face of the buffer sleeve is jointed with the rodless chamber sealed end face and the sealing surface is formed and a time period when the piston rod retreats to a terminal point position of the retreating movement, the hydraulic oil at the piston side of the sealing surface can flow to the oil passing hole of the rodless chamber through the throttling oil duct. The hydraulic cylinder has the following advantages: simple machining of the buffer structure, and good effect. The utility model simultaneously provides a hydraulic buffer system, an excavator and a concrete pump truck in which the hydraulic cylinder is used.

title: Method of synthesizing a plurality of products
abstract: A method of synthesizing a plurality of products using a process is described. The process is a multi-stage process. The products formed via the process are attached to articles known as beads (20). The method includes the steps of isolating individual beads (20), and labelling them with a laser to produce a unique identifying code at the penultimate stage of the process. This code enables the chemical synthesis routes undergone by each bead (20), and chemical synthesis to which each bead (20) is to be subjected at the final stage of the process, to be recorded. The product can therefore be easily identified.

title: Light ring for an aircraft cabin window
abstract: In an aircraft having an A/C exterior and an A/C interior, an assembly for illuminating an A/C window on the interior. The assembly comprises an A/C interior panel having an inner surface and an outer surface configured with walls defining a window opening. A substantially opaque inner collar is generally configured to the shape of the window opening also has an inner edge and an outer edge. The inner collar is adapted to engage the A/C interior panel adjacent the window opening. A window shade unit is provided and has an inner lens and a substantially opaque moveable shade. A light diffuser member, such as a milky colored at least partly light transparent sheet of plastic, is configured to the shape of the window opening. The light diffuser engages the opaque inner collar near the outer edge thereof and lays adjacent the inner lens of the window shade unit. Coupling members are used to couple the window unit to the inner collar and an illumination source configured to lay adjacent the collar and an outer surface of the light diffuser, so as to illuminate the window from the outside in, through the light diffuser when the light source is illuminated, so as to cast light into the A/C interior.

title: In Vitro Generation of Hepatocytes from Human Embryonic Stem Cells
abstract: Differentiation of human pluripotent stem cells, such as human embryonic stem cells (hESC), into hepatocytes by in vitro methods is disclosed. The pluripotent stem cells are cultured in conditioned medium from the hepatocarcinoma cell line, HepG2. Specific growth factors and defined media may also be added to the medium for stage specific differentiation of the derived hepatocytes. Hepatocytes differentiated from human pluripotent stem cells may be characterized by fluorescence activated cell sorting (FACS), immunofluorescence analysis (IF), real time polymerase reaction (RT-PCR), and functional assays. The methods disclosed herein are able to differentiate high percentages of hepatocytes from human pluripotent stem cells using the disclosed methods. These differentiated cells may exhibit polygonal shape morphology, typical of hepatocytes, and may express hepatocyte specific genes. The differentiated cells may also be positive for definitive endoderm markers and hepatic markers.

title: High-efficiency, sub-control and phase-change heat exchange system and method
abstract: The invention relates to a high-efficiency, sub-control and phase-change heat exchange system. The heat exchange system provided by the invention comprises a heat exchanger of heat source (3) and a heat exchanger of cold source (12) which are mutually communicated through a steam tube and a condensate line to from a sub-control and phase-change heat exchange circuit. The heat exchange circuit is provided with an air flow regulating valve and a liquid flow regulating valve which can control the circuit. A reservoir tank (16) is configured on the condensate line. The header of the steam tube on the top of the heat exchanger of heat source (3) is divided into two steam sub-tubes. A first steam sub-tube is connected with the heat exchanger of heat source (12) and an air flow regulating valve (11) is configured between the first steam sub-tube and the heat exchanger of cold source (12). A second steam tube communicates with the reservoir tank (16) via a condensate heater (18) configured inside the reservoir tank (16). A liquid distribution tube (6) is configured inside the collecting chamber (7) of the heat exchanger of heat source (3), and a plurality of sprayers are configured on the liquid distribution pipe which is used for the mixing heat exchange of steam and condensate. The efficiency of the system provided by the invention is much higher.

title: Ultrasonic diagnostic equipment
abstract: In an ultrasonic diagnostic apparatus, measurement accuracy of elastic characteristics is improved. Based on a plurality of frames generated by scanning an ultrasonic beam, a temporal change in the displacement amount of a living tissue is calculated, and a displacement waveform indicating the temporal change in the displacement amount is generated. This displacement waveform is caused by, for example, the subject's respiratory motion. Based on the analysis result of the displacement waveform, instructions for breathing and breath holding are given. When the breathing instruction is repeated and the periodicity of the displacement waveform is detected, the breath-holding instruction is given. For example, when point B in the displacement waveform (when the subject is inhaling, the displacement is maximized) is detected, the subject is instructed to exhale. Next, when the point C (the time when the displacement (absolute value) becomes maximum when the subject exhales) is detected, an instruction to hold the breath is given. After the breath holding instruction, elasticity measurement is executed according to the amount of displacement. [Selection] Figure 3
text: Ultrasonic diagnostic equipment In an ultrasonic diagnostic apparatus, measurement accuracy of elastic characteristics is improved. Based on a plurality of frames generated by scanning an ultrasonic beam, a temporal change in the displacement amount of a living tissue is calculated, and a displacement waveform indicating the temporal change in the displacement amount is generated. This displacement waveform is caused by, for example, the subject's respiratory motion. Based on the analysis result of the displacement waveform, instructions for breathing and breath holding are given. When the breathing instruction is repeated and the periodicity of the displacement waveform is detected, the breath-holding instruction is given. For example, when point B in the displacement waveform (when the subject is inhaling, the displacement is maximized) is detected, the subject is instructed to exhale. Next, when the point C (the time when the displacement (absolute value) becomes maximum when the subject exhales) is detected, an instruction to hold the breath is given. After the breath holding instruction, elasticity measurement is executed according to the amount of displacement. [Selection] Figure 3

title: Method, system and equipment for transmitting periodical feedback information
abstract: The embodiment of the invention discloses a method for transmitting periodical feedback information. The method comprises the following steps: a base station transmits periodical feedback long-term information through a wireless resource control (RRC) signaling, including feedback types, feedback periods and the like, and releases the periodical feedback resource through the RRC signaling; physical resource information of the periodical feedback is transmitted through a physical downlink control channel (PDCCH), including the number, positions and modulated code modes and the like of physical resource blocks (PRB); and a terminal transmits the periodical feedback information according to the periodical feedback resource distributed by the base station. The embodiment of the invention also discloses a system and equipment for transmitting the periodical feedback information. By adopting the invention, reasonable dispatch and transmission of the periodical feedback information in a long term evolution (LTE)-A system can be realized.

title: Compound steel cutlery
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] The invention that can obtain a desired hardness by cold working without requiring the high temperature quenching is to provide a compound steel blade such as a kitchen knife and a sickle. And [Structure] High hardness and wear resistance for sustaining the sharpness required for blades are obtained by cold working of austenitic stainless steel to work harden it, and at the same time, when punching a press tool In order to prevent wear and cracks in the molded product, a CLAD steel plate in which a ferritic stainless steel 2 which is a low carbon soft steel is compounded with an austenitic stainless steel is made and a blade is molded. That is, austenitic stainless steel 1 that is work-hardened by cold working is compounded at a mixing ratio of 75% to 70%, and ferritic stainless steel 2 is compounded at 25% to 30%, and the compounded product is subjected to the cold working. To reduce the thickness to make only austenitic stainless steel 1 high hardness, and ferritic stainless steel 2 to produce composite steel while maintaining its softness, and form it into a predetermined knife such as a knife or sickle. Is.

title: Waste belt collecting device
abstract: The invention discloses a waste belt collecting device. Waste belts are gradually increased after being generated, the increased waste belts can droop, when the waste belts touch an inductor, the inductor transmits running signals to a motor, the motor drives a coiling reel to rotate and runs for a set time such as 5 seconds or 10 seconds, the time is set by technicists in the field according to specific conditions, the coiling reel can coil the generated waste belts, after the set time is up, the motor can stop running, the coiling reel also can stop coiling until newly generated waste belts are enough and droop to touch the inductor, and then the motor can drive the coiling reel to rotate again to coil the newly generated waste belts. The waste belts are automatically coiled on the coiling reel by matching of the inductor and the motor, manual operation is omitted, and collection is convenient; and moreover, the waste belts are coiled on the coiling reel, so that the storage size of the waste belts can be reduced.

title: Deicing method for compressor inlet air moisture
abstract:
PURPOSE: To make suction air temperature rise and dissolve the freezing of moisture in the atmosphere as well as to prevent any damage to a compressor due to the freezing from occurring, by leading steam by bleed air out of a steam turbine into a compressor inlet of a gas turbine, and mixing this steam with the atmosphere to be sucked in to the compressor.  
     CONSTITUTION: A compound power plate is provided with a gas turbine 1, a generator 2, a steam turbine 3 and a waste head recovery steam generator 4. And, the gas turbine 1 is provided with a compressor 5, a combustor 6 or the like, and the atmosphere 8 is sucked into the compressor 5 from an inlet casting 9. In addition, in this inlet casing 9, there is provided with an inlet guide vane 10 which is opened or closed when a temperature of exhaust gas is regulated. In this case, the specified amount of steam 23 is sprayed to the inside of the inlet casting 9 from a nozzle 13 on the basis of a detection signal out of the temperature sensor 14 installed in the downstream of the guide vane 10. With this constitution, when the guide vane 10 is throttled, such fear of moisture in the atmosphere 8 being frozen and damaging a blade 11 of the compressor 5 is obrated. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1988,JPO&Japio

title: Altitude alerting instrument
abstract: An aircraft altitude alerting instrument. The instrument includes a pressure reference scale and an altitude alerting scale. Means is provided for placing a selected altitude alerting setting on the altitude scale adjacent to a pressure reference reading on the pressure reference scale. The pressure reference reading on the pressure reference scale provides an index for the selected altitude alerting setting. Means responsive to measured static pressure outside the aircraft and coupled to the altitude setting means is provided for activating a warning signal device.

title: Shale-sintered hollow ganged brick
abstract: The invention belongs to the field of building materials, which relates to a shale-sintered hollow ganged brick. The large-sized bearing or nonbearing hollow wall brick is prepared by performing crushing, sieving, stirring, aging, impact molding, drying and roasting on shale taken a main raw material and biomass wastes as raw materials for internal combustion. The shale-sintered hollow ganged brick has the advantages that barren mountain wastes are utilized; fertile farmlands are not occupied; cultivated lands are protected; the energy conservation and the consumption reduction are realized; the construction cost is decreased; the traditional architectural style of ganged walls is maintained and the like.

title: Crinkled fabrics and methods of producing same
abstract: Crinkled areas are produced on cloth of normal non-creping twist and texture by bleach processing and stretching the cloth in a warpwise direction, printing it locally in the warpwise stretched condition with a paste containing a thermosetting resin resist, drying, polishing and glazing the dry cloth and hardening the resin by heat while the cloth is held in the prestretched condition and finally subjecting the cloth to a slack laundering operation or mechanical shrinking operation, whereby the non-printed areas are shrunk to their prestretched dimensions and the printed areas are caused to crinkle.  Specified resists are urea-formaldehyde and melamine-formaldehyde condensation products and alkyd resins such as a glycerolphthalic-anhydride-fatty acid condensation product.  A blend of melamine-formaldehyde resin and an alkyd resin is also suitable.  If desired, the paste may contain urea and the printed fabric is then subsequently treated with aldehyde to produce the resin.  Thickeners such as starch, sodium alginate, gum tragacanth, a protein thickener or a resin-oil-water emulsion may be added to the paste as also may a polymerization catalyst such as ammonium chloride.  The polishing and glazing operation is effected by heated calendering rolls and this operation may also serve to harden the resin.  In the slack laundering operation the cloth is subjected to a standard soap and water laundering treatment and dried in the slack condition. The mechanical shrinking operation is that known under the Registered Trade Mark "Sanforized".  The cloth may be dyed prior or subsequently to the treatment or dyestuffs may be incorporated in the printing paste.

title: Pedestal for ballast block decking
abstract: A deck system and pedestal for use in forming an elevated surface are provided. The system includes a plurality of ballast blocks, pavers or panels laterally positioned in a pattern to form a deck. Each of the blocks, pavers or panels has corner portions, and the pattern includes intersection areas in which the corner portions of adjacent blocks, pavers or panels extend. The system also includes a plurality of pedestals. The pedestals are located directly beneath the intersection areas and support the corner portions of adjacent blocks, pavers or panels a spaced distance above an underlying structure. Each pedestal has a base at a lower end thereof and a support at an upper end thereof. The support is rotatable relative to the base for altering an overall height of the pedestal. One or more couplers can be added to the pedestal to alter the overall height of the pedestal. The pedestals can include a rubber pad or coating that secures and stabilizes the block, paver, or panel on the pedestals. Brace securement eyelets can be provided in a flange extending circumferentially about the coupler and in the base of the pedestal.

title: Intelligent commodity recommending method and system based on user answer-and-question mode
abstract: The invention provides an intelligent commodity recommending method and system based on a user answer-and-question mode. The method includes the steps that questions and answers are collected, and a question-and-answer relation is built; the answers are recorded and analyzed, and data structuring and processing are conducted on the answers; screening and matching are used for analyzing and excavating the collected user behaviors and psychological features; recommending and display are conducted, and the matched commodity information is recommended and displayed to users. By means of the intelligent commodity recommending method and system, the users can pick out interested commodities in the relaxing atmosphere, the user purchase experience and efficiency are improved, and the time in picking the commodities is saved.

title: Automatic tending-to-zero regulating and control method for air pre-heater sealing clearance
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of thermal power generation, and provides an automatic tending-to-zero regulating and control method for the air pre-heater sealing clearance. The method includes the steps that 1, an air pre-heater rotor shaft 11 is aligned; 2, air pre-heater fan-shaped plates 6 are modified, screws 9 are hinged to one end of each air pre-heater fan-shaped plate 6, lifting devices 10 are additionally arranged at the other end of each air pre-heater fan-shaped plate, and a set of clearance sensors 5 is mounted on each fan-shaped plate 6; 3, an air duct and a smoke duct are modified, and temperature sensors are mounted at an inlet and an outlet of the air duct and an inlet and an outlet of the smoke duct; 4, a control cabinet 8 is additionally arranged, contains a program-controlled computer and controls the lifting devices 10 to enable the fan-shaped plates 6 to rise and fall according to signals transmitted from the sensors; 5, checking and calibration are conducted, specifically, the correlation data between gas leakage clearances and the temperatures of the inlet and the outlet of the air duct and the inlet and the outlet of the smoke duct are checked, and non-electrical quantity calibration of the air and smoke temperatures and the sealing clearances is converted in to electrical quantity calibration; 6, program control software is made and arranged in the computer in the control cabinet 8; and 7, debugging, test running and production are carried out. The boiler heat efficiency is improved, and coal consumption is lowered; and electricity consumption of a boiler fan and an air pre-heater and abrasion of sealing parts are reduced. The automatic tending-to-zero regulating and control method is applied to the air pre-heater for thermal power generation.

title: Rotary display part type information processor
abstract:
PURPOSE: To enable a person kept at a dead angle of a display part to see the contents of the display part with no shift of a main body by turning a display cabinet (a cover body having a display part) by an optional angle around a straight line orthogonal to the open/close axis of the cover body.  
     CONSTITUTION: A display cabinet 3 can cover the upper surface of a main body 2 and also opened/closed in 140 at the maximum in the direction shown by an arrow A. A liquid crystal display 6 is provided on a counter surface of the main body 2, and a tilt axis cabinet 4 is rotatably provided at the fringe part of the main body 2. Thus the cabinet 4 supports rotatably the cabinet 3 to the main body 2. Furthermore, the cabinet 4 support rotatably the cabinet 3 around a straight line orthogonal to the rotary axis of the cabinet 4 in the direction shown by an arrow B or its opposite direction. Thus even a person kept at a dead angle of the display 6 can know the display contents. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1991,JPO&Japio

title: Sod roll pickup mechanism
abstract: A sod roll picker including a pair of right facing spear bar assemblies and a pair of left facing spear bar assemblies. Each of the right and left facing spear bar assemblies includes a spear bar, a plurality of spears secured to the spear bar, and a guide roller disposed on each end of the spear bar assembly. The picker also includes a base frame having a pair of sidewalls connected by a pair of end walls. Each end wall includes a pair of right guide paths configured to receive the guide rollers of the right facing spear bar assemblies and a pair of left guide paths configured to receive the guide rollers of the left facing spear bar assemblies. The picker also includes a right spear bar linkage interconnecting the right facing spear bar assemblies and a left spear bar linkage interconnecting the left facing spear bar assemblies.

title: Coating composition
abstract:
PURPOSE: To provide a coating composition capable of giving on metal surfaces, etc., transparent and glossy coating films of outstanding alkali and water resistances, corrosionproofness, insulation, etc., comprising specific components including organopolysiloxane and colloidal silica in specified proportions.  
     CONSTITUTION: For example, (A) 100pts.wt. of an organoalkoxysilane of formula I (R is 1W8C organic group; R' is 1W5C alkyl, etc.) is incorporated with (B) 5W50pts.wt. on a solid basis of colloidal silica dispersed in a hydrophilic organic solvent (pref., i-propyl alcohol), (C) 0.1W50pts.wt. of water and (D) 50W500pts.wt. of the same solvent as that present in the component B (including the solvent in the component B) followed by hydrolysis and polycondensation to convert the component A into an organopolysiloxane. The resulting system is incorporated with (E) 0.01W5pts.wt. of at least one kind of compound selected from 2W3 nitrogen atoms-contg. heterocyclic compounds (pref., benzimidazole) and aluminum compounds of formula II (R 3  and R 4  are each alkyl; R 5  is alkyl, etc.; n is 0W3) (partially hydrolyzed products or partially condensate therefrom) (pref., ethyl acetoacetatealuminum diisopropylate), thus obtaining the objective coating composition. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1988,JPO&Japio

title: Information processing device and method
abstract: Disclosed herein is an information processing apparatus that performs a process of splicing encoded streams together at a splicing point, the apparatus including: control means for determining a section to be subjected to re-encoding in the encoded streams; decoding means for decoding the encoded streams to generate baseband signals; and encoding means for encoding an edited baseband signal generated by splicing the baseband signals generated by the decoding means together at the splicing point to generate an edited encoded stream. The control means provisionally determines a first section to be subjected to re-encoding in first and second encoded streams to be spliced together at a first splicing point. When a second splicing point exists in the first section or a predetermined section that follows the first section, the control means determines a second section to be subjected to re-encoding based on the second splicing point.

title: Method for preparing hexangular ordered FePt nano particle array
abstract: The process of preparing ordered hexagonal nanometer FePt particle array includes the following steps: 1. self-assembling inverse micelle with amphiphilic block copolymer PS-block-P2VP intoluene; 2. adding metal salts FeCl3 and H2PtCl6 into the inverse micelle solution through stirring for the metal salts FeCl3 and H2PtCl6 to be combined with the P2VP kernel of the inverse micelle to form inverse micelle with supported metal salts; 3. depositing the inverse micelle with supported metal salts onto smooth monocrystalline substrate through dip coating to obtain ordered hexagonal inverse micelle array; and 4. oxygen plasma etching to eliminate copolymer substrate and reduce metal salt into simple substance so as to obtain homogeneous ordered hexagonal nanometer FePt particle array on the monocrystalline substrate.

title: Method for realizing display mirror display function
abstract: The invention discloses a method for realizing display mirror display function, and aims at providing a method for realizing the display mirror display function with convenient use, wherein users can select to use the mirror display function or not according to demands. The method comprises the following steps: selecting a mirror option in a magic bright menu, recording current brightness contrast variable data, storing the current brightness contrast variable data into a temporary variable register, then, setting zero for the brightness contrast variable data, writing into a brightness contrast variable data register, then, controlling the external voltage applied on a mirror reflective electrode layer for realizing mirror display, selecting an individual setting option under the magic bright menu, reading the brightness contrast variable data stored in the temporary variable register, writing into the brightness contrast variable register, and releasing the mirror display function. The method is simple and has convenient use.

title: Measurement data storage method and measurement data storage device
abstract: In addition to a measurement data file, an information presentation page is created so that various measurement information such as a graph image and a measurement cycle based on the measurement data can be referred to so that the target measurement data file can be easily found. A measurement data storage method and a storage device are provided.   A method of building measurement data in an internal memory 3 in a predetermined format and storing it in a storage medium 5 after completion of measurement, and creating a graph image related to the measurement data after completion of measurement and storing it in the storage medium 5 Steps and information are acquired from the measurement data, and an information presentation page is constructed based on the information. When the information presentation page is accessed, the graph image is captured and displayed on the information presentation page. In addition, the process includes the steps of associating so that the measurement data can be downloaded from the information presentation page and storing it in the recording medium 5.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Special-shaped hollow composite filter bar
abstract: The utility model provides a special-shaped hollow composite filter bar. The special-shaped hollow composite filter bar comprises a base bar, the tail end of the base bar is provided with a special-shaped core filter bar, the special-shaped hollow filter bar is rapidly formed through heating during the production process without being packaged by forming paper and can avoid glue seepage; the cross section of the inner cavity of the hollow filter bar can be in a round shape, a star shape, a polygon shape and the like, so that the special-shaped hollow composite filter bar is attractive in appearance and easy to manufacture.

title: Primer, probe and kit for evaluating skin regeneration conditions
abstract: The invention discloses a primer, probe and kit for evaluating skin regeneration conditions. The sequences of the primer and the probe are SEQ ID NO:1-4 and SEQ ID NO:5-8, wherein 5' end and 3' end of SEQ ID NO: 3-4 and 7-8 are connected with different fluorescence labelings. The invention also discloses a method for assisting customers to select correct beautifying methods by using gene detection, enabling the customers to know both the internal and external causes of skin regeneration, providing personalized beauty and health solutions for the customers, and maximizing the effect of regeneration beauty products.

title: Flash memory and the manufacturing process thereof
abstract: BACKGROUND OF THE INVENTION 1. Field of the Invention The present invention relates to a flash memory and a method of manufacturing the same, wherein a floating gate in the form of a spacer is formed on a side of a gate electrode of a MOS transistor structure formed by a general MOS transistor forming process by using polysilicon. All the area of the floating gate can be used without increasing the capacitance, thereby increasing the capacity of the floating gate.

title: Ball bearing
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a ball bearing capable of smoothly maintaining rotation by reducing the rise of a rotating torque when balls are clogged even when the number of separators disposed in a rolling element raceway is large.  <P>SOLUTION: Either of a spherical separator 4 and a columnar separator 14 having a diameter smaller than that of balls 3 is disposed in the same rolling element raceway for the balls 3 carrying the load of the bearing. By this, the bearing torque when the balls are clogged can be reduced more than that in a conventional bearing in which only the columnar separator 14 is disposed. As a result, even the number of the separators disposed in the raceway is large, the rise of the torque in rotating can be suppressed to maintain the smooth rotation of the ball bearing.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2006,JPO&NCIPI

title: Winter wheat water-saving high-yield cultivating method
abstract: The invention discloses a winter wheat water-saving high-yield cultivating method. The method comprises: selecting drought tolerant winter wheat breed seeds to carry out coating treatment; calculating the application amounts of phosphor, potassium and nitrogen in soil according to the growing demand and nutrient element balance principles of wheat; adjusting the landform of planting areas; applying proper phosphate fertilizers, potash fertilizers and slow release nitrogen fertilizers into 15-35cm deep soil; delaying the sowing period of winter wheat to mid-October for sowing, and then sprinkling nutrient solution; and irrigating the wheat in the jointing stage of wheat growth. The method increases the yield of winter wheat per mu to more than 500 kg while saving water and fertilizer. The effect is significant.

title: Thin film magnetic head having spiral coils and manufacturing method thereof
abstract: The invention is directed to improvement of a write element of a thin film magnetic head. In the write element, a lower coil surrounds in a spiral form a back gap portion, arranged within a height of a lower pole. An upper coil is disposed above the lower coil, surrounding in a spiral form the back gap portion and arranged within a height of an upper pole. A gap film is at an intermediate level in the pole length that is defined by the height of the lower pole and the height of the upper pole.

title: Power supply device fixer combination
abstract: The utility model relates to a power supply device fixer combination used to fix a power supply device to a computer base. The power supply device comprises a front wall whose lateral margin is provided with two clip fixing holes. The computer base comprises a back panel and a side panel. The back panel is provided with an aperture provided for the exposure of the power supply device, and the side panel is provided with two through holes. The retainer is installed sleekly on the forward wall of the power supply device, comprising a body part. The anterior part of the body part extends outwards two clip fixing elements fitting to the through holes of the computer base, and the middle part of the body part forms outwards two clip fixing hooks fitting to the clip fixing holes of the power supply device.

title: Method for producing feed or food
abstract: Provided is a method of producing a feed or food product in which an inner layer is encrusted with a gelled outer layer composition, the method including the steps of: preparing an outer layer composition feedstock by adding a secondary feedstock to a protein feedstock and/or a starch feedstock that forms a gel upon heating and then mixing by stirring, and preparing an inner layer composition that is encrusted with the outer layer composition; extrusion molding with an extruder provided with a double nozzle so as to cover a surface of the inner layer composition while simultaneously gelling the outer layer composition feedstock by heat treatment; and cutting a continuously extruded cylindrically shaped product to a fixed length with a shutter mechanism while simultaneously encrusting a cut surface with the gelled outer layer composition.

title: Electric Elbow Rehabilitation Aids
abstract:
The present invention relates to an electric elbow rehabilitation aid, and more particularly to an exoskeleton-type electric elbow rehabilitation aid that can be worn to assist the rehabilitation of the upper extremity muscles of elderly or weak muscle rehabilitation patients, mounted on the upper arm The upper and lower arm cuff, the lower arm cuff to be mounted to the lower arm, the upper arm frame is extended to be mounted from the upper arm cuff, the lower arm frame is mounted to extend from the lower arm cuff, the upper arm frame and the lower arm frame is centered on the elbow joint A mechanism part configured to include a rotary connection part connected to rotate and a gear part provided on the rotary connection part to rotate the rotary connection part by a motor to operate the upper limb to bend or extend the upper limb; A rotation angle sensor attached to the rotation connection part to measure a rotation angle of the elbow joint when the upper limb is bent or extended by the force of the arm itself; And a control unit controlling an operation of the mechanism unit to extend or bend the upper limb in the opposite direction by the rotation angle of the joint measured by the rotation angle sensor.
   
   
    The apparatus may further include a force sensor provided in any one of the upper and lower thin frames to measure a force applied to the arm when the upper limb is bent or extended, and the control unit may calculate the force calculated by the force sensor when the mechanism is operated. It characterized in that for controlling the force applied to the mechanism portion.
   
     
   
    Upper limbs, lower extremities, rehabilitation

title: Peritoneal dialysis catheter with fixing end
abstract: The utility model discloses a peritoneal dialysis catheter with a fixing end. The peritoneal dialysis catheter comprises a macroporous hollow tube which can be placed at the pelvic floor of a human body; pores are arranged on the tube wall of the macroporous hollow tube; the two ends of the macroporous hollow tube are connected with a microporous hollow tube respectively; the port of the microporous hollow tube on one side is connected with a solid fixing end; the port of the microporous hollow tube on the other side is connected with a terylene sleeve which can be connected with an external connecting tube; and micropores are arranged on the tube wall of the microporous hollow tube. The peritoneal dialysis catheter disclosed by the utility model is simple in structure, smart in design, safe and reliable; a novel dialysis catheter with proper length can be selected; and tube drift does not happen easily, the liquid replacing time can be reduced, the areas for clearing metabolic waste are increased.

title: Heat dissipation device
abstract: A heat dissipation device includes a first and a second housing, at least one pipe, and a working fluid. The first and the second housing internally respectively defines a first and a second chamber, in which a first and a second wick structure is respectively formed, and has at least one first and second opening communicated with the first and the second chamber respectively. The pipe has a pipe body, and a first and second extended portion, which respectively has a first and a second open end, and a first and a second through opening, and is inserted into and connected to the first and the second chamber via the first and the second opening respectively. The pipe internally defines a pipe chamber, in which a pipe wick structure is formed. The working fluid is provided in the first and the second, and the pipe chamber.

title: Two-Polar plate in grid flow-field distribution structure
abstract: The utility model discloses a two-polar plate in a grid flow-field distribution structure, which adopts a grid flow-field distribution structure. The structure has unclogged airflow and uniform distribution, and is easy to realize the management of water balance. The electrical property of the utility model is obviously superior to a two-polar plate in a parallel concave groove type flow-field distribution structure.

title: Thermally bondable polyterephthalate/polyethylene composite fiber with high interfacial adhesive strength
abstract: The present invention relates to a heat-sealable composite fiber composed of polyethyl terephthalate and polyethylene, and the composite fiber is intercalated at the interface between two polymers comprising a polyester / polyethylene block copolymer having compatibility with the two polymers as a compatibilizer. It is characterized in that, such a heat-sealed composite fiber has the advantages such as excellent interfacial adhesion between the two polymers, excellent heat sealability and carding properties.

title: Master sound recording discs for gramophone record mfr. - where recording is cut directly into a metal or alloy disc
abstract: The master disc is pref. made of an alloy of non-ferrous metals, esp. using tin, lead, aluminium, silver, copper, and/or indium. Improves the fidelity of the recording and also simplifies the complicated series of operations normally involved in the plating processes used for record mfr. Master discs are usually made using a thin disc of aluminium coated on both sides with a lacquer, in which the recording is cut using a stylus surrounded by a small heater coil which facilitates cutting, but the heat alters the plasticity of the lacquer and the fidelity of high-frequency signal recording. By using a metal or alloy disc with no lacquer, the dimensions of the cutter stylus can be chosen so no heater coil is required, and fidelity is improved together with the signal/noise ratio. The metal disc can be cut with a diamond cutting stylus and reduces the number of plating operations normally employed in the electroforming of the stamping negatives used to press records.

title: Traveling vehicle system
abstract: This traveling vehicle system is provided with a traveling path network including traveling paths (R5, R6, R23), a plurality of traveling vehicles (3), and a traveling vehicle controller. The traveling vehicle controller has: an abnormality ascertainment unit for ascertaining an abnormality on the downstream side traveling path of a branching section (S2) at least comprising the traveling path (R6); and an entrance determination unit which, if a traveling vehicle (3B) passing through the branching section (S2) immediately before enters onto the traveling path (R6), and a traveling vehicle (3A) passing through the branching section (S2) immediately after is about to enter in succession onto the traveling path (R6), omits a determination as to whether or not the traveling vehicle (3A) has entered onto the traveling path (R6) when an abnormality has not yet been ascertained by the abnormality ascertainment unit and makes a determination as to whether or not the traveling vehicle (3A) has entered onto the traveling path (R6) when an abnormality is ascertained by the abnormality ascertainment unit.

title: Air nailer operation switching device
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] In an air nailing machine, the structure for the switching mechanism of continuous hammering and single shot hammering and the trigger lock mechanism is simplified and the switching operation is simplified. A switching pin 10 is rotatably provided within a moving range of a trigger 7 and an idler 8, and a radial cutout 10a is formed in the switching pin 10 so that the switching pin 10 is rotated around its axis. Depending on the orientation of the notch 10a, the notch 10a allows the pivoting of the trigger 7 and the return of the idler 8 to the front position, and the notch 10a.   The second position in which the pivoting of the trigger 7 is allowed by the second position and the rest part 10d of the notch 10a restricts the return of the idler 7 to the front position, and the rest part 10d restricts the turning of the trigger 7. By setting the position 3 and rotating the switching pin 10, it is possible to switch between the three operating states of continuous shot, single shot and trigger lock.

title: Hydraulic stroke locking mechanism for pneumatic actuator
abstract: The invention relates to a hydraulic stroke locking mechanism for a pneumatic actuator. The upper end of an upper piston rod of a double-piston-rod hydraulic cylinder upwardly penetrates out of the center of an upper cylinder cover, and the lower end of a lower piston rod downwardly penetrates out from the center of a lower cylinder cover; a piston rod stroke limit component is mounted on the upper cylinder cover; the lower cylinder cover is fixedly mounted on a support, the lower piston rod is inserted into the support from a piston rod insertion hole from top to bottom, and the lower end of the lower piston rod is fixedly connected with the upper end of a push rod of the pneumatic actuator. The hydraulic stroke locking mechanism is reasonable in structure and safe and reliable to operate, has two functions of valve position locking and manual operation, can quickly lock the push rod of the pneumatic actuator at any position in a stroke range together with a valve spool component of a valve and is simple and laborsaving to operate; besides, the hydraulic stroke locking mechanism can serve as a hydraulic manual device used for operating the valve in emergencies, emergency stop of a device after valve fault is avoided, the pneumatic actuator applying the hydraulic stroke locking mechanism does not need to be added with a handwheel mechanism, and cost waste is avoided.

title: Timepiece for separately driving with analog and digital displays and method thereof
abstract: PURPOSE: A watch with a number displayable needle and a method of controlling the display of the number are provided to enable a time indicated by an analog needle to be easily learned since the numbers, displayed by an hour-indicator and a minute-indicator, are displayed to have correct positions. CONSTITUTION: A watch with a number displayable needle comprises an analog assembly(20), an MPU(12) and an analog actuator(16). The analog assembly comprises a character plate(22), an hour-indicator(36), an hour hand and a minute hand. Numbers are marked on the character plate so that parts around a reference point are divided into 12 segments to recognize a time. The hour-indicator visually displays the hour-indicating data and the minute-indicating date, which are input. The hour hand and the minute hand are installed on each surface. The hour and minute hands are coupled independently of at least one rotating shafts, which are located on the reference point. The hand and minute hands indicate the hour and the minute according to the rotation of the rotating shafts.

title: Method and system for encrypting shared documents for transit and storage
abstract: A method and system is provided for encrypting documents for transit and storage where the interactive end user has no direct responsibility and takes no action for creating, protecting, using or deleting an encryption key. A clear text document located on a client system is encrypted, and the cipher text document is transmitted from the client system to the encryption server system. At the request of the client system, a cipher text document stored on the encryption server system is retrieved, transmitted from the encryption server system to the client system, and decrypted. At the request of the client system, a clear text document stored on the encryption server system is retrieved, encrypted, transmitted from the encryption server system to the client system, and decrypted.

title: 2T2C signal margin test mode using different pre-charge levels for BL and/BL
abstract: The present invention provides a test mode section for facilitating a worst case product test sequence for signal margin to ensure full product functionality over the entire component lifetime taking all aging effects into account. A semiconductor memory test mode configuration includes a first capacitor for storing digital data The capacitor connects a cell plate line to a first bit line through a first select transistor. The first select transistor is activated through a connection to a word line. A second capacitor stores digital data and connects the cell plate line to a second bit line through a second select transistor. The second select transistor is also activated through a connection to the word line. A sense amplifier is connected to the first and second bit lines and measures a differential read signal on the first and second bit lines. A potential is connected to the first bit line through a third transistor and changes a pre-charge signal level on the first bit line when the third transistor is turned on to reduce the differential read signal.

title: Hair repair kit
abstract: The present invention provides a new and improved kit for use in conjunction with a hair conditioning treatment. The kit includes a container having an opened top, a closed bottom, four sidewalls, an inner surface and an outer surface, and a cover hingedly attached to the open top. There are at least two receiving areas: a plastic cap receiving area defined upon the inner surface, and a cotton strip receiving area defined upon the inner surface. A plurality of plastic caps are included in the kit. Each of the plastic caps has a closed top and opened bottom, and a peripheral edge defining the opened bottom. Each of the caps is adapted to be worn upon the head of the user, furthermore each of the plastic caps is stacked one upon the other and positioned within the plastic cap receiving area of the container. A number of cotton strips are also included in the kit. Each cotton strip is of substantially similar dimensions and is adapted to encircle the scalp of a user. The cotton strips are adapted to be positioned within the cotton strip receiving area of the container. A paper sleeve having a first end, a second end, an intermediate extent, an inner surface and an outer surface, is adapted to be secured about the cotton strips. The paper sleeve and the cotton strips are adapted to be positioned within the cotton strip receiving area of the container.

title: Brushless DC spindle motor startup control
abstract: Angular position of a polyphase brushless DC motor rotor is determined by the steps of generating a sequence of pulses with a programmed digital microcontroller, sequentially applying the pulses to selected ones of the plural windings or winding pairs, and sequentially measuring differential inductive coupling between the selected ones of the windings and selected others of the windings without rotating the rotor. Once angular position is determined, a multi-mode startup sequence is carried out to spin up the motor to a desired rotational velocity without any counter-rotation at startup.

Once angular position is determined, a multi-mode startup sequence is carried out to spin up the motor to a desired rotational velocity without any counter-rotation at startup.

title: Metal effect pigments comprising a mixed inorganic/organic layer, method for the production of such metal effect pigments, and use thereof
abstract: The invention relates to metallic effect pigments with coating, comprising a platelet-shaped substrate, where the coating comprises at least one hybrid inorganic/organic layer, the hybrid layer having at least partly an inorganic network that has one or more inorganic oxide components, and having at least one organic component, the organic component being at least partly an organic oligomer and/or polymer which is covalently bonded at least partly to the inorganic network via one or more organic network formers. The invention further relates to a method of producing these metallic effect pigments, and to their use.

title: Novel electrical power cabinet device
abstract: The invention provides a novel electrical power cabinet device which is used for installing a power device (9). The novel electrical power cabinet device comprises an electrical cabinet body (199), a fixed beam (7) which is fixed in the electrical cabinet body (199), and an elastic clamping component which is connected with the internal end of the power device (9). The elastic clamping component comprises two wedge-shaped clamping blocks (8) which are symmetrically arranged. An abutting open spring (88) is arranged between the two wedge-shaped clamping blocks (8) and used for elastically opening the two wedge-shaped clamping blocks (8). The external side of each wedge-shaped clamping block is provided with a wedge-shaped surface (810), and the end part of one side, which is close to the fixed beam (7) of the wedge-shaped surface is hinged with a rolling wheel (82) through a fixed shaft (81).

title: Laminated glass and laminate used therein
abstract: Provided is highly heat-insulating laminated glass configured so that an infrared reflective layer formed by fixing a composition containing a polymerizable liquid crystal compound is sandwiched between intermediate resin films and placed between glass sheets having two curved surfaces of mutually different curvatures, wherein the intermediate resin film in contact with the glass sheet having the greater curvature is made thicker than the intermediate resin film in contact with the glass sheet having the lower curvature, whereby the highly heat-insulating laminated glass is configured so that the infrared reflective layer formed by fixing the composition containing the polymerizable liquid crystal compound is sandwiched between the intermediate resin films and placed between the glass sheets having two curved surfaces of mutually different curvatures, making it possible to provide laminated glass that has reduced wrinkling and breakage in the intermediate resin films and the infrared reflective layer.

title: Improvements in or relating to joining materials by high frequency heating
abstract: 623,736. Seaming rubber: moulding hollow plastic articles. STANDARD TELEPHONES & CABLES, Ltd., CLARKE, C. E. EADON-, and MICKLEWRIGHT, P. L. April 13, 1946, No. 11397. [Classes 70 and 87 (ii)] [Also in Groups VIII and XI] Hollow articles such as bulbs made from a plurality of sheets of thermo-plastic material such as rubber or polyvinyl chloride are edge-seamed by placing the sheets between electrodes one at least of which has a dividing and seaming edge, applying a high frequency alternating or pulsating electric potential for a sufficient period to soften the thermo-plastic material, removing or substantially reducing the potential and subsequently applying a mechanical pressure sufficient to form a seam. In a device for seaming rubber bulbs, 8 bottom electrodes 16 (Fig. 14) fixed to back plate 31 are covered with a sheet of unvulcanized rubber, two plugs per mould are then placed in position by means of dimpled template 33 and then another sheet of rubber and top electrode 32 placed in position. The current is switched on and after the rubber has softened the power is cut off and the electrodes brought together by pressure, firstly to consolidate the welded joint and then to cut away excess material. The electrodes are preferably chamfered on the inside. Additional electrode limbs may be provided to form pockets in articles such as air cushions. The frequency used is normally above 5 megacycles. The Provisional Specification describes also a similar process in which the heating is produced by any suitable means.

title: Heat pipe type heat exchanger unit
abstract: The invention provides a heat pipe type heat exchanger unit which comprises a housing, a heat pipe and radiating fins, wherein the housing comprises a first part and a second part which are hermetically isolated from each other through a partition plate; the heat pipe penetrates the partition plate and is arranged in the housing; the radiating fins are connected to the heat pipe; the first part is communicated with indoor air, and the second part is communicated with outdoor air, so that the part of the heat pipe, which is positioned in the first part, forms the evaporation end, and the part which is positioned in the second part forms the condensation end. The heat pipe type heat exchanger unit can use cold energy of a natural environment for indoor cooling down of a machine room or a base station, completely isolate the contact between the outdoor air and the indoor air while using the cold energy of the environment, and ensure that indoor humidity and cleanliness of the machine room or the base station can not be affected.
