title: Manufacturing method of micro-fuse for industry and product of the same
abstract: A manufacturing method of micro-fuse for industry and its product are disclosed in the present invention. Plural processing portions are pressed on a material belt, in which two opposite and non-contacted conducting bars are provided inside these processing portions. An insulation housing between these two conducting bars is injected and molded. The housing has an opening through which a conducting wire is connected with two conducting bars. The opening of the housing is closed such that the connection part between two conducting bars and the material belt is pressed and cut off. The cut-off part is bent toward the housing side so as to facilitate and fasten the manufacturing process of micro-fuse.

title: Insulin injection device and its operation method
abstract: The present invention allows the patient to be somewhat cognitively or even visually impaired to use it safely and conveniently without complicated button manipulation, and eliminates the need to learn how to use the hospital for a long time and immediately use it with a brief description. In this way, according to the change in the patient's condition, the already set insulin dosage can be automatically adjusted within the appropriate range and infused into the patient, so that the blood sugar control of the patient can be more accurately performed.

title: Device for testing chipping of painting layer for vehicle
abstract:
The present invention relates to an apparatus for evaluating chipping properties of automotive coatings, and more particularly, to be configured to be most similar to an environment in which a chipping problem occurs in an actual vehicle, and to easily test chipping properties for coatings. It relates to a chipping property evaluation device of the coating film.
   
   
    To this end, the present invention includes a first chamber having a structure in which the inlet and outlet of the external impact object is formed on the top and one side, respectively; An air pressure generating device installed inside the first chamber to inject air pressure toward the outlet; A second chamber having an inlet formed in one side thereof in communication with the outlet of the first chamber and having a collection box for collecting the external impact material at a bottom thereof; The present invention provides a chipping property evaluation device for an automotive coating film composed of a jig embedded in the second chamber to fix a coating film specimen.

title: Crop spraying positioning method based on binocular vision gridding partition matching algorithm
abstract: The invention discloses a crop spraying positioning method based on a binocular vision gridding partition matching algorithm and belongs to the technical field of medicine application of crops. The method comprises the following steps of: utilizing double cameras to calibrate target crops and obtaining an image of the target crops; respectively obtaining a binary image of a left camera target crop and a binary image of a right camera target crop; respectively carrying out gridding division on the binary image of the target crop obtained by the left camera and the binary image of the target crop obtained by the right camera; carrying out matched searching on each point of a left side gridding region in a right side gridding region to obtain mutually-matched points to form a matched point pair; calculating a left and right image vision difference by each matched point pair and solving a three-dimensional coordinate of the point of the target crop corresponding to the matched point pair; deleting an error point and carrying out fitting treatment on the point of the target crop to obtain a fitting curve or curve surface; and planning a sprayer path according to the fitting curve or curve surface. The crop spraying positioning method disclosed by the invention realizes extraction and positioning of a three-dimensional information outline of the target crop.

title: Semiconductor air conditioner
abstract: The utility model relates to a semiconductor air conditioner, which comprises a semiconductor refrigeration slice, heat insulation material used for fixing the semiconductor refrigeration slice, and radiators which are respectively arranged at the front face and the reverse face of the semiconductor refrigeration slice, wherein, the radiators and the heat insulation material are matched to fix the semiconductor refrigeration slice between the radiators; the thickness of the heat insulation material of the utility model is larger than the thickness of the semiconductor refrigeration slice in order to solve the problem of the existing similar product that hot and cold exchange phenomenon caused by that the distance between the two radiator is smaller can occur; meanwhile, the back of a bottom plate of each radiator is provided with a convex structure having a size which is the same with that of the semiconductor refrigeration slice, the convex parts are tightly contacted with the surfaces of the semiconductor refrigeration slice, and the non convex parts are tightly contacted with the surfaces of the heat insulation material. The structure can cause that the distance between the two radiator can be increased, and thereby, the effect that the cold quantity or the heat quantity is emitted to space which needs refrigerating or heating can be improved.

title: Systems and Methods for an Improved Electronic Table Game
abstract: Certain embodiments of the present invention provide a gaming device including a display adapted to provide a dealer representation to a player at a player position, a sensor adapted to sense at least one of a location and an orientation of the player at the player position, and a processor adapted to generate the dealer representation to interact with the player based at least in part on the sensed at least one of the location and the orientation.

title: Cabin air supercharged aircraft internal combustion engine
abstract: An aircraft having a user region therein within which pressurized air at selected pressures can be maintained using an environmental control system provided in the aircraft, and a utility region outside a utility boundary wall of the user region within which selected equipment for the aircraft is located. An internal combustion engine, provided as an intermittent combustion engine, is provided in the utility region having an air intake coupled to combustion chambers therein and a rotatable output shaft also coupled to those combustion chambers for generating force with an air transfer duct extends between the user region and the air intake so as to be capable of conveying pressurized air to that air intake.

title: Film optical addressing electric potential sensor used for detecting Hg2+ and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses film light addressing potential sensor for measuring Hg2+ and the manufacturing method. The sensor is based on the light addressing potential sensor (LAPS), a layer of sensitive film is produced on its surface with laser pulse depositing technology. The invention synthesizes the sensitive material at first, which is used as the target of pulse laser deposition. Then it produces a fixed metal layer through magnetism control sputtering technology on LAPS, and then carries on the process of film with laser pulse depositing technology and device. The film sensor is sensitive to the Hg2+ in the liquid; it can detect the content of Hg2+.

title: Subscriber name display method
abstract:
PURPOSE: To contrive the attainment of a convenient and efficient usage by counting each data of an electronic telephone directory, soring data based on the result of count and displaying the data with the high frequency of usage.  
     CONSTITUTION: Ten data with the high frequency of usage among electronic telephone directory data are displayed on a display device 10 by calling as an automatic call key. When an object name exists in the data, automatic dialing is applied by depressing the key of the name. When the object name is not listed therein, an index key is depressed for retrieval. Moreover, data used for preceding and next preceding use are displayed on the redial key column of the display device 10. In case of dialing from a ten-key, the telephone number is displayed on the redial key column. In depressing a software key, the screen display is changed and the selection screen of sending caller names, and in dialing through the selection of a caller name, the caller name is displayed on the display device 10 together with a ringer at the incoming call to an incoming call side telephone set. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1988,JPO&Japio

title: Vibration mechanism of vibrating subsoiler
abstract: The invention relates to a vibrating mechanism for a vibrating subsoiler. The vibrating mechanism is characterized by comprising an eccentric shaft, a cross-shaped shaft coupling, a lever and sub-soiling shovels; one end of the eccentric shaft is a hexagonus spline shaft end, the other end is an eccentric shaft end, and the eccentric shaft is a cantilever shaft formed by being supported by two bearing seats; the spline shaft end of the eccentric shaft is connected with the power output shaft of a tractor through the shaft coupling, and the eccentric shaft end of the eccentric shaft is articulated with the cross-shaped shaft coupling through a bearing and a clip spring; the lower end of the cross-shaped shaft coupling is hinged at one end of the lever, a pair of overhanging arms is arranged at the other end of the lever, and the sub-soiling shovels are vertically fixed on the pair of the overhanging arms. Due to the adoption of the lever principle, the penetration angles of the sub-soiling shovels are changeable, so that the sub-soiling shovels penetrate through the soil more easily, the resistance of the soil to the shovel surfaces is reduced, and the tractive resistance of the vibrating subsoiler is further reduced. The invention is widely applied to various vibrating subsoilers.

title: A control system with braking function of series excited direct current cross-connected double motor
abstract: The invention discloses a control system with braking function of series excited direct current cross-connected double motor used for electric motor cars, which is characterized by comprising a core cell microcontroller (MCU), a complete signal inputting and conditioning circuit, an output executive circuit, a fault display circuit, an input-output isolating circuit, a power electronic switch, a drive circuit thereof and the like; two series excited direct current motors are crossly connected, namely the single motor self is serially excited and two motors are connected in parallel; the main circuit connection driven by the motors consists of two current fly-wheel diodes, four power switch electronic devices, two contactors, etc. The motor connection mode, main circuit and controller disclosed in the invention can realize the functions of motors of rotating the motors normally and reversely, starting current limit, regulating speed, braking, etc. The motors can realize regenerative braking and has high efficiency, and the whole system has characteristics of perfect control functions, high reliability and the like.

title: Roller bearing
abstract: An object of the present invention is to increase a lubricating oil reservoir without reducing the overall rigidity of a cage so that the axial end face of a roller is easily lubricated.   In a roller bearing in which a plurality of rollers 3 arranged between inner and outer rings 2 and 1 are accommodated in a pocket portion 4a of a cage 4, each pocket portion 4a faces an axial end surface 3a of the roller 3. A lubricating oil reservoir 10 is provided, and the lubricating oil reservoir 10 is provided on either side of the pocket portion 4a in the axial direction, and the lubricating oil reservoir 10 is provided on one side in the axial direction and the other side. The pocket portion 4a provided on the side of the door is mixed. By securing the lubricating oil reservoir 10, even if the axial thickness of the base portion 4c of the retainer 4 is partially reduced, the thin portion is dispersed in the base portions 4c on both sides in the axial direction, thereby suppressing the overall rigidity reduction. Can do. Further, if the lubricating oil reservoir 20 is provided on the inner surface 9a of the flange 9 of the outer ring 1 or the inner ring 2 facing the axial end surface 3a of the roller 3, the lubrication of the axial end surface 3a of the roller 3 can be maintained well. . title: Biological dehydrogenation preparation method of 6 alpha-methylprednisolone intermediate
abstract: The invention relates to a biological dehydrogenation preparation method of a 6 alpha-methylprednisolone intermediate, which uses a compound of formula (1) as a substrate and obtains a compound of formula (2) by adopting a simple arthrobacterium biological dehydrogenation method. The process comprises the following steps of: crushing the formula (1) compound or dissolving the formula (1) compound by using a solvent; adding to a fermentation tank with cultivated arthrobacterium to perform biotransformation; extracting, separating, and refining; drying, and then obtaining a dehydrogenation matter, i.e. the formula (2) compound. The invention can achieve the biotransformation rate of 70-90 percent.

The invention can achieve the biotransformation rate of 70-90 percent.

title: Personal injury claim management system
abstract: A technique for computerized management of a plaintiff's personal injury case is disclosed. This technique includes establishing records, each reflective of the phase of a corresponding personal injury claim. The first phase corresponds to pre-negotiation of the claim and includes at least a first and second subordinate pre-negotiation stage. Each of these stages includes the generation of a number of prompts directed to obtaining information about the claim. A given record may also be set to a second management phase corresponding to negotiation of the claim or a third management phase representing settlement of the claim. In addition, the present invention discloses a technique to automatic ly generate a demand letter and calculate settlement amounts from information gathered in the record during pursuit of the claim. The management system may also include scheduling various prompts and correspondence with the program in accordance with a predetermined schedule spanning several days.

abstract: The present invention provides a kind of thickening agent and its applications, by the material composition of following weight percent：Surfactant 50-65%, organic solvent 15-25%, surplus are water.Difference and intermolecular collaboration facilitation of the thickening agent according to surfactant salt tolerance, by selecting different types of surfactant to be compounded, it plays a role respectively under different salinities, and with the increase of salinity, promote the growth of rodlike worm shape micella, micella gradually increases so that the viscosity of system increases rapidly.Have the characteristics that resistance to high salinity, recycling, without chemical treatment under the conditions of high salinity, it can be directly used for preparing fracturing fluid or oil displacement agent, realize that multiple types return the recycling of drain, by using the site operation pattern of " return drain and prepare oil displacement agent in the clear water preparing fracturing fluid-row's of returning preparing fracturing fluid-end ", the target of oil field operation " no pollution, zero-emission " is realized.

title: System for creating linerless pressure sensitive coil of stamps
abstract: A system for creating a coil of stamps from a web of stamp material having an adhesive applied to a side thereof is provided. The system includes an anvil and a perforation die cooperating therewith with the web passing therebetween in order to perforate the web. The web is passed between the anvil and the die with the adhesive side thereof facing the anvil. The anvil is chilled so as to inhibit the adhesive from adhering thereto as the web is perforated. The anvil may be chilled from an outer surface thereof, or may be hollow and chilled from an inner surface thereof. In the former case, the system preferably includes a trough holding a chilling material through which at least a portion of the outer surface of the anvil is passed. Where the anvil is chilled from an inner surface thereof, a cooling fluid is preferably passed therethrough.

title: Hierarchical mobility label-based network
abstract: A system includes a label edge router associated with a geographical region, an area label edge router associated with an area that includes the region, and a route reflector associated with the area. The label edge router registers a first mobile node, creates a mobility binding for the first mobile node, and sends a first internal update message that includes the mobility binding. The area label edge router receives a second internal update message that carries contents of the first internal update message, updates a forwarding information base based on the second internal update message to establish a first label switched path, and sends an external update message. The route reflector receives the first internal update message, sends the second internal update message to the area label edge router, and receives the external update message from the area label edge router.

title: Apparatus and method for collecting debris in a well bore
abstract: A downhole tool (20) is provided for use within a casing (10). The tool includes a collector tool that comprises: a cylindrical body (21) having an external diameter smaller than the casing diameter so as to form an annular gap (5) between the body and the casing; a first downhole fluid passage (30) provided in the body and having an upper inlet (32) and a lower outlet (34); at least one secondary fluid passage (40) extending between the first downhole fluid passage and the annular gap; a filter means (36) arranged between said at least one secondary fluid passage and said outlet; and a first sleeve member (60) provided on the body and adapted to move between a first position in which said at least one secondary fluid passage is closed and a second position in which said at least one secondary fluid passage is open.

title: Piston-type water-leakage protector
abstract: The utility model relates to a piston-type water-leakage protector which comprises a shell, an impeller, a piston, a movable base and a reducing gear set. Water flow pushes the piston to drive a toothed plate guide slot in the movable base to be engaged with a last-stage gear of the reducing gear set; and the last-stage gear in the reducing gear set transmits torque to the toothed plate guide slotto lead the toothed plate guide slot to move so as to control separation of a door-closing rod in the piston from the movable base, thus realizing automatic closing function of water-leakage. The value of water flow continuously passing through the piston-type water-leakage protector once is taken as a standard for judging water-leakage, and can be set.

title: Terminal equipment for token passing data communication system
abstract:
PURPOSE: To attain the token passing data communication applicable in common by setting a signal processing procedure corresponding to any of systems such as single token system, single packet system and multitoken system according to the signal processing system of a common transmission line.  
     CONSTITUTION: A transmission control section 110 controls the transmission by the reception of a free token or a transmission request 132, and a control program section 202 is a storage section for a control program realizing a communication algorithm of a token ring 5 or a loop applied with a node equipment. A return frame reception control section 113 is a function section supervising the return from a loop 5 of a sent frame and consists of a detection circuit 128 of a frame end field and an SA coincidence detection circuit 127 detecting the head of a reception frame. A selector 106 is a selection circuit sending either a free token or a transmission frame and controlled by an SEL2 control section 112. A shift register 107 converts a parallel data into a serial data and sends the result to a transmission line 5. Reception and transmission FIFOs 116, 108 are memories adjusting the difference in data transmission speed between a common transmission line 5 and a memory bus 117. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1988,JPO&Japio

title: Sludge suction car
abstract: A sludge suction wheel equipped with a dry vacuum pump and having a desired suction force is provided.   A sludge suction wheel 1 is a sludge suction wheel 1 equipped with a sludge recovery mechanism 2. The sludge recovery mechanism 2 has a receiver tank 4, a casing 75, and a rotor 76 for storing the recovered sludge. And a dry vacuum pump 7 for reducing the pressure inside the receiver tank 4 and a cooling mechanism 10 for cooling the dry vacuum pump 7. The cooling mechanism 10 includes an oil cooler 113 for cooling the coolant, and a liquid pump 112 for circulating the coolant through the oil cooler 113 in the cooling mechanism 10. title: Building unit for integral masonry
abstract: The unit has been designed for use in all types of wall, be they retaining walls, load bearing walls, facings or partitions and to allow the reinforcement of the same by both vertical and horizontal reinforcement. The units may be employed in exposed walling or rendered or faced walling, with or without reinforcement. As such the unit (1b) is provided with yielding lines (5d) set on one of its stretcher faces, which enable access to internal holes (11d) of different sizes by which to house the said vertical reinforcement. The access to the hole is made by the removal of detachable side sections (6d) set within yield lines (5d). The considerable width of the holes (llc) permits the simultaneous reinforcement of both ends of the unit without affecting the external face (13) or the exposed face of the wall. Internal radial dividers (15) set within the holes (lid) are tapered towards both the central core and the perimeter of the hole (5e) to enable their easy removal when vertical reinforcement is required, and serve as mortar savers when no such reinforcement is required.
text: Building unit for integral masonry The unit has been designed for use in all types of wall, be they retaining walls, load bearing walls, facings or partitions and to allow the reinforcement of the same by both vertical and horizontal reinforcement. The units may be employed in exposed walling or rendered or faced walling, with or without reinforcement. As such the unit (1b) is provided with yielding lines (5d) set on one of its stretcher faces, which enable access to internal holes (11d) of different sizes by which to house the said vertical reinforcement. The access to the hole is made by the removal of detachable side sections (6d) set within yield lines (5d). The considerable width of the holes (llc) permits the simultaneous reinforcement of both ends of the unit without affecting the external face (13) or the exposed face of the wall. Internal radial dividers (15) set within the holes (lid) are tapered towards both the central core and the perimeter of the hole (5e) to enable their easy removal when vertical reinforcement is required, and serve as mortar savers when no such reinforcement is required.

title: Content recording and reproducing device
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a content recording and reproducing device allowing a user who tries to view a program content to get to know items to which general viewers pay attention with respect to the program content.SOLUTION: The content recording and reproducing device comprises: video recording means which records a program content transmitted from a broadcast station or a program content transmitted from a server connected via a network; reproduction means which reproduces the program content; a blog (Blog) acquisition part which acquires blogs relating to program information on the program content; and topic word acquisition part which sums up the number of blogs containing keywords for each keyword contained in the blogs to calculate a degree as a topic and acquires keywords with degrees as topics not less than a predetermined threshold, as topic words.

title: Process for producing semiconductor device substrate
abstract:
A process of producing an SOI-structured semiconductor device substrate, comprising 
bonding polished surfaces of two Si-monocrystal wafers (1a, 1b), at least one of which surfaces bears an oxide film (1c), and uniformly eliminating part of the thickness of one of the wafers (1b) parallel to the polished surface, characterised by: 
reducing the diameter of said one wafer (1b) so that it is slightly smaller than that of the other wafer (1a), thereby exposing an unbonded uniform annular periphery on the surface of said other wafer (1a); 
forming, on the surface of said one wafer (1b) and said periphery, a material (1d) providing greater resistance to polishing than said one wafer (1b); and 
polishing said one wafer (1b). 
     Even when only a few µm thick, the material, e.g. SiO₂, provides accurate thickness control of the thin film, and thus acts as a polishing guard.

title: Supercritical fluid processing equipment
abstract: A supercritical fluid is easily reusable.   Processors (10A, 10B) capable of increasing / decreasing a fluid in a compression chamber (13) by a piston (12) sliding in a cylinder (11), a hydraulic actuator (30) for driving the piston (12), and a fluid supplied to the compression chamber (13). A pressure accumulator 40 storing at a predetermined pressure; a fluid passage 17 that enables fluid to flow between the pressure accumulator 40 and the compression chamber 13; and a fluid control means that controls the fluid flow in the fluid passage 17. And the fluid stored in the pressure accumulator 40 is introduced into the compression chamber 13 through the fluid passage 17, and the piston 12 is driven by the hydraulic actuator 30 to compress the fluid in the compression chamber 13 so that the fluid is in a supercritical state. A predetermined process is performed on the processing object M in the compression chamber 13 with the fluid in the supercritical state, and after this process, the fluid in the compression chamber 13 is passed through the fluid passage 17 by the pressure in the compression chamber 13. It is returned to the accumulator 40.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Audio verification of digital subscriber line connection
abstract: A test matrix switch-associated mechanism conducts an interactive communication session with the butt set of an incumbent local exchange carrier (ILEC) technician, to verify the intended connectivity of a digital subscriber line pair through the switch to customer premises equipment subscribing to digital service from a competitive local exchange carrier (CLEC). Connectivity through the switch is controlled by way of a supervisory control processor that may be downloaded with communication and test control software from a remote test unit, in association with one or more CLECs that are served by the ILEC's central office equipment. Once loaded with this control software, including a routine for executing the connectivity verification mechanism of the invention, the switch's control processor sources digitally synthesized test signals for application to a line under test, and conducts a digitally-based analysis of replies to such signals as supplied by a craftsperson's butt set. The executed routine enables an ILEC technician to remotely verify and complete establishment of a digital subscriber line path through the switch for the digital service supplied by the CLEC.

title: System and method of monitoring welding information
abstract: A method of operating a welding system includes receiving welding data corresponding to a welding session for a weld, receiving a location selection from an operator, and displaying on a display a graphical representation of welding parameters of the welding selection corresponding to the location selection. The welding data includes welding parameters, including a work angle of a welding torch, a travel angle of the welding torch, a contact tip to work distance, a travel speed of the welding torch along a path of the weld, an aim of the welding torch, or any combination thereof. The location selection corresponds to a point along the path of the weld traversed by the welding torch.

title: Sewing machine directly driven by motor and coupling mechanism thereof
abstract: The utility model discloses a sewing machine directly driven by a motor, comprising the motor, a coupling mechanism and an upper shaft. An output shaft of the motor is fixedly connected with a power input end of the coupling mechanism; a power output end of the coupling mechanism is fixedly connected with one end of the upper shaft; the output shaft of the motor is arranged at the same line with the upper shaft of the sewing machine; and the coupling mechanism comprises an upper-shaft coupler, a motor coupler, a cushion pad and a bearing, wherein the contact surface between the upper-shaft coupler and the cushion pad is three pedal-typed; and the contact surface between the cushion pad and the motor coupler is three pedal-typed. For the sewing machine, the upper-shaft coupler, the cushion pad and the motor coupler are mutually connected in the special three-pedal type embedding method, so that the area of the bearing surface of the cushion pad is larger, therefore, the service life of the cushion pad can be prolonged; and the cushion pad has a buffering function when the motor rotates, so that the vibration and the noise of the sewing machine can be reduced. The utility model also discloses the coupling mechanism.

title: A kind of electric cabinet structure
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of electric cabinet structures, including cabinet body, pedestal and stabilizer blade, the pedestal is arranged in the bottom of the cabinet body, more screw rods are welded at the top of the pedestal, the screw rod passes through the cabinet body and is fixed with nut, and the bottom of the pedestal is left and right to be arranged in parallel multiple stabilizer blades, forms gap between the two neighboring stabilizer blade, the first stabilizer blade is provided between the two neighboring stabilizer blade, first stabilizer blade is connect with the whorl of base；The present apparatus is by forming gap between stabilizer blade convenient for equipment transportation devices such as fork trucks, the first stabilizer blade is installed on pedestal again when being put in place, promotes the load-bearing capacity of cabinet body, is needed to install and remove pedestal according to user, when operation convenient for safeguarding using LED light, floor light.

title: Heat exchanger
abstract: PURPOSE:To obtain the heat exchanger, prominent in the property of maintenance and compact, by a method wherein heat transfer units, for flowing cooling medium therethrough, are separatably laminated through gaskets while cooling water is made to flow between the neighboring heat transfer untis. CONSTITUTION:In the heat exchanger, the heat transfer units 2, 4a, 4b, laminated through the gaskets 3, are clamped separatably and fixed with each other through through bolts 5, therefore, the heat exchanger is compact and provided with a high resistance to pressure. The refrigerant is supplid from a supplying header 12 and passes through inlet port 7b of respective units 2, 4a, 4b, a main body 7a, an outlet port 7c and a discharging pipe 7e, thereafter, is discharged out of a discharging header 13. Cooling water is supplied to the supplying parts 14a of respective air gap chambers 14 in the gaskets 3 from a supplying pipe 16 through communicating pipes 7e and flows to a discharging section 14b along turbulent flow promoting plates 15 into a direction reverse to the same of the refrigerant, thereafter, passes through communicating pipes 7f and is discharged out of a discharging pipe 17. In this case, heat exchange is effected between the refrigerant and the cooling water. When nuts 5a are removed, respective heat transfer units may be separated and water scale or the like, reserved in the air gap chambers 14, may be removed easily.

title: Diamond continuous circular saw blade
abstract: The invention relates to a diamond continuous circular saw blade. The diamond continuous circular saw blade comprises a basal body, wherein diamond bits are annularly arranged on the outer circumferential wall of the basal body and the diamond bits are integrally sintered on the basal body through pressure sintering. The diamond continuous circular saw blade has the advantages that the structure is simple, the design is reasonable, the diamond bits are designed to form the integrated saw blade which is not easily worn, and thereby the service life is prolonged.

title: An electrical motor
abstract: A DC motor comprises at least one disk stator (10) carrying an array of DC electromagnets (12) and confronting at least one disk rotor (20) carrying an array of permanent magnets (22). When the electromagnets are energised the stator and the rotor have like poles at the same radial positions, thus providing a repulsion force. The electromagnets are intermittently energized through a switching means as soon as the attraction forces of both magnetic fields are at maximum and then de-energized as the repulsion forces of both fields are at minimum so as to enable said rotor (20) to maintain continuous rotation. <IMAGE>

abstract: This invention relates to a lifting and transport machinery. The purpose of the invention is to improve ease of operation. The axis 9 is connected to a load by means of a cable block system. When lifting a load, the counterweight is deflected until the traverse takes an equilibrium position. 1 hp f-ly, 2 ill.

title: Process independent design for gate array devices
abstract: A unique gate array cell and ASIC library development methodology is taught which require no new simulations or new place and route to port a given device design to a same generation process technologies which are available from different vendors. This methodology equalizes the functionality and timing characteristics of the macrocell library on a plurality of alternate sources.

title: Apparatus for blood inspection
abstract:
PURPOSE: To prevent sticking or adsorption of blood cell and protein in platelet to a blood inspection apparatus made of a synthetic resin, by coupling a specified amount of water soluble non-ionic polymer on a blood contact surface of the apparatus.  
     CONSTITUTION: A blood inspection apparatus is made of a synthetic resin such as polymethylmethacrylate and polyethylene. A water soluble non-ionic polymer is coupled to a contact surface with blood on the inner surface of the apparatus by graft polymerization or the like. The polymer the amount of coupling is held with a range of 1W100μg/cm 2 , for example, by using polyacrylamide, polyvinyl pyrrolidone, polyvinyl alcohol or the like. Thus, the coupling of the water soluble non-ionic polymer can reduce the sticking of platelet or the like and the absorption of protein on the blood inspection apparatus, thereby obtaining correct inspection data.

title: Forming technology and forming device for liquid residues
abstract: The invention discloses a forming device for liquid residues generated in a direct coal liquefaction process. The forming device comprises a cooling tower and a forming trough, wherein the top of the cooling tower is provided with a liquid residue inlet and a steam inlet, and the bottom of the cooling tower is provided with a liquid residue outlet and a steam outlet; and the forming trough is internally provided with a water storage space, and the liquid residue outlet is communicated with the water storage space in the forming trough. According to a use method of the forming device, high-temperature liquid residues are subjected to heat transfer with water vapor in the cooling tower so as to be pre-cooled and then flow into the water storage space of the forming trough to be cooled and formed underwater. The forming device disclosed by the invention is applicable to a pollution-free forming process for liquid residues obtained in the direct coal liquefaction process.

title: Cloth-stripe button hole of garment
abstract: The utility model relates to a cloth-stripe button hole of garment. The position on a body of garment where needs to be provided with a button hole is sewn with cloth stripes which are arranged side by side and have certain width, the other ends of the cloth stripes arranged side by side are sewn with a button hole cloth binding edge, the gap among the cloth binding edge and cloth stripes are combined into a button hole. The sewing line of the garment body and the button hole cloth binding edge is sewn with a ragged edge again to cover on the button hole binding edge. The utility model is convenient for a button to fasten and exit, can set styles at the button hole cloth binding edge of the garment to beautify the garment, and is particularly applicable to tight underwear.

title: Together-in and together-out composite steaming box
abstract: The utility model relates to a together-in and together-out composite steaming box. A box body adopts a cordwood type structure, the end part of the box body is a cloth guide roller steaming re-heating zone, the lower part of the box body is a mesh belt steaming zone, the top plate of the box body and the top plate of a steam sealing port are both in indirect heating warm-keeping drip-proof structure, heating water containing trough with a groove structure is arranged on the bottom of the box body, and the box body is provided with a bottom frame. The together-in and together-out composite steaming box adopts the cordwood type structure, so that the transportation and the installation work of a large-size box body can be simplified.

A box body adopts a cordwood type structure, the end part of the box body is a cloth guide roller steaming re-heating zone, the lower part of the box body is a mesh belt steaming zone, the top plate of the box body and the top plate of a steam sealing port are both in indirect heating warm-keeping drip-proof structure, heating water containing trough with a groove structure is arranged on the bottom of the box body, and the box body is provided with a bottom frame. title: Self-priming step trough measurement tool
abstract: The invention discloses a self-priming step trough measurement tool comprising a basic square strip and a measurement adjusting rod. The front end of the basic square strip is provided with a square-opening blind hole. The tail end of the measurement adjusting rod extends into the square-opening blind hole. The front end of the measurement adjusting rod and the rear end of the basic square strip are respectively provided with a guide slide sleeve. The guide slide sleeves are internally provided with a vertical measurement rod respectively. The tail ends of the vertical measurement rods are respectively provided with a measurement pin block. The measurement pin blocks are internally provided with a magnetic strip respectively. With application of the aforementioned mode, height of the vertical measurement rods of the self-priming step trough measurement tool can be adjusted to be adaptive to different depths of step troughs. The measurement adjusting rod is moved so that the measurement pin blocks are enabled to be adsorbed on the two trough walls of the step troughs respectively and the measured value of trough width is obtained, and thus operation is convenient, stability is great and measurement accuracy is high.

title: Spawning new timelines during game session replay
abstract: Game sessions including one or more players in the game system can be recorded and stored as game records. A pre-recorded game session can be selected and replayed. However, in addition to providing a static replay of the game session, at any point during the replay of the game session, the game system may allow one or more players to take over the individual game characters and take control of the character. When the player takes control of the game character during playback, a new timeline with potentially different performance is spawned from the original timeline, and a new game record corresponding to the new timeline is created and stored.

title: Production of garlic snack
abstract:
PURPOSE: To produce tasteful garlic snack free from bad smell by frying sliced garlics or dried garlic flakes without coating.  
     CONSTITUTION: Garlics are sliced and fried without coating at about 150°C in a short time. Or garlics are sliced, washed with water, dipped in an organic acid of 3W4pH over about 3hr, washed with water, squeezed and fried without coating. Or dried garlic flakes are restored by dipping them in water, treated with an organic acid solution and fried without coating.

title: Termination of strength members of deep water cables
abstract: A method for terminating a cable ( 6 ) having at least one strength member ( 7 ). The method includes the steps of providing a cable termination comprising at least one termination chamber ( 2 ) for accommodating an end section of the strength member ( 7 ) and arranging and fastening an anchoring sleeve ( 12 ) around at least parts of the end section. The method further includes introducing the end section into the termination chamber ( 2 ) and fastening the end section by curing a polymer resin in the termination chamber ( 2 ) as well as a termination suitable for the method.

title: Paper feeder
abstract: (57) [Summary] [PROBLEMS] To prevent inconvenience such as occurrence of a jam by more effectively cleaning the surface of a separation roller. SOLUTION: A cleaning unit of a roller group constituting a sheet feeding device includes at least a cleaning member abutting on a surface of a separation roller and a cleaning member between a feed roller and a separation roller after detecting the absence of a transfer material during a sheet feeding operation. Control means for rotating the roller group for a predetermined time at a timing when there is no transfer material in the contact portion.

title: Rear suspension of motor car
abstract: PURPOSE:To contrive an improvement of a toe-in effect, by a method wherein mutual relative positions among a ball joint, two rubber bushings, a wheel center and the edge part of a stabilizer and a direction of the rubber bushings are specified for arrangement. CONSTITUTION:A ball joint 11 is arranged in the rear upper part of a wheel center W, and two rubber bushings 12 are arranged lower than the wheel center W respectively, while the surface P including the ball joing 11 and the rubber bushings 12 and 13 is arranged outside of the center W of the right and left of the wheel on a center height CL and on the ground GL, and the front rubber bushing 12 and the rear rubber bushings 13 are arranged forward and rearward respectively, in the vertical surface including the central axle C of the wheel. A connecting part between an end 15a of an arm 15 and an end 16a of a stabilizer is positioned in the rear of the ball joint 11 and the upper part of the center of an oscillation. With this constitution, an improvement of a toe-in effect can be contrived.

title: Pattern recognition dictionary generation device, pattern recognition device, and pattern recognition dictionary generation method
abstract: An object of the present invention is to maintain the accuracy of the recognition process and increase the speed in the pattern recognition process.   A pattern recognition dictionary generation device generates a pattern input unit, a feature extraction unit that extracts an n-dimensional feature, and a feature selection function that converts an n-dimensional feature into an m-dimensional feature, and serves as a feature selection dictionary. A feature selection dictionary generating unit to be stored in the storage medium; a detailed identification function for calculating the similarity of patterns; and a discrimination function generating unit for storing in the storage medium as an identification dictionary; and a partial space of the n-dimensional feature space In addition, a large classification feature selection function that converts an m-dimensional feature into an L-dimensional feature on an L-dimensional feature space that is a subspace of the m-dimensional feature space is generated, and a detailed identification function is used as a function on the L-dimensional feature space. A major classification discriminant function that generates a major classification discriminating function by conversion, stores the major classification feature selection function as a feature selection dictionary in a storage medium, and stores the major classification discrimination function as a discrimination dictionary in a storage medium It includes a detecting section, a. title: Fuel cell system
abstract: When stopping operation of a fuel cell, residual moisture in the fuel cell is efficiently discharged with a relatively simple configuration.   When the operation of a fuel cell (fuel cell stack) is stopped, the switch 15 is opened to shut off the output current of the fuel cell 1 and then the hydrogen dried from the hydrogen gas supply means 2 and the air supply means 3 Gas and air are supplied to the fuel cell 1 and supplied to the fuel cell 1 while the refrigerant is circulated by the refrigerant circulation means 4. At this time, in the refrigerant circulation means 4, the refrigerant is caused to flow through the refrigerant bypass flow path 32 that bypasses the refrigerant 31 without passing through the radiator 31. Since the refrigerant does not pass through the radiator 31, the heat retaining properties of the refrigerant and the fuel cell 1 are improved, and the residual moisture in the fuel cell 1 can be smoothly evaporated and discharged with hydrogen gas and air.   [Selection] Figure 1

title: Dynamic parallax barrier autosteroscopic display system and method
abstract: Embodiments of the invention provide a dynamic parallax barrier autostereoscopic system and method for one and multiple users with user tracking. One example embodiment of the invention is a dynamic parallax barrier autostereoscopic virtual reality display system includes a display including a front display plane and a rear display plane. The front display plane dynamically generates barrier strips with transparent regions therebetween. The rear display plane generates images viewable through the transparent regions to create a virtual reality effect for a user or users.

title: Device for fixing a plinth on a guard rail
abstract: The invention relates to a device (2) for attaching a skirting board (3) to a railing (4), of the type comprising: a support member (20) for the plinth (3) having a groove receiving (13; 23) a falling edge (31) of the plinth (3); and - clamping means (25) of the support member (20) on the railing (4), said clamping means (25) being arranged on the support member (20) and shaped to move the support member (20) between a loosened position in which the receiving groove (23) is spaced from the railing (4) by a predetermined distance to allow insertion of the falling edge (31) of the skirting board (3). ), and a tight position in which the receiving groove (23) is brought closer to the railing (4) to press the falling edge (31) of the plinth (3) against said railing (4). The present invention finds application in the field of securing structures at height.

title: Antirust agent and antirust paint and antirust liquid using it
abstract: (57) [Summary] [PROBLEMS] To provide a novel rust inhibitor excellent in rust inhibiting effect, a rust inhibiting paint and a rust inhibiting liquid using the same. SOLUTION: The rust inhibitor is a salt of a salt obtained by neutralizing 2- or 3-mercaptopropionic acid with two or more equivalents of a base.   Contains two or more species. The rust inhibitor was prepared by dissolving the rust inhibitor alone in water or a mixed solvent containing water. The rust preventive paint was prepared by dissolving the rust preventive agent together with the resin in water or a mixed solvent containing water.

title: Improvements in or relating to electrolytic oxidation
abstract: In anodic oxidation at an anode current density of 0.05 to 0.3 amps/dm3 of an acid solution of an iodate or a solution of elemental iodine in aqueous alkali forming the anolyte employing a lead dioxide anode immersed in the anolyte and a catholyte consisting of an aqueous solution of alkali in which is immersed an alkali-resistant cathode, the cell being maintained at a temperature of from 5 to 50 DEG C., the anolyte and catholyte are separated by a diaphragm of a woven fabric which is resistant to attack by acid and alkali and which has a Frazier Air Porosity Rating of from 0.8 to 1.1 on ft/min. As described the diaphragm is a flat weave fabric of polypropylene or polyvinylchloride which has been shrunk by heat treatment to form 72.5 to 82.5% of its original dimension and is used in a cell for converting iodic acid to per-iodic acid.ALSO:A flat weave fabric of polypropylene or polyvinyl chloride is shrunk by heat treatment to from 72.5 to 82.5% of its original dimension so as to have a Frazier Air Porosity Rating of 0.8 to 1.1 cu. ft/min.  The polypropylene fabric is shrunk by calendering at 305 DEG F. and 500 lbs/square inch for 3 minutes while the polyvinyl chloride fabric is shrunk by immersion in water at 80 to 95 DEG C. for from 5 to 30 minutes.

title: Universal telephone handset cord
abstract: The universal telephone handset cord of the invention is adaptable for connection with telephones of different design. For use with a saddle-type handset the cord is provided with a removable sleeve for closing the handset cord opening, and one or more removable split ring washers which abut a saddle on the transmitter cup to secure the cord therein. To adapt the cord for use with a stayhook-type handset, the sleeve is removed leaving an underlying bushing to close the smaller cord opening in that type handset; also, the split ring washers which are not needed are removed. Connection with the screw in the handset is made with a stayhook secured to the end of the cord. The cord may also be provided with alternate schemes of color coding for the various telephone designs. This is done by coding the wires of the cord overall in one scheme and then superimposing a second color code scheme over portions of the wires in a manner which leaves the underlying scheme still visible.

title: Pipeline back drag device
abstract: The invention relates to the field of laying of water supply and drainage and gas pipelines and provides a pipeline back drag device. The pipeline back drag device is integrated by welding a drawing head, a conical body and a connection body in sequence. A connection hole is formed in the end, to be connected with a drilling machine, of the drawing head. Pipeline connection threaded holes are formed radially in the cylindrical surface of the connection body. According to the optimized technical scheme, the pipeline back drag device is majorly applied to non-excavation underground laying operation for the water supply and drainage and gas pipelines, is reusable and can be conveniently and fast installed, picked up and placed when used; the phenomena of deformation and disconnection between the device and the pipelines do not occur; and when the pipeline back drag device is used, the working efficiency is greatly improved, and the cost is reduced.

title: Adjustable honing head mechanism
abstract: The utility model discloses an adjustable honing head mechanism and relates to an improved technology for a honing head of a honing machine. The adjustable honing head mechanism consists of a honing head (1), diamond honing strips (2), adjusting pads (3), adjusting nuts (4) and positioning frames (5), wherein the middle of the honing head (1) is a cylinder; two ends of the cylinder are provided with threaded joints; honing strip mounting grooves (1-1) which are through horizontally are formed on front and rear sides of an outer surface of the honing head (1); two diamond honing strips (2) are arranged in the two honing strip mounting grooves (1-1); the positioning frames (5) are arranged at two ends of the diamond honing strips (2); two adjusting nuts (4) are matched with the threaded joints at the two ends of the honing head (1); an adjusting pad (3) is arranged on the inner side of each adjusting nut (4); and the adjusting pads (3) are pressed against the positioning frames (5) so as to fixedly clamp the honing strips (2). The problems that the honing head of the honing machine cannot be adjusted to cause large machining dimension deviation and the worn honing head is scraped to cause waste are solved.

abstract: (57) [Summary] [Structure] A product obtained by hydroformylating a monoacetal of 2-propenal in the presence of a catalyst having ruthenium supported on a carrier is reacted with hydrogen and water simultaneously with 1,4-butane. title: Method for preparing hierarchical porous oxygen-rich carbon nanocones from organic metal complexes
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of new energy materials and particularly relates to a method for preparing hierarchical porous heteroatom-rich one-dimensional carbon nanocones through one-step carbonization after organic metal complexes are prepared through simple complexation reactions of ferric salt and organic ligands in a room temperature environment. A one-dimensional carbon nanocone material has multifunctional energy storage applications, can have the reversible capacity of 758 mA h g<-1> after being circulated for 60 times under the current density of 50 mA g<-1> when used as an anode material of a lithium-ion battery, can have the capacity up to 182.7 F g<-1> at the sweep speed of 5 mV s<-1> when applied to a capacitor, and can still have the capacity of 188 mA h g<-1> after being circulated for 400 times under the current density of 100 mA g<-1> when used as an anode material of a sodium-ion battery. Besides, the one-dimensional carbon nanocone material shows higher potential in the aspect of sulfur storage. Raw materials for synthesis of the material are cheap, and the synthesis process is convenient, so that the method is very suitable for large-scale industrial production.

title: Submerged actuator
abstract: A well structure which includes a well housing (12) having an upwardly facing internal shoulder (26) and an internal recess (30) below the shoulder. A tieback (14) is adapted to be landed on the housing internal shoulder and has an upper internal surface and a smaller lower internal surface with a shoulder (46) therebetween. An actuator sleeve (16) has an upper outer portion fitting closely within the upper internal surface of the tieback, a lower outer portion fitting closely with the lower internal surface of the tieback, a downwardly facing external shoulder (44) between the lower and upper outer portions and a lower tapered surface tapering downwardly and inwardly. Latch elements (18) having upper outer tapered surfaces mate with the lower tapered surface on the actuator sleeve. A pressure compensating material (60) is positioned in the annulus between the shoulders (56, 44) and the upper internal surface of the tieback and the lower outer portion of said actuator sleeve so that downward movement of the actuator sleeve within the tieback is not prevented by the trapping of liquid within the annulus.

title: Three-dimensional bio-medical probe sensing and contacting structures with addressibility and tunability
abstract: A three dimensional biomedical probe device is provided that includes a planar substrate. A probe structure is supported on the planar substrate. The probe structure has a base and a portion essentially perpendicular to the base extending along a length to a tip and has a linear dimension at the tip of said probe structure of between 5 nanometers (nm) and 5 microns thereby defining an AC, DC, or transient current, charge, or voltage sensing probe. In one variation, this probe is the electrical contact to the biomedical medium. In another variation this probe is the gate electrode of a field effect transistor (FET). An array of selectively electrically addressable such devices is also provided giving the ability to sample the physiological activity at many positions within cells, fluids and intercellular regions without the need for mechanical motion and inducing cellular lysis.

title: Detection of Face Area and Organ Area in Image
abstract: An image processing apparatus includes: a face area detecting unit detects a face area corresponding to a face image in a target image; an image generating unit that generates an organ detecting image including the face image which is inclined in a predetermined angular range in an image plane on the basis of the detection result of the face area; and an organ area detecting unit that detects an organ area corresponding to a facial organ image in the face area on the basis of image data indicating the organ detecting image.

title: Control circuit of microwave oven
abstract: The control circuit comprises low volt transformer, first and second rectification parts and main controller. Interrupt circuit part, voltage stabilizing circuit, acoustic control unit, part of controlling airblast motor, control unit of high-voltage transformer and unit of sensing door operation are integrated in a chip. Thus, the control circuit possesses advantages of reduced quantity, size of elements, and sizes of circuit board, simple operating steps and lowered cost.

title: Buoyancy material
abstract: (57) [Summary] (Modified) [Purpose] To provide a buoyancy material that has excellent weather resistance, corrosion resistance, and strength against external forces such as impact and friction and that has stable buoyancy for a long period of time. [Structure] A cylindrical synthetic resin foam 1 mainly composed of closed cells and having a foaming ratio of 30 times comprises a coating material 2 in which a steel plate having a thickness of 0.5 mm is used as a core material and a fluororesin layer 8 is laminated as an outermost layer. It is coated. The buoyancy material of the present invention has a large buoyancy because the foam is mainly composed of closed cells, and since the surface is covered with a steel plate, the foam of the inner layer is protected from the impact and friction received from the surface of the buoyancy material, It has excellent durability.

title: Zero-Backlash Bushing
abstract: A zero-backlash bushing employs a dual-component composite design, comprising a tapered resilient slotted bushing core compressibly engaged by a cylindrical annular sleeve. As opposed to the axial pressure of a locking nut, the annular sleeve exerts a circumferential pressure on the bushing core, thereby inducing a tight radial engagement between the threads of the bushing core and the adjustment screw, as opposed to the lateral thread engagement induced by a locking nut. This tight radial engagement leaves radial gaps between the threads of the bushing core and the screw, which radial gaps can be filled with grease. Slots in the bushing core enable migration of grease within the bushing and facilitate constriction of the bushing core.

title: Parking system for a motor vehicle
abstract: The present invention relates to a parking system for a motor vehicle, which includes a sensor system for measuring data about the surroundings of the vehicle, a parking instruction device for outputting steering instructions to the driver, a parking direction device for automatically steering the vehicle when parking, and a central processing device for calculating a, from the current vehicle position outgoing trajectory from measured environmental data and taxes of the parking instruction device and the parking steering device, and a method for parking a motor vehicle with such a parking system.

title: Bath water filtration device with electronic antibacterial function
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Object] The present invention relates to a bath water filtration device having an electronic bacteriostatic function. [Structure] In the present invention, a circulation pump (7) that can be installed near the bath body (A) and circulates the bath water, a filter (R) that purifies the bath water, and a bath body (A) inside In the bath hot water filtering device, which is equipped with a bath hot water absorption pipe (4) and a bath hot water discharge pipe (5) each of which has one end open, and which is configured to circulate and purify the bath hot water in the bath body (A), In the above filter (R),   By applying a low frequency alternating current of a rectangular wave, the bacteria propagating on the filter medium housed in the filter (R) can be electrically sterilized.

title: State record system for data migration
abstract: A system and method for facilitating a migration engine to migrate data items in a data directory from a source system to a destination system over multiple migration passes are disclosed. A state file can be used to track migration states of data items during the life cycle of the migration. The state file can be generated and updated by a plugin to the migration engine. During a migration pass, the state file can be loaded into the memory to influence the migration by the migration engine. Prior to the migration pass, migration profile specifying one or more migration actions can be invoked by a migration routine. The invocation of the migration profile can cause the state file to be modified to perform the migration actions accordingly.

title: Structured-light measuring method and system
abstract: A structured-light measuring method, includes: matching process, in which the number and the low-precision depth of a laser point are achieved by using the imaging position of the laser point on a first camera (21) according to a first corresponding relationship in a calibration database, and the imaging position of the laser point on a second camera (22) is searched according to the number and the low-precision depth of the laser point so as to acquire the candidate matching points, then the matching process is completed according to the imaging position of the first camera (21) and the candidate matching points of the imaging position of the first camera (21) on the second camera (22) so that a matching result is achieved; and computing process, in which the imaging position of the second camera (22) matching with the imaging position of the first camera (21) is achieved according to the matching result, and then the precision position of the laser point is determined by a second corresponding relationship in the calibration database. A structured-light measuring system utilizes the above measuring method.

title: Household voice-operated remote control unit and control method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to a household voice-operated remote control unit and a control method thereof. The household voice-operated remote control unit comprises a display screen and a shell. A voice training key, a voice recognition key, a microphone (MIC) and a micro speaker (speaker) are arranged on the outer side of the shell. A circuit board and a wireless signal transmitter are arranged in the shell. A voice recognition system is further included and comprises a voice signal processing module and a system control module. Operation is convenient, the remote control unit can be operated simply by sending voice information or carrying out key input, operation is easy and fast, pertinence is achieved, and the household voice-operated remote control unit is reasonable in design and can be popularized on a large scale.

title: Resistor chip
abstract:
PURPOSE: To shorten wiring length and to reduce noise, by employing a series of processes in which some resistors formed in a chip are directly connected to the elements within an LSI on the chip, and the remaining resistors are connected at the respective one ends as the output terminals of a board to any element within the LSI through wirings outside the board.  
     CONSTITUTION: Resistors 4 are connected to most of the through holes 2, which are bored through a board 1 of insulator, through wirings 3, and such resistors 4 are connected by both a power layer 6 and the through holes 2. And, when resistors are put to use, some resistors 4 are connected to an LSI chip through solder, further the remaining resistors 5 are selectively connected to the wiring board through solder. As a result, for the specific terminal resistors, the wiring length to the LSI chip can be shortened and the wiring capacity can be decreased to reduce the signal noise. Moreover, the remaining resistors may be connected to any element within the LSI chip, which enables the connection between elements within the LSI or the connection between elements of one LSI and the other LSI to be freely performed.

title: Abrasion and deformation detection method of palletizing robot
abstract: The invention discloses an abrasion and deformation detection method of a palletizing robot. A base and a mechanical arm of the palletizing robot are respectively provided with a laser correlation sensor, each laser correlation sensor comprises a laser emitter and a narrow beam laser receiver, and a laser sensor signal line is connected with a robot controller and can transmit laser detection signals to the robot controller. Three set measurement positions are measured repeatedly to confirm whether the robot is actually abraded or has errors, the errors are worked out, and a quantitative error report and a report about prediction of maintenance requirements are given according to the errors.

title: Improvements in and relating to bombs and projectiles for use in aerial warfare
abstract: 498,595. Projectiles. MOTLEY, L. June 9, 1937, Nos. 15977 and 18628. [Class 9 (i)] A bomb or projectile for attacking hostile aircraft comprises a number of units coupled by cable and adapted to be separated from each other in the air, increased tension of the coupling cable arising, e.g. by contact with an aircraft causing at least one of the units to explode. The projectile may be fired from a mortar 7 and may comprise a frictionally held cap 1 housing a parachute 2 connected by a bolt 29 passing through wadding 28 to a container 3 which is connected by a coiled cable 8 to a second container 4, the containers accommodating explosive charges 5, 6. Separating charges 9, 10 are located between the parachute and the upper container, and between the containers, respectively. The cable 8 may be coupled with one or both containers by a detonating device which is actuated by excessive tension on the cable. In one form, the cable 8, Fig. 3, is coupled to a lever 11 having a pin to strike the detonator 12, the lever being held in inoperative position by a pin 23 which shears under excessive load. In another form, the cable is coupled to a lever 11, Fig. 4, which is held inoperative by a spring 24 until the cable is subjected to abnormal strain, in which case the lever swings and is snapped to operative position by the spring 24 to strike the detonator 12. The projectile is mounted in a cartridge case 13 which accommodates the propellant charge 14. A time fuze 18 connects the charge 14 with the separating charge 10, and an instantaneous fuze 19 is provided between the separating charges 9, 10. When the projectile is fired, the containers 3, 4, after a given time interval, are separated by the firing of the charge 10 and substantially at the same instant the charge 9 blows off the cap 1 and allows the parachute to open. The container 4 falls to the extent permitted by the cable 8 and the apparatus falls as a whole under the restraint of the parachute, constituting an aerial mine. Impact on the cable, e.g. by hostile aircraft, increases the tension on the cable and fires the explosive charges 5, 6. The projectile may be fired from the ground or may be dropped or fired from an aircraft ; when it is to be dropped, the cartridge case is omitted and the fuze 18 is ignited directly either electrically or by a blow. Specification 498,599 is referred to, as describing and claiming means for automatically ejecting the cartridge case from the muzzle of the mortar after the firing of the projectile.

title: Remote resource management system for automatically downloading required files from application server depending on contents of selected files on requesting computer
abstract: A remote resource management system for maintaining resources shared in a distributed computing system, which downloads only such resources that are the most suitable for an application requested by a user. When a user selects an application at a terminal computer, an application server computer providing the selected application will determine the most suitable resources for the selected application by consulting a resource linkage manager disposed therein. The application server transfers information advising the suitable resources, together with a download agent, to the terminal computer. In the terminal computer, the download agent determines whether the resources should be newly downloaded or not, referring to local resource management information that describes what resources exist in the terminal computer. If downloading is necessary, the resource management system locates the necessary resource files by using a downloadable resource management directory in a resource server computer. The resource files are downloaded from downloadable resource storage in the resource server computer, and installed into the terminal computer system according to a specified installation mode. When the installation is finished, the download agent will be unloaded, and the application runs with the downloaded resources.

title: Method for operating stacker in handler for testing module IC
abstract:
The present invention relates to a method of controlling a stacker of a handler for testing a module IC, so that an operator does not need to pull out a user tray or supply a shipping tray to a stacker during a test.
   
   
    To this end, the present invention, two rows of loading section, two rows of unloading section, one row of empty tray loading section in which empty trays are loaded after the module IC is emptied from the trays of the loading section, and the unloading section is to be supplied. An empty tray supply unit for loading trays, a loading standby unit for loading module ICs stored in the trays supplied from the loading unit, and an unloading standby unit for unloading the tested module ICs A method of controlling a stacker of a handler comprising: loading trays containing module ICs to be tested in a first row and a second row of the loading section before the handler is operated, and the first row and the empty tray of the unloading section Load empty trays into which the tested module ICs will be stored; When the handler starts, in the loading section, the trays of the first row are supplied one by one to the loading standby section, and then empty trays are loaded into the empty tray loading section, and the trays of the second row of the loading section are supplied to the loading standby section, and then empty. Allow trays to be loaded in a first row of loading sections; In the unloading unit, empty trays of the first row are supplied to the unloading standby unit to store the tested module ICs, and then loaded in the second row of the unloading unit, and then the empty trays of the empty tray supply unit are supplied to the unloading standby unit. Provided is a stacker control method of a module IC test handler, characterized in that the received module IC is stored in the first row of the unloading unit.

title: Paper container capable of increasing barrier property
abstract: Disclosed is a paper container capable of increasing barrier property. The material of the paper container is a laminated structure, the paper container comprises a paper layer and a barrier layer combined with the paper layer, the barrier layer is a triple-layer structure, both the inner layer and the outer layer of the barrier layer are made of polyethylene, and the middle layer of the barrier layer is a high-density barrier material layer. The relative density of the barrier layer can achieve about 1.2, thereby largely increasing barrier property, reducing air permeability, oxygen permeability, carbon dioxide permeability and the like, and being capable of stopping various fluid such as oil, soup and the like. Through a high permeability property detecting test, the utility model can achieve non-leakage completely, and greatly increases breaking resistant strength and tearing resistant strength which are ten times that of a traditional paper container.

title: Two-stage pipelined execution unit and control stores
abstract: A two control store scheme with instruction execution overlay is shown in a data processing system execution unit having a two-state pipeline. The first control store controls the first-stage facilities during the first cycle of instruction execution and points to the initial location of the second control store. The second control store controls the second-state facilities during the final cycle of instruction execution. The second control store also controls the facilities of both stages during the intermeidate cycles of instruction requiring more than two cycles to execute. Because the second control store controls only the second-stage facilities during the final cycle, execution of the first cycle of the following instruction can take place concurrently within the first-stage facilities under the control of the first control store.

title: Polymer electrolyte membrane fuel cell with Nafion cast membrane of limited thickness and method of operation
abstract:
The present invention provides a polymer electrolyte membrane fuel cell having a limited thickness Nafion cast membrane, characterized in that the thickness of the Nafion cast membrane in the polymer electrolyte membrane fuel cell, 15 ~ 30㎛. The fuel cell preferably has a thickness of 25 mu m in the cast membrane. In addition, the fuel cell preferably includes a gas diffusion layer having an average pore size of 1 to 2 μm, and preferably includes a gas diffusion layer having an average pore size of 1.55 μm. According to the present invention, it is possible to improve the performance of the battery in various temperature ranges in the non-humidity condition by effectively generating the back diffusion of moisture from the cathode side and improving the proton conductivity to reduce the membrane resistance.
   
     
   
    Gas diffusion layer, membrane electrode assembly, non-humidification operation, thickness limitation, cast membrane

abstract: The invention relates to an Android mobile terminal based traffic police law enforcement system, which adopts a modular design and comprises an on-site law enforcement module, an off-site law enforcement module, a non-motor vehicle and pedestrian punishment module, an accident processing module, a mobile office module, an integrated service query module and a system setting module, wherein the modules transmit information to a background server instantly; and a back-end server also carries out information input synchronously while a system terminal is in operation, thereby debugging with a handheld terminal at any time, and being interconnected.

title: Information control system for reserve locking infrastructure nodes for subsequent exclusive and share locking by the system
abstract: Apparatus and method for controlling concurrent process access of infrastructures. The apparatus and method selectively locks nodes and tree structures to reserve lock a node and tree structure for subsequent exclusive and share locking by a process. Currently running processes have share read only access to the reserved locked node and tree structure until a subsequent exclusive lock is applied by the process to the reserve locked node and tree structure.

title: Novel shop primer and preparation method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a novel shop primer. The novel shop primer is formed by mixing and stirring thermoplastic acrylic resin, a dispersing agent, an anti-settling agent, plasticizer, iron oxide red, aluminum hydroxide, barium sulfate, dimethylbenzene, n-butyl acetate, 2-ethoxyethyl acetate, acetic ether, epoxy resin and 1/2-seocnd cellulose nitrate which are used as raw materials. The novel shop primer has the advantages that 1, the novel shop primer is high in drying speed, and can meet the production requirement of a shot blasting pretreatment automatic production line; 2, the shop primer is high in environment-friendliness and does not contain zinc powder, zinc oxide fume is avoided in the thermal processing process, and health of workers is facilitated; 3, the shop primer is high in solvent resistance, and can be matched with various oil paints; 4, the shop primer is high in weldability; 5, the shop primer is high in mechanical property and suitable for processing processes of leveling and bending paint coated steel and the like; 6, the shop primer is high in rust resistance, and the rust resistance capacity of the steel can reach more than four months; and 7, the performance of the domestic and overseas like products can be improved, and the shop primer has great popularization and application value.

title: Root feeding stake
abstract: A root feeding stake includes a funnel having a downspout that surmounts a first end of an elongate hollow tube. A second end of the elongate hollow tube is connected to a truncate hollow tube and a second end of the truncate hollow tube is connected to a leading section having a pointed end to facilitate its entry into soil. When installed, the leading section and the truncate hollow tube are below a ground surface and the funnel and elongate hollow tube are above the ground. Perforations are formed in the truncate hollow tube and a barrier is provided between the truncate hollow tube and the leading section so that water and liquid nutrients poured into the funnel flow through the downspout, the elongate hollow tube, and into the ground through the perforations. The perforations are formed in a predetermined sector of the truncate hollow tube to aim the water and liquid nutrients at the roots of a plant near which the stake is positioned.
