title: Package substrate and chip package structure
abstract: The invention provides a package substrate and a chip package structure. The package substrate of the invention is used for carrying a chip, and the package substrate comprises a flexible dielectric layer and a conductive layer. The conductive layer, disposed on the flexible dielectric layer, comprises a plurality of leads and a plurality of test pads. One end of each of the leads is electrically connected to the chip. The test pads are connected respectively to the other ends of the leads. A hollow is formed on a surface of at least one test pad of the plurality of the test pads for positioning a tip of a probe pin. With the formation of the hollow on the test pad, probe pin shift while touching the test pad can be reduced. Electrical short caused by the particles scraped from the surface of the at least one test pad by the probe pin and the subsequent false testing result can also be avoided.

title: Fixing device
abstract: PURPOSE:To make the pressure fixing device small and light by reducing contact pressure when not using by using a spring of shape memory alloy that pressure contacts a roller and obtaining specified pressure only when fixing operation. CONSTITUTION:A rod 6 is wound with a coil spring 7 made of shape memory alloy and a habit is given to maintain shrinked shape at normal temperature, and elongates on heating. A heater 9 is placed near the rod 6 and coil spring 7 and the heater is energized only when the fixing device is used. When starting picture forming operation, the heater 9 is energized, and the coil spring 7 is heated and elongated. Pressure fixing is performed by raising the pressure of a pair of rollers 1, 2 to specified pressure before arrival of transferring agent at the fixing position. On completion of fixing, the heater is weakened and the coil spring 7 is cooled and shrinked. Thus, pressing force between rollers can be diminished to the weight of rollers and accessory members. By this way, the whole fixing device can be made light and compact.

title: Production of salad oil
abstract:
PURPOSE: To produce a salad oil having excellent cooling resistance by mixing a liquid food oil with a specific oil and fat produced from palm oil, subjecting the obtained mixture to ester interchange with a specific lipase in the absence of solvent and fractionating the product.  
     CONSTITUTION: The raw material for the subject salad oil is a mixture of (A) an oil and fat produced from palm oil, having an iodine value of 55-75, a tripalmitic acid content of ≤2wt.% and a melting point of 5-25°C and having a fatty acid composition consisting of (i) 30-42wt.% of palmitic acid, (ii) 42-48wt.% of oleic acid and (iii) 11-20wt.% of linoleic acid and (B) a liquid food oil other than the component A at a weight ratio (A:B) of 5:95 to 95:5. The mixture is subjected to ester interchange with an immobilized lipase having 1,3-specificity in the absence of solvent and the ester-interchange product is fractionated in the absence of solvent to obtain the objective salad oil.

title: Universal computing paradigm with single-code base utilizing a flexible distributed computing architecture
abstract: An application program for use in a hybrid computing environment comprising standalone, client-server, or Internet use is described. The application is written in a single code base and installed on a client computer that is configured for use as either a standalone or networked computer. Server side components of the application program are installed on a server computer configured to be coupled to client computers over a local or wide area network or over the Internet. Data and file resources utilized by the application program are installed locally on the client computer or on the server computer, or on a device remotely coupled to the network coupling the client and server computers. The application program is installed on the client computer for use as a standalone, client-server, or Internet application, or any combination thereof. At runtime, the user selects the mode of use in which the application program is to be executed.

At runtime, the user selects the mode of use in which the application program is to be executed.

title: Weather box
abstract: An apparatus includes an outdoor device and an indoor device. The outdoor device includes an outdoor thermometer, an anemometer, a rain gauge, and a transmitter coupled to the outdoor thermometer, the anemometer and the rain gauge. The indoor device includes a receiver, a processor coupled to the receiver, and a television modulator coupled to the processor. Outdoor weather data includes an outdoor temperature provided by the outdoor thermometer, a wind speed provided by the anemometer and a rain fall measurement provided by the rain gauge. The transmitter is operable to send the outdoor weather data to the receiver. The receiver provides the outdoor weather data to the processor. The processor is operable to provide screen image data, the screen image data being based on and including the outdoor weather data. The television modulator is operable to provide a television signal having the screen image data carried therein. The television signal is compatible with either an auxiliary input to a television or a tuner input to a television tuned to a predetermined channel.

title: A kind of single-end available bandwidth measuring, device and transmitting terminal
abstract: The present invention proposes a kind of single-end available bandwidth measuring, device and transmitting terminal.The single-end available bandwidth measuring includes：Set initiator parameters；Send the detection Bao Liezhi destination nodes based on Transmission Control Protocol；The TCP response bags returned from the destination node are received, calculate the round-trip delay of each detection bag；And the first drop rate packets when round-trip delay drops to steady state value are found, if the first drop rate packets are present, the average transmission rate of detection bag row during the first drop rate packets will be sent as available bandwidth measurement value.It carries out the measurement of available bandwidth based on Transmission Control Protocol and self-supported drop rate packets row.The present invention has the characteristics that measurement accuracy is high, measuring speed is fast, invasion degree is low, robustness is good.

title: Working method of air traffic control system for 4D trajectory-based operation
abstract: The invention discloses a working method of an air traffic control system for 4D trajectory-based operation. The air traffic control system comprises a data communication module, a monitoring data fusion module, an airborne terminal module and a control terminal module, wherein the monitoring data fusion module is used for fusing the monitoring data of an air traffic control radar and automatic dependent monitoring data, and providing real-time trajectory information for the control terminal module; and the control terminal module comprises a preflight conflict-free 4D trajectory generation sub-module, an in-flight short-term 4D trajectory generation sub-module, a real-time flight conflict monitoring and alarming sub-module and a flight conflict resolution 4D trajectory optimization sub-module. According to the working method of the air traffic control system of the invention, the control terminal module is utilized to process flight plan data, 4D trajectories are generated by using the hidden Markov model, and therefore, potential traffic conflicts of air traffic conditions can be analyzed; and a model prediction control theory method is adopted to provide an optimal resolution scheme. With the working method adopted, flight conflicts can be effectively prevented, and the safety of air traffic can be improved.

title: RNA antagonist compounds for modulating PCSK9
abstract: The present invention provides compounds, compositions and methods that modulate the expression of PCSK9. In particular, the present invention relates to oligomeric compounds that can hybridize with a target nucleic acid encoding PCSK9, such as oligonucleotide compounds, and methods for preparing such oligomeric compounds. The oligonucleotide compounds are shown to modulate the expression of PCSK9 and their medicaments and their use in the treatment of hypercholesterolemia and related disorders are disclosed.

title: Ultra-thin coaxial cable stripping tool
abstract: The utility model provides an ultra-thin coaxial cable stripping tool comprising a blade whose one end is provided with a fixing hole and a knife base whose knife base surface is provided with a groove. The tool base surface on one side of the groove is provided with a knife base fixing portion in rotating fixing with the fixing hole of the blade. The knife base surface on the other side of the groove is provided with a downward pressing adjusting mechanism corresponding to the blade. The grooves corresponding to the two sides of the blade respectively fix a cable fixing ring movably passed through by the cable and a cable fixing portion whose fixing hole is movably plugged with the cable. The other end of the fixing hole of the cable fixing portion is provided with a length adjusting mechanism. The wire insulation stripping of each layer of the ultra-thin coaxial cable can be respectively conducted by the cable stripping tool and the cutting depth and the cutting length of the cable stripping tool can be set according to different layers. The operation can be operated by common operator with low cost.

title: Rubber stopper for medicine
abstract:
PURPOSE: To provide a rubber stopper for medicine which has various types of excellent properties such as being conformed to 'rubber stopper test law for transfusion fluid' under Japan pharmacopoeia revision 11, being suitable for applications for which liquid leakage property is especially required, being superior in other coring properties, and being conformed to cell toxicity test, etc.  
     CONSTITUTION: Polyisoprene rubber is the main component of the title rubber cap, and a liquid state polybutadiene which has an end functional group in the molecule is blended by 0.5-20 pts.wt. and/or a liquid state polyisoprene which has a functional group in the molecule is blended by 0.5-15 pts.wt., and in addition, an inorganic filler is blended by 5-40 pts.wt., and they are peroxide cured to make the title rubber cap for medicine.

title: Structure and method for mounting tiles on a substrate
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Purpose] To facilitate the attachment of tiles to a substrate. [Structure] A ridge 3 is provided on the front surface of a substrate 1, and an inclined first ridge side surface 3a and second inclined ridge side surface 3b are provided. The rear surface of the tile 2 is provided with a dovetail-shaped concave groove 4 and is provided with a first concave groove side surface 4a and a second concave groove side surface 4b. The elastic metal fitting 10 is mounted so as to extend from the second concave groove side surface 4b to the back surface of the tile 2. While the elastic metal fitting 10 is hooked on the tile 2, the tile 2 is brought close to the substrate 1 and the tile 2 is pushed up to press the elastic metal fitting 10 against the convex side surface 3b, and the arcuate curved portion 11 is pushed open. Then, after the concave groove side surface 4a is engaged with the convex stripe side surface 3a, the tile 2 is pulled down and the tile 2 is locked to the substrate 1. [Effect] When the tile 2 is attached to the substrate 1, the force for pushing the tile 2 upward is small. Therefore, workability is good. Even if the size of the elastic metal fitting 10 is uniform, the tile 2 can be attached to the substrate 1 having a large number of sizes, and the cost of parts can be reduced.

title: Waste liquid treatment device

title: Gas sensor and module sealing structure thereof
abstract: This utility model relates to a gas sensor and module sealing structure thereof. The gas sensor is composed of a printed circuit board, a sensor element and a cover. The sensor element is stuck and cut lines on the printed circuit board and the cover is laid on the printed circuit board and overlay the sensor element. The printed circuit board configures the connection of the connect circuits and the cutting lines of the sensor element. Through these connect circuits, the signals of the sensor element can be measured and controlled. The utility model can encases and measure a plurality of sensor elements by using only a single printed circuit board and no need of metal pins, thus it can reduce the cost of the gas sensor greatly.

title: Method of compressing lamination stacks for permanent magnet rotor
abstract: The present invention is a method of compressing lamination stacks for a permanent magnet rotor. The method includes the steps of providing a plurality of stages of lamination stacks and magnet carriers on a rotor shaft to form an assembly; positioning a spacer between each of the lamination stacks of each of the plurality of stages; and fitting a retainer plate with a groove at each end of the assembly. The groove allows a centrifugal force to deflect a top of the retainer plate inward toward the spacers and the spacers are milled to a size that is slightly wider than an axial gap between the lamination stacks of each stage. The groove on the retainer plates has a depth and radial position that determines the extent to which the top of the retainer plate deflects towards the spacers.

title: Method and device for percutaneous sealing of internal puncture sites
abstract: The present invention relates to a device for percutaneously sealing of an internal puncture site comprising a tissue portion having a puncture formed therethrough. A locating device is mounted for longitudinal movement relative to a guide wire towards and away from the puncture site. Delivery structure has a distal end portion and is mounted for longitudinal movement relative to the guide wire. A tubular puncture site engaging member has a distal end portion and is mounted exteriorly of the delivery structure for longitudinal movement relative to the guide wire. A supply of fluid thrombogenic material which will be capable of promoting clotting when delivered to the puncture site is provided. The delivery structure has a fluid passageway open to the distal end portion thereof and communicated to the supply of fluid thrombogenic material. The locating device and the puncture site engaging member are positioned with respect to one another such that they can be moved together towards the puncture site. The locating device transmits a signal to the user indicating that the distal end portion of the puncture site engaging member is engaged with the tissue portion in surrounding relation with respect to the puncture. The distal end portion of the delivery structure can be positioned adjacent the puncture site and the fluid thrombogenic material can then be delivered from the supply to the puncture site through the fluid passageway. The puncture site engaging member is constructed and arranged such that the distal end portion thereof will surround the fluid thrombogenic material being delivered to the puncture site so as to prevent the material from flowing away from the puncture site when the distal end portion of the puncture site engaging member is engaged with the tissue portion in surrounding relation with respect to the puncture, thereby allowing the material to promote clotting and seal the puncture. The present invention also relates to a method for percutaneously sealing internal punctures sites and to a sealing device having improved locating device for properly positioning the device with respect to the puncture site. Further, the present invention is well-suited for application to arterial puncture sites.

title: Manufacture of semiconductor element
abstract: PURPOSE:To prevent the short-circuit and bending of a fine metal wire having a long connecting distance due to the deformation thereof by connecting the electrode of a pellet with an internal lead through the intermediary of an intermediate electrode insulated from a pellet-mounting body and by sealing the same later with resin. CONSTITUTION:A number of intermediate electrodes 7 are prepared on the outer periphery of the pellet-mounting body 2, being insulated from the body. In a package made or resin, the electrodes 7 are formed together with the internal leads 1 by selective etching, while, in the package of a metal-plate body, they are connected to a heat-resisting insulation substance 8 and are provided through selective etching. By utilizing the intermediate electrodes 7, required connections are made with fine wires and then sealing with resin is conducted. By this constitution, the deformation of fine metal wires at the time of resin sealing is prevented, while the short-circuit thereof can also be prevented.

title: Fuel tank and motor vehicle
abstract: The invention discloses a fuel tank, which comprises a fuel holding device and at least one partition board. The inside of a fuel tank body is transversely divided into at least two fuel chambers by the partition boards, through grooves which are communicated with the fuel chambers are arranged among the partition boards and a bottom of the fuel tank body, the bottom has a lowest point, and the fuel holding device is disposed at the lowest point. The bottom is favorable for gathering impurities in fuel to the lowest position under the effect of gravity, the fuel holding device is positioned at the lowest position of the bottom, and the impurities can be discharged conveniently. The through grooves are favorable for gathering impurities in various fuel chambers to the lowest position of the bottom, and when liquid level of the fuel is lower than through holes of the partition boards, fuel in the fuel chambers can flow back and forth through the through grooves. In a particular implementation mode, the fuel holding device further consists of scrapers, and the scrapers are capable of scraping off fuel dirt deposited at the bottom and are favorable for cleaning the impurities in the fuel tank. The invention further discloses a motor vehicle, which comprises the fuel tank.

title: Carbon fibre heating wire
abstract: A carboform electrothermal wire includes a carbon fiber and an insulating layer, which is characterized in that a metal electrothermal wire is equally intertwined around the exterior of the carboform bundle, the exterior of which is packed with the insulating layer. title: Retailing display assembly
abstract: The retailing display assembly is of the upright channel and slidably positionable and releasably anchorable type. The upright channel has an upright rear-wall provided with two columnar arrays of rearwardly struck lanced openings therethrough. The bracket includes a conventional horizontal hanger bar extending rigidly forwardly from an upright web member. The web member is provided with a pair of forwardly extending wings abuttable against the channel member front-walls and is further provided with a pair of downwardly and rearwardly extending tabs that are releasably anchorably protrudable through selectable co-elevational openings of the channel rear-wall.

title: Accounting method and accounting machine
abstract: The invention relates to an accounting method for recording a transaction initiated by a user (C) and a transaction point (V), in which the user operates a mobile telephone that is identifiable by a telephone number associated with a user account, and in which the point-of-sale (V) transmits point-of-sale-related (V), transaction-dependent accounting data to an accounting point. A method of this kind is to be further developed such that the user's mobile telephone number remains unknown to the point-of-sale, thus enabling greater anonymity of the user. According to the invention, this is achieved in that the accounting data are stored in the memory of the accounting point, and in that the accounting data can be confirmed by the user's (C) call to the accounting point and matched to the user's account by means of the telephone number.

title: Virtual connection of a remote unit to a server
abstract: Apparatus and associated methods are provided which allow a remote user to maintain a virtual session with a server. A virtual session allows a remote and possibly mobile user to maintain a virtual presence in an office environment without actually being present. Using the present invention, a remote user can access a central application program such as an Internet service provider, a database system, an inventory system or billing system. Likewise, the remote user can receive calls and other forms of communications as though he or she were present in an office environment. A virtual session does not require a physical connection to be continuously present in order to provide a virtual connectivity. This is especially important for mobile applications where the remote user may incur long distance and/or wireless toll charges. Also, methods are presented to allow a remote unit to rapidly reconnect in a transparent and seamless way without burdening the user with the need to connect and reconnect or to upload and download information. Related methods are provided to allow the virtual session to be established, operated and maintained.

title: Method, apparatus, and system for determining the existence of a data file
abstract: Embodiments of the disclosure provide a method, apparatus, and system for determining the existence of a data file. The method includes: sending, by a first network node, a request to a second network node, the request including a first identifier of a data file; searching for, by the second network node, a local matching data file according to the first identifier of the data file; selecting a file block from the local matching data file, and acquiring a first position of the selected file block; and sending the first position to the first network node; selecting, by the first network node, a file block at a corresponding position from the data file according to the first position, and calculating a second characteristic value of the selected file block; and sending the second characteristic value of the file block to the second network node; and determining, by the second network node, whether the second characteristic value matches a third characteristic value of the selected file block in the local matching data file, and determining whether the data file exists based on the matching result.

title: Heat exchange plate of Plate-type heat exchanger
abstract: The utility model discloses a heat exchange plate for a plate type heat interchanger, belonging to a component for a heat interchange device whose heat exchanging mediums are not in direct contact, in particular to a fixing plate for two heat exchanging mediums, or a component for a heat exchanging device for a laminated passage, whose mediums are in contact with different sides of the passage. The heat exchange plate comprises a locating hole, a medium incoming and outgoing entrance, an incoming and outgoing entrance flow guide zone, a distributary zone and a heat transmitting zone, which is characterized in that: the plate ripples in the heat transmitting zone are divided along the center line of the plate into two sides; the obtuse angle ripples on one side are connected with the sharp angle ripples on another side. The beneficial effect of the utility model is in that: due to adopting different angle ripples along the center line of the plate, the flow rate of the heat exchange flux is in a right match with the permissible pressure drop. Meanwhile the diameter ratios of the ripple flow passages at the two sides of the heat exchange plate are different, enabling the flowing speeds of the cold and hot mediums between the plates are close or equal with each other, improving the heat exchange factor by 5 to 10 percent. The utility model is suitable for the manufacturer in this line to replace the prior art with the novel utility model.

title: Securing access to group accounts on a computer system
abstract: A system, method, and computer program to implement Public Key Infrastructure ("PKI")-based access controls on a computing device independently of the operating system's user identification and authorization system. A software application on a standalone, non-networked computing device detects a "smart card" with a PKI certificate identifying the card holder. The identity of the card holder is verified against a registry stored on the computing device separately from the operating system's user identification and authorization system. Verification of the identity of the card holder results in setting the state of the computer system as "authorized" or "unauthorized." In the unauthorized state, user input and viewing of information is prevented. The software application may thus identify individual smart card holders and provide secure access to data and resources, and track authorized and unauthorized access on computing devices that must remain in an "always logged in" state.

title: Capacitance sensor used for touch panel and its electrode structure
abstract: An electrode structure and a capacitance sensor that can suppress the generation of glare and ripples caused by interference of backlight light of a display panel and improve display quality of a touch panel.   An electrode structure used for a touch panel includes a plurality of conductive portions formed by forming a network structure. Each conductive part has four arc lines 101a to 101d that form a closed region so as to be disposed so as to be surrounded. Each two arcs facing each other have the same opening direction. The capacitive sensor is formed by insulating and laminating two layers of the electrode structure, and one of the arc lines of the first layer electrode and the plurality of arc lines of the second layer electrode intersects at only one point. title: Method for protecting copyright of digital image by applying public key system
abstract: The name of the invention is 'method for protecting copyright of a digital image by applying a public key system', belonging to the technical fields of computer security, image processing, computer application and the like. In the method provided by the invention, a public key system is utilized to protect the copyright of the digital image; and chaotic system, lifting wavelet and cellular automata technologies are utilized to process the digital image, so that the authentication on copyright information is realized, thus the robustness is higher. The technology can be widely applied to the field of copyright protection of the digital image.

title: 230V passive high-power factor circuit
abstract: The utility model discloses a 230V passive high-power factor circuit, which is increased with four diodes, such as diode D8, D9, D10 and D11, and a capacitance C6 and a capacitance C8 on the basis of an EMC filter circuit, a rectifying circuit, a power factor correction circuit, a half-bridge circuit and a load, the diode D8 generates a negative voltage after rectifying the current of a lamp tube, adding to the circuit, thereby holding that the electrolytic voltage is always less than an input voltage, the input current is always conducted, and holding continuity of the input current; the high-frequency current on the lamp tube is stacked on the input current by the capacitance C6 simultaneously; the feeding also is rectified by the diode D9, the feeding of the capacitance C8 is stacked on the electrolytic capacitance C4 by D10 rectifying at the same time, to form a direct current half-bridge voltage with smaller ripple, thereby the current waveform phase of the electrolytic capacitance C4 is consistent with that of the input current when charging, and improving the power factors of the whole lamp.

title: A kind of physical examination data uploading method, wireless terminal and Business Management Platform
abstract: The present invention provides a kind of physical examination data uploading method, wireless terminal and Business Management Platform, wherein the described method includes: user identity ID is sent to Business Management Platform by cellular network by health terminal machine；Business Management Platform verify the user identity ID it is legal after, wireless device identifier corresponding with user identity ID by the cellular network is sent to health terminal machine；The physical examination data that measurement obtains are sent to the corresponding wireless terminal of the wireless device identifier by health terminal machine；If the wireless terminal receives the instruction for sending data, the physical examination data are sent to Business Management Platform by cellular network；The Business Management Platform stores the physical examination data.The present invention, which realizes, is not uploaded to Business Management Platform for physical examination data by VPN, and gives the purpose that user's physical examination data upload power to make decision.

title: A Lottery Direct Ticketing Processing System and Method Therefore through Internet
abstract: PURPOSE: An Internet instant lottery processing system and method is provided to enable an issue of an instant lottery, a check of a winner, a transfer of a winning money and an approval over the Internet so that it can enhance a reliability of a lottery process system and reduce a cost. CONSTITUTION: The system comprises a lottery issue system(100), a sale system(200) and a lottery process system(300). The lottery process system includes a web server(31), a system controller(32), a lottery table(33), a decoder(34), a winning processor(35), a lottery database(80), and a user database(70). The system controller(32) generates a public key according as a user purchases a lottery, transmits a corresponding private key, generates an approval code, and processes an approval on a lottery purchase and a payment of a winning money. The lottery table(33) generates lottery data under the control of the system controller(32). The decoder(34) decodes the code of the lottery table(33). The lottery database(80) records data decoded by the private key, and unused lottery data based on a winning money data table and a lottery number table. The user database(70) records the public key and the private key performing a random process of lottery number extracted from the lottery database(80).

title: Method and System for Email Identity Validation
abstract: The present invention uses Server-based Certificate Validation Protocol (SCVP) to validate the public key digital signature certificate of an email signer (or the public key encryption certificate of an email recipient) by using a modified SCVP server such that a trustworthiness indicator based on certificate policies is included in an SCVP server response that maps the certificate policies asserted in the public key certificate of the email signer (or email recipient(s)) to graphically represent the degree of trust that can be attributed to the identities bound to public key certificates containing one or more certificate policies. The graphical representation of a trust level may appear directly in an email client and is based on the level of trust attributable to the binding between the public key distributed via a public key certificate (for signing or encryption) and the identity/attributes of the “subject” or “entity” contained in that certificate.

title: Alignment of tirks using network manager
abstract: A network management system supports network operators in their day-by-day provisioning, using a data synchronizer. First, the synchronizer initiates an inventory verification request specifying the verification data to be returned. The synchronizer then determines the network manager (NM) and the record keeping system involved in the inventory verification request and sends a request to the NM and the record keeping system for the inventory information of interest. The synchronizer receives current inventory data from the NM and inventory data from the record keeping system, and compares the current inventory data and the inventory data from the record keeping system to determine data discrepancies. A discrepancy may be corrected automatically or be the operator. An application of the synchronizer is for updating inventory data of a trunk integrated record keeping system (TIRKS) using an integrated network manager (INM).

title: Security authentication method and apparatus for pos user public key, and terminal device
abstract: A security authentication method and apparatus for a POS user public key, and a terminal device. The method comprises: upon running firmware for the first time, randomly generating a first key (S101); downloading a user public key, and generating a first ciphertext on the basis of the first key and the user public key (S102); and upon downloading an application, verifying whether the user public key is correct on the basis of the first key and the first ciphertext (S103). The present method employs a key generated by the terminal itself to encrypt the user public key, so as to effectively prevent a man-in-the-middle event caused by an unauthorized user of the terminal altering the user public key, thereby preventing the terminal from running unauthorized payment applications and improving security of the terminal.

title: Method for procuring policy by using resemblance and containment based on hashing
abstract: PURPOSE: A method for securing integrity of policy using relation and containment based on hashing is provided to reduce the usage of a memory, by comparing data based on the hashed result value. CONSTITUTION: A first policy is inputted(101). At least one data among relation, distance and containment is calculated on the basis of hash(102). Relation and containment between the first policy and the second policy are calculated using the calculated data(103). Integrity is secured by managing the first policy, based on the calculated relation and containment(104).

title: Systems and methods for performing device authentication operations using cryptocurrency transactions
abstract: A first device may be coupled to a second device over a network. The first device may maintain a first cryptocurrency wallet and may include mining circuitry that generates cryptocurrency rewards for the wallet. The first device may transmit a communications request to the second device. The second device may transmit payment information identifying a second wallet and a selected authentication amount to the first device. The second device may select the authentication amount to perform a desired amount of device connection rate limiting. The first device may generate an authentication transaction for a cryptocurrency network to transfer the authentication amount from the first wallet to the second wallet. The second device may determine whether the authentication transaction has been verified by the cryptocurrency network. In response to determining that the authentication transaction has been verified by the cryptocurrency network, the second device may establish the communication link.

title: Enabling a User to Transact Using Cryptocurrency
abstract: A system and method of enabling a user to transact using cryptocurrency of a value defined in relation to a different medium of exchange or financial instrument is provided. In the method, a request to create a voucher having a face value remaining defined in relation to the medium of exchange or financial instrument is received. A voucher having key data being associated with a voucher cryptocurrency address holding a token amount of cryptocurrency included therein is generated. A transaction ledger is monitored to determine whether a redeeming transaction against the voucher address has occurred against a destination cryptocurrency address. Responsive to a redeeming transaction against the voucher address occurring, an additional amount of cryptocurrency is transferred to the destination address. The additional amount of cryptocurrency being calculated such that the sum of the token and additional amounts substantially matches a cryptocurrency equivalent of the face value of the voucher.

title: System and method for developing an analytic fraud model
abstract: A system and method is provided for developing an analytic fraud model to predict likelihood that a transaction is fraudulent comprising a first database storing a log of credit transaction information comprising requests for credit reports and including application information used by a credit requestor. A second database stores deleted credit inquiries. The deleted credit inquiries comprise fraudulent requests for credit reports. A programmed processing system is operatively associated with the first and second databases and operates in accordance with a sampling program. The sampling program filters the stored deleted credit inquiries for a select period to obtain a sample of fraudulent transactions, obtains select fraudulent credit transaction information from the log for the sample of fraudulent transactions, obtains a sample of random credit transaction information for the select period from the log, and processes the fraudulent credit transaction information and the random credit transaction information to determine characteristics of fraudulent and non-fraudulent application information used by credit requester. A predictive fraud model is developed using the determined characteristics.

title: Semiconductor device
abstract: A semiconductor device includes a nonvolatile memory, and an interface configured to transfer data to and from the nonvolatile memory. The interface includes a security logic unit which controls a security level for the data written to the nonvolatile memory, in accordance with a plurality of preset security codes and a lock code that is written to a specific area in the nonvolatile memory.

title: Specialized secondary compartment in a mobile device
abstract: A computer-implemented method includes identifying critical data on a primary storage of a mobile device, where the primary storage is powered by a primary battery component. The critical data is backed up from the primary storage to a secondary storage. A charge level of the primary battery component is detected. It is determined that the charge level of the primary battery component is less than a minimum threshold. The mobile device is switched from a primary mode to a secondary mode, based on the charge level being less than the minimum threshold. A secondary battery component powers the secondary storage in the secondary mode, and the critical data is accessible on the secondary storage in the secondary mode.

title: Method and system for introducing information of buyer
abstract: A method and a system for intermediating purchase information are provided to promote sales and offer correct goods/sale information to a buyer by making an information providing member register the purchase information of the buyer to an information providing service system, and offering sale incentive to the member registering the purchase information and a system operator. An intermediary member manager(32) registers an intermediary member and manages the information related to the intermediary member. A seller member manager(33) registers a seller member and manages the information related to the seller member. A database(34) stores various kinds of information managed by an information providing service server(30). An information matching searcher(35) searches the seller member matched with the purchase information of a customer member from the database by receiving the purchase information from the customer member through the website. An information transfer controller(36) transfers the matched purchase information to the seller member. A fee payment processor(37) distributes a predetermined ratio of a sale fee paid from the seller member to the intermediary member registering the purchase information.

abstract: A method for managing identifiers can include receiving, in an identifier management system, a request for an identifier in a computing system. title: Detecting suspicious network activity using flow sampling
abstract: Methods, media, and computing devices for network security can include receiving flow sampled network traffic from multiple network devices with a network monitoring computing device for network traffic among multiple computing devices, comparing source ports and destination ports in the flow sampled network traffic to a list of approved ports with the network monitoring computing device, and detecting suspicious network activity for flow sampled network traffic having a source port and a destination port exceptional to the list of approved ports with the network monitoring computing device. Alternatively, a suspicious network activity list can be maintained for flow sampled network traffic having source and destination ports exceptional to the list of approved ports. Alternatively, a network administrator can be alerted when a port is added to the suspicious network activity list in response to a total number of ports in the suspicious network activity list exceeding a threshold number.

title: Method and system for managing a network
abstract: In an exemplary method, a network having first and second network manager devices is managed by independently managing a first operation using a first logic of the first network manager device, including managing a first portion of a database, and by independently managing a second operation using a second logic of the second network manager device, including managing a second portion of the database. A peer-to-peer interface can communicate information between the first and second network manager devices. In an exemplary embodiment, a system for managing a network includes a plurality of network manager devices, each device including a logic for managing a different operation, a database, and a peer-to-peer interface for sending queries to a different network manager device in the plurality and receiving queries from the different network manager device in the plurality.

title: Credit limit storage in an anonymous trading system
abstract: An anonymous trading system comprises a network of broker nodes each of which perform price matching, deal execution and market distribution. Trader terminals on trading floors are connected to a given broker node via a trading agent node. Credit may be stored for a given trading floor at its trading agent node or at a credit agent node which stores credit limits for a group of trading floors. Where the credit limits of a party to a proposed deal are stored at a credit agent node, the deal execution process is routed through that credit agent node to check for available credit. The system allows institutions to adopt any combination of local and global credit assignments with counterparties with which it wishes to trade.

title: Identity ledger in crypto currency transactions
abstract: The technology presented here reduces the computational cost in processor cycles, memory, disk space and/or bandwidth by not requiring mining to obtain the system crypto currency. Further, the technology presented here uses a distributed identity ledger to verify transactions, thus avoiding the need to verify an 80 GB block chain. In addition, the entries on the identity ledger can expire after a certain period of time, thus automatically reducing the size of the identity ledger.

abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of high intensity HDPE double-wall corrugated pipes, including ripple tube body, anticorrosive coat, cushion, cavity volume, spring, steel screen layer, antimicrobial coating and hydrophobic layer, the surface of ripple tube body is provided with anticorrosive coat, the inwall of anticorrosive coat is provided with cushion, the inside of cushion is provided with cavity volume, spring is provided with inside cavity volume, the inwall of cushion is provided with steel screen layer, the inwall of steel screen layer is provided with antimicrobial coating, the inwall of antimicrobial coating is provided with hydrophobic layer, the HDPE double-wall corrugated pipes in the inside of body by being provided with cushion, and certain cushioning effect can be carried out to external force provided with some groups of springs inside cushion and cause the intensity of the HDPE double-wall corrugated pipes to obtain certain lifting by the decrease of steel screen layer again, with excellent in cushion effect, decay resistance is strong, the advantages that service life is long.

title: Hybrid cryptographic system and method for encrypting data
abstract: Hybrid cryptographic systems and methods of encrypting data are disclosed. Hybrid encryption methods are used to securely transmit electronic data packets from a sender to multiple clients. The method includes storing a shared symmetric key on each of the clients. The sender encrypts the private key of the asymmetric key pair using the shared symmetric key. The transmitter encrypts the data packet with the temporary symmetric key to generate an encrypted data packet. The transmitter encrypts the temporary symmetric key with the public key of the asymmetric key pair to generate an encrypted temporary symmetric key. The sender transmits the encrypted data packet, the encrypted temporary symmetric key, and the encrypted private key to the client. Each client decrypts the encrypted data packet by: decrypting the encrypted private key using the shared symmetric key; the encrypted temporary symmetric key is decrypted using the decrypted private key, and the encrypted data packet is decrypted using the decrypted temporary symmetric key.

title: Customer token preferences interface
abstract: Embodiments are directed to token management. Embodiments initiate presentation of a digital wallet management interface including initiating presentation of a digital wallet; initiating presentation of an original token associated with the digital wallet; initiating presentation of a toggle switch comprising a first position and a second position and associated with the original token and configured for graphical manipulation by the user between the first position and the second position, wherein the first position corresponds to the original token being available for use as a payment credential; and where the second position corresponds to the original token being unavailable for use as a payment credential.

title: Biological feature based safety certification method and device
abstract: The invention discloses a biological feature based safety certification method and device. The method comprises that a terminal obtains a first biological feature according to a received biological feature certification request; the terminal matches the first biological feature and a preset second biological feature to generate a matching result; the terminal uses a secrete key of a safety certificate, which corresponds to the terminal uniquely, of the terminal to encrypt the matching result to obtain first cryptograph data; and the terminal sends the first cryptograph data and a public key certificate of the safety certificate to a certification end which is a server or the terminal. The method and device of the invention can solve the problem that present identity certification has hidden safety troubles.

title: Online mobile payment system and method using authentication codes
abstract: A mobile payment method includes the steps of making an online purchase at an online store with payment information being received by a web browsing capable device. The web browsing capable device connects to a server and a payment request including a VID is sent to the server. The server verifies the VID. A mobile payment device is connected to the server. A token request is sent to the mobile device upon verification of the VID. A token response is sent to the server. Information is archived to a database and a cookie associated with the VID is created. The cookie with associated VID is archived. A payment response is sent to the web browsing capable device. An authorization request is sent to the online store, and the online store authorizes the transaction with a payment network.

title: Transactions, payment and emergency medical system
abstract: A system comprising a device adapted to be worn by an individual, which provides personal identification of the owner in case of incapacity and also be used as an e-wallet that integrates contactless payment technology to substitute the petty cash that people carry along when exercising. Additional functionalities that can be integrated onto the card include store loyalty cards, membership cards, keys and public transportation cards. The device has an interchangeable form that holds a card. The card can also be used as a debit card to draw funds and purchase items at point of sale terminals with compatible technology while providing medical and personal information to emergency medical responders.

title: Telecommunications call time slicing system and method
abstract: A telecommunications system and method provides a time slicing capability whereby alternate services, such as advertising, can be provided to a party while being kept on hold. Thus, charges associated with portions of the call during which alternate services are provided can be billed to other parties, such as advertisers, and the cost for the call to the caller or the called party can be reduced. The connection between the caller and the called party is maintained during the time that alternate services are being provided so that when either the caller or the called party is available to accept or resume a call, the alternate services are terminated and the caller and called party are reconnected.

title: Diversity receiver
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To improve the bit error rate of a basic signal requiring reception without fail and to improve the bit error rate of a high-definition signal when the basic signal can be stably received concerning a diversity receiver to be used for transmitting a hierarchy encoded television signal through an orthogonal frequency-division multiplexing(OFDM) system. SOLUTION: The bit error rate of the basic signal is detected by an error correction circuit 15 and when this bit error rate exceeds a specified value, the level difference of two signals to be synthesized is detected by level detectors 20 and 21 and a comparator circuit 22. When the level difference of two signals to be synthesized is a little, one signal is attenuated by a variable attenuator 5 or 6 and the ripple of a waveform caused by diversity synthesization is reduced so that the bit error rate can be improved.

title: Online real-time data interaction method and device, electronic equipment and storage medium
abstract: The invention relates to big data, and discloses an online real-time data interaction method, which comprises the following steps: acquiring second video data and audio data of a user within a preset time period, and judging whether the user environment of the user meets preset requirements or not according to the second video data and the audio data; when the user environment where the user is located meets the preset requirement is judged, playing first video data corresponding to the user request, acquiring third video data of the user in real time, and performing feature processing on the third video data to obtain a feature sequence of the user; and inputting the characteristic sequence into the expression recognition model to obtain a target expression category of the user, and dynamically adjusting the playing strategy of the first video data according to the target expression category. The invention also relates to a blockchain technique, wherein the second and third video data are stored in the blockchain. The invention can improve the efficiency of online real-time data interaction.

title: Action figure game
abstract: A method and an apparatus by which rules and record keeping in games employing figures as game pieces are incorporated onto the figures themselves. Counters or wheels keep track of a character's characteristics and how they change as a game progresses. Accessories can be added to the figures that change the characteristics of a character. The accessories also identify how the characteristics of a character are modified by adding the accessory.

title: Ripple-eliminating circuit
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain a ripple-eliminating circuit whose frequency dependency is small and adjustment is easy even at low frequencies by constituting a circuit so as to subtract a dc component from the signal in which dc- and ripple-components are superimposed.  
     CONSTITUTION: A capacitor 5 blocks the dc component of a signal e 1  and passes the signal containing only a ripple component. An inversion amplifier 6 inverts and amplifies the signal from the capacitor 5 to generate an output signal e 2 . The signal e 2  and the original signal e 1  are added in a non-inversion-adder amplifier 7, and a rippleless output signal e 3  is obtained. The amplification of the inversion amplifier 6 and the resistances of resistors 12 and 13 are so selected that the voltage and polarity of the ripple component of the original signal applied across a resistor 14 are opposite to the voltage and polarity of the output signal of the inversion amplifier 6 which is also applied across the resistor 14, and that the magnitudes of both signals are practically equal. In this constitution, frequency dependency is made small, and the circuit is readily adjusted. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1980,JPO&Japio

title: Authentication enforcement using decryption and authentication in a single transaction in a secure microprocessor
abstract: The present invention uses a secure processor (22) operating with a host processor (210) to perform a unitary decrypt/authenticate operation. The host processor (210) receives encrypted messages (12) that include authentication information. The host processor must submit each message (12) to the secure processor (22). The secure processor (22) then decrypts and authenticates the message. If the authentication operation (24) is not successful, the secure processor (22) does not return the fully-decrypted message back to the host (210). In a preferred embodiment, the host (210) will receive no part of the message upon failure.

title: Mining node and method for mining
abstract: Disclosed are a mining node and a mining method. The mining node comprises: a management server communication unit receiving an electronic wallet address, pool server information, and cryptocurrency information of a management server from the management server; a memory storing the electronic wallet address of the management server; a pool server communication unit connecting a pool server based on the pool server information and transmitting the electronic wallet address to the pool server; and a processing unit performing mining based on the cryptocurrency information in the connected pool server. The processing unit calculates mining resource information used for performing mining. The pool server communication unit transmits the mining resource information to the pool server. The management server communication unit transmits the mining resource information to the management server.

title: Systems and Methods for Collecting Bonds and Fines for Warrants and Traffic Tickets
abstract: Systems and methods are provided that allow law officers to carry out financial transactions with individuals having outstanding warrants who might otherwise be arrested. The system includes a wireless (typically cellular based) credit card/debit card transaction unit carried by the law officer during the process of serving the warrant, or during a traffic stop, wherein an outstanding warrant is identified. The system further includes a wide area network (Internet) connection that facilitates record keeping functionality associated with the posting of the bond or payment of the fine by the individual being addressed by the law officer. The appropriate financial transaction computer systems convey payment or posting of the bond to a database associated with the police station or the like. Likewise, wide area network (Internet) connections to databases associated with the judicial courts that may have issued the warrants are also secured for the purposes of verifying the posting of the bond or the payment of the fine. The real time updating of records in each of the various agency databases provides the necessary security for both the individual on whom the warrant is served, and for the agencies involved in executing the warrant.

title: System and method for processing multi-currency transactions at a point of sale
abstract: A system and method for supporting non-cash transactions in multiple currencies. The system includes software which determines wether a transaction is in local or non-local currency and a multi-currency payment platform (212,218) to interface a point-of-sale terminal with a voucher receiving module (206)  and a database system (212,222) to enable the point-of-sale terminal to download current exchange rates for different currencies. The cardholder (202) is able to determine the exact amount that will be charged in that currency upon receipt of cardholder's (202) statement for the card. The software enables the recalculation of the transaction amount from the currency in which the merchant has priced the transaction into the currency of the cardholder's choice, and allows a choice to be made as to the currency in which the transaction will be processed. The merchant receives settlement in the currency of his choice, which will not necessarily be the merchant's local currency.

title: Evolving interactive dialog box for an internet web page
abstract: A host Web page includes an evolving interactive dialog box (110) wherein an Internet user may enter user data to be processed. When the user completes entering user data in a first revolution of the interactive dialog box (110), the first resolution (110) is replaced with a second resolution of the evolving interactive dialog box (120) without disturbing or affecting any other part of the host Web page being displayed. Beneficially, the first and second revolutions may be communicated to a user computer together with and at a same time as the host Web page. Also, the second revolution (120) may include a variety of data which is selected or customized to match the user data submitted in the first revolution. Each revolution of the evolving interactive dialog box may be comprised of any combination of general textual data entry fields (112), category (pull-down) menu, contact information data entry fields (114), and opt-in/opt-out buttons. The evolving interactive dialog box may also include dynamically selectable features, such as font type, font size, font color, box shape, box dimension(s), background colors, foreground colors, etc.

title: System and method for prevent error bookbinding
abstract:
The present invention relates to a bookbinding error prevention system and method, and more particularly, a test device installed on one side of a book matching machine and a bookbinding machine for binding a book to print a unique code (bar code) printed or printed on a cover sheet and a guide sheet. The present invention relates to a bookbinding error prevention system and method for checking whether matching and binding state are performed correctly by scanning and matching with customer information stored in a server memory. 
     The bookbinding error prevention system according to the present invention includes a cover 10 having a customer name, a title, etc. printed on the surface thereof, and having a unique code 11 printed or outputted on one side thereof to identify the information; A guide sheet is printed and a guide sheet 20 having a unique code 21 for identifying the information printed or outputted on one side thereof; A matching device (100) for matching the guide paper (20) according to the customer code (30); A bookbinding apparatus 300 for binding the matched guide sheet 20 together with the cover sheet 10; A server 500 for analyzing and comparing whether the front cover 10 and the guide sheet 20 supplied according to the customer code 30 match; It characterized in that it comprises a cutting machine 700 for cutting the booklet bound through the bookbinding machine 500. 
     And the bookbinding error prevention method of the present invention after inputting the information (customer name or title, cover type, guide sheet type, order) for the booklet on the server 300, the customer code 30 for the information is given to the memory Storing at 550 (S1); Printing or outputting a unique code 11 indicating a customer name and type on a cover 10 to prepare a cover and placing the cover code on the supply table 310 of the bookbinding apparatus 300 (S2); Preparing or guiding the guide sheet 20 by printing or outputting a unique code 21 indicating a guide sheet, a guide sheet type, etc. on the guide sheet 20 and placing the guide sheet storage unit 110 of the matching device 100 ( S3); Transmitting, by the server 500, a command to mate the guide sheet 20 according to the customer code 30 stored in the memory 550 to the matching device 100 through the command unit 510 (S4); Receiving the command of the matching device 100 step (S5) to match the guide sheet 20 in the guide storage unit 110 according to the customer code (30); Inspecting whether the matching guide sheets 20 are correctly matched through the inspection apparatus 130 (S6); Transferring the guide sheets 20 and the front cover 10 matched by the matching device 100 to the bookbinding device 300 (S7); Checking whether the cover sheet 10 and the guide sheet 20 to be transferred coincide with the customer information 30 stored in the server 500 (S8); It characterized in that it comprises a step (S9) of cutting the frame and the unique codes (11, 21) of the bookbinding bound by the bookbinding device 300 and then sending it to the customer.

title: Electronic money purse and fund transfer system
abstract: The essence of the invention is a socalled "data bit variable spacer generator", block 79, which contributes to the generation of a control output "c" from a combinatory logic circuit group 78. The logic level of "c" determines whether a clear data bit from the parity flip flop FF6 is to be sent out or a random bit from block RMG. The `variable data bit generator` is controlled by a number of parallel bit outputs from registers SH1 and SH2 which hold an encryption key after being conditioned by other logic inputs derived from key parity flip flops (FF1 and FF2) and clear data bit levels from block 81. Registers SH1 and SH2 shift and recirculate when the `c` output is high. Similar principles are used when data are decrypted. The circuit is suitable for integration with other functions on a single substrate chip.

title: System and Method for Managing Card Using Security Apparatus and Providing Targeted Advertising
abstract: Disclosed are a card management system for providing a target advertisement and using a security device and a method thereof. According to an aspect of the present invention, the present invention provides a card management system capable of reusing a transportation card, which is used by a user as in the past, without re-buying the transportation card even if the traffic card is lost or a smartphone is changed, and a method thereof. In addition, a card management server, which issues a card to a terminal, comprises a communication unit, a control unit, a memory unit, a signature value coding and decoding module and a separation module.

title: A kind of unmanned cashier and its method of payment
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of unmanned cashier and its methods of payment, unmanned cashier includes commodity identification platform and merchandise news display screen, supporting rack is fixed in the one side wall of commodity identification platform, commodity information processor is installed in the inside of commodity identification platform, commodity information processor includes native processor, RFID reader and gravity sensor, RFID reader and gravity sensor are connect with native processor circuit, communication connection is useful for the cloud database of storage commodity id information and consumer's id information on native processor, merchandise news display screen is fixed on the one end of supporting rack far from commodity identification platform, the HDMI connecting lines for being used for transmission picture signal are connected between merchandise news display screen and commodity identification platform.The present invention is identified the information of commodity by commodity identification platform and obtains corresponding commodity payment information, shows payment information by merchandise news display screen, the payment of consumer's barcode scanning saves the cash register time, and reduce cash register cost.

title: Systems and Methods for Networked Music Playback
abstract: Systems, methods, apparatus, and articles of manufacture to facilitate connection to a multimedia playback network are disclosed. An example method provides content to a local playback network. The example method includes identifying multimedia content from a content provider. The example method includes passing information regarding the multimedia content to a local playback system including one or more multimedia playback devices in response to a trigger. The example method includes facilitating play of the multimedia content via a local playback network associated with the local playback system.

title: System and method for auto billing service using mobile communication
abstract: A system and a method for an automatic billing service using the mobile network are provided to enable a user to pay a fare for using subway, highway, and a bus with a mobile terminal based on location information by checking the precise location information of the mobile terminal. A PAN(Personal Area Network) coordinator(15) periodically transmits a beacon signal including ID information to a management area by being installed to each gate of the subway and the highway. The mobile terminal(10) includes the ID information of the PAN coordinator and the mobile terminal to a location registration message, and transmits the message to a location registration server(25) if entry in the management area of the PAN coordinator is checked by receiving the beacon signal. The location registration server stores the location information of each PAN coordinator and entrance/exit discriminating information to a database, and checks a location and departure/arrival of the mobile terminal by searching the ID information of the PAN coordinator included in the location registration message from the database.

title: Offline authentication
abstract: Techniques for enhancing the security of a communication device when conducting a transaction using the communication device may include using a limited-use key (LUK) to generate a transaction cryptogram, and using a signature key to generate a signature. The transaction can be an offline data authentication transaction, and access can be granted based on authentication of the signature prior to verifying the transaction cryptogram.

title: The ultra-thin splicing LED display of a kind of high resolving power
abstract: The utility model discloses the ultra-thin splicing LED display of a kind of high resolving power, it comprises four display units, forms display screen after splicing; Described display screen is fixedly mounted on backboard; Described display unit comprises the flexible display screen luminous zone of rectangular structure, and right side and the bottom of flexible display screen luminous zone are provided with splicing edge, is respectively longitudinal spliced limit and horizontally-spliced limit; The position of the splicing edge of corresponding display unit on described backboard, offers cannelure and transverse groove that thickness is more than or equal to splicing edge thickness; Described display screen surface is irradiated face shield assembly, and described face shield assembly comprises translucent cover and display unit face shield; Described display unit face shield is provided with diffuse reflection striped and extinction hole, described diffuse reflection striped is the bar shaped ripple glaze being distributed in display unit face shield surface and arranging along horizontal direction; Described four display unit face shields are embedded in described translucent cover, and the outward flange of four display units and the cell wall of translucent cover are fitted.

title: A method for order-preserving multiple pattern matching based on hashing
abstract: The present invention proposes a hashing-based algorithm for solving the problem of ranking multi-pattern matching. The ranking pattern matching is a string matching method for determining whether the two strings match or not based on whether or not each character in the string appears in the same order. Rank pattern matching can be applied to areas where value change order is important, such as stock price index analysis and music similarity analysis. The problem of ranking multi-pattern matching is to find all sub-strings of text in which the patterns in the pattern set and the order of each character appear in the same order when a pattern set of text and several patterns is made.

title: Management of object mapping information corresponding to a distributed storage system
abstract: Systems and methods for managing mapping information for objects maintained in a distributed storage system are provided. The distributed storage system can include a keymap subsystem that manages the mapping information according to object keys. Requests for specific object mapping information are directed to specific keymap coordinators within the keymap subsystem based on a consistency based hashing schema. The hashing schema is updated and distributed to other components within the distributed storage system based on a defined distribution model.

title: Electric power steering control device
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an electric power steering control device capable of suppressing torque ripple of a 3-phase brushless motor by an inexpensive constitution without requiring an enormous amount of data for correction.  <P>SOLUTION: A sine wave current value of a frequency obtained by integral multiple or fraction of a frequency of an electric angle of the 3-phase brushless motor 3 for assisting steering force of a driver is added to the current value set according to the steering force of the driver to be a q axis target current of the 3-phase brushless motor 3, and the q axis current of the 3-phase brushless motor 3 is feedback-controlled to the q axis target current.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2009,JPO&INPIT

title: A kind of method and device of Hole Detection
abstract: The present invention is suitable for field of information security technology, provides a kind of method and device of Hole Detection, comprising: the first access mode by carrying User Identity accesses the URL that server provides, and obtains the first data content that the server returns；The second access mode by not carrying the User Identity accesses the URL, obtains the second data content that the server returns；Judge to access whether result meets preset Hole Detection condition, the preset Hole Detection condition includes that first data content and second data content be not identical；When the access result meets preset Hole Detection condition, determine that there are loopholes by the URL.In the present invention, the access of different modes is initiated by the URL provided from trend server, judgement is compared for the data content that each access mode is returned according to server, to detect that the URL with the presence or absence of loophole, which thereby enhances the efficiency of Hole Detection.

title: A kind of energy saving driving circuit switched based on the two duty ratio of PWM
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of energy saving driving circuit switched based on the two duty ratio of PWM, comprise input unit, high low duty ratio switch unit and driver element; Described input unit produces the PWM ripple signal of high and low duty ratio and control signal and the PWM ripple signal of high and low duty ratio and control signal is sent to high low duty ratio switch unit; Described high low duty ratio switch unit receives the signal of input unit and carries out the switching of high and low duty ratio and the PWM ripple signal after switching is sent to driver element; Described driver element is connected with load and completes the driving to load.The utility model is by the switching of two duty ratio PWM, and circuit drives with higher duty ratio PWM when starting, and has come during maintenance with lower duty ratio PWM, achieves energy-conservation, consumption reduction, low-carbon (LC) advantage while completing driving.

title: Power converter
abstract:
PURPOSE: To reduce in size a DC reactor, an electrolytic capacitor, to alleviate the load of a transistor, and to enhance the efficiency of a power converter by suppressing a ripple current flowing to a DC reactor.  
     CONSTITUTION: A current flowing to a DC reactor 2 is detected by a current detector 11, input to a first filter 12, and a signal corresponding to the DC component of the current flowing to the DC reactor 2 is obtained. Similarly, the output of the current detector 11 is input to a second filter 13, and a signal containing the ripple of the current flowing to the DC reactor 2 is obtained. If the current flowing to the DC reactor 2 tends to increase, the output of an addition point 14 is moved in a negative direction, the signal is added to an addition point 15 to reduce the output voltage of a reference voltage generator 9. Accordingly, since a pulse width controller 10 so regulates the ON/OFF ratio of a transistor 3 as to reduce the voltage of an electrolytic capacitor 5, an increase in the current flowing to the DC reactor 2 is suppressed. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1990,JPO&Japio

title: Method of remotely controlling a plurality of receivers and a system including such receivers
abstract: 1354942 Selective signalling ZELLWEGER Ltd 18 May 1971 [2 June 1970] 15463/71 Heading G4H In a remote-control system having a plurality of receivers connected to an electricity energy distribution network, a command is formed by a combination of two (or more) commands transmitted one after another as modulations of a single carrier frequency to all the receivers. For ripple control, commands are transmitted as A.C. impulses superimposed on the mains supply, these being converted to D.C. at the receiver, recognition of the first command of a combination pulsing a monostable to open a gate so that the second command of the combination, if present, can be recognized. If it is, the control function is performed. Using 100 basic commands, 10,000 combinations can be obtained. Some receivers may only respond to the basic commands used separately.

title: Secure communication via the internet
abstract:
Secure communication via the Internet is enabled, using public key
cryptography, where the sender is relieved from key management tasks. The sending station
110 indicates to a key server 170 an intention to send a secure electronic communication to
the receiving station 120. The key server verifies whether a public key is available for the
intended receiver. If not, the key server indicates to the receiver an intention to send a
secured communication, and enables the receiver to obtain software for creating a
private/public kcy pair for the receiver and for providing the new public key to the key
server. If the public key was already available to the key server or the public key is at a later
stage made available by the receiver, the public key for the receiver is used to secure the
electronic communication. The secured communication is made available to the receiver
through the communication system.
text: Secure communication via the internet Secure communication via the Internet is enabled, using public key cryptography, where the sender is relieved from key management tasks. The sending station 110 indicates to a key server 170 an intention to send a secure electronic communication to the receiving station 120. The key server verifies whether a public key is available for the intended receiver. If not, the key server indicates to the receiver an intention to send a secured communication, and enables the receiver to obtain software for creating a private/public kcy pair for the receiver and for providing the new public key to the key server. If the public key was already available to the key server or the public key is at a later stage made available by the receiver, the public key for the receiver is used to secure the electronic communication. The secured communication is made available to the receiver through the communication system.

title: Methods and systems for provisioning mobile devices with payment credentials
abstract: Embodiments are described that are directed to optimizing the provisioning of payment account credentials to mobile devices utilizing mobile wallets. In some embodiments, one of multiple provisioning schemes may be selectively chosen for payment account credential provisioning based upon a determined risk involved with a particular provisioning request. A low risk provisioning request leads to an immediate provisioning of a payment credential, whereas a provisioning request of high risk results in the provisioning request being denied. In some embodiments, medium risk provisioning requests will cause an additional user authentication to be performed before the payment account provisioning is finalized. The additional user authentication may occur using a separate communication channel than the channel in which the provisioning request was received.
