title: Data processing method and device for electronic transaction verification
abstract: This application discloses a kind of data processing method and device for electronic transaction verification, the authentication processing operation for executing electronic transaction between the first electronic transaction user and the second electronic transaction user, including：Judge whether at least one of the first electronic transaction user and the second electronic transaction user identity condition meet preset first identity condition；If it is determined that any identity condition in the first electronic transaction user and the second electronic transaction user meets preset first identity condition, then the electronic transaction is executed and preset the first data processing；By the way of judging subscriber identity information, by the data processing for executing electronic transaction to the user for meeting preset condition, achieve the purpose that improve transaction security, it is not easy the technique effect of dispute to realize digital asset over-the-counter trading, and then solves the problems, such as that digital asset over-the-counter trading safety is relatively low in the related technology, is susceptible to dispute.

title: Computer apparatus and mining method using thereof
abstract: The present invention relates to a computer device and a method for mining the same, and a computer device mounted on a transportation means provided with a generator and a storage battery according to the present invention includes a mining unit that performs a mining operation for generating blocks to be connected to a blockchain. During driving of the transportation means, the mining unit is operated using power generated by the generator or power stored in the storage battery. According to an embodiment of the present invention, as a reward obtained by performing a mining operation of a blockchain using surplus power generated during the operation of a transportation means, it is possible to reduce fuel costs for driving transportation means or data communication costs for autonomous driving. There is an advantage.

title: Apparatus and method for controlling data access
abstract: An apparatus and a method for controlling data access, wherein the method comprises obtaining a data access key to gain access to a data storage for storing data to be transferred between a first device and a second device; storing the obtained data access key in a memory; obtaining a first public key associated with the first device; obtaining a second public key associated with the second device; encrypting the data access key with the first public key to form a first encrypted key; encrypting the data access key with the second public key to form a second encrypted key; and removing the data access key from the memory permanently. The data access key is accessible by decrypting the first or second encrypted key using a corresponding first or second private key of the respective first or second public key.

The data access key is accessible by decrypting the first or second encrypted key using a corresponding first or second private key of the respective first or second public key.

title: Method for Providing Asynchronous Reverse Direction Payment based on Application Interlocking by using Affiliated Store's Mobile Device with Radio Signal Sending and Cryptocurrency
abstract: According to a method for asynchronous payment in a reverse direction based on application interlocking using an affiliate wireless terminal sending a wireless signal and cryptocurrency, the method comprises: a first step that the operating server receives transaction registration information from an affiliate terminal; a second step that the operating server separately and uniquely identifies an affiliate having an affiliate wireless terminal, generates one time identification (OTID), and generates disposable authentication code at the same time; a third step that the operating server links and stores the transaction registration information, OTID, and authentication code; a fourth step that the operating server provides the OTID and authentication code to the affiliate terminal; a fifth step that the operating server receives recognition information; a sixth step that the operating server uniquely identifies and authenticates the affiliate having the affiliate wireless terminal, confirms any one piece of transaction registration information only identified through the OTID of the transaction registration information, and authenticates the validity of the confirmed transaction registration information through the authentication code; a seventh step that the operating server provides transaction information; an eight step that the operating server receives request information; a ninth step that the operating server processes payment information to be provided to a payment application of the user wireless terminal; a tenth step that the operating server confirms a result of a cryptocurrency transaction procedure; and an eleventh step that the operating server provides payment result information based on cryptocurrency for the cryptocurrency transaction procedure to the user wireless terminal and affiliate terminal.

title: Method and system for data acquisition for analyzing transaction of cryptocurrency
abstract: The present invention relates to a method and an apparatus for acquiring data for generating a machine learning model for detecting fraudulent accounts for cryptocurrency. The method for acquiring data for generating a machine learning model for detecting fraudulent accounts for cryptocurrency comprises the steps of: receiving a report relating to a fraudulent address from a first database that stores information about the reported fraudulent address; acquiring a first fraudulent address and first description associated with the first fraudulent address from the report; extracting a plurality of first key words associated with the first fraudulent address from the first description by using natural language processing; and storing the first fraudulent address in a second database.

title: Bidding management method and system for electronic bidding
abstract: The present invention relates to an electronic bidding system for acquiring and analyzing an article bidding notice to which a bidding agent is applied in all bidding announcements of an electronic bidding system and providing reasonable tactical information to each bidder through a quotation of a manufacturer for each article, And more particularly, to a tactical management method and system. The system of the present invention collects the bid announcement from the bid notification server, stores it in the database, selects the bid notification of the article to which the bid is applied, assigns the person in charge of the quotation, requests a quote from the manufacturer of the bid notification, A tentative management server for judging whether or not a tentative bid is possible based on a manufacturer's evaluation and providing tentative information to the related tentative users; An operating terminal for accessing a tactical management server to input tactic-related additional information and process an estimate for each bid announcement; A plurality of interpersonal terminals for electronically bidding on the corresponding bidding announcements according to the toughening information provided from the toumage management server; And a manufacturer terminal for providing an estimate of the tendered article at the request of the trolling management server. title: Distributed interactive multimedia system architecture
abstract: Various aspects of an interactive multimedia system and associated methods. In general, the multimedia system employs central and peripheral hubs that function to provide services to a plurality of clients of a call manager server, or manager subsystem. The hubs and subsystem cooperate to serve requests originating in the plurality of clients. The client-server-client architecture allows for distributed processing and resource management. Redundant connections between the various network subsystems and hubs provide survivability. Each subsystem or hub is provided with the ability to initialize or recover from systemic errors, thereby distributing initialization and recovery. Certain of the distributed resources are capable of being managed from other subsystems, thereby allowing sharing of the resources. An open numbering plan allows efficient call treatment of dialed numbers. Call processing is sharable between multiple manager subsystems. Finally, an iterative process is employed to ensure that calls routed through the network travel the shortest possible path.

title: Targeted secure printing
abstract: Secure transmission of data to an intended image output device, wherein the data can be used to generate an image at the intended image output device in the presence of an intended recipient. The data is encrypted using a first key. The first key is then encrypted using a second key and a third key. The second key is a public key of a first private key/public key pair, a private key of the first private key/public key pair being primarily in the sole possession of the intended image output device. The third key is a public key of a second private key/public key pair, a private key of the second private key/public key pair being primarily in the sole possession of the intended recipient of the image. The encrypted data and the twice-encrypted first key are transmitted to the intended image output device. The twice-encrypted first key is then decrypted by using the private keys of the second and first key pairs, respectively, which are primarily in the sole possession of the intended recipient device and the intended image output device, respectively. The data is then decrypted and printed at an image output device.

title: Rapid-sequence full-frame CCD sensor
abstract: A CCD sensor structure adapted for backside illumination, has a wide depletion layer separating the illuminated surface from potential barrier-like structures, e.g., in the form of a series of p-wells, that shield portions of the CCD channels and that cause the photoelectrons to converge through "ports" between the p-wells into selected regions of the CCD channels. The potential barriers are thus arrayed to delineate at the CCD surface a series of charge-packet-forming or integrating regions, each of which has two (or more) adjacent shielded charge-packet-holding or storage regions into which the frame-indicative charge packets are successively shifted upon receipt of the light from successive image frames. With an anti-reflective coating on the illuminated back surface, this device not only provides 100% fill-factor for each of the successive frames, but also can provide very high quantum efficiency (QE) across the visible spectrum. A preferred embodiment utilizes 7-phase (non-barrier-type) ripple clocking for charge packet readout.

abstract: Disclosed are a summing transaction system of a cryptocurrency and a method thereof. abstract: Provided is a method of a card company server simplifying a user identity verification procedure in a card payment, the method including steps of: (a) when a service registration request including card information, ID information, password information, and user terminal identification information are received from a user terminal, matching and storing the pieces of information included in the service registration request; and (b) when a card payment approval request including the stored user terminal identification information is received from the user terminal, performing a process of automatically inputting the ID information into the user terminal.

title: Method and system for securing a payment transaction with trusted code base on a removable system module
abstract: A trusted code base is provided on a removable system module that is inserted in a mobile payment device  130.  The trusted code base obtains a password from a customer for processing a payment transaction and encrypts the password using a public key. Access to the trusted code base by unauthorized processes is prevented to protect the password while unencrypted. The mobile payment device  130  transmits the encrypted password over a network  140  to a transaction host  160.  The transaction host  160  decrypts the encrypted password and applies the decrypted password to process the payment transaction.

title: Cache Hashing
abstract: Cache logic generates a cache address from an input memory address that includes a first binary string and a second binary string. The cache logic includes a hashing engine configured to generate a third binary string from the first binary string and to form each bit of the third binary string by combining a respective subset of bits of the first binary string by a first bitwise operation, wherein the subsets of bits of the first binary string are defined at the hashing engine such that each subset is unique and comprises approximately half of the bits of the first binary string; and a combination unit arranged to combine the third binary string with the second binary string by a reversible operation so as to form a binary output string for use as at least part of a cache address in a cache memory.

title: Centralized data management platform
abstract: A system and/or method may be provided for publishing a user's updated account information to one or more entities. An example centralized platform system stores a plurality of central accounts of a user, where each central account corresponds with an account that the user has with another entity. The centralized platform system receives a user's updated account information associated with a central account and updates stale account information at the centralized platform system with the user's updated account information. The centralized platform system may identify a set of central accounts at the centralized platform system linked to the updated account information, identify a set of accounts that the user has with one or more other entities and that correspond with the set of central accounts, and publish the user's updated account information to the one or more entities.

title: Authentication Processing System and Method for finance transantion
abstract: An approval processing system for a financial transaction supporting a remote approval procedure via a mobile device and a method of operating the same are disclosed. The approval processing system inputs the information related to the manager requesting the approval and a code related to the reason for the approval of the financial transaction requiring the approval, and transmits the approval request together with the inputted information, and from the contact terminal. A host receiving the approval request, analyzing the approval reason code transmitted from the person in charge of the terminal to determine whether the financial transaction requires the approval procedure of the manager, and transmitting the information of the manager and the details of the financial transaction according to the determination result. And a TTS server for changing the details of the financial transaction from the documented information to the voiced information and the authentication number registered by the manager, and the financial transaction changed from the host to the information of the manager and the voiced information. Receive history, and remind to the administrator's mobile device And a approval server for transmitting the details of the transaction, receiving an authentication number entered through the manager's mobile device, comparing it with the registered authentication number, and providing the comparison result to the host. And generating an approval result in response to the comparison result provided from the approval server, and when the input authentication number and the stored registration authentication number are the same, provide the authentication number to the person in charge.

And generating an approval result in response to the comparison result provided from the approval server, and when the input authentication number and the stored registration authentication number are the same, provide the authentication number to the person in charge.

title: Systems and methods for managing mobile account holder verification methods
abstract: Embodiments of the invention are directed to methods, apparatuses, computer readable media and systems for coordinating account holder verification methods among secure entity applications and wallet applications from different issuers, wallet providers, etc. on mobile devices. A common payment management application may be provided in a trusted execution environment associated with a mobile device to support secure entity applications (e.g., provisioned payment application instances in the trusted execution environment) and mobile wallet applications (e.g., provisioned on a memory of the mobile device) to coordinate account holder verification methods. The common payment management application may be accessible by both mobile applications and the secure entity applications.

abstract: A method of operating a storage device that is connected to a host includes entering an authentication mode; and performing the authentication operation responsive to entering the authentication mode. The performing of the authentication operation includes receiving a read command and a first random authentication address from the host; performing an authentication procedure based on at least a portion of the first random authentication address; and generating result data responsive to performing the authentication algorithm.

title: Structure preserving database encryption method and system
abstract: A database encryption system and method, the Structure Preserving Database Encryption (SPDE), is presented. In the SPDE method, each database cell is encrypted with its unique position. The SPDE method permits to convert a conventional database index into a secure one, so that the time complexity of all queries is maintained. No one with access to the encrypted database can learn anything about its content without the encryption key. Also a secure index for an encrypted database is provided. Furthermore, secure database indexing system and method are described, providing protection against information leakage and unauthorized modifications by using encryption, dummy values and pooling, and supporting discretionary access control in a multi-user environment.

title: Auto-recoverable and auto-certifiable cryptostem using zero-knowledge proofs for key escrow in general exponential ciphers
abstract: A method is provided for an escrow cryptosystem that is essentially overhead-free, does not require a cryptographic tamper-proof hardware implementation (i.e., can be done in software), is publicly verifiable, and cannot be used subliminally to enable a shadow public key system. A shadow public key system is an unescrowed public key system that is publicly displayed in a covert fashion. The keys generated by the method are auto-recoverable and auto-certifiable (abbrev. ARC). The ARC Cryptosystem is based on a key generation mechanism that outputs a public/private key pair, and a certificate of proof that the key is recoverable by the escrow authorities. Each generated public/private key pair can be verified efficiently to be escrowed properly by anyone. The verification procedure does not use the private key. Hence, the general public has an efficient way of making sure that any given individual's private key is escrowed properly, and the trusted authorities will be able to access the private key if needed. Since the verification can be performed by anyone, there is no need for a special trusted entity, known in the art as a “trusted third party”. The proof and verification method involves one party proving to a second party that a third party can gain access to an encrypted value. In addition, the system is designed so that its internals can be made publicly scrutinizable (e.g., it can be distributed in source code form). This differs from many schemes which require that the escrowing device be tamper-proof hardware. The system is efficient and can be implemented as a “drop-in” replacement to an RSA or ElGamal cryptosystem. The system is applicable for lawenforcement, file systems, e-mail systems, certified e-mail systems, and any scenario in which public key cryptography can be employed and where private keys or information encrypted under public keys need to be recoverable. The system security relies solely on the security of cipher systems involved whose security has been extensively studied in the past.

title: Improvements in television synchronising pulse separators
abstract: 1,027,019. Television circuits. THOM ELECTRONICS Ltd. Jan. 14, 1965, No. 1746/65. Heading H4F. A television sync.-pulse separator designed to overcome the disadvantage of fixed cut-off level separators, wherein the slope of the pulse sides and the amplitude modulation of the pulses by picture content due to D.C. restoration causes the timing of the cut-off pulses to be phase modulated by the picture content, comprises a D.C. differential amplifier I whose output voltage depends on the difference between an input voltage at input X and a reference voltage T, a first feedback path (clamp N and resistor R1) operating only on the front and back porch intervals of the television signal applied at point Q, and tending to equal the voltage of the porch intervals at input X with the reference voltage T, a second feedback path (resistor R 2 ) tending to equal the voltage of the sync. pulse tips with the reference voltage T, whereby the porch and tip voltage levels appear at the amplifier output Y, spaced either side of the reference voltage T, by amounts depending on the relative magnitudes of resistors R 1  and R 2 , a third feedback path (resistor Rf) controlling the gain of the amplifier, and a separator means K coupled to the output Y passing sync. pulse signals greater than a predetermined level V. Thus by making R 1  equal to R 2 , the reference voltage T appears half way up the sync. pulse at output Y and by choice of level V, the separated sync. pulses at output U also start half way up the sync. pulses, thus utilizing the fact that the steepest part of the sync. pulse occurs half way up. The first feedback path is operative only during the porch intervals due to clamp N being closed during said intervals under the control of a clamp pulse generator L, generating clamp pulses, starting at the finish of the sync. pulses and timed by means of the output from the separator K. The voltage level of the sync-pulse tips is determined by sampler J which is rendered operative during the tip intervals by a pulse generator P. Alternatively the circuit J may comprise a peak detector. The voltage V may be obtained from potentiometer R 3 /R 4 . The input impedance and amplification of the circuit may be varied by means of capacitor C 2 , the video frequency input impedance and amplification with the capacitor connected to point B, being R 1 R 2 /R 1  X R 2  and R#(R 1 +R 2 )/R 1 R 2  respectively, and with the capacitor connected to earth R 1  and R#/R 1 . Variation of the video-signal level due to superimposed power frequency ripple is also overcome by the invention. If the picture part of the video signal is at level peak while for several successive lines, the circuit shown can mistake the level peak while signal for the black level, such that sync. separator K produces the blanking pulses at its output and the clamp pulses from generator L are correspondingly incorrect. This can be avoided if a self-biasing sync.-separator (see Fig. 1a and 1b, not shown), is added to the output of amplifier I (see Fig. 5, not shown). This separator clips off the sync. pulses near their tips and causes the production of a second train of clamp pulses which are fed to one input of a coincidence gate, the other input being fed by generator L, and said gate feeding clamp N. A transistorized embodiment of the invention is shown and described in detail (see Fig. 6, not shown).

title: Method and apparatus for licensing computer programs using a DSA signature
abstract: A method and apparatus for using a Digital Signature Algorithm (DSA) for providing licensing of software. Three steps are required to allow setting up a license, issuing a license and for customer update of the license. An initialization step generates a public and private key pair. A license generation step follows the initialization step and involves feeding the private key and data for the license terms through the DSA to create a digital signature. The digital signature hash value is distributed to the customer as a valid license. The customer performs license verification by running the signature, public key and data for the license through the DSA on the customer's machine.

title: The low fluctuation slotted eye convolution p-m rotor of motor in electric automobile

title: Input end protection circuit of vehicle-mounted USB charger
abstract: The utility model discloses an input protection circuit of on-vehicle USB charger. It includes power processing circuit, DC/DC converter, USB charge management circuit, undervoltage protection circuit and overvoltage crowbar, whole car power is connected to power processing circuit's input, DC/DC converter's input is connected to power processing circuit's output, USB charge management circuit's input is connected to DC/DC converter's output, and the USB interface is connected to USB charge management circuit's output, the whole car power is all connected to undervoltage protection circuit and overvoltage crowbar's input, reference voltage source is all connected to the reference terminal, DC/DC converter's enable end is all connected to the output. The utility model discloses an add under-voltage, excessive pressure discernment treatment circuit at the USB charger input, greatly promoted the power consumption safety of product, guarantee conversion efficiency and output ripple rate, have advantages such as control accuracy height, low cost, control process are simple.

title: A kind of temperature control method of water and device
abstract: This application discloses a kind of temperature control method of water, including obtain ambient parameter and User Identity；According to ambient parameter and User Identity, pass through neural computing target temperature；According to target temperature, water temperature is adjusted by pid control algorithm.The application utilizes neutral net, and corresponding target water temperature is calculated according to different ambient parameter and User Identity, and so as to carry out water temperature control, therefore, the application can realize the Intelligent Dynamic control to water temperature.Disclosed herein as well is a kind of water temperature control device, equally with above-mentioned beneficial effect.

title: Ripple counter circuits in integrated circuit devices having fast terminal count capability and methods of operating the same
abstract: Ripple counter circuits in integrated circuit devices can have fast terminal count capability. A terminal count circuit can be configured to mask selected unstable counter bits generated by a ripple counter circuit using an indication that a terminal state of the ripple counter circuit has been reached. Related methods are also disclosed.

title: Method for authenticating payment data, corresponding devices and programs
abstract: The invention pertains to a method for authenticating at least one datum, method implemented during a payment transaction occurring between a communication terminal of a merchant and a user device, method of the type comprising the authentication by the communication terminal of at least one message m generated by the user device, by way of a near-field wireless data link. Such a method comprises, within the user device: - a step of obtaining (10), on the basis of the message m, of a random datum t and of a hash function H, an authentication code S 1;   - a step of obtaining (20), on the basis of the message m, of the random datum t, of a public key Z of the communication terminal, of a first private key x of the user device and of the authentication code S 1 , a first signature component S 2 ; - a step of obtaining (30), on the basis of the message m, of the random datum t, of the public key of Z of the communication terminal, of a second private key y of the user device and of the authentication code S 1 , a second signature component S 3 ; - a step of transmitting (40), to the communication terminal, the authentication code S 1 , and the two signature components S 2  and S 3 .

title: Systems and methods for liquidity transfer
abstract: A platform providing an electronic currency exchange is provided. The electronic exchange of assets is provided, wherein exchange of fiat currency, cryptocurrency, tokenized assets, or a combination thereof is realized. The liquid transfer of assets is realized through the conversion of a first asset into a second asset wherein the first asset is first converted, or sold, onto a tokenized asset which is then converted into the second asset. An asset exchange framework provides a platform for the liquid transfer of assets through asset matching based on specific user instruction and true intention.

title: Method for security token offering smart contract management and apparatus thereof
abstract: It includes STO smart contract processing unit and cryptocurrency transaction unit, and STO smart contract processing unit includes utility token module (LINU), bond mapping token module (LINT), stable token operation module (LINS), and token issuance management module (ILM). An STO smart contract operating device is provided.

title: Systems and methods for token linking and unlinking in digital wallets
abstract: Systems and methods for token linking and unlinking in digital wallets are disclosed. In one embodiment, a method for token linking in digital wallets may include: an issuer wallet application executed by the information processing device requesting, from a token vault, an identification of a customer's accounts that are eligible for push-provisioning to a third party wallet application executed by the information processing device; receiving the identification of customer accounts from the token vault; identifying accounts provisioned in the third party wallet application; determining accounts from the customer accounts that have not been provisioned to the third party wallet application to provision to the third party wallet application; provisioning the determined accounts to the third party wallet application; and requesting the token vault link a token associated with the provisioned account to an issuer wallet associated with the issuer wallet application.

title: Operation authorization method and device
abstract: The invention discloses an operation authorization method and device, and belongs to the field of network security. The method includes the steps that motion data collected by a wearable device are obtained; whether the motion data are motion data matched with verification physical motion or not is detected; if yes, the preset operation corresponding to the verification physical motion is authorized to be executed. According to the method, the user identification is verified through the motion data collected by the wearable device, and the problems of complex operation of obtaining a dynamic authorization password in a short message mode and the possibility of leakage are solved; the authorization verification process is simplified, and the authorization execution of the preset operation can be finished only through the wearable device, so that the user property and user privacy are effectively protected, and the safety in using the mobile internet is improved for users.
text: Operation authorization method and device The invention discloses an operation authorization method and device, and belongs to the field of network security. The method includes the steps that motion data collected by a wearable device are obtained; whether the motion data are motion data matched with verification physical motion or not is detected; if yes, the preset operation corresponding to the verification physical motion is authorized to be executed. According to the method, the user identification is verified through the motion data collected by the wearable device, and the problems of complex operation of obtaining a dynamic authorization password in a short message mode and the possibility of leakage are solved; the authorization verification process is simplified, and the authorization execution of the preset operation can be finished only through the wearable device, so that the user property and user privacy are effectively protected, and the safety in using the mobile internet is improved for users.

title: Packet reception apparatus and packet reception method
abstract: Without RTP receiver  106  receiving a BYE packet, end time determiner  111  takes into consideration packet loss information from packet loss monitor  110  and the situation regarding RTP packet reception from RTP receiver  106,  and determines media transmission from the server is completed, and instructs control command transmitter-receiver  109  to stop the media, provided that the situation where there has been no packet loss and no RTP packet has been received. Moreover, where RTP receiver  106  does not receive data, the end of media is not determined if a packet loss has occurred in a lower layer.

title: Access method for shared space, and permission management method and apparatus
abstract: One or more embodiments of the present description provide an access method for a shared space, and a permission management method and apparatus, said access method comprising: receiving an access request from a user for a shared space associated with a group; and determining, according to permission information of the user in the organizational framework of the group, the shared content matching the permission information in the shared space, so as to provide same to the user.

title: Method and apparatus for processing data
abstract: The application provides a method and a device for processing data, which aim to ensure that network equipment can accurately indicate the action of terminal equipment. The method comprises the following steps: at a first moment, the terminal equipment receives a data packet from the network equipment; the terminal equipment determines a reference time according to the first time and determines a processing time according to the reference time and the timestamp; at the processing time, the terminal device processes the packet.

title: Packet service system and method for controlling packet transmission
abstract: A method of data communication comprising establishing a communication bearer between a data source and a mobile device over a communication network comprising wired and wireless communication segments; and adjusting transmission of the real-time data based on quality of service over the wired and wireless communication segments, when data being communicated comprises real-time data and is being transmitted over a real-time communication protocol.

title: Method and apparatus for authentication and payment for devices participating in Jini communities
abstract: Architectures that enable different types of security devices to operate interchangeably in very large network environments for authentication and metered access to services are described. The system relies on a lease-based access to the network services. The leasing model supports a smart card type payment for services allowing for payments to be automatically forwarded from the smart card type device to the service whenever a service is leased. To lease a service, the requesting service must first be authenticated using devices like cellular phones, smart cards, Personal Data Assistants, or similar devices that have processing and memory capabilities and in some instances, wireless communication capabilities. Services may enter or exit the environment at will. Devices and services in this environment have public certificates that are used for authentication. Services may customize access to its products to make them available only to desired services.

title: Method for circulating electronic money based on gold in internet and form of electronic money same
abstract: PURPOSE: A method for circulating electronic money based on gold on the Internet is provided to generate an electronic money based on gold be used and circulated in an electronic commerce on the Internet. CONSTITUTION: In an electronic money circulation method based on gold at a system having a plurality of client terminals(20) and a main server(10) which is connected to the client terminals(20) through a network and controls the client terminals(20) for calculating an electronic money based on gold, a client who wishes to obtain an electronic money based on gold connects to an electronic money web site based on gold being supplied in the main server(10) using one terminal out of the client terminals(20), orders a wanted amount of electronic money based on gold, and secures electronic money in a database area of the main server(10). The client buys a commodity using the electronic money secured in the database area on the Internet, and transfers the electronic money to a database area of a commodity seller as a price of the commodity.

title: System security approaches utilizing a hierarchical memory system
abstract: A method and system for ensuring system security is disclosed. Based on the content of the data units the method and system monitor, the method and system retrieve the states and the dependency relationships among these states that are representative of unwanted patterns. The method and system store the states and the dependency relationships mentioned above in different types of memories according to the frequency of accessing the states. The frequency is calculated by comparing a number of test data patterns with the states in a sequence specified by the dependency relationships. The method and system further identify a set of suspected data units by comparing the data units with the retrieved states in a sequence specified by the retrieved dependency relationships, wherein the content of the set of the suspected data units collectively matches any of the unwanted patterns.

title: Optimal connection to internet and roaming method for user moving indoors/outdoors, and method therefor
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a method for connecting to the Internet and a roaming method for a user of a mobile data communication terminal, which are capable of inexpensively connecting an incoming call at any indoor/outdoor place. SOLUTION: In this method, the user enjoys communication services indoors by connecting a data communication terminal 10 to an outdoor wireless Internet network. When received information of an indoor system ID matches an indoor system ID registered in the terminal 10, an indoor position is registered in a position register 80 and the connection is switched from the outdoor wireless Internet network to an indoor gateway 100 to connect the terminal 10 to the Internet network 50 via the indoor gateway 100 and indoor wireless connection modules A and C. The data provided from the Internet network 50 is provided to the terminal 10 via the indoor network on the basis of the registered position information.  Then, when the information of the indoor system ID is not received, the outdoor position is registered in the position register 80, and the connection is switched to the outdoor wireless Internet network.

title: Method for ascertaining network bandwidth allocation policy associated with application port numbers
abstract: A network comprises a local group of network workstations and clients that periodically need access to a wide area network like the Internet. A class-based queue traffic shaper is placed in between and enforces multiple service-level agreement policies on individual connection sessions by limiting the maximum data throughput for each connection. The class-based queue traffic shaper distinguishes amongst datapackets according to their respective source and/or destination application types. Which policy is appropriate to enforce is found by listing all standard port numbers for an application in a single port group. Policies are attached according to port group. The field of over 64K possible port numbers is thus reduced to a short list of application groups, e.g., twelve or less. When a datapacket arrives that needs to be classified according to application, its port numbers are used to index a port group table This returns an application type and a concomitant service-level agreement policy.

title: Advanced cybersecurity threat mitigation using behavioral and deep analytics
abstract: A system for mitigation of cyberattacks employing an advanced cyber decision platform comprising a time series data store, a directed computational graph module, an action outcome simulation module, and observation and state estimation module, wherein the state of a network is monitored and used to produce a cyber-physical graph representing network resources, simulated network events are produced and monitored, and the network events and their effects are analyzed to produce security recommendations.

title: Wireless router with built-in user management function, system and networking method thereof
abstract: The invention relates to a wireless router with a built-in user management function, a system and a networking method thereof. The functions of user authentication and access authority control are provided and the access control can be performed in time and flow manners. The wireless router comprises a local area network Ethernet interface, a wide area network Ethernet interface, a wireless network module, an account data storage and an account authentication managing module, wherein the account data storage is used for storing information of an access user of a wireless network; the account authentication managing module is used for propelling a log-in page to the user after the user is connected to the wireless network and calling the information of the access user of the wireless network to authenticate the user identity; the account authentication managing module is respectively connected to the wireless network module, the account data storage and the wide area network Ethernet interface; the local area network Ethernet interface is connected to the wide area network Ethernet interface; the information of the access user of the wireless network comprises user name, account level, access authority expiry date and residual flow; and the account authentication managing module works in a mainly used mode or a subordinate mode.

title: Video monitoring system and device scheduling method thereof, and server
abstract: The invention discloses a video monitoring system and a device scheduling method thereof, and a server. The device scheduling method comprises the steps that a first server receives a device scheduling request issued by a second server in response to a device adding command to build a connection with a device to be scheduled, wherein the scheduling request comprises a public key of the second server; the public key of the second server and a first certificate are installed into the device to be scheduled, wherein the first certificate is generated by the first server by using a private key of the first server, and the second server pre-stores and trusts the public key of the first server; the device to be scheduled is routed and connected to the second server, and thus the second server verifies identity of the device to be scheduled by using the public key of the first server, and builds the connection with the device to be scheduled after the verification is passed. According to the system and the device scheduling method thereof, and the server provided by the invention, security of the device to be scheduled can be verified, thus ensuring collection security of video information.

title: Mobile Content Capture and Discovery System based on Augmented User Identity
abstract: A system and a method is provided for collecting information and discovery of the information based on an augmented user identity. A note creation function allows a user of a computer device to create notes. A note interaction function allows the user to interact with notes and/or Cloud information available via the Internet. An annotiation function annotates content to the notes, which could be context traits and/or user identity traits. User identity traits are augmented through information obtained from the creation process and/or the interaction process with notes or Cloud information. Using a discovery function, notes can be discovered for a user from a note database/store using aspects of the context traits and/or the augmented user identity traits.

title: Modulation method based on space voltage vector pulse width modulation
abstract: The invention discloses a modulation method based on space voltage vector pulse width modulation. According to the modulation method based on the space voltage vector pulse width modulation, by adjusting an action sequence of voltage vectors, the frequency of an output current ripple is multiplied under the same tube switching frequency, so that the amplitude of the output current ripple is reduced; when the frequency of the output current ripple is increased, under a condition of the same maximum current ripple amplitude, the value of electrical inductance is reduced, but the inductance impedance is changeless, so that the inductance costs are reduced, and the circuit costs also are reduced.

title: Elliptic Curve Cryptography and Digital Signature Method using fast finite field operations
abstract: The present invention relates to an elliptic curve encryption method and an electronic signature method using a fast finite field operation to quickly perform a finite field multiplication and a square operation when an elliptic curve cryptosystem is implemented. The public key is generated as a result of the mutual calculation between the key and the arbitrary coordinates represented by the polynomial on the elliptic curve, and the user A side calculates the random integer within the predetermined range and the coordinates with each other. The multiplication operation with the coordinates expressed by the constant m and the highest order m-1) includes the lower first step of calculating the product of the m-2th order polynomial by the Karatsuba-Ofman Algorithm (KOA) method, and the remaining m-1th term. Obtain an intermediate value for multiplication, wherein the intermediate value comprises a lower second step comprising a product of coefficients represented by repeated multiplication, and finally a system obtained in the lower first step. Performing a lower third step of calculating and generating coefficients of the product of the entire m-1 order polynomial using the values of the numbers, the median value obtained by the KOA method, and the addition and subtraction of the middle values obtained in the lower second step. Characterized in that, it is possible to perform the finite field multiplication and square operation quickly, thereby improving the encryption security and efficiency.

title: Method for preventing illegal use of user identification module
abstract: The invention is a method to protect a user identity module (UIM) against illegal use, including: (1) in the UIM, presetting an anti-theft code; (2) when UIM is lost, sending the anti-theft code and new PIN1 code to the UIM; (3) the UIM justifies if the received anti-theft code is consistent with the preset one: if is, modifying the PIN1 code in the UIM and setting the state of the PIN1 code as 'valid' state, restarting the mobile terminal; otherwise ending. Before UIM is lost, preset an anti-theft code; after UIM is lost, use a wireless technique to send the original anti-theft code and a new PTN1 code to a mobile terminal supporting STK/UTK function, the mobile terminal modifies the PIN1 code in the UIM and sets the PIN1 code as 'valid' state. An illegal user need input an new PIN1 code when he wants to enter, effectively protecting the UIM against illegal use and protecting the important information in the UIM.

title: Servo controller with current ripple detection
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a servo controller of a motor with which misdetection of a current ripple pulse can be avoided and a high control precision can be obtained. SOLUTION: A revolution/position command unit 14 gives command signals of the revolution and the rotation value of a motor 1. If a current signal detection unit 11 detects a motor current and outputs a current signal, a current ripple detection unit 12 detects a current ripple which is produced in the current signal and outputs a current ripple pulse. A control operation unit 10 generates a control signal so as to make the revolution and the rotation values of the motor 1, which are obtained from a direction signal and the current ripple pulse, agree with the target values which are the command signals outputted from the revolution/position command unit 14. The control operation unit 10 has a running average processing unit 10a which defines the running average of the revolution of the motor 1 obtained from the current ripple pulse as the revolution of the motor.

title: Code printing method, code printing device and touch chip
abstract: The application provides a coding method, wherein a coding period is divided into two coding rounds, P detection electrodes are coded, in the first coding round, M adjacent detection electrodes are coded positively, N adjacent detection electrodes are coded negatively, the M detection electrodes coded positively and the N detection electrodes coded negatively offset, wherein M + N is less than or equal to P, and M-N is less than or equal to Q, in the second coding round, K adjacent detection electrodes are coded positively, L adjacent detection electrodes are coded negatively, the K detection electrodes coded positively and the L detection electrodes coded negatively offset, wherein K + L is less than or equal to P, K-L is less than or equal to Q, and M + K is greater than or equal to P, wherein Q is the number of detection electrodes with no water ripple after offset, and P is not greater than the number of touch screen detection electrodes.

title: Rotor of interior permanent magnet motor
abstract: The present invention relates to a rotor of a recessed permanent magnet, and is a rotor of a recessed permanent magnet motor rotatably inserted into a stator including a core or a winding and having a permanent magnet embedded therein, And a plurality of permanent magnet bodies spaced radially from the rotation center of the rotor main body and embedded in the rotor main body, wherein the permanent magnet body includes a first permanent magnet and a second permanent magnet, The permanent magnets are separated from each other by the second permanent magnets and are spaced apart from each other and embedded in the rotor body to reduce torque ripple while minimizing the vibration and noise of the permanent magnet motor.
text: Rotor of interior permanent magnet motor The present invention relates to a rotor of a recessed permanent magnet, and is a rotor of a recessed permanent magnet motor rotatably inserted into a stator including a core or a winding and having a permanent magnet embedded therein, And a plurality of permanent magnet bodies spaced radially from the rotation center of the rotor main body and embedded in the rotor main body, wherein the permanent magnet body includes a first permanent magnet and a second permanent magnet, The permanent magnets are separated from each other by the second permanent magnets and are spaced apart from each other and embedded in the rotor body to reduce torque ripple while minimizing the vibration and noise of the permanent magnet motor.

title: Voltage controlled oscillator
abstract:
PURPOSE: To comprise the large part of a low noise oscillator of a semiconductor integrated circuit by emplying an oscillation circuit of Colpitts type collector grounding system, increasing the size of a transistor for oscillation, and using a surface acoustic wave oscillation element and an inductance in an oscillation circuit.  
     CONSTITUTION: A Colpitts type collector grounding system is employed as an oscillation circuit format, and the oscillation circuit is formed with a collector capacitor 6, feedback capacitors 4 and 5, and a resonance circuit. The size of the transistor(TR) 1 for oscillation is increased to realize a low noise. The Q of the surface acoustic wave resonance element 3 comprising the resonance circuit is not so high, and oscillation frequency sensitivity is adjusted with a tuning voltage added on a variable capacitance diode 7 from a tuning voltage supply terminal. An emitter-follower circuit which requires no choke coil in the emitter output of the TR 1 is employed to reduce influence from the load side of the oscillation circuit. Also, the collector power source of the TR 1 is set separately as the one in which a ripple filter is provided, and is applied from a terminal 20.

title: Suitable for the framework column connected node and its construction technology of prefabrication and assembly construction building
abstract: The invention provides a kind of framework column connected node and its construction technology suitable for prefabrication and assembly construction building, the framework column connected node that prefabrication and assembly construction is built should be applied to, for two prefabricated frame trestles to be attached, including：Open-type shaper, it is some to draw nut, some fixing bolt and ripple grouting sleeves, the ripple grouting sleeve is embedded in the bottom of the prefabricated frame trestle in advance, it is described some to drawing nut to be embedded in advance respectively on two prefabricated frame trestles, the post cage bar of two prefabricated frame trestles is overlapped in junction and is fixed with column tie-bar, the open-type shaper is arranged at the outside of the junction of two prefabricated frame trestles by described pair of drawing nut with fixing bolt, junction casting concrete by from the ripple grouting sleeve to two prefabricated frame trestles.The present invention has easy construction, can realize the fast and reliable connection of prefabricated frame trestle.In addition, there is the advantages of small volume, light weight using open-type shaper.

title: Symmetric semiconductor rectifier
abstract:
The utility model relates to semiconductor converting technology and is intended to power power lines and DC inserts, as well as industrial DC load. 
     Multiphase semiconductor rectifiers are known in the art, representing one of the most common types of static power converters. The basis of all classic rectifiers is the use of a three-phase rectifier bridge, powered by the secondary winding of the transformer, and to obtain an increased number of ripples at the output of the rectifier, the options for switching on the star, triangle and zigzag windings are used. The quality of the output voltage is determined mainly by the number of ripples for the period of the supply network, equal to twice the number of phases of the rectified voltage. 
     The most common is a twelve-pulse rectification circuit based on a combination of connecting the secondary windings of the power transformer with a star and a triangle, which provides a phase shift. The aforementioned circuit has found the greatest distribution for powering DC power lines, as well as in industrial rectifiers. However, the quality of the output voltage of the twelve-pulse circuit is not high enough and in many cases requires additional filtering (smoothing), which increases the dimensions of the installation. 
     In special cases, when high quality of the rectified voltage is required, they resort to the use of a twenty-four pulse rectification circuit equipped with four three-phase bridges connected in series or in parallel. Such a circuit requires an additional phase shift between the secondary windings of the supply transformers and the use of star, delta, and zigzag winding circuits, which leads to an increased number of turns and an increase in size. 
     The advantage of the proposed rectifier is the implementation of twenty-four pulse mode and the corresponding increase in voltage quality without the formation of four mutually and symmetrically phase-shifted three-phase voltage systems connected to rectifier bridges. Technically, this means the rejection of all windings according to the "triangle" scheme and the corresponding coil consumption. 
     The presence of twenty-four pulsations at the output and their symmetry are achieved due to an additional phase shift between the two transformers when using a zigzag primary winding. The mentioned transformers have two secondary three-phase windings according to the "star" scheme for each, four rectifier bridges are connected to the secondary windings, combined in pairs with a parallel connection corresponding to six-phase rectification. Pairs of bridges are connected sequentially and according to, moreover, the said bridges in each pair are connected to the secondary windings with an equal number of turns. 
     The phase shift between the transformers is necessary to obtain six-phase rectification in the pairs of bridges and is achieved by turning on the primary windings of each of them according to the zigzag scheme with a different combination of coils. Thus, the unification of the design of transformers is achieved, which do not differ from each other in the delivery state and are interchangeable. 
     The main technical advantage is the reduction of the mass and dimensions of the transformers due to the rejection of additional turns for switching the primary winding circuit of the transformers into a "triangle". It also provides the advantage of the possibility of mutual replacement of transformers, increases the unification of the production technology and assembly of the rectifier installation.

title: Novel wave-making type pickling tank for hot galvanizing
abstract: The utility model relates to a pickling plant technical field just discloses a novel ripples formula descaling bath is made to hot-galvanize, including the liquid reserve tank, including vibrating device, the inside movable mounting of liquid reserve tank has the driving shaft, the back fixedly connected with motor of driving shaft, fixed block fixedly connected with protection box is passed through to the bottom of motor, protection box's top fixed mounting has switching device, the outside of driving shaft just is located fixed mounting between protection box and the liquid reserve tank has first gear, the outside meshing of first gear has the second gear, the inside fixed mounting of second gear has the driven shaft, the driving shaft just is located the inside equal fixed mounting of liquid reserve tank and makes the wave plate with the outside of driven shaft. This novel hot-galvanize formula descaling bath of making ripples, through the rotation of motor drive driving shaft and driven shaft, further make ripples piece rotate, will drive the pickle and to work piece department undulant to reached and drop the oxide on workpiece surface fast, and the complete effect that drops.

title: Method and computer system for selecting an edge server computer
abstract: Media Distribution within the Internet is done with the help of Application-Servers, Content-Servers and distributed Edge-Servers where the clients are connected to Media Distribution Services. A computer system is provided comprising client 1, having a Web browser with a media player 2, Web application server 3, content server, edge servers ES1 to ES4 and media request broker 11. After the client 1 has selected a media for streaming the media request broker 11 makes a determination concerning an appropriate edge server to perform the streaming operation. This determination is made based on an extension of the client's http request made by the edge server and passed from the application server to the media request broker.

title: A system, device and method for executing a digital wallet application
abstract: The system comprises a user electronic device 200 with a processor which executes a digital wallet application associated with a digitised transaction card. The device 200 obtains user preference information in relation to the digital wallet application S604; communicates the user preference information S605 to a management server 300; and receives a notification command for the digital wallet application S614. The notification command is determined according to the user preference information S613 and determines the audible and/or haptic feedback to be provided. The user electronic device 200 controls an audio and/or haptic output unit of the device to provide, when the digital wallet application is executed, audible and/or haptic feedback according to the notification command in response to the digitised transaction card being selected and/or used for a transaction S606 with a merchant 500. The audible feedback can be a sound chosen by the user. The haptic feedback can include forces, vibrations or motions.

title: On-line mobile payment system based on somatosensory network and credibility authentication method
abstract: The invention provides an on-line mobile payment system based on a somatosensory network. The on-line mobile payment system based on the somatosensory network comprises a medical center, an e-business authentication center, an intelligent terminal, an aggregation node, a wearing node and an implantation node, wherein the e-business authentication center authenticates the on-line mobile payment of a user. The invention further discloses a credibility authentication method. A registration phase comprises the steps of (a) registering the medical center, (b) registering the e-business authentication center, (c) generating secret key information, (d) coding and dividing equally and (e) establishing a polynomial. An authentication phase comprises the steps of (1) starting a transaction, (2) conforming the transaction, (3) measuring physiological signals, (4) generating a set, (5) generating and sending messages, (6) authenticating a user identity, (7) reconstructing the polynomial, (8) establishing Ktf and carrying out judgment, and (9) verifying legitimacy. According to the on-line mobile payment system and method, a unique secret key can be obtained through the same physiological signal of the user in a negotiation mode, authentication of on-line mobile payment is achieved effectively, and the safety of payment is guaranteed.

title: Systems and methods for using distributed attestation to verify claim of attestation holder
abstract: Some implementations of the disclosure are directed to: receiving an encrypted message from an entity, the encrypted message including a request to determine if a claimant of a distributed attestation is a holder of the distributed attestation; decrypting the encrypted message; using at least a public key of the entity to determine whether the entity is authorized to obtain information about the distributed attestation; and if the entity is authorized to obtain information about the distributed attestation, transmitting a response message to the entity indicating if the claimant of the distributed attestation is the holder of the distributed attestation. Authorization of the entity to obtain information about the distributed attestation may be based on role based access control rights to obtain information about the distributed attestation.

title: Internet Banking Login Service System by Using Key-Lock Card and Certificate and Internet Banking Login Method thereof
abstract: The Internet banking log-in system using the public key certificate and the certificate of the present invention registers a key lock card issued from a card issuer and receives an encrypted password of a public certificate received from a user PC, transmits the encrypted password to an authentication center, A site server for receiving a certificate from the user PC and decrypting the generated key value and decrypting the encrypted key value to determine whether the key is a registered key card; Receives the authentication result from the site server, requests the connection to the key lock card, receives the generated key value from the connected key lock card, and transmits the encrypted key value to the site server On the site server's key card A key card for connecting to the PC through a USB module, generating a key value, encrypting the key value and transmitting the key value to the PC, and receiving an encrypted password of the authorized certificate from the site server And an Internet network or a wireless communication network for transmitting / receiving data between the authentication center server and the site server, the user PC, and the authentication center server for determining whether or not the authentication certificate is authenticated and transmitting the authentication result to the site server.

title: System, apparatus and method for performing cryptographic operations in a trusted execution environment
abstract: In one embodiment, an apparatus includes a calculation logic to receive a plurality of wait certificates, each associated with a validated block of transactions of a distributed ledger system, and to generate a local mean value based thereon; a timer generation logic to generate a wait time for a proof of wait associated with a first block of transactions of the distributed ledger system based at least in part on the local mean value; a timer logic to identify when the wait period has expired; and a certificate generation logic to generate a wait certificate for the first block of transactions responsive to expiration of the wait period, the wait certificate to validate the first block of transactions. Other embodiments are described and claimed.

title: System and method for service session management in an IP centric distributed network
abstract: Provided are a system and method for service session management in an IP centric network. In one example, the method includes accessing a network to establish a point of presence through an access interface layer at an access management layer and a core portion of the network and designating a default amount of bandwidth and a plurality of default setup parameters. Service is invoked through an allied application server on the network to establish an amount of network resources requested by a user. The allied application server manages any changes requested by the user to the quality of service parameters and bandwidth amount through the core network. A transport session is established to create and manage a connection from the user to a destination address.

title: Server and system for inserting advertisement contents into contents
abstract:
The present invention relates to a system and server for inserting advertising content into content. 
     The present invention receives the content and the advertising content, and stores the advertising content in the advertising content database including the advertiser link information, which is the link information of the advertiser terminal in the advertising content, if the producer terminal selects the advertising content in the advertising content database, It provides a system for inserting the advertising content to the content, characterized in that it comprises a content providing server for inserting the content into the advertisement insertion content and confirming the advertiser link information to send the advertisement insertion notification to the advertiser terminal. 
     According to the present invention, the content producer extracts the advertisement content suitable for the content produced by the content from the advertising content database and inserts it into the content, and the advertiser can approve or reject it, so the advertiser side can insert the content Hassle-free to retrieve the effect is effective. 
       
     Content, advertising, insertion, approval, rejection

title: Method and system for establishing call
abstract: Disclosed in the embodiments of the present invention are a method and a system for establishing a call, relating to the technical field of communication, the method comprising: on the basis of a received call command, determining calling device information and called device information; on the basis of a pre-stored device information/processor room mapping relationship, determining a processor room corresponding to the calling device information and the called device information, the device information/processor room mapping relationship being determined at least on the basis of the location the first time the call device went online; and configuring the processor room to send a call command to all the call devices corresponding to the called party when the called party is in an idle state. The present method and system for establishing a call pre-store a device information/processor room mapping relationship determined the first time the call device went online, and do not need to synchronise device information each time the call device goes online, thereby avoiding frequent data synchronisation as a result of the call device frequently going on and offline, and simultaneously avoiding the problem of data synchronisation not being prompt.

title: Method of dispensing pills from a movable platen
abstract: A plurality of cassettes, each filed with a supply of pills and positioned over a target location. A platen is provided beneath the target location with receptacles configured to hold both vials and blister packs. The platen or the cassette is movable so that any blister of the blister pack or the vial can be positioned under the target location to receive a quantity of pills from the cassette.

title: System and method for filtering content
abstract: A system and method of filtering content is provided for reducing transmissions of content between a gateway and one or more clients. A method includes determining a plurality of characteristics of content, including at least one static characteristic of content, and sharing the determination of the plurality of characteristics of content with the gateway and the one or more clients. A method of managing content in a gateway includes: reading a container, the container identifying content not to be distributed according to at least one characteristic of the content; comparing the container with received content for distribution to a client; and if the container identifies the received content as including one or more subsets of content identified as not to be distributed, filtering the subsets from the content.

title: D.C. motor without commutator
abstract: The utility model relates to a no commutator direct current motor, which comprises a stator and rotor, wherein the stator of the motor comprises two ring cores which are corresponding at the left and the right, radial magnetic arms which number is equal and the position is corresponding are  equably arranged on each ring core, the ends of the magnetic arms are fixed on a frame, a wire chase which is made by a non-magnetic material is fixed on an outer wall of the ring core of every two magnetic arms, and a low wire chase is arranged on the inner wall of the ring core which is arranged on a corresponding position of each magnetic arm. A stator armature winding of each ring core is cocurrently and orderly winded in the low wire chase and the non-magnetic material wire chase which corresponds to the inner wall and the outer wall of the ring core, the enwinding direction of the windings which are arranged on the left and right corresponding positions is opposite, and two stator armature windings are mutually concatenated, thereby the vibration , the torque ripple and the noise which are caused by the current shock are avoided, an electronic reversing device is saved, the cost of the motor is greatly reduced, and the utility model is beneficial to be popularizated and applicated.

title: Water-cooling corrugated flue natural gas fired boiler
abstract: The utility model provides a water-cooling ripple flue fires natural gas boiler, including last boiler drum, lower boiler drum, the combustor, the side membrane type wall of convection current, left side membrane type wall, convection bank, the straight membrane type wall of front end portion, the straight membrane type wall of back tip, top membrane type wall, basement membrane type wall, right side membrane type wall, corrugate furnace, on the straight membrane type wall of front end portion, the fixed installation pipe that is equipped with, the combustor sets up to the inside jet flame of corrugate furnace in the installation pipe, the inside air current that enters into convection bank turns to the passageway has between the straight membrane type wall of back lateral part and the back tip of left side membrane type wall, the front side of side membrane type wall of convection current is equipped with the exhaust port. The invention fully utilizes the space of the existing hearth, and the corrugated hearth is arranged, thereby obviously reducing the volume of the boiler, facilitating the large-scale of the boiler and reducing the overall transportation cost; the corrugated structure can destroy the boundary layer of the flue gas, plays a role in strengthening heat transfer, absorbs more heat to reduce the heat of the high-temperature flue gas discharged from the hearth, improves the operation time of the boiler, and reduces the maintenance cost of the boiler.

title: Film for electromagnetic wave shield and method for manufacturing the same
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a method for manufacturing a film for an electromagnetic wave shield and the resultant film for the electromagnetic wave shield, wherein there are no deformations such as an undulation, or a ripple-shaped lateral stripe, and a high flatness appears.  <P>SOLUTION: In the method for manufacturing the film for the electromagnetic wave shield, a laminated body of a three-layer structure is composed of a metal foil 1, an ultraviolet curing resin layer 2, and a transparent plastic film 3. After an ultraviolet curing resin is coated on any one of the metal foil and the transparent plastic film, another constituent material is laminated to form the three-layer structure. Thereafter, ultraviolet rays are irradiated to cure a resin, and the laminated bodies of the three-layer structure are continuously manufactured. In this method, a substrate temperature in irradiating the ultraviolet rays is set at 40°C or less.  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2007,JPO&INPIT

title: Dehumidification structure in steam turbine ripple
abstract: The present invention relates to dehumidification structure in a kind of steam turbine ripple, it is made up of upper semi-ring and lower semi-ring, by split Flange joint between upper semi-ring and lower semi-ring, upper semi-ring and lower semi-ring are respectively provided with multiple row corrugated plating, it is provided with, in the inner ring of described upper semi-ring and the outer ring of lower semi-ring, the hopper making the water droplet on multiple row corrugated plating instill, it is provided with skewed slot at the split of upper semi-ring, water droplet is made to be flow to the outer ring of upper semi-ring from the inner ring of upper semi-ring by skewed slot, drain tank is had at the outer ring of lower semi-ring split, and drain tank connection skewed slot, make the hopper that water droplet passes through under drain tank flows in the outer ring of semi-ring, the weep hole of hopper it is communicated with bottom lower semi-ring, water droplet is made to flow out steam turbine at the weep hole of bottom.By annular corrugated interior dehumidification structure, can make steam turbine on the premise of meeting exhaust steam moisture requirement, realize single cylinder structure, effectively reduce steam-turbine plant and the weight of corollary equipment, size and reduce number of devices, simplified system composition, saving substantial amounts of arrangement space.

title: Forming method for metal sheet
abstract:
PURPOSE: To prevent causing a ripple and a deviation of a dimensional accuracy of a metal sheet by a residual stress, at the time of bending the metal sheet by rolls, by projecting a laser beam on the bending part.  
     CONSTITUTION: When the laser beam is projected on the intended bending part 2 of the metal sheet, the part 2 is heated to soften and improve a workability. In this state, the metal sheet 1 arrived at a roll forming machine is inserted between the rolls 6, 7 to bend, and the bending part 2 is in the state to have increased its workability by projecting the laser beam, so any residual stress is generated. In this way, the working condition is maintained for a long period and the working accuracy is improved. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1987,JPO&Japio

title: Dc power unit for welding
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain a smoothed DC current with the small ripple factor with simple and inexpensive structure by constituting an AC power source as the three-phase AC power source and constituting a rectifier as the one-phase center tap type full wave rectifier.  
     CONSTITUTION: The DC current is supplied from plus and minus side terminals of the one-phase center tap type full wave rectifier 7 to materials 3 to be welded held in-between welding electrodes 1 and 1a and the welding is performed. Since the primary side is the three-phase AC power source, the current is allowed to flow to the phase W and the phase V of three current wave-forms of phase U, V and W and the current is allowed to flow to the phase U and the phase V after the phase 60° and further, to the phase U and the phase W after the phase 60° and a thyristor of a main circuit switch 9 is ignition-controlled and electrified by a controller for every 60 ° phase in order. In this way, the DC current having six crests is obtained in a period corresponding to one cycle of commercial frequency. In case of such control, since the same alternating voltage as one phase is impressed on the primary side of a transformer 8, the magnetic flux frequency of the transformer 8 is made three times and an iron core constituting the transformer 8 is made about 1W3 times and its size is reduced. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1988,JPO&Japio
