title: Certificate management apparatus, program, and method
abstract: <P>PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To avoid security reduction when updating registration of a public key certificate attached to electronic mail.  <P>SOLUTION: A public key certificate attached to received electronic mail is verified (S14) and, if the public key certificate is determined valid, it is investigated whether or not the public key certificate corresponding to a mail address of a transmission source is already stored in a certificate store (S20, S22). If stored, a validity end timing of the stored public key certificate is compared with the validity end timing of the public key certificate related to the received electronic mail (S28). If the public key certificate related to the received electronic mail is newer as a result in the certificate store, exchange with a former public key certificate is performed (S30). In such a case, corresponding electronic mail information or the like is recorded as a log so as to be effectively used for futuristic problem tracing or the like (S32).  <P>COPYRIGHT: (C)2007,JPO&INPIT

title: Motor
abstract: The utility model discloses a motor. The motor comprises a shell, wherein a motor shaft is disposed at a middle part of the shell, an external side of the motor shaft is sleeved with a rotor, a left end of the rotor is sleeved with a baffle plate, a right end of the rotor is sleeved with a commutator, a left end of the motor shaft is provided with a plastic baffle ring, a right side of the motor shaft is provided with an oil containing bearing, tooth strips are distributed on an external wall of the shell in a uniform manner, and bar shaped ripples are disposed on an internal wall of the shell. The external wall of the shell is coated with an anticorrosive coating. The motor is advantageous in that: the left side of the rotor is sleeved with the baffle plate, and the left end of the motor shaft is provided with the plastic baffle ring, so that impurities are prevented from going into the motor to influence operation of the motor; as the same time, the tooth strips are distributed on the external wall of the shell in the uniform manner, and bar shaped ripples are disposed on an internal wall of the shell, so that the shell is prevented from being wore after a long-time operation of the motor; and the external wall of the shell is coated with the anticorrosive coating, so that the motor is prevented from corrosion, and usage life of the motor is increased.

title: Rotten machine is ground in a kind of environmental protection and energy saving
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of environmental protection and energy saving and grinds rotten machine, including organism, Mo Lan mechanisms and feeding mechanism are provided with the body, the Mo Lan mechanisms are located above feeding mechanism, the Mo Lan mechanisms include polishing roller and rotary electric machine, the rotating shaft of the rotary electric machine is connected with polishing roller, the feeding mechanism includes transport trolley, Pneumatic rubber ripple and support, the support is installed on transport trolley side, one end of the Pneumatic rubber ripple is installed on support, the other end is installed on transport trolley, the support is provided with cushion block, the support is right against below polishing roller, slag discharge plate is provided with below the support, the slag discharge plate is provided with more than one mud hole, dust catcher is communicated with below the mud hole；Rotten machine is ground in the environmental protection and energy saving being capable of improving production efficiency and product yield, reduction factory recruitment cost, while in turn ensure that the working environment of workman and factory.

title: Managing security for computer services
abstract: A system or computer usable program product for providing security for a business application including receiving a request from a server including a server public key and a security token, deploying a virtual node implementing the business application in response to the request, using the security token in a bootstrap process by the virtual node to provide authentication to the server, and authenticating a message from the server using a server public key.

title: Authentication using a secure circuit
abstract: Techniques are disclosed relating to authentication using public key encryption. In one embodiment, a computing device includes a secure circuit, a processor, and memory. The secure circuit is configured to generate a public key pair usable to authenticate a user of the computing device. The memory has program instructions stored therein that are executable by the processor to cause the computing device to perform operations including authenticating the user with a server system by sending authentication information supplied by the user. The operations further include, in response to the server system verifying the authentication information, receiving a first token usable to register the public key pair with the server system and sending, to the server system, a request to register the public key pair for authenticating the user. In such an embodiment, the request includes the first token and identifies a public key of the public key pair.

title: Mobile terminal and control method therefor
abstract:
The present invention provides a mobile terminal which can activate a fingerprint input unit when the mobile terminal is in a power saving state. To this end, the mobile terminal may comprise: a display unit; a fingerprint input unit which forms a mutual layer structure with the display unit; and
a control unit for, when the display unit is in an off-state, activating the fingerprint input unit upon receiving a touch input satisfying a preconfigured condition, and controlling the display unit to be switched to an on-state when a fingerprint recognized through the fingerprint input unit matches pre-registered fingerprint data.

title: Method for negotiating media coding/decoding, and terminal device
abstract: A method and terminal device for negotiating media coding/decoding are provided. The method for negotiating media coding/decoding comprises: a first terminal device receiving a response signaling sent by at least one second terminal device that transmits a response signaling according to the request information, the response signaling including a media coding/decoding capability set supported by the second terminal device that sends the response instruction; determining a first media coding/decoding on the basis of negotiation with the at least one second terminal devices that transmits the response signaling according to the media coding/decoding capability set supported by the at least one second terminal device that transmits the response signaling; mixing with the audio signals of the at least one second terminal device that transmit the response signaling according to the first media coding/decoding. The success rate of negotiating the media coding/decoding is improved, and the quality of the audio signal of the terminal device is ensured when the audio signals of a plurality of terminal devices are mixed.

title: System and method for network address translation and session management
abstract: A system and method for network address translation (NAT) and session management, is for performing address translation and distributing a call to a plurality of call agents with respect to a SIP(Session Initiation Protocol) message in an NAT system, by applying NAT concept to a SIP call initiated at the external public network or the local network. The system and method for network address translation (NAT) and session management includes a plurality of call agents (constituting the local network), interfacing a plurality of the SIP call agents with the NAT block, controlling the NAT block to uniformly distribute a SIP call input from the outside, to the internal SIP call agent. Also, the system and method for network address translation (NAT) and session management, could include more than one call agent for a packet exchange system, by applying the NAT using the SIP to a packet exchange system for supporting VoIP using the SIP in the packet network, and thus much more traffic could be processed.

title: Techniques for providing access to data in dynamic shared accounts
abstract: Techniques for providing access to data in dynamic shared accounts are disclosed. In one particular exemplary embodiment, the techniques may be realized as a system for providing data in dynamic shared accounts. The system may comprise one or more processors communicatively coupled to a network. The one or more processors may be configured to identify a first user associated with an account (S04), identify a second user to have access to the account associated with the first user in the event the first user is unavailable to access data or perform functions associated with the account (S06), map the second user to the account (S12), and provide the second user access to the account based on the mapping and with access privileges associated with the first user (S14).

title: Method and system for providing service control and brokering in IMS-based telecommunication system
abstract: The present invention relates to a service registration, control, and brokering method in an IMS-based communication system, and a system using the same. In the case that a user moving to a visited network from a home network wants to receive local service in the visited network, the user checks whether the user can receive the local service in the visited network through the home network. If it is possible, a serving call state control function (S-CSCF) that handles service control in the visited network performs local service control upon a user's request and provides the corresponding local service to the user. Accordingly, the user can be more efficiently provided with local services through the S-CSCF that handles the service control of the visited network. In addition, the visited network can provide the user with services that are adapted to a profile of the user.

title: Systems and methods for labor resource capacity modeling with associated rates in an integrated program portfolio management solution
abstract: Systems and methods for labor resource capacity modeling with associated rates in an integrated program portfolio management solution are disclosed. In one embodiment, an organization's labor capacity and the associated cost may be defined across discrete time periods and managed distinct from the demand and associated financial budget defined within a portfolio of programs. Capacity and demand may be reflected together such that an organization may satisfy portfolio demand by adjusting capacity and demand independently.

title: Customer loyalty building method for e.g. supermarket, involves executing audiovisual contents on respective display devices to generate alternative broadcasting programs of contents, where execution is automatically triggered by server
abstract: The method involves selectively broadcasting audiovisual contents, of a network relative to a sales network and of a client relative to a client entity of the sales network, from a server (11) to sale sites. The contents are executed on respective display devices (13) of the sale sites so as to generate alternative broadcasting programs of the network and client audiovisual contents, where the execution of the contents is automatically triggered by the server. An independent claim is also included for a system for building and collecting customer loyalty on a sale site.

title: Aluminum intercooler
abstract: The utility model relates to an aluminum intercooler, including a pipe belt type radiator core body and gas chambers which are arranged at the two sides of the radiator core body; a pressurized gas inlet and a pressurized gas outlet which are communicated with the gas chambers are arranged on the radiator core body which includes aluminum radiating strips and aluminum radiating pipes which are arranged at intervals mutually, and the aluminum radiating pipes are communicated with the gas chambers; the surfaces of the aluminum radiating strips are provided with folds, and the aluminum radiating pipes are square pipes; aluminum fins are arranged in the aluminum radiating pipes, and the cross section of the aluminum radiating strips is fold surface; ripple-shaped aluminum fins are arranged in the radiating square pipes; the path which is passed by the air is curved rather than linear, which forces the air flow to change the motion direction and generate disturbed flow to strengthen heat exchange, so as to greatly improve the efficiency of heat radiation.

title: Longitudinal slope is greater than 5% anti-slip corrugated steel device

title: The ground brush assemblies of dust catcher and the dust catcher with it
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of ground brush assemblies of dust catcher and the dust catcher with it.Ground brush assemblies include：Base；Upper lid, the base is fixed on the upper lid, exhaust passage is limited between the upper lid and the base, at least a portion of the inner surface in the air channel is smooth air channel face, and the smooth air channel face is provided with flexible membrane, and the inner surface of the flexible membrane is shiny surface.According to the ground brush assemblies of the utility model embodiment, by setting flexible membrane on the inner surface in air channel, when air-flow flows in air channel, flow velocity can be slowed down, the high frequency that flexible membrane can also be absorbed in air-flow make an uproar ripple prevent from reflexing in air enter human ear so that reduce ground brush assemblies noise.

title: A kind of stator module and motor in axial magnetic field
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of stator module and motor in axial magnetic field, which includes shell, stator core, coil, pole shoe and stator cover board, wherein stator core, coil and pole shoe are arranged in the space that shell and stator cover board are surrounded；Coil is arranged in the open slot of stator core；Pole shoe is fixed on stator cover board, and when stator cover board is docked with shell, pole shoe can be arranged at the notch of open slot.There is open slot on stator core in the utility model, to facilitate the installation of coil, simultaneously, pole shoe is fixed on stator cover board, when stator cover board is docked with shell, the pole shoe slot ripples that can reduce motor corresponding with the notch of open slot, the iron loss for reducing motor improves the efficiency of motor, while reducing the torque pulsation of motor.Since pole shoe is carried on stator cover board, in assembling, directly after docking stator cover and housing, pole shoe can be matched with open slot, to improve the production efficiency of motor.

title: Design method of reflection type multi-channel optical filtering element easy to manufacture
abstract: The invention relates to a design method of a reflection type multi-channel optical filtering element easy to manufacture. The basic structure of a designed reflection type multi-channel optical filter is characterized in that ultra-wide wave band high-reflection metal, periodic high-refractive-index and low-refractive-index alternate film piles, ultra-thin metal films and an incident medium are sequentially arranged from a substrate side. The method includes the steps that transmission oscillating ripples between first harmonic generation and third harmonic generation of a periodic high-refractive-index and low-refractive-index dielectric material are utilized, the ultra-wide wave band high-reflection metal and chromium metal are combined, the multi-channel reflection optical filtering element is designed, wherein the chromium metal enables designated wavelengths at an original transmission position to reach high reflection, and the positions and the number of channels of the optical filtering element can be determined according to a given central wavelength and the medium refractive index. The reflection type multi-channel optical filtering element is different from a traditional narrow-band peaky interlayer film system which is high in manufacturing requirement and based on a Fabry-Perot structure, the intermediate structure of the reflection type multi-channel optical filtering element is a traditional regular film system structure, the number and the positions of the multiple channels can be adjusted according to actual requirements, and the reflection type multi-channel optical filtering element is easy to manufacture, simple in manufacturing process, low in manufacturing cost, easy to integrate, and significant in designing actual optical thin films.

title: Children safety protection shoes
abstract: The utility model discloses a pair of children safety protection shoes. A children safety protection shoe comprises an upper, a liner, an outsole, a midsole, an innersole and an alarming information system; the information system consists of an intelligent sensing chip of a wireless receiving external host, which is installed inside the upper and used for transmission, and a wireless transmitting chip which is installed on a heel cup, and the information system is used for receiving dangerous information; the intelligent sensing chip is installed inside the upper; the upper also comprises a toe protection shoe head, an adjusting locking ribbon, an alarming lamp, a micro alarming device and a charging jack; the outsole is provided with antiskid ripples, shock-absorption balancing grooves, an anti-torsion bridge and a brake block; and a midsole is provided with a balancing pad and a balancing rod, and a shoe inner pad is provided with an antiskid lattice and a shock-absorption pad. The children safety protection shoes have a dangerous information prompting function and an alarming function; and moreover, the comfort and the protection of the shoes can be improved, and the safety protection of children can be realized. The children safety protection shoes are reasonable in design, strong in manipulability and capble of being widely suitable for the production of children shoes.

title: Method for Providing Asynchronous Reverse Direction Payment by using Radio Signal Device and Cryptocurrency
abstract: The present invention relates to an asynchronous reverse direction payment method using a wireless device and cryptocurrency and, more specifically, to a method which is implemented by means of an operation server which communicates with a terminal of a member store and is communicable with a wireless terminal of a user who visits the member store. The method comprises the steps of: allowing the operation server to receive transaction registration information and a one-time identification (OTID) from the terminal of the member store; allowing the operation server to store the transaction registration information in association with the OTID; allowing the operation server to receive recognition information from a designated operation application of the wireless terminal of the user; allowing the operation server to check one transaction registration information; allowing the operation server to provide transaction information to the operation application of the wireless terminal of the user; allowing the wireless terminal of the user to check the result of procedures of a cryptocurrency transaction; and providing payment result information based on cryptocurrency to the wireless terminal of the user and the terminal of the member store.

title: Method and system for authenticating a network user
abstract: A method and system for creating a certificate for a client of a service provider of a communications network, wherein the client has a client private key and a client public key. The method includes the steps of establishing a communications link with the service provider through a dedicated communication channel; requesting a client certificate from the service provider; obtaining a caller-ID from an operator of the dedicated communication channel; and creating the requested client certificate using the caller-ID. Preferably, the method also includes the step of verifying that the caller-ID obtained from the operator of the dedicated communication channel is the same as client information provided by the client when requesting the client certificate. The certificate can be stored at a caller ID server or a client's storage.

title: Securing results of privileged computing operations
abstract: A formalized set of interfaces (e.g., application programming interfaces (APIs)) is described, that uses a security scheme, such as asymmetric (or symmetric) cryptography, in order to secure the results of privileged operations on systems such as the operating system (OS) kernel and/or the hypervisor. The interface allows a public key to be included into a request to perform a privileged operation on a hypervisor and/or kernel. The kernel and/or hypervisor use the key included in the request to encrypt the results of the privileged operation. In some embodiments, the request itself can also be encrypted, such that any intermediate parties are not able to read the parameters and other information of the request.

title: Apparatus for prepayment of telecommunication connections in a telecommunication switching network without utilization of rate schedules and call cost computations
abstract: The present invention provides a method and apparatus for prepayment of telecommunication connections between first and second telecommunication devices operably associatable with the telecommunication lines of a telecommunication switching network. In general, the method involves storing telecommunication-time data representative of a prepurchased amount of telecommunication-time available for payment of telecommunication connections in the telecommunication switching network. At the initiation of the first telecommunication device, a telecommunication connection is established between the first and second telecommunication devices so that a telecommunication process can be conducted therebetween. The telecommunication connection between the first and second telecommunication devices is terminated in response to termination of the telecommunication process. The time duration of the telecommunication connection is measured. The stored telecommunication-time data is processed to indicate a decrement in the available telecommunication-time, which is essentially equal to the measured time duration of the telecommunication connection. Various embodiments of telecommunication-time metering apparatus are provided for carrying out the method of the present invention.

title: System and method for distributed database processing in a clustered environment
abstract: The present invention provides a system for distributing database processing across a loosely coupled hardware platform, or a computer cluster. The system divides the data held within the database across all available resources, and then submits the database queries in parallel to all points of data storage. Once all resources have received and processed the database query, the results are sent back to a single point for final reassembly.

title: Systems and methods for real time streaming
abstract: Described in detail herein is an event streaming system. A controller disposed at a facility, can receive an event from computing systems disposed at the facility. The event is received by the controller at a time the event occurs. The controller can stream the event including the set of data. A central system can receive the at least one event streamed by the controller. The central system can include a repository cluster, a relational database, and a NoSQL database. The central system can concurrently route the set of data included in the event to the repository cluster, the relational database and the NoSQL database of the event response system to store the set of data in the repository cluster, the relational database and the NoSQL database.

title: Determining Speed Parameters In A Geographic Area
abstract: Systems, methods, apparatus, and computer program products are provided for assigning parameters to a geographic area, wherein the parameters may be used to associate a speed limit with the geographic area. For example, in one embodiment, a geofenced area that (a) corresponds to a geographic area and (b) comprises one or more street segments is identified. Additionally, speed data associated with one of more of the street segments is received. After receiving the speed data, a speed limit is (a) determined for one or more of the street segments and (b) associated with the geofenced area.

title: Commodity information management system
abstract:
The present invention provides a product information management system which can ensure safety release using a tag, further improve the quality of product management and safety management, and at the same time, improve the system efficiency. 
     According to the present invention, after the bar code 101 is read by the reading unit 80, the device device 60 for demagnetizing the magnetized safety tag 102 attached to the product 100, and the device device 60 by the device device 60. The magnetic detector 70 for detecting the magnetism of the elementary safety tag 102 and the control unit 201 for notifying the operator of the detection result by the magnetic detector 70 using the LED 94 and the speaker 95. The operator recognizes whether or not the safety tag 102 has been released based on the light by the LED 94 and the sound by the speaker 95.

title: Method for updating firmware by e-mail
abstract: A method for updating firmware of an information apparatus by e-mail is proposed. The computer vendor for the information apparatus prepares an update program and attaches the update program to e-mail sent to the information apparatus to be updated. The content of the e-mail is discriminated if the update mode of the information apparatus is in enabled. The attached file is examined after the e-mail is received and the attached file executes update operation if the examination is correct.

title: Systems and methods for providing a personalized exchange market
abstract: The present invention relates to systems and methods for providing a personalized exchange market, and more specifically, to systems and methods for establishing personalized pledge agreements for uncertain future events or occurrences. In one embodiment, the invention includes a method including the steps of facilitating a pledge offer via a network, the pledge offer specifying an outcome of an uncertain future occurrence, the uncertain future occurrence being independently definable; facilitating an acceptance of the pledge offer over via the network, the acceptance forming a pledge agreement; determining the outcome; and facilitating performance of the pledge agreement based on the outcome.

title: System and method for securely loading data in a cache memory associated with a secure processor
abstract: An object of the present invention is to provide a solution for a secure processor integrated in a proprietary third-party system-on-a-chip that makes it possible to use an unsecured memory in a secure manner. The system comprises at least one host processor specific to the system-on-chip and host memories associated with said host processor, at least one proprietary secure processor integrated in said on-chip system and secure memories associated with said secure processor, at least one cache memory secure container containing a plurality of cache lines and having a secure cache controller configured to load said cache lines from the host processor to the secure processor. The system further includes at least one unsecured memory accessible by the host processor and the secure processor. The cache stores an integrity table containing fingerprints of each cache line and a health check program for each cache line as it is loaded by the secure processor from the host processor and / or memory. unsecured. A cache line is validated after a successful comparison between an imprint of the cache line calculated by the secure processor and a corresponding fingerprint extracted from the integrity table.

title: A kind of user identity real name identification method of electronic fare payment system
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of user identity real name identification methods of electronic fare payment system, belong to technical field of network information safety, solve the problems, such as that prior art real-name authentication is dangerous, insecure.This method comprises the following steps: electronic fare payment system issues real-name authentication request to third-party monitoring system；After third-party monitoring system receives real-name authentication request, the network operator information and network user's title of electronic fare payment system is obtained, and acquire user's real name identity information, be transmitted to Infrastructure platform；Infrastructure platform verifies real name identity information；If verification result is very, network operator information, network user's title and real name identity information to be carried out encryption mapping, generates network identity certificate and be transmitted to third-party monitoring system, and issue real-name authentication confirmation message to electronic fare payment system；Otherwise, real-name authentication is terminated.This method passes through third-party monitoring system combination network identity certificate, and it is same to realize the testimony of a witness while protecting privacy of user.

title: Rotary regenerative air preheater heat transfer corrugated plating with flow-disturbing hole and processing method thereof
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of rotary regenerative air preheater heat transfer corrugated plating and processing method thereof with flow-disturbing hole.Flow-disturbing hole left by rotary regenerative air preheater heat transfer corrugated plating, this kind of rotary regenerative air preheater heat transfer corrugated plating is alternately formed by stacking by the first location-plate and the second location-plate, second location-plate thickness is 0.4-0.8mm, first location-plate is interconnected by otch and ripple and forms, and the first location-plate thickness is 0.4-0.8mm.Flow-disturbing hole shape is divided into circle and rectangle, comprehensively obtains after the size in flow-disturbing hole, spacing and arrangement mode are through strict Technology design and experiment show.By arranging circular flow-disturbing hole on carbon steel flat board, then formed by the rolling of waveform roll.This kind is with the heat-transfer character that the novel rotary type air preheater heat transfer corrugated plating in flow-disturbing hole effectively can improve existing rotary regenerative air preheater heat transfer corrugated plating and the circulating resistance reduced in its passage, and reduce rotary regenerative air preheater heat transfer corrugated plating machining needs steel consumption simultaneously.

title: Interval averaging circuit
abstract: PURPOSE:To permit to determine the mean value of a DC signal including superimposed ripples in a moment by a construction wherein a sample holding circuit adapted to sample output from an integrator in an interval averaging circuit comprises two units of sample holding circuits serially connected to each other. CONSTITUTION:An input terminal 1 is connected via a resistor R1 to an inverted input terminal of an amplifier U1 having an integrating capacitor C1. Output of thus arranged integrator is connected via a switch S1 to a first sample holding circuit which comprises a capacitor C3 and an amplifier U3. Output of the first sample holding circuit is connected via a switch S3 to a second sample holding circuit which comprises a capacitor C5 and an amplifier U5. Output of the second sample holding circuit is connected to an inverted input terminal of the amplifier U1. The switches S1 and S2 are operated to have respective ON intervals  t1 and t2 different from each other, so that a feedback loop is not formed and  hence the accurate interval averaging can be performed even in the region of  high frequency.

title: Computer architecture for emulating a correlithm object processing system that places portions of correlithm objects in a distributed node network
abstract: A distributed node network to emulate a correlithm object processing system includes a distribution node, a first calculation node, and a second calculation node communicatively coupled to each other. The distribution node is configured to divide each source correlithm object of a correlithm object mapping table into at least a first portion that comprises a first subset of the binary values in that source correlithm object and a second portion that comprises a second subset of the binary values in that source correlithm object. The first calculation node stores the first portion of each source correlithm object. The second calculation node stores the second portion of each source correlithm object.

title: Certification encrypting method between certificate public key system and identity public key system
abstract: The invention discloses a certification encrypting method between a certificate public key system and an identity public key system, which comprises the following steps: selecting parameters from a public key function database, and generating public keys and private keys of the identity public key system and the certificate public key system; generating public keys and private keys of users according to the parameters of a system, the public keys and the private keys; calculating a session key between the users of the identity public key system and the certificate public key system by bilinear mapping, a private key of a sender and a public key of a receiver; authenticating an encrypted message by the session key to obtain a cipher text, and sending the cipher text to the receiver; and calculating a session key by the bilinear mapping and the own private key by the receiver, and then decrypting out a clear text message and authenticating identity of the sender by the session key. The certification encrypting method has the advantages of simple implementing process and high transmission efficiency, and can be used for confidential paper certifiable transmission between the certificate public key system and the identity public key system.

title: Apparatus and method for proving transaction between users in network environment
abstract: The digital signatures of users A and B are created for a transaction document which states the contents of a transaction between the users A and B, and they are sent to a transaction proof device of a notary public being a third party, together with the transaction document. Thus, the users A and B and the notary public share information, and the notary public can objectively prove the transactional contents, etc.

title: Method and device for realizing transaction reconciliation based on cryptocurrency
abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a method and a device for realizing transaction reconciliation based on cryptocurrency, wherein the method comprises the following steps: receiving a first reconciliation request carrying reconciliation data from a first transaction participant, the reconciliation data comprising cryptocurrency in which a transaction fingerprint is stored; and checking whether the self transaction processing result is consistent with the transaction processing result of the first transaction participant according to the transaction fingerprint. According to the method for realizing the transaction reconciliation based on the cryptocurrency, provided by the embodiment of the invention, a first reconciliation request carrying reconciliation data is received from a first transaction participant, wherein the reconciliation data comprises the cryptocurrency with a transaction fingerprint; and checking whether the transaction processing result of the transaction processing module is consistent with the transaction processing result of the first transaction participant according to the transaction fingerprint, so that the problem of high system complexity of the reconciliation module in the clearing process of the multi-stage transaction system is solved.

title: Parity prediction circuit for adder/counter
abstract: A parity prediction circuit for predicting parity in an adder, counter or similar device. The parity prediction is obtained with a parity prediction network connected from most significant bit to least significant bit. The parity prediction network is used in place of a parity generator or in combination with a parity generator for error checking purposes. In a special application, the parity prediction is employed for a ripple-carry type counter where the predicted parity bit is produced by a single network of NAND gates connected in series from high-order to low-order counter bits. The predicted parity is available no later than the completion of the carry-out propagation.

title: Systems and methods for using imaging to authenticate online users
abstract: Systems and methods are disclosed for authenticating an identity of an online user. One method includes receiving from the user, through a first device, a request to access a web page associated with the user's online account; transmitting to the user an image that contains a unique ID and a URL of an authentication server; and receiving from the user, through the first device, an authentication request containing the unique ID. The method also includes receiving from the user, through a second device, a log-in ID associated with the user and the unique ID; and authenticating the identity of the user to grant the user access, through the first device, to the web page associated with the user's online account.

title: Method for providing payment gateway service using utxo-based protocol and server using same
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for providing a payment agency service and a server using same, and specifically, to a method for registering an authentication certificate, a method for providing a payment agency service, a card company server, and a payment agency server. A registration method according to the present invention comprises the steps of a payment agency server: (a) delivering identity authentication information and a first push token ID to a card company server, when the identity authentication information and the first push token ID is delivered from a user terminal; (b) delivering a successful authentication result to the user terminal to support generating and saving a public key and a private key of the user; and (c) managing the first push token ID or a second push token ID as an integrated push token ID when the first push token ID and the second push token ID match, and saving registration information including the integrated push token ID and the public key.

title: An apparatus and method based on one’s complementary recoding for speedy calculation of public key in elliptical curve cryptography for securing communication in Internet of Things
abstract: Title: An apparatus and method based on one's complementary recoding for speedy calculation of public key in elliptical curve cryptography for securing communication in Internet of Things Abstract An apparatus and method based on one's complement subtraction to represent positive integer k in scalar multiplication which offer less Hamming weight and will remarkably improve the computational efficiency of scalar multiplication by reducing Hamming weight in Elliptical Curve Diffie Hellman scheme on Internet of Things platform for calculating public key by sensor nodes. By the way of example the method of recoding is utilized in ECDH scheme where reducing Hamming weight i.e. the number of one's in binary format of positive integer reduces the computational cost of addition and doubling operations on elliptical curve scalar multiplication and thus reduces the public key calculation time on Internet of Things platform. The present method also reduces the memory required for calculating public key on wireless sensor nodes and is much simpler than Non adjacent forms.

title: Method of making a transaction between cryptocurrencies and apparatus using it
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for transacting between cryptocurrencies, wherein a first trader accesses a wallet authentication server to receive a wallet certificate, and the first trader accesses a transaction matching server using the received wallet certificate. 1 A step in which a trader transmits a cryptocurrency transaction condition to the transaction matching server, receiving a result of matching a second trader to trade with the transmitted transaction condition from the transaction matching server, in the wallet of the second trader Receiving a result of confirming the second cryptocurrency balance from the transaction matching server, and in the case of the transaction balance as a result of the verification, transmitting the first cryptocurrency according to the transaction conditions to the wallet of the second trader; 2 receiving a second cryptocurrency from the wallet of the trader, wherein the first trader is a second trader When matched, the wallets of the first trader and the second trader are locked to prevent the transfer of cryptocurrency to a wallet other than the trading party for a certain period of time, and remote transactions between individuals without passing through various exchanges In this case, it is possible to secure transactions between individuals in real time without escrow, and it is possible to conduct safe and convenient transactions while protecting personal assets from hacking of cryptocurrency exchanges.

title: Electronic registration systems for tracking and/or identifying fraudulent gift cards purchased or linked to fraudulent item returns, and associated methods
abstract: The exemplary embodiments described herein relate to the field of electronic registration (ER) of purchased products and, more particularly, to an improved electronic registration system that enables the tracking and/or identifying of fraudulent gift cards that are purchased or linked to fraudulent item returns. In certain exemplary embodiments, transaction information for gift cards is stored in and/or connected to an ER database such that fraudulent activities associated with the gift card and/or items linked to the gift card may be tracked and/or identified—even potentially long after the gift card has been initially provided.

title: Wearable personal digital device for facilitating mobile device payments and personal use
abstract: Provided are a wearable personal digital device and related methods. The wearable personal digital device may comprise a processor, a display, biometric sensors, activity tracking sensors, a memory unit, a communication circuit, a housing, an input unit, a projector, a timepiece unit, a haptic touch control actuator, and a band. The processor may be operable to receive data from an external device, provide a notification to a user based on the data, receive a user input, and perform a command selected based on the user input. The communication circuit may be communicatively coupled to the processor and operable to connect to a wireless network and communicate with the external device. The housing may be adapted to enclose the components of the wearable personal digital device. The band may be adapted to attach to the housing and secure the wearable personal digital device on a user body.

title: Automated management of confidential data in cloud environments
abstract: A shared networked storage may be separated from a key vault system. A storage request with data to be stored and the storage request with a confidentiality rating may be received. The confidentiality rating may indicate a level of confidentiality the data is associated with. The storage request with the data and the confidentiality rating may be received via a shared networked storage access interface by a security layer. The data to be stored by the key vault system and the confidentiality rating may be encrypted on request of the security layer and into a data container. The shared networked storage may be categorized into Cloud zones. Each Cloud zone may be assigned a trust level. The data container may be stored in one of the Cloud zones of the shared networked storage. The trust level of the one of the Cloud zones may correspond to the confidentiality rating.

title: Safety switch device
abstract: The invention discloses a safety switch device applied to electronic products such as computers and used for controlling an electronic product to be switched on. The safety switch device comprises a lock and a power switch, wherein the lock is arranged on a shell of the electronic product. The lock comprises a lock cylinder, a first lock pin and a second lock pin, wherein the first lock pin and the second lock pin are controlled by the lock cylinder. The power switch comprises a first elastic sheet and a second elastic sheet. The first elastic sheet is connected with the first lock pin of the lock and the second elastic sheet is connected with a power source pin which provides switch signals for a main board and is arranged on the main board of the electronic product. The second lock pin of the lock is connected with a grounded pin on the main board. When a key matched with the lock is inserted into the lock and is rotated to the condition that the first lock pin is in contact the second lock pin, the power switch is switched off so that the switch signals can be received by the power source pin, and the main board can be triggered to conduct switching on and switching off.

title: Steel trading system
abstract: Embodiments of the present invention provide a receiver for receiving transaction information including reinforcing information from a user terminal, a transmitter for providing transaction information to a user terminal, a transaction information registered between the seller and the buyer through the receiver and the transmitter. It provides a reinforcing bar trading system comprising an analysis unit for calculating the reinforcement demand by receiving the buyer's process data or building characteristic data through the transaction brokering and receiving unit for brokering the transaction.   Accordingly, embodiments of the present invention can diversify the distribution structure of the rebar by arranging the rebar transactions online through the transaction brokerage brokering the rebar trading and calculating the type, quantity and input time of the rebar through the analysis unit. Rebar prices can be reliably created, and rebars can be purchased at a timely low price in accordance with the timing of rebar input.

title: System and method for blocking a multicast spam in pim multicast protocol
abstract:
The multicast spam blocking system in the PIM multicast protocol according to the present invention receives a multicast packet generated from an originating terminal through the Internet, and determines whether the multicast packet is spam or not to request a multicast spam processing request. A receiving terminal transmitting to the receiving router and a spammer list in which spammer information is registered, and updating the spammer list according to the multicast spam processing request received through the receiving router, and connected with the calling terminal transmitting multimedia spam packets. Rendezvous points for deleting multimedia spam packets in conjunction with the originating router. 
     As described above, in the present invention, the spam information is managed at the rendezvous point in the PIM protocol-based multicast network and the spam information is shared with the sender, thereby multicasting the PIM protocol, for example, the PIM-SM protocol and the BIDIR-PIM protocol. It can be applied to the network to minimize the occurrence of multicast spam to protect the PIM network from multicast spam. 
       
     PIM, Spam, Spam Response, PIM-SM, BIDIR-PIM

title: System and method for transparently authenticating a user to a digital rights management entity
abstract: Various embodiments of a system and method for transparently authenticating a user to a digital rights management entity are described. In various embodiments, a digital rights management server may be configured to receive an authentication token from a first remote computer system. Such authentication token may indicate that a particular user of the first remote computer system was authenticated by a first content provider of one or more content providers. In various embodiments, the digital rights management server may also be configured to verify the authentication token by determining that one or more portions of the authentication token were generated based on respective authentication information issued to the first content provider. In various embodiments, the digital rights management server may also be configured to, in response to verification of the authentication token, issue to the first remote computer system one or more credentials.

title: Dynamic digital watermark
abstract: Some implementations may provide a computer-implemented method for validating a digital document, the method including: receiving, at a computing device, the digital document comprising at least two digital watermarks, the digital document issued by a central entity; retrieving a first digital watermark from the digital document, the first digital watermark visually presented at a first time point; retrieving a second digital watermark from the digital document, the second digital watermark visually presented at a second time point, the second digital watermark being different from the first digital watermark and the second time point being different from the first time point; and reading the digital document based on the retrieved first and second digital watermarks.

title: LIGHTING DEVICE AND LIGHT
abstract: An object of the present invention is to provide a lighting device and a lamp that can reduce a ripple that occurs in output light. A lighting device (1) according to the present invention includes a rectifier circuit (11), a drive circuit (12) and a current control circuit (13). The rectifier circuit (11) is configured to rectify an AC voltage (V1) to a pulsating voltage (V2) to be output. A load circuit (20) containing two or more solid-state light sources (2) connected in series is connected between the output terminals (113, 114) of the rectifier circuit (11). The drive circuit (12) is configured to change a number of the two or more solid-state light sources (2) that emit light according to a change in a voltage value of the pulsating voltage (V2) such that a period of the pulsating voltage (V2) Comprising: a first period in which a portion of the two or more solid state light sources (2) emit light and others of the two or more solid state light sources (2) emit no light; and a second period in which all of the two or more solid-state light sources (2) emit light. The current control circuit (13) is configured to control, in at least the second period, a value of current (I1) flowing through the load circuit (20) according to an average voltage of the pulsating voltage (V2).

title: In mold decoration method of prepressing in mold decoration film
abstract: The invention relates to an in mold decoration method of a prepressing in mold decoration film, which comprises the steps of: firstly, manufacturing the prepressing in mold decoration film; then prepressing and forming the prepressing in mold decoration film according to the product shape to ensure that the prepressing in mold decoration film forms a shape matched with the product; then cutting the prepressed and formed part off, placing into an injection molded mold, and enabling the prepressing in mold decoration film to be combined with plastics when injection molding; and tearing a base layer and a release layer of the prepressing in mold decoration film except that the film and a printing patern layer are attached on the surface of the plastics when in demolding. According to the in mold decoration method of the prepressing in mold decoration film, defects of ripples, cracks and the like occurring in the decoration film can be avoided, and the smoothening and flattening effect of the outer surface of the product is improved.

title: Load driver
abstract: A DC motor is driven at a stable voltage with reduced ripple.   A voltage of a DC power supply is boosted by a boost switching power supply and supplied to a DC motor from an H-bridge load switching circuit. Turning on the power supply switching element Tr1 of the step-up switching power supply 4 causes energy to be stored in the inductance element 11, and powering off the power supply switching element Tr1 causes power of the inductance element 11 to pass through the diode 12. The power is supplied to the capacitor 13 and is also supplied to the load switching circuit 5. The timing at which power is supplied to the motor 3 by the load switching circuit 5 is set to the timing at which the power supply switching element Tr1 is turned off. As a result, electric power from the inductance element 11 is supplied to the capacitor 13 and the motor 3, so that ripple in the voltage of the capacitor 13 can be reduced and stabilized.   [Selection diagram] Fig. 1

title: Unified login biometric authentication support
abstract: As disclosed herein, a token and/or a public/private key can be stored in a secure enclave that can be later used when a user logs into the payment provider's website. At that time, the user can simply swipe a fingerprint to complete a transaction. Thus, biometric authentication may be applied to complete the transaction. Moreover, the transaction can be completed across different browsers. In an implementation, a long-term token is not utilized. Instead, when a user opts into the disclosed implementation, a private and public key pair is generated on the client side device. The private key may be stored in the secure enclave and the public key may be sent to the payment provider. Thus, there may be no token involved to complete the transaction.

title: Buck boost converter and switching mode power supply using the same
abstract: An embodiment relates to a switching mode power supply device and a switching mode power supply device using the same. A switching mode power supply device according to an embodiment includes a power supply part which supplies power, a conversion part which raises or drops a voltage received from the power supply part, and a load part which receives a voltage outputted from the conversion part. The conversion part may include a switch part which changes the flow of a current flowing through the conversion part in a first mode and a second mode, an inductor part which stores energy in the first mode and discharge energy in the second mode, a capacitor which discharges energy in the first mode and stores energy in the second mode, and a diode part which prevents the backflow of a current in the first mode and the second mode. A switching mode power supply device according to the embodiment can reduce a ripple current without increasing the number of components.

title: Electronic voting method, device and storage medium
abstract: The application provides an electronic voting method, an electronic voting device and a storage medium, wherein the method comprises the following steps: receiving a first vote sent by a first voting terminal; the first vote is a vote after ring signature, and the first vote comprises first candidate information and first public keys of a plurality of voters corresponding to the first candidate information; verifying whether the ring signature of the first vote passes according to the first candidate information; if the ring signature of the first vote is verified to be failed, determining a second public key according to the first public key; and sending the second public key to the first voting terminal, and receiving a second vote sent by the first voting terminal, wherein the second vote is a vote obtained by the first voting terminal performing ring signature on the first vote again according to the second public key. The electronic voting method, the electronic voting device and the storage medium can ensure that the voting information of the voter cannot be deduced so as to ensure the anonymity of voting.

title: A kind of driving bridge for crawler-type combine
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of driving bridge for crawler-type combine, including driving wheel (1), drive gear (2) and be positioned at the jack shaft (3) driving gear (2) two ends, one end of described jack shaft (3) is connected with driving wheel (1), the other end is connected with driving gear (2), it is characterized in that: on jack shaft (3), be simultaneously provided with ripple pearl clutch hub (9) and brakes, described ripple pearl clutch hub (9) controls jack shaft (3) along with driving gear (2) to rotate or departing from driving gear (2), mobile control brake system by clutch ripple dish (11) on ripple pearl clutch hub (9).Only needing to arrange a shift fork on clutch ripple dish, operating system is simple, flexible operation.

title: Method, device, equipment and storage medium for encrypting and protecting server starting option
abstract: The invention discloses a method, a device, equipment and a storage medium for encrypting and protecting a server starting option, wherein the method comprises the following steps that when the server starting option is changed and a storage request is executed, a south bridge chip triggers an interrupt operation; and transmitting the interrupt information to the controller, executing user identity authentication by the controller, and feeding back an authentication result. The device comprises a south bridge chip, a storage module and a control module, wherein the south bridge chip is used for triggering interrupt operation when a server starting option is changed and a storage request is executed; the controller is used for receiving an interrupt operation triggered by the south bridge chip and executing user identity authentication when the server starting option change is requested to be stored; the power supply module is used for powering off the whole machine when the user identity authentication fails; and the input module is used for inputting the user identity authentication information. The invention avoids the malicious operation of randomly changing an unauthorized system disk, carries out identity verification on the modification of the server starting option, enhances the capability of the server system to resist malicious intrusion, and improves the stability of the system.

abstract: A kind of New Multi-mode water outlet shower head, it includes housing, and housing is provided with circular heavy platform, and the platform that sinks is provided with apopore close to handling position and penetrated with water inlet pipe, water outlet plate of the installation with a variety of water spouts in described heavy platform, it is characterised in that：Described water outlet plate center is provided with mounting hole, and fixed screw is spirally connected through the mounting hole and the fixing hole positioned at heavy platform center, and some rolling ripple pearls are additionally provided with described heavy platform and are pressed on the slide unit of water outlet plate lower end.The beneficial effects of the utility model are：1）Simple in construction, production cost is low, improves the market competitiveness.2）The installation of water outlet plate is carried on and rolled in ripple pearl, it be sphere friction to change conventional planar friction, reduces contact area, reduction water outlet plate friction area, makes that its switching is lighter, and service life is longer.

title: A kind of water ripples image generation projector
abstract: The utility model relates to a kind of water ripples image generation projector, adopts two metal halid lamps of high-luminous-efficiency as light source, adopts two have the cylindrical tube of the hollow of water ripples pattern surperficial and one have water ripples pattern stator; Two cylindrical tubes adopt driven by motor, and their turning cylinder mutually at an angle; Between lamp and the cylindrical tube with water ripples pattern, fixing reflector is housed, it is placed in the back side, image projection direction, can increase the brightness of projection; Be provided with a slice clear glass (or transparent engineering plastics) in the beam area in the water ripples pattern projection direction of the outside of cylinder, the half of this glass is coated with the film of blue light.When metal halide lamp is lighted and cylindrical tube rotates, bright gorgeous water ripples pattern true to nature can be projected on screen (as metope).The utility model implements easily, and the water ripples effect of realization is true to nature.

title: alternative feeding device for at-risk babies
abstract: alternative feeding device for at-risk babies. The present utility model application refers to an easy-to-use object that is best suited for alternative feeding for premature newborns, for speech therapy use and may be used by others. The device basically consists of a color-scaled cup engraved on the embossed cup wall for easy viewing, a ripple flow reducer, and a rounded nozzle formed by the cup's own rim for easy contact with the baby's mouth, a lid on the rim of the cup where it will be snap fitted to prevent food contamination.

title: Optimal torque ripple reduction by current shaping
abstract: A motor drive system and method for controlling an electric motor are provided. The motor drive system comprises a plurality of phase lines switchably connected to the electric motor, a plurality of controllable switches, and a controller. The controller is communicatively coupled to the plurality of controllable switches and is configured to receive signals from the rotor sensor indicative of the rotor speed and position. The controller generates a value representing back electromotive force (back EMF) as a function of rotor position with respect to the rotational reference system. Based on the rotor position, the controller determines a plurality of phase currents that reduce the torque ripple of the electric motor to approximately zero. The controller operates the controllable switch to supply a plurality of phase currents to the electric motor.

title: A method for updating a long-term key used to protect communications between a network and a remote device
abstract: The invention relates to a method for updating a first long-term key (LTK0) used to protect communications between a telecommunication network (100) and a remote device (130) associated to a secure element (101), said secure element (101) storing the first long-term key (LTK0) and a public key belonging to an over-the-air key pair which is adapted to secure data exchange between the remote device (130) and an over-the-air server (104) configured for the remote maintenance of the secure element (101), said over-the-air server (104) storing said over-the-air key pair which is composed of said public key and of a corresponding private key. The method comprises the steps of: generating (200) a second long-term key (LTK1), ciphering (201) the second long-term key (LTK1) using the public key of the over-the-air key pair, sending (202) the ciphered version of the second long-term key (LTK1) to the over-the-air server (104), replacing (203) in the secure element (101) the first long-term key (LTK0) by the second long-term key (LTK1).

title: Systems and methods for anonymous cryptocurrency transactions
abstract: Systems and methods for anonymous cryptocurrency transactions are disclosed. A method may include: receiving, from the electronic device associated with a sender of a cryptocurrency transaction, a zero-knowledge statement comprising a shuffled and anonymized list of participants comprising the sender, a receiver of the cryptocurrency transaction, and a plurality of decoy participants, a transfer amount, and a remaining balance, and a secret witness, wherein each participant is associated with an index; generating one-out-of-many proofs for the sender and the receiver based on their associated indices; generating a Basic Zether proof for the transfer amount and the remaining balance; conducting many-out-of-many proofs with parameters chosen for an anonymous payment setting; and constructing a zero-knowledge proof for the zero-knowledge statement. The sender sends an ordered list of the participants and the zero-knowledge proof to a verifier using the FiatShamir transform, and the verifier verifies the zero-knowledge proof.

title: Publicly verifiable compressed fingerprints and an application in securing domain name systems
abstract: Aspects of the disclosure provide a method of securely transmitting information, including receiving, by a Domain Name System (DNS) asking device, a domain name query including a full domain name, and communicating, by the DNS asking device, with an authoritative DNS answering device. The communicating includes sending, by the DNS asking device, the query to the DNS answering device, generating, by the DNS answering device, an authoritative response including a binding record, digitally signing, by the DNS answering device, the authoritative response to output a unique fingerprint on the authoritative response to generate an authoritative signed response, sending, by the DNS answering device, the authoritative signed response to the DNS asking device, and publicly verifying, by the DNS asking device, the authoritative signed response using only the full domain name to deterministically derive a verification public key corresponding to a signing private key of the DNS answering device.

title: Method, device and system for securing payment data for transmission over open communication networks
abstract: A method for securing payment data for transmission over open communication networks is disclosed. The method comprises establishing a data connection between a first and a second transceiver device, the first transceiver device configured as a merchant device and the second transceiver device configured as a customer transceiver device. The merchant device transmits a first data package which comprises a unique merchant identifier and transaction request data, to the customer transceiver device over the data connection. The merchant device receives a cryptogram from the customer transceiver device. The cryptogram having been generated from using a secret key and a counter value together with the received unique merchant identifier and the transaction request data. The method comprises forming an authorisation request comprising the received cryptogram, merchant identifier and the transaction request data and submitting said authorisation request to at least one of an issuer and an acquirer to facilitate authorisation and processing of said transaction request data.

abstract: According to an aspect of the present invention, there is provided a method for generating a product-specific address and an index for authenticity management, the method comprising: (a) supporting a server to generate or generate a master public key from a seed; , Generating or generating at least one HD index (Hierarchical Deterministic Index) using the master public key, and (c) using the master public key to generate or generate at least one HD index And generating or generating a unique address corresponding to the unique address.

title: Login authentication method, authentication server, authentication client and login client
abstract: A login authentication method, an authentication server, an authentication client and a login client. The method comprise: acquiring an authentication request message generated by a login client according to user identity identification information logged in by a user; triggering, according to the authentication request message, an authentication client to collect biometric information of the user; receiving the biometric information collected by the authentication client; and comparing the biometric information with user biometric registration information corresponding to pre-stored user identity identification information, and generating an authentication result.

title: Group signature method without trusted party
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of group signature method of no trusted party, the technical issues of for solving existing group signature method low efficiency.Technical solution is in key generation phase, and t people chooses the sub- private key of oneself, calculates and disclose oneself sub- public key and public signature key.In the signature stage, the sub- private key that t people is utilized respectively oneself calculates the signature of oneself, and the signature of oneself is then sent to signature conjunction winner and goes to synthesize.After signature closes the signature that winner receives everyone generation, whether effective is signed using everyone sub- public key verifications, if everyone signature is effective, synthesize signature, if the signature of someone is invalid, notifies t idiograph to fail and exit signature process.The present invention uses elliptic curve point multiplication operation, improves efficiency.Since signature is generated by multiple people's distributed computings, signature process does not need synthesis private key, prevents private key from revealing；Due to compatible with the ECDSA of bit coin system signature, can also be passed through by bit coin signature verification.

title: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR SECURED ELECTRONIC TRANSACTIONS
abstract: The invention relates to a method and a system for carrying out electronic transactions via asymmetric cryptography in a secure manner via the internet between multiple users and service providers with a verified identity, via an authentication authority comprising the following steps: verification authority; - management of the public keys of all logged in users by the authentication authority; - making available an application that generates key pairs on the smartphone of the user and whereby the private keys of the user are kept with the user himself.

title: Call management system with call control from user workstation computers
abstract: A Call Management System provides for management of calls directly by system users at their workstation computers via a digital data network such as a digital networks not controlled via the user's telephone instruments as in prior systems. A call management computer intercepts incoming calls and controls the handling of such calls according to instructions received from the users' workstations, which are accessed via the digital data network. Trunk circuits are monitored and controlled using digital signal processors to proactively identify the called party, the calling party and the call type (voice, Fax, data) and control and to monitor all calls. Each different type of call is managed differently and automatically through direct user workstation controls and/or user-generated rules to provide special treatment for designated callers. Multiple calls to user at the same time may be handled with no busy signals to callers. Only one number is needed for a user to receive voice Fax and data calls. Fax and data transmissions are automatically received.

title: Face and bar code double-recognition method and device
abstract: The invention provides a face and bar code dual-recognition method, which comprises the steps of networking mobile payment equipment which is arranged in a plurality of scenes and is supported by a face verification circuit, is cooperatively applied with an input device and a printing device, and connecting the mobile payment equipment, an electronic terminal and a server cluster; acquiring parameter data to generate a two-dimensional code image and combining the two-dimensional code image with a face image; when the payment event is triggered, code scanning and non-contact card swiping payment are supported, and the first distance measurement sampling point is monitored, recognition and reading are completed in a buckling and scanning mode. The method is used for decoding a two-dimensional code image by combining with an acquired face image through a preset algorithm, and extracting the characteristics of the combined image through a depth self-learning algorithm, so that efficient and accurate two-dimensional code and face double recognition and payment in a network distribution environment supporting code scanning payment and non-contact card swiping payment in a plurality of scenes with large environmental parameter changes are effectively completed. The present disclosure also provides a device for dual recognition of human face and bar code.

title: Method for interfacing food merchandise direct-deal based on video for direct communications between producer and buyer
abstract: The present invention relates to an image-based producer-buyer direct communication method food direct transaction mediation method and system. This includes: a broadcast channel creation step in which the mediation server allocates a broadcast channel associated with a predetermined food item to a member producer terminal; An image uploading step of uploading image data showing a production process of the predetermined food item to the mediation server in order for the member producer terminal to broadcast through a predetermined broadcasting channel associated with a predetermined food item; Broadcasting step in which the purchaser terminal connected to the intermediary server directly communicates between the producer and the purchaser, including a chat in a method of viewing real-time streaming broadcasted video through a predetermined broadcast channel associated with a predetermined food item and inputting text. ; The intermediary server provides the predetermined food item so that the purchaser terminal can order and transmits the order information to the member producer terminal, thereby providing a direct transaction between the producer and the purchaser.

title: Intelligent end user devices for clearinghouse services in an Internet telephony system
abstract: Clearinghouse services architectures that support the use of end user devices, such as personal computers, Internet Protocol (IP) phones, cable multimedia terminal adapters, and residential gateways, in an Internet telephony system. The innovative architectures include a proxy-based system model, a direct communication model, and a hybrid proxy/direct communication model. A user can operate an “intelligent” end user device. i.e., a device running a client program with knowledge of the architecture particulars, to access a clearinghouse service on an IP network. This enables the user to communicate a telephony call over the IP network and via the combination of a terminating gateway identified by the clearinghouse service and the Public Switched Telephone Network.

title: Receipt data processing device and method for processing receipt data
abstract: According to one embodiment, a receipt data processing device includes a data generating section, a command issuing section, and an output section. The data generating section is configured to generate receipt data including information about an item purchased by a customer. The command issuing section is configured to issue a cut command that causes a sheet on which a receipt image corresponding to the receipt data is printed by a printing device to be cut off. The output section is configured to output the receipt data to an external device that is different from the printing device, in response to the issuance of the cut command by the cut command issuing section.

title: Password resetting method and device and server
abstract: The invention discloses a password resetting method, a password resetting device and a server. The method comprises the following steps: responding to a reset password request of a payment application of the terminal equipment, and acquiring a new password of the requested password from the terminal equipment; triggering a user identity identification card in the terminal equipment to initiate a voice call request to a special service platform server so as to request an operator platform server to verify the IMSI corresponding to the pre-stored associated number of the payment application through the special service platform server and determine whether the IMSI corresponding to the number initiating the voice call request is consistent with the IMSI; and if the verification result is that the IMSI is consistent, resetting the requested password as a new password. According to the method provided by the embodiment of the invention, the fund security problem caused by the fact that the payment software account is stolen can be solved.

title: System and method for customer initiated payment transaction
abstract: A system for a customer initiated payment transaction includes a mobile device of a customer, a card of the customer having card information, and a merchant having merchant information and payment information. In another embodiment, a system for a customer initiated payment transaction includes a mobile device of a customer, a merchant, a multi-payment gateway, and a network. The mobile device processes a card payment transaction by: receiving the merchant information and the payment information; being activated, for processing the card payment transaction, by the card; creating a payment authorization request using the card information, the merchant information, and the payment information, and sending the payment authorization request to an acquirer; and receiving a result of the payment authorization request from the acquirer. The mobile device includes a digital wallet, on which a customer may register one or more of a plurality of payment methods.
