title: The method and system of on-line payment digital cash
abstract: The present invention provides a kind of method and system of on-line payment digital cash, and can flexibly and easily merchandise digital cash.This method includes：First user terminal is according to the payment instruction of reception, extract the digital cash equal with the amount of money specified by payment instruction, and the request of generation first is sent to business bank's digital coin systems, wherein, the first request includes second user terminal iidentification and the digital cash；Business bank's digital coin systems are after the first request is received, and the request of generation second is then sent to Central Bank's digital coin systems；Central Bank's digital coin systems perform the operation of preset term according to the second request and successfully indicate operation to return to business bank's digital coin systems, and the operation that owner's change is carried out to the digital cash is included in the operation of preset term；The digital cash is sent to second user terminal by business bank's digital coin systems；Wherein, the first request and second asks to be used for carry out owner's change to the digital cash.

title: Secure card
abstract: Systems and methods for monetary cards are described. The cards are free from personally identifiable data, e.g., no name or embossment. In an example, the card includes a first number that activates the card and a second number written to the card at activation away from the card manufacturer. This helps prevent theft at the manufacturer. This second account is a bearer account where anyone who knows the account number can withdraw the funds from the account. The account may be funded with either the account number or the authentication number.

title: Authentication method and device
abstract: An account authentication method performed at a server, including: receiving a login request sent by an initiating terminal; searching, among binding relationships between initiating terminal identifiers, authentication terminal identifiers, and registered biological characteristic information according to the first terminal's identifier, a matching target binding relationship; when found, sending an authentication request to an authentication terminal corresponding to an authentication terminal identifier; receiving biological characteristic information that is sent by the authentication terminal, and determining, through comparison, whether the biological characteristic information is consistent with registered biological characteristic information included in the target binding relationship; and if so, authenticating the login request.

title: Consumer tracking system
abstract: A method performed on a local computing device 130 which: receives configuration data identifying a transaction or service provided to a user; requests and receives transaction data from a server 140 corresponding to the transaction, based on the configuration data; and requests and receives review data S1 from the user in respect of the transaction and forwarding the review data to the server. It then transmits a payment request S5 to a user device 120 with an identifier dependent on the transaction data; wherein the identifier comprises server access information to enable the user device to access the server, enabling an association between the review data and the user device to be made. A method performed on a server comprises: providing transaction data in response to a request from a local computing device; receiving review data from the local computing device; receiving a connection request from a user device, comprising an identifier provided by the local computing device; and associating the user device with the review data in respect of the transaction. The methods ultimately allow for better tracking of customer sentiment over multiple encounters with a service provider.

title: System and method for providing multiple application programming interfaces for a browser to manage payments from a payment service
abstract: Disclosed herein are systems, methods, and computer-readable storage devices for a new browser including multiple application programming interfaces. A method includes receiving, from a site, at a browser and via a first application programming interface that defines a first protocol for communicating data between the browser and the site, a first payment request associated with a potential purchase by a user, in response to the first payment request and based on an identification of a payment service, communicating, from the browser and via a second application programming interface that defines a second protocol for communicating data between the browser and the payment service, a second payment request to the payment service, receiving, at the browser, from the payment service, via the second application programming interface, authorized payment information and communicating, from the browser, to the site and via the first application programming interface, the authorized payment information.

title: Method of imposition added-service commission and imposition commission of using multiple application in ic chip card
abstract: A billing processing method is provided to store information of an issuer in an IC chip card by an opened key value. A billing processing system related to the imposition of commission and added-service commission in a IC chip card supporting multiple applications comprise the followings: an IC chip card renewal space for enabling reading/writing operations from/on the IC chip card as well as the confirmation of details to be settled(S13); a storage in which commission settlement related data is recorded(S16); a compulsory module having constraint on a paragraph to be recorded and the settlement of commission when the reading/writing operations are performed, in case of adding information about a card issuer and an application program in the card; and the application program for encryption processing in a commission related operation in the card.

title: Methods and apparatus for contingency communications
abstract: Methods and systems for contingency communication are disclosed. In one embodiment, a method for providing emergency services may be performed by a base station operating in a communication system In an embodiment, the method for providing emergency services includes transmitting a beacon signal to indicate an emergency status to enable portable devices to operate in a stress mode. A distress signal may be transmitted by a mobile device in response to the beacon signal to the base station, wherein the distress signal carries information at least comprising user identity associated with the mobile device, geolocation of the mobile device, or biometrics of a user of the mobile device.

title: Detector for rotating angle
abstract:
PURPOSE: To simplify construction and to reduce errors in detection by providing magnetic poles projecting respectively inward in a diametral direction on the quadrisections of a circumference and providing a stator, etc. applied with primary windings and secondary windings respectively on these magnetic poles.  
     CONSTITUTION: A detector for rotating angle is mainly constituted of a stator 10 having magnetic poles 11, 12, 13, 14 projecting respectively inward in a diametral direction on the quadrisections of a circumference and applied with primary windings 11a, 12a, 13a, 14a and secondary windings 11b, 12b, 13b, 14b on these magnetic poles, and a rotor 20 having the shape wherein a circular column is cut to a V shape from the side thereof, and held freely turnably with a shaft 21 while the circular cylindrical surface thereof is held oppositely to the projecting end faces of the magnetic poles 11, 12, 13, 14. The constitution is thus simplified, and an error known as a slot ripple is eliminated, whereby the accuracy in detection is improved.

title: Method and apparatus for depositing paper checks from home or office
abstract: A form of paper checks, and the apparatus and method to handle them, allows deposit from home or office. The apparatus can be implemented with a Personal Computer (PC) having a secure cryptography generator (SCG) installed. The process of depositing paper checks begins by the payee endorsing a check having printed thereon encryptions in at least selected locations where information is written by a payer. The act of writing by the payee obscuring some of the encryptions. The payee then scans the endorsed check with a scanner to generate a digitized version of the check. The computer extracts from the digitized version of the check a concatenated branch number, account number and check number and a corresponding digital signature. The payee then transmits the extracted information together with the digitized version of the check for deposit. The checks a specially designed to prevent fraud such alteration of the payee, amount and multiple deposits. In addition to the encryptions imprinted on the check, a secret key and a plurality of digital signatures are generated based on the concatenated branch number, account number and check number.

title: Electronic cash implementing method and equipment using user signature and recording medium recorded thereon a program for the method
abstract: A user registers a user public key PKU as a pseudonym at a trustee or issuer and obtains an signature for the pseudonym as a license. The sends the pseudonym, PKU identification information IdU and the amount of withdrawal x to the issuer institution. The issuer increments a balance counter of the pseudonym by x, then generates an issuer signature SKI(PKU, x) with a secret key SKI, and sends the issuer signature as an electronic cash to the user. The user verifies the validity of the issuer signature with a public key SKI, and if valid, increments an electronic cash balance counter Balance by x. At the time of payment, user sends the public key PKU and the license to a shop, and the shop verifies the validity of the license, and if valid, sends a challenge to the user. The user attaches a signature to the challenge with user secret key SKU, then sends it to the shop together with the amount due y, and decrements the electronic cash balance counter by y.

title: Cryptocurrency kiosk/atm device and system and method of using the same
abstract: A standalone cryptocurrency kiosk/ATM device including at least the following components: (i) a bill validator; (ii) bill dispenser; (iii) printer; (iv) code scanner; (v) touch screen display; (vi) computing power in the form of a processor/controller; and (vii) internet connection means. The standalone device may include other components such as a backup power supply. In practice, the standalone device facilitates the purchase and sale of cryptocurrency. A plurality of devices and central computer/server may form a network of devices. A lightning network may be used in combination with a blockchain network to increase transaction speeds.

title: Verification protocol for a point of sale merchandising system
abstract: A method of validating a merchant in a point of sale transaction system, comprising the steps of encrypting a customer secret identification information using a public key of the merchant, entering the encrypted information into a transaction device, transmitting the encrypted information from the device to a merchant, decrypting at the merchant and the encrypted secret identification information, and transmitting the decrypted secret identification information from the merchant to the device wherein the customer verifies the decrypted secret identification information by visual inspection of the secret identification information.

title: A virtual sales, payment and reporting method and e-cash register pos system
abstract: The present invention is related to virtual sales, payment and reporting method and an e-cash register pos system which operates in compliance with said method 10 which can be used in all kinds of stores that can be reached via the internet, or any kind of devices such as telephones, smart devices, smart kiosks, etc, which enables the purchasing of all kinds of goods and services by means of any kind of electronic medium; which provides the financial recording of said purchases, generation of sales receipts of invoices for said purchases, being able to receive 15 payment of said goods services by the cash register pos, and transferring if necessary the above mentioned information to the related organizations or institutions (regulatory institutions). By means of the system which operates according to this method and said method, enables the storage of the information created during sales and purchasing for the duration of the legal record keeping 20 period, archiving said information electronically and transferring said information when desired, periodically or instantly to the authorized organizations.

title: System for determining issue amount of cryptocurrency based on block chain
abstract: The present invention relates to a system for determining the amount of issuance of a blockchain-based cryptocurrency, and the system acquires information on a reserve prepared in advance for payment of real economic value exchangeable for cryptocurrency, and provides market price information on real economic value. An information acquisition unit to acquire; And an issuance amount determining unit that calculates an issueable amount of cryptocurrency using the obtained payment reserve information and market information of the actual economic value; and the cryptocurrency is convertible from another cryptocurrency and It is issued on a condition that can be incinerated.

title: Method and Apparatus for Adding Value to a Stored Value Account
abstract: An apparatus and method for adding value to a stored value account using a scanable stored value code are provided. Through the use of scanable stored value codes, the process of adding value to a stored value account can be improved. Stored value card containing scanable stored value codes provide advantages to holders of stored value accounts.

title: Method, apparatus, and computer program product for topping up prepaid payment cards for offline use
abstract: A card holder carries out an initial top-up of a balance of a pre-paid payment card. The prepaid payment card is configured for use in an infrastructure in accordance with a payment specification requiring different behavior for normal transactions in the infrastructure versus that required for topping-up of the balance. Contemporaneously with the initial top-up, the card holder registers risk mitigation information in association with the pre-paid payment card. Subsequent to the initial top-up, an indicator is written to the pre-paid payment card during a transaction with the pre-paid payment card outside the infrastructure. The indicator identifies the pre-paid payment card as having the risk mitigation information associated therewith. During subsequent presentation of the pre-paid payment card to the infrastructure, the pre-paid payment card is treated as a token backed up by the risk mitigation information, based on presence of the indicator on the pre-paid payment card.

title: Network-based digital audio/video transmission device for security surveillance
abstract: The present invention is a security surveillance system configured by connecting CCTV equipment such as a video camera, a splitter, a DVR (Digital Video Recorder) with a cable, and high installation cost problem due to one-to-one wiring, which is the biggest disadvantage of the conventional analog cable. In addition, it provides a digital audio / video transmission system that makes it easy to install all the equipment, even when wiring analog cables, without the need for additional digital expertise. As a technology to solve the high cost problem by one-to-one wiring, there is a network DVR system that replaces analog cable with digital. However, this method has a problem that it is difficult to install a system without a conventional operator having to acquire a separate professional digital-related knowledge because the system setting method is complicated. In order to solve the above problems, the present invention is a digital video streamer and a digital video distribution amplifier in which all settings are completed by simple switch operation without complicated remote setting process, and hybrid digital video that can select analog and digital inputs for each input channel. It consists of devices, such as a recorder.

title: Authorisation of cashless payment using SMS
abstract: Mobile Wallet materialises the whole concept of having a virtual wallet. Never again will a person have to depend on carrying their credit cards or cash on them at all times when purchasing products from a shop or online. Mobile Wallet eliminates the necessity and need for physical cash or credit cards to be used on a day to day basis whilst shopping. Mobile Wallet facilitates a safer way to go shopping as there will be no risk of losing cash/cards or even have them stolen, since you will no longer have to carry them with you. Using their mobile phones, people will be able to 'virtually pay' for whatever goods/products they wish to buy. Whether its clothes, electronics, food, airline tickets, whatever, customers will be able to automatically send the amount payable to the merchant instantly and securely without the need to physically hand over cash, or the need to enter secure information (such as a signature or credit card pin number) in front of the merchant.

title: Pre-emptive download of software in data processing network
abstract: Software modules (e.g. dynamically loadable code such as java applets) are pre-emptively transferred in a data processing network from a host data processing system for execution on a client data processing system. The software modules are of a number of different types, each type providing a different service at the client system (e.g. e-mail, text editor etc). The host system determines the type of a first software module transferred to a client and makes a prediction, based on this determination, as to the type of software module that may next be required at the client. The predicted software module is then transferred to the client system in advance of any request for same from the client.

title: System and method for error isolation and error mitigation based on network modeling
abstract: A method of identifying an information monitoring point for fault isolation and mitigation analysis in an electrical or electronic system (EES) for a vehicle, the method comprising:   - Define a network model of the EES that provides the physical, structural, functional and behavioral aspects of the EES, identifying potential monitoring points in the model as targets;   - Determination of an intermediate state centralization measure, which models holistic complex interactions among layers of the power supply, the wiring, the sensors, the control of the communication in the EES. for each destination in the model, as a summation of a ratio of a total number of shortest routes between each pair of destinations in the model and a number of such shortest routes that pass the destination whose inter-state centralization measure has been determined;   - selecting a minimum of an intermediate state centralization measure threshold;   Identify which of the determined intermediate state centralization measures for each of the targets is greater than the threshold;   - defining a minimum of a degree of a neighborhood factor that defines a predetermined coverage of a target relative to all other targets;   - Determine which of the targets that have an intermediate state centralization measure larger than the threshold value, a degree of the neighborhood factor larger  than the minimum of the degree of the neighborhood factor; and   - Identify a target as a monitoring point that has the highest intermediate state centralization measure above the threshold and that has a degree of neighborhood factor that meets the predetermined coverage.

title: Federated key management
abstract: The present invention enables enhanced data security in an environment with distributed computing resources.   The system uses information submitted in association with the request to determine whether and how to process the request. The information can be digitally signed by the requestor using the key so that the system that processes the request can verify that the requester has the key and that the information is authentic. The information may include information identifying the owner of the key needed to process the request, and the key owner may be the system or another, possibly third party system. . The request to decrypt the data ensures that a certain amount of time elapses before access to the decrypted data is provided, thereby providing an opportunity to cancel such a request and / or security Can be processed to mitigate violations. title: Diagnosing device for charger
abstract:
PURPOSE: To facilitate operation by diagnosing the charger of a vehicle by a microcomputer-controlled controller according to the rotating speed of an engine which is calculated from the output of a rotation detector, a ripple signal of frequency corresponding to the engine rotation signal of the power output terminal signal of the oil alternator of the charger, a DC component signal, etc.  
     CONSTITUTION: The alternator (ACG) 4 whose electric generation quantity is controlled by the voltage regulator 3 of the charger outputs a three-phase full-wave output from a terminal A in the charging system 1 of the vehicle and a battery 5 is charged through the terminal A. In the 1st processing circuit part 7, the A-terminal output signal of the ACG 4 is amplified 11 through LPF circuits 8 and 9 and a differential amplifier circuit 10 and waveform-shaped by a comparing circuit 12 into a pulse signal synchronized with the ripple signal, so that the signal is inputted to the controller 17. In the 2nd processing circuit 13, the A-terminal output signal of the ACG 4 is inputted to the controller 17 through a voltage dividing circuit 14 and an A/D converter 15. Then, the rotating sped of the engine which is calculated and corrected by the controller 17 is displayed 20.

title: Browser session storage as storage for private key in public-key encryption schema
abstract: An encryption system, method, and computer software program product provides encrypted transmission of data between a server and a web browser application on a client computing device. The system includes an Internet browser; a JavaScript data encryption library; a public key encryption algorithm; a server; and a public private key pair of the user. The JavaScript library loads in user's browser and configured with symmetric and asymmetric encryption libraries and codes. Server sends an encrypted key data to the browser/JavaScript application. The user may then provide their private key and the JavaScript library decrypts the encrypted key data and obtains a symmetric key used to encrypt the data the server transmits to the browser during a session. With the server transmitting data in encrypted form, the browser is configured to decrypt the received data using the JavaScript data encryption library and the private key of the user.

title: Revoking Direct Anonymous Attestation credentials by updating group public/private key pair and only updating valid credentials
abstract: Direct Anonymous Attestation (DAA) involves a Signer (<B>11</B>) using a credential supplied by an Issuer (<B>10</B>) to anonymously prove to a Verifier (<B>12</B>), on the basis of a public key of the Issuer, the Issuer's attestation to the Signer's membership of a particular group. To facilitate membership revocation, the Issuer updates (<B>62</B>) the public key at intervals, and also effects a complementary updating (<B>63</B>) to the Signer's credential unless the Signer has ceased to be a legitimate group member. A non-updated credential is inadequate to enable the Signer (<B>11</B>) to prove its Issuer attested group membership to a Verifier (<B>12</B>) on the basis of the updated Issuer public key. The system can be used with Trusted Platform Modules (TPM).

title: Providing for the omission of root information from depth-related requests according to standard request/response protocols
abstract: Depth-related requests without root-level information or actions according to standard request-response protocols such as HTTP are disclosed. For example, in one embodiment, a method specifies a request, such as a PROPFIND command, for application against a collection, such as a hierarchy of folders. Within a DEPTH header of the request, the method includes a NOROOT token to indicate that root-level information of the collection is unwanted. The request is then output, according to a predetermined transport protocol such as HTTP. In one embodiment, the outputting of the command is also according to a predetermined markup language, such as XML.

title: Sharing a media station
abstract: Disclosed are systems, methods, and non-transitory computer-readable storage media for sharing a media station. A user can share a media station with one or more other users. The sharing user can transmit a share request to share the media station with receiving users. A share link configured to provide access to the shared media station can then be sent to each receiving user. In some embodiments, the shared media station can be tailored or customized for the receiving user. For example, the shared media station can be tailored based on user preference data for the receiving user. To customize the shared media station, a new version of the shared media station can be generated based on one or more media station seeds that define the media station, as well as the user preference data. The newly generated version of the media station can then be provided to the receiving user.

title: System and computer-implemented method for identifying defective chip cards through substandard transaction experiences
abstract: A system and computer-implemented method for analyzing chip card transactions to identify defective chip cards and/or defective chip readers in need of replacement. Constraints are established to define a subset of card transactions. From a full set of card transactions the subset is identified consisting of each card transaction falling within the constraints and occurring at a merchant having a chip reader. From this subset the unique chip cards are identified, and for each unique chip card a percentage of fallback transactions is calculated. The percentage of fallback transactions is compared to a maximum value, and if the percentage of fallback transactions exceeds the maximum value, the chip card is identified as defective. Each defective chip card is reported to the card issuer, along with at least a recommendation to replace the defective chip card. A similar process may be used to identify defective chip readers of particular merchants.

title: Network address allocation
abstract: Apparatus, systems, and methods assign a permanent network address to a user identity, detect access to a network by a node associated with the user identity, generate an identifier associated with the user identity, and send the identifier to the node to enable the node to obtain replacement of a temporary network address allocated to the node, with the permanent network address. Activities may include receiving a release request from a node to release a temporary network address allocated to the node (associated with the user identity), receiving an allocation request (including the identifier) from the node to allocate a permanent network address previously assigned to the user identity, and allocating the permanent network address to the node as a replacement for the temporary network address. Additional apparatus, systems, and methods are disclosed.

Additional apparatus, systems, and methods are disclosed.

title: Power supply for aerosol delivery equipment
abstract: The present invention provides a kind of aerosol delivery equipment.The aerosol delivery equipment includes at least one shell for limiting the reservoir for being configured to keep aerosol precursor composition, and includes heating element and power supply at least one shell.The heating element can be controlled to the component of activation and boil-off gas aerosol precursor composition.The power supply is configured to provide power to heating element to activate the component with boil-off gas aerosol precursor composition.The power supply includes the supercapacitor with graphene ripple struction.

title: Injection moulding appearance module
abstract: An injection moulding appearance module comprises a housing member and an appearance member. The appearance member has a first surface and a second surface which are opposite to each other, wherein the first surface and the second surface have identical ripples, and the ripples on the first surface and the second surface align with each other and change in a alternative convex and concave manner in the same direction, so that the appearance member has uniform wall thickness; and the second surface has multiple reinforcing protruding ribs which are extended in the direction, and are slidably arranged on the housing member in the same direction.

title: Sound quality adjuster
abstract: A sound quality adjusting device is provided that includes means for suppressing ripples while keeping the cepstral length of a cepstrum fixed.   A sound quality adjustment device inputs a desired filter response to the sound quality adjustment device, and calculates a Fourier spectrum of the set filter response input at the desired filter response input portion. Spectrum calculating section 12, a spectrum smoothing processing section 13 for performing a smoothing process on the Fourier spectrum calculated by the spectrum calculating section 12, and a cepstrum for converting the Fourier spectrum smoothed by the spectrum smoothing processing section 13 into a cepstrum. It comprises a calculator 14 and an LMA filter 15 using the cepstrum calculated by the cepstrum calculator 14 as a filter coefficient. The LMA filter 15 includes an input terminal 16 for inputting an audio signal and an output terminal 17 for outputting an audio signal.   [Selection diagram] Fig. 1

title: File printing method, device, system, electronic equipment and storage medium
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a file printing method, apparatus, system, electronic device, and storage medium, the method comprising: generating a user identity verification instruction in response to the received file acquisition request; under the condition that the identity authentication of the user passes, receiving a predetermined file acquisition request, and determining certification data according to the user identity information and the file type in the predetermined file acquisition request; fusing the certification data with a certification template corresponding to the file type to obtain a certification file; and sending the certification file to the file printing terminal. The embodiment of the disclosure can improve the efficiency of issuing the certification documents.

title: Communication system with digital wallet having blank user card and related methods
abstract: A mobile wireless communications device may communicate with a terminal including a first NFC device, the terminal being capable of receiving data from a provisioning server. The mobile wireless communications device may include a housing, a wireless transceiver carried by the housing, a second NFC device carried by the housing, a memory carried by the housing, a display carried by the housing, and a processor carried by the housing and coupled to the wireless transceiver, the second NFC device, the memory, and the display. The processor may be configured to implement a digital wallet including user cards, receive from the terminal, via the second NEC device, a blank user card including user data fields, and fill the user data fields of the blank user card to define a completed user card and send the completed user card to the provisioning server.

title: Authentication system and method for smart card transactions
abstract: An authentication system includes a portable information device, such as a smart card, that is configured to store and process multiple different applications. The smart card is assigned its own digital certificate which contains a digital signature from a trusted certifying authority and a unique public key. Each of the applications stored on the smart card is also assigned an associated certificate having the digital signature of the certifying authority. The system further includes a terminal that is capable of accessing the smart card. The terminal has at least one compatible application which operates in conjunction with an application on the smart card. The terminal is assigned its own certificate which also contains the digital signature from the trusted certifying authority and a unique public key. Similarly, the application on the terminal is given an associated digital certificate. During a transactional session, the smart card and terminal exchange their certificates to authenticate one another. Thereafter, a smart card application is selected and the related certificates for both the smart card application and the terminal application are exchanged between the smart card and terminal to authenticate the applications. Additionally, the cardholder enters a unique PIN into the terminal. The PIN is passed to the smart card for use in authenticating the cardholder. The three-tiered authentication system promotes security in smart card transactions.

title: Device for certificating the transaction of cryptocurrency and cryptocurrency wallet application
abstract: The present invention relates to a cryptocurrency transaction authentication device and a cryptocurrency wallet application using the same. According to one embodiment of the present invention, the cryptocurrency transaction authentication device comprises a first cryptocurrency authentication means having a hardware storage space and storing a private key for a first wallet, and a second cryptocurrency authentication means for transmitting a code to decode a private key for a second wallet stored in a mobile terminal through wireless communication with the mobile terminal. The second wallet is owned by the same user as the first wallet, and is distinguished from the first wallet. Therefore, as one device including the first cryptocurrency authentication means and the second cryptocurrency authentication means is manufactured in the form of a card or USB, a user can keep it conveniently.

title: Reconciliation of indirectly executed exchanges of data using permissioned distributed ledgers
abstract: The disclosed exemplary embodiments include computer-implemented systems, apparatuses, and processes that monitor and reconcile indirectly initiated exchanges of data between network-connected devices and computing systems using a permissioned distributed ledger. For example, an apparatus may obtain and transmit first transaction information characterizing a data exchange to a first computing system. The first computing system may submit a portion of the first transaction information to a second computing system through a programmatic interface inaccessible to the apparatus, and the second computing system may execute the data exchange in accordance with at least the portion of the first transaction information. The apparatus may also obtain at least one element of a distributed ledger that includes encrypted second transaction information characterizing the execution of the data exchange, decrypt the encrypted second transaction data and perform operations that reconcile the first transaction information and the decrypted second transaction information.

title: Using Domain Name System Security Extensions In A Mixed-Mode Environment
abstract: A method relates to generating, by a processing device executing a DNS resolver, a first domain name system (DNS) query comprising a DNS request generated from an application executing on the processing device to query a first DNS server serving a first DNS zone connected to the processing device via a public network, receiving, from the first DNS server, a first resource record comprising a DNS answer to the DNS query, a second resource record comprising a digital signature generated by signing the DNS answer with a first private key of the first DNS zone, a third resource record comprising a first public key for verifying the digital signature, and one or more files for validating a chain of trust of the first public key, determining, by the processing device in view of the one or more files, that the chain of trust of the first public key misses at least one of a trust anchor or a link in the chain of trust, and generating a second DNS query comprising the DNS request to query a second DNS server residing in a private network of the processing device.

title: Transaction management method and apparatus, and program and recording medium thereof
abstract: Transaction management method in an intermediate server intermediates a transaction between a seller terminal and a purchaser terminal. The method includes storing a transaction procedure having a plurality of procedures in a predetermined order for each transaction type, and the attribute information regarding the data to be transmitted or received in each of the plurality of procedures, and transmitting or receiving the data to be transmitted or received between the seller terminal and the purchaser terminal in accordance with the transaction procedure determined by a transaction type and its attribute information in the transaction between the seller terminal and the purchaser terminal.

title: Electronic transaction system, wide area network printing system, and communications terminal
abstract: In an electronic transaction system, a password authenticating section of the portable telephone judges whether the password inputted on the operating section of the accounting control device coincides with the password stored in the portable telephone. If the judgment result is affirmative, the controlling section of the portable telephone controls the communicating section thereof to send a notification that the password matching is established to the accounting control device, and controls an electronic money information altering section thereof to alter the amount of electronic money stored in an electronic money storing section thereof in accordance with the command requesting subtraction of electronic money.

title: System and method for providing service control to a single telephone end terminal from multiple service providers
abstract: A system and method of using multiple service providers to provide subscriber services on a per call basis achieved by using H.323 capability in a gatekeeper to identify call signaling transfer addresses used for each call. Service subscription data is based on the address or alias being used to place or receive a call. Since telephones can have the ability to register multiple addresses simultaneously, the same phone can receive service from multiple providers simultaneously. In addition, it is possible that some of the addresses or aliases used may be part of a private address space such as, for instance, a private branch exchange (PBX) system. This would enable service from a provider that is not a registered public telephone service provider.

title: Method and apparatus for web enabled wireless tour-guide system
abstract: A web enabled wireless personalized and customized virtual tour-guide system includes a wireless tour-guide device and system enabled to access the Internet. The geographic location of the wireless tour-guide device is detected and reported. Intelligent agent software is responsive to a request from the user to create a customized tour program using information accessed at selected Internet web sites or a web site with pre-aggregated information. The intelligent agent uses the created tour program, such as a tour of historical exhibits, to guide the user along the customized tour route by voice and/or graphics, and provides information about each exhibit on the tour. The virtual tour-guide system can personalize each directed tour by taking individual user expressed preferences into account, and can use collaborative filtering of experiences with prior users to suggest other exhibits which may be of interest to the present user. The web enabled wireless tour-guide system is goal directed and interactive, responding like a human tour-guide to the needs of the user.

title: System for group purchasing using blog
abstract: The present invention relates to a joint purchase system and method using a blog, and a sales server thereof. When a sales server sets a transaction price of a product or a service and transmits information of the product or service to a blog server, the blog server is connected to the blog. In addition, the terminal transmits and displays information on goods and services along with a blog to a terminal, and when a terminal user who recognizes the request requests a joint purchase, the sales server accumulates the number of purchases, processes the sales, and setstles the amount. In this way, the POC for the sale of goods or services can be expanded and contribute to the activation of e-commerce.

title: Method and system for generating data packet in different kinds of network
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To reduce quantity for fragmenting datagram into segments and to extend valid network band width associated with packet transmission on a network by comparing the size of a maximum transmission unit(MTU) that can be transmitted at a prescribed route with the sizes of transmitted packets and processing and transmitting the packets when the sizes of the packets are large. SOLUTION: When the datagram segment is larger than MTU of a reception side network, a router fragments the datagram into plural smaller datagrams before the datagram is transmitted. The datagram of 4700 bytes is distributed to four datagrams provided with data of 1170 bytes and the datagram of 1700 bytes is divided into two smaller datagrams of 850 bytes for the network of 1500 bytes by MTU, for example. Data is uniformly distributed among the datagrams, the maximum fragmented size is reduced and the probability of fragmentation can be reduced.

title: Authentication code based payment method using mobile terminal
abstract: PURPOSE: An authentication code based payment method using a mobile terminal is provided to enable a user to apply a payment means except a credit card to an offline service without the payment means such as the credit card. CONSTITUTION: A payment mediation server receives a transmission request of an authentication code from a mobile terminal of a client(S201). The payment mediation server generates the authentication code according to the request of the mobile terminal of the client. The payment mediation server transmits the authentication code to the mobile terminal(S202). The payment mediation server receives the authentication code and payment basic information from a member store terminal. The payment mediation server performs user authentication by comparing the authentication code which transmits to the mobile terminal with the authentication code received from the member store terminal(S205). [Reference numerals] (S201) Requesting an authentication code to a payment mediation server; (S202) Transmitting the authentication code to a mobile terminal; (S203) Inputting the authentication code to a member store terminal; (S204) Transmitting the authentication code to the payment mediation server; (S205) Performing user authentication; (S206) Performing a payment process

abstract: The present invention relates to table ware technical fields, and disclosing one kind can allow people not need to wait in line at clearing, save the clearing dining table of waiting time.It includes table leg, desktop, the desktop central position is equipped with clearing induction zone, desktop is surrounded by waterproof display screen, desktop lower surface is equipped with alarm, wireless signal transmitter, power switch, power cord jack, settles accounts and is equipped with inductor, PLC controller, internal electric source inside the desktop immediately below induction zone；Wherein, waterproof display screen, alarm, wireless signal transmitter, power switch, inductor, internal electric source are connect with PLC controller respectively, and power switch is connect with power cord jack；Waterproof display screen upper surface coated with protective film；With the matching used clearing disk of a kind of clearing dining table, including disk body, disk body bottom is equipped with induction chip matched with clearing dining table.

title: Method and apparatus for giving a contactless authorization for using a vehicle
abstract: The method involves a passenger using a chip card on which call-up information regarding authorization to use is stored, contactless scanning of the information using a sensor system, computer evaluation of the detected information to determine whether permission to use can be granted and storing a recoverable permission information on the card depending on the decision to show the presence of authorization to use. Independent claims are also included for the following: an arrangement for contactlessly granting permission to use a vehicle.

title: Ram daemons
abstract: A method, according to one embodiment, includes identifying data received or generated by one of a plurality of nodes; replicating the data to a plurality of storage components; receiving, at a first node of the plurality of nodes, a request for the data; determining that a cache of the first node does not include the data; identifying a second node of the plurality of nodes that has an identifier indicating that the data is stored in the second node; requesting that the second node of the plurality of nodes service the request; determining that the second node of the plurality of nodes has not responded to the request; identifying a third node of the plurality of nodes that has the identifier; requesting that the third node of the plurality of nodes service the request; retrieving the response to the request; and providing the data to the first node.

title: Safety burglar mesh with metal grilles
abstract: The invention provides a safety burglar mesh with metal grilles. The safety burglar mesh with metal grilles is provided with a rectangular frame formed by stainless steel square tube welding, the inner and outer double layer structure is adopted in the frame, wherein the inner layer is burglar mesh, the outer layer is composed of metal grilles, and the inner layer and the outer layer share one frame. The metal grilles are fixedly welded on the inner side of the four sides of the frame. The burglar mesh comprises a plurality of horizontally arranged transverse grids and vertically arranged vertical grids. The two ends of the transverse grids are fixedly welded on the inner side of the left and the right sides of the frame, a plurality of uniformly distributed nodes are arranged along the length direction of the stainless steel bars of the transverse grids, the stainless steel bars forms an oval plate at each node by forging, and the center of the oval plate is also provided with through holes. The middle part of the vertical grid is penetrated through the through holes corresponding to each transverse grid and is fixedly welded, the two ends of the vertical grid are fixedly welded on the inner side of the upper and the lower sides of the frame, and thus the grids of the burglar mesh is formed. The metal grilles of the safety burglar mesh with metal grilles can be seen in the external appearance, and therefore the burglar mesh is more beautiful; a new type of structure is used in the inner layer of the burglar mesh, and therefore the burglar mesh is  securer.

title: A kind of method of quick determination functional coating thickness parameter
abstract: The invention discloses a kind of method of quick determination functional coating thickness parameter, suction ripple layer is prepared using antiradar coatings, antiradar coatings even application on polytetrafluoroethylene, controlling to inhale ripple thickness degree for 0.08mm~0.2mm, is solidified afterwards；Suction ripple layer after solidification is taken off from polytetrafluoroethylene, is cut into polylith and metallic plate size, shape identical is block；Using epoxy resin as matrix, matching layer is prepared on polytetrafluoroethylene using calcium carbonate, glass fibre, silica or hollow glass micropearl as filler；The thickness for controlling matching layer is 0.08mm~0.2mm, is solidified afterwards；Matching layer after solidification is taken off from polytetrafluoroethylene, is cut into polylith and metallic plate size, shape identical is block；It is combined, is sticked in cohesive mode on each metallic plate to inhaling ripple layer, matching layer, produces the functional material coating model of multiple different parameters combinations.

title: A kind of distributive type Computational frame of the lower coupling of master/slave framework
abstract: The embodiment of the invention provides a kind of distributive type Computational frames of the lower coupling of master/slave framework, comprising: the work of Distributed Services environment, cluster management host node, cluster is from the service processing node of node, cluster；The Distributed Services environment is used to store operating status, load condition and the execution status of task of each distributed node；The cluster management host node is used to manage the operating status of clustered node, and to each clustered node distributed tasks；The work of the cluster is used to execute the task that the cluster management host node is distributed from node, and the intermediate result of task execution is cached in Kafka；The service processing node of the cluster obtains business result for consuming the message generated in Kafka.The stream data that can be suitable in a variety of situations is handled, sufficiently decoupling between module, be can be realized dynamic reducing and expansion appearance, is realized the redundancy backup of data, the back mechanism of host node is able to achieve reliability of service.

title: A kind of double bubble clad type sealing strips of automobile door frame
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of double bubble clad type sealing strips of automobile door frame, it is related to auto parts field.The sealing strip includes taking the shape of the letter U structure for the clamping part for being caught in doorframe metal plate seam, the sealing being connected as a single entity with clamping part and interior trim overlap joint lip, and interior trim overlaps lip one end and the blind end of clamping part connects, and the other end with trim panel for mutually overlapping；Sealing is in hollow double bubble structures, upper foaming portion and lower foaming portion including interconnection and the horizontal support for separating upper foaming portion and lower foaming portion, lower foaming portion connects clamping part, there is the compression section in ripple struction in the middle part of upper foaming portion, reinforcement is provided with lower foaming portion, reinforcement is obliquely installed, one end connection horizontal support, other end connection clamping part.The sealing strip has the rebound performance of high intensity, and can ensure sealing while effort to close is reduced, and improves sealing strip service life.

title: Method and system for personal data service based on secure computation
abstract: A method for protecting user privacy for a privacy protection application, includes: receiving a request for user data of a user from a third-party service; receiving, from the user, an authorization for the request for the user data; acquiring the user data from a plurality of different storage facilities; processing the acquired user data with a data model provided by the third party service, wherein the data model comprises a multi-party computation model configured to generate processed user data based on the user data stored at the plurality of different storage facilities; encrypting the processed user data using a third-party public key associated with the third-party service; and transmitting the encrypted processed user data to the third-party service to enable the third-party service to decrypt the encrypted processed user data to obtain the processed user data.

title: System and method for facilitating point of sale transactions with minimal transfer of sensitive data
abstract: Disclosed herein are a system and method for facilitating point of sale transactions with minimal transfer of sensitive data corresponding to a consumer or merchant. The system and method comprise connecting to a central banking system using a communications apparatus for connecting to a landline or mobile communications network. The communications apparatus is coupled to one or more slots for receiving a merchant digital token and a consumer digital token storing merchant public and private keys and consumer public and private keys, respectively. The merchant and consumer public keys are used to identify the merchant and consumer, respectively, to the central banking system. The merchant and consumer private keys are used to sign, and thereby authenticate, a merchant sign-on agreement and a payment authorization form, respectively.

title: Permutation data transformation to enhance security
abstract: A data transformation is initiated that permutates certain bits in a data input based on other bits in the data input. Another data transformation raises one segment of data input to the power of another segment's function, where k is mutually different for a function of a predetermined modulus. Apply this algebraic coefficient to the result and assemble the transformed data. Hashing a segment of the master key is an important application of derivation. Get two numbers from the other segment of the master key. Applies a general-purpose hash function to the result of the hash, from which the bits selected are derived keys. According to another embodiment, the encoded counter is combined with segments of the master key. Hash the result and select the derived bits as derived keys. These algorithms can be combined with each other and combined with key wrapping or encryption algorithms to increase the security of these other applications.

title: Virtual card number transaction record
abstract: A mobile device obtains 303 a payment token e.g. a single use virtual card number (VCN), uses it in a transaction 305, obtains a receipt of the transaction e.g. an e-receipt using NFC or Bluetooth (RTM) or by capturing an image of a physical receipt, and associates the receipt and record of the used token 309. A master record of all tokens may be kept on the device or a separate server. The token may be presented to a merchant wirelessly or by barcode e.g. QR code. The transaction may be associated with other information provided when requesting the token such as transaction description, purpose, location and user identity. In a business context employee spending can be easily recorded for auditing and expense claims as receipts are automatically associated with payment records. If a token was not used to make a purchase a token may be assigned and recorded alongside the receipt along with an indication it was not used to make the purchase.

title: An energy resource network
abstract: An energy resource network (100) comprising: a plurality of energy resources (102, 104) each capable of delivering a quantum of energy; and a plurality of energy-consuming- devices (106, 108) each capable of accepting a quantum of energy. Each energy resource (102, 104) is associated with an energy-resource-processor (110, 112), which is configured to issue one or more offer-messages in respect of a quantum of energy available for supply from the energy resource (102, 104). Each energy-consuming-device (106, 108) is associated with an energy-consuming-processor (114, 116) that is configured to receive one or more offer-messages in respect of a transaction for receiving a quantum of energy from one of the energy resources (102, 104). The energy-resource- processor (110, 112) and / or the energy-consuming-processor (114, 116) being configured to issue a cryptographically-secured transaction record of the transaction for inclusion within a publicly-available distributed ledger.
text: An energy resource network An energy resource network (100) comprising: a plurality of energy resources (102, 104) each capable of delivering a quantum of energy; and a plurality of energy-consuming- devices (106, 108) each capable of accepting a quantum of energy. Each energy resource (102, 104) is associated with an energy-resource-processor (110, 112), which is configured to issue one or more offer-messages in respect of a quantum of energy available for supply from the energy resource (102, 104). Each energy-consuming-device (106, 108) is associated with an energy-consuming-processor (114, 116) that is configured to receive one or more offer-messages in respect of a transaction for receiving a quantum of energy from one of the energy resources (102, 104). The energy-resource- processor (110, 112) and / or the energy-consuming-processor (114, 116) being configured to issue a cryptographically-secured transaction record of the transaction for inclusion within a publicly-available distributed ledger.

title: Method for protecting user card
abstract: A method for ensuring safety of user card includes setting a safety cipher key in user card and setting verification device then setting said cipher key in verification device , carrying out certification on verification device according to safety cipher key set in user card for judging whether user card is legally used or not and responding to relevant access request if it is or otherwise refusing relevant access request when relevant access is carried out to user card .

title: Smart vending machine allowing product to be selected by opening door
abstract: A smart vending machine allowing a product to be selected by opening a door according to the present invention comprises: a main body comprising a product storage space for storing products on a plurality of shelves, a reader for identifying at least one payment means from among cash, a credit card, and a smartphone of a user, and a product selection identifier for identifying a product picked up by a customer; a door for opening and closing the main body; a lock part having a lock function for locking the door and an open function for unlocking the door; and a controller comprising a payment means identification module for unlocking the lock part when the reader identifies the payment means, a payment module for performing, via the payment means, a payment for the product identified by the product selection identifier as having been picked up, and a lock module for locking the lock part when the payment module completes the payment. The smart vending machine of a product selection type through door opening and closing according to the present invention opens the door after the payment means is authenticated to allow a customer to directly touch, see, and select various products and then make a payment, and thus has an effect of providing fun to select a product and trust in the products.

title: Contents distribution system and contents distribution method
abstract: A contents distribution system includes: a distribution request reception unit (34) for receiving a distribution request from a user terminal (1); a route search unit (32) for searching a communication route; a band measurement unit (33) for measuring a remaining band which can be used in the communication line; a distribution decision unit (37) for permitting distribution of contents when all the communication lines have a remaining band not smaller than a predetermined band; a route information accumulation unit (6) for recording the band change for each time in the remaining band of the respective communication lines; a reservation management unit (35) for receiving a reservation request from the user terminal; and a user management unit (36) for registering reservation information in a user database (4). According to the band of the respective communication line obtained by subtracting the band of communication line reserved from the band, the distribution decision unit (37) decides whether to enable distribution of contents data. This enables a VOD service not generating quality lowering of the contents data distributed but preventing the increase of the communication load, and improves the quality of the VOD service.

abstract: This application involves the data processings of big data processing field, in particular to Data Migration namely a kind of refund processing method, device, computer equipment and storage medium.The described method includes: it is corresponding to repayment amount and refund limit to obtain current account；When described when repayment amount is higher than the refund limit, then split to obtain the current fractionation amount of money to repayment amount by described；The request of first turn of money is sent to correspondent bank server according to the current fractionation amount of money, and receive that the correspondent bank server returns turns first turn of corresponding money result of money request with described.It can be avoided artificial nucleus using this method to check account list and identity information waste plenty of time, and when refunding unsuccessful, directly carry out splitting amount of money refund, then it is whole to improve treatment effeciency.

title: Systems and methods for token-based reimbursement and disbursement
abstract: The development of new therapeutic treatments is efficiently financed through a tokenized funding mechanism. Tokens associated with a treatment such as a pharmaceutical are issued by a company developing the pharmaceutical and are purchasable either as an investment in the future success of the pharmaceutical or to mitigate the future cost associated with use of the pharmaceutical. Proceeds of the sale of tokens may fund development of the pharmaceutical and each token may initially represent a part of one pharmaceutical dose. The tokens may be purchased by individuals, investment funds, or insurers, are tradeable on an electronic exchange, and may have a defined or adjustable future redemption value. Revenue generated from pharmaceutical sales may be distributed to token holders. Prioritization in revenue distribution may account for token holder utilization of the products or services of the token issuer and may affect when and how many tokens may be redeemed.

title: Systems and methods for identifying original streams of media content
abstract: Systems and methods for identifying original streams of media content are disclosed. An exemplary method involves identifying at least one media content identifier in a media content directory. The media content identifier identifies media content. A plurality of stream access identifiers may be associated with the media content identifier. The method also involves identifying at least one stream access identifier of the plurality of stream access identifiers that includes access information for accessing an original stream of data from a media file comprising the media content. The method also involves providing identifier information about the at least one stream access identifier to a client in response to a client request.

title: System, method, and computer-accessible medium for blocking malicious EMV transactions
abstract: An exemplary system, method, and computer-accessible medium can include, for example, storing on a first device an applet configured to generate a digital tag; receiving a request at the first device for information; configuring the digital tag to be associated with at least one of (i) an application or (ii) an input on a second device, such that receipt of the digital tag by a second device causes the application to launch on the second device; and emitting from the first device a digital tag.

title: System and methods for online authentication
abstract: A method of authenticating a network client to a relying party computer via a computer server comprises the computer server receiving a transaction code from a token manager via a first communications channel. The network client is configured to communicate with a token manager which is configured to communicate with a hardware token interfaced therewith. The network client is also configured to communicate with the relying party computer and the computer server. The computer server also receives a transaction pointer from the relying party computer via a second communications channel that is distinct from the first communications channel. Preferably, the transaction pointer is unpredictable by the computer server. The computer server transmits an authorization signal to the relying party computer in accordance with a correlation between the transaction code and the transaction pointer. The authorization signal facilitates authentication of the network client to the relying party computer.

title: A kind of sequential control method for Radar Signal Processing
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of sequential control method for Radar Signal Processing, belong to signal processing technology field.By handling multiple ripple position data packings, data are transmitted in measurement processor, the transmitting procedure surveyed in high disposal device and communication controller according to four SECO steps of the invention, effectively reduce the congestion degree, complexity and error rate of data transfer, the transmission rate of data is improved, greatly strengthen the ability of radar processing data.The process signal time is short, ensures the accuracy of radar detection instruction target.Method is simple to operate, and signal transacting effect is good.Solve prior art and use the processing method that a ripple position data are only handled in leading periodic signal, when ripple position is switched to the short cycle by long period, loss of data phenomenon occurs, causes signal processing time length, result error, has a strong impact on the problem of radar indicates target accuracy.

title: Monolithic Cuk switch power circuit
abstract: The utility model relates to a monolithic Cuk switch power circuit consisting of an input low pass filter, a rectification filter circuit, a switch spike absorbing circuit, a Cuk high-frequency converter, a one-chip switch power supply integrated circuit IC2 and a voltage-stabilizing feedback control circuit, wherein the input low pass filter and the rectification filter circuit are connected with the Cuk high-frequency converter; one end of the switch spike absorbing circuit is connected with an output end of the rectification filter circuit, and the other end thereof is connected with a drain electrode of the one-chip switch power supply integrated circuit IC2; one end of the voltage-stabilizing feedback control circuit is connected with an output end of the Cuk high-frequency converter, and the other end thereof is connected with the one-chip switch power supply integrated circuit IC2; and an input end of the Cuk high-frequency converter is connected with the one-chip switch power supply integrated circuit IC2. The circuit can realize continuous transmission of power energy, and has the advantages of small output ripple wave spike, strong loading capacity, lower cost and the like.

title: Intracranial arterial stent
abstract: The utility model discloses an intracranial arterial stent which comprises a bare stent. The bare stent comprises a plurality of sets of circular supporting units (10) arranged along an identical central axis and connecting units (20) connected between two adjacent sets of supporting units (10), and the circumferential unfolding structures of the supporting units (10) are ripple structures. The intracranial arterial stent can prevent vascular restenosis from occurring, and improves the therapeutic effect of intracranial arterial stenosis.

title: Method for secure device discovery and introduction
abstract: A first message is transmitted over a communication channel to initiate a transaction. The first message contains a random number and a public key of a device. Continuing the transaction, a second message is received. The second message also contains a random number and a public key of a second device. At least one message is received that contains a proof-of-possession of the device's password, along with a credential that is encrypted with a credential key.

abstract: The invention discloses a kind of corrugated composite endergonic device and rail vehicles, device includes anti-creep tooth plate, energy-absorbing component and rear baffle, the back side of anti-creep tooth plate connects guide rod, energy-absorbing component includes corrugated flow energy-absorbing component and enhanced energy-absorbing component, corrugated flow energy-absorbing component is the cylinder with a central through hole, it is enclosed and is set by the guiding flow pipe and corrugated plating of several alternate settings, enhanced energy-absorbing assembly set is set in central through hole, the free end of guide rod is inserted in affixed in the guide through hole opened up on rear baffle after guiding flow pipe, contact the both ends of energy-absorbing component with anti-creep tooth plate and rear baffle respectively.Rail vehicle with above-mentioned apparatus can controllably occur according to preset ripple path steady ordered, relatively traditional endergonic structure present invention has more stable load --- displacement curve, it does not have excessively high initial spike power, it can be effectively prevented from and generate moment biggish load in impact endergonic process, further decrease the damage to occupant and car body.

title: Network user identity authentication method and system
abstract: Provided are a network user identity authentication method and system. The network user identity authentication method comprises: collecting all webpage browsing records of a legitimate user within a set time period as a session, and processing each of the browsing records into a pattern of a website top-level domain name, a content class and a time stamp; and acquiring m sessions of the legitimate user, and performing the following processing for each of the sessions: obtaining n feature values of a webpage browsed by the user according to the session; processing the acquired feature values according to a set third algorithm, so as to obtain a weight matrix corresponding to the feature values; obtaining a score of the session by means of calculation according to the feature values and the corresponding weight matrix; and obtaining a classification threshold value of the legitimate user by means of calculation by using a fourth algorithm according to the score of the session. According to the technical solution of the present invention, continuous authentication is begun from the three aspects of a browsed and recorded website, content and time, so that the authentication effect is improved.

title: Secure communications between devices and a trusted server
abstract: A method of establishing secure communication between a first mobile computing device and a second mobile computing device includes generating a first self-signed key at the first mobile computing device, pairing the first device with a second device, the pairing including receiving user input of a passcode and after receiving the user input sending the first public key to the second mobile computing device and receiving a second public key from the second mobile computing device, storing the second public key in a database of trusted devices, the database of trusted devices being stored in the first mobile computing device, receiving in the first mobile computing device a list of mobile computing devices connected to a mobile network, matching the list of mobile computing device against the database of trusted devices, and establishing secure communication between the first mobile computing device and the second mobile computing device.

title: Method for Providing Asynchronous Reverse Direction Payment by using Affiliated Store's Mobile Device with Sound Signal Sending and Cryptocurrency
abstract: The present invention relates to an asynchronous reverse payment method using an affiliated store wireless terminal for transmitting a sound wave signal and cryptocurrency, capable of solving various technical and/or security defects, which comprises: a first step of receiving uniquely generated identification (UGID) by an operating server; a second step of generating a one-time authentication code by the operating server; a third step of associating and storing transaction registration information, the UGID, and the authentication code by the operating server; a fourth step of receiving recognition information by the operating server; a fifth step of authenticating validity of the transaction registration information by the operating server; a sixth step of providing transaction information by the operating server; a seventh step of confirming a result of a cryptocurrency transaction procedure; and an eighth step of providing cryptocurrency-based payment result information.

title: Distributed network and ecosystem based on innovative proof-of-reputation consensus protocol
abstract: Disclosed is a distributed network and ecosystem based on an innovative proof-of-reputation consensus protocol. The system consists of an application layer, a virtual machine, an incentive layer, a consensus layer, a network layer, and a data layer. The data structure of a directed acyclic graph (DAG) is used to maintain the forward expansibility of the system, the light node client on a smartphone is supported to combat the decentralization of the system, the dispersibility is maintained, more reliable security is provided, a friendly DApp and sidechain development environment is provided to satisfy the technical requirements of some applications in large-file storage, low transaction costs, user information protection, sidechain and smart contract iteration, and Bug fixing, and the problems of expansibility and dispersibility of a blockchain are solved. The system is currently the most feasible blockchain ecosystem for high-frequency micro-micro transactions and social applications. Users enhance reputation values by means of active social interaction and active use of business applications in the ecosystem, so as to increase the probability of being selected as trusted light nodes. The system is easy to promote and use.

title: The method and system of resource numerical value transfer
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of method and system of resource numerical value transfer, including：Resource payment terminal includes subscriber identity information and resource numerical value transinformation resource numerical value transfer request to resource receiving terminal by the point-to-point transmissions of NFC, resource receiving terminal verifies resource numerical value transfer request, if be proved to be successful, resource numerical value transfer request is sent to server；Server judges whether resource payment terminal is online, if online, sends resource numerical value and shifts authorization requests to resource payment terminal, so that its corresponding first authorization message of acquisition is used as current grant information, and returns current grant information to the server；If not online, then resource numerical value transfer request carries the second authorization message of unique timeliness, server resolving resource numerical value transfer request packet obtains the second authorization message as current grant information, resource numerical value transfer is carried out according to current grant information, subscriber identity information and resource numerical value transinformation, the success rate of resource numerical value transfer is improved.

title: Systems and methods for an account issuer to manage a mobile wallet
abstract: A system may be configured to perform operations and/or steps comprising querying, by an issuer server, a network server for an alias associated with a transaction account. The issuer server may receive the alias from the network server. The issuer server may also send the alias to an issuer application. The operations may also comprise validating, by the issuer server, an account validation input entered into the issuer application. The issuer server may send an issuer signature criteria that indicate whether the account validation input is valid. The issuer application may add an alias associated with the account to a digital wallet.

title: The method and system to pay for donation without keying-in beneficiary account id
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for safely and conveniently delivering a condolence to a resident or a resident even without knowing the account number of the resident or the resident. A cash service is provided when the sender sends the name of the consignee to the cash service server using a mobile phone. The server inquires the grant recipient account ID matched with the grant recipient name in the consignee DB, and the sender sends the card ID, the remittance amount and the cash service authentication information to the cash service server by using the mobile phone. And verifying the cash service authentication information and determining whether the remittance amount is within the cash service remaining limit, and cash processing as much as the remittance amount with respect to the card ID, and depositing the deposit processing amount reflecting the remittance amount into the high receipt money account ID. It features.
