title: Network interface module with minimized data paths
abstract: NETWORK INTERFACE MODULE WITH MINIMIZED DATA PATHS                  ABSTRACT       A  multi-processor,   multi-tasking  virtual  machine   comprises processes, messages, and contexts.   Processes communicate only through messages.   Contexts  are  groups of related  processes.   The  virtual machine   is  implemented  in  a  distributed  data  processing  system comprising  a  plurality of individual cells coupled by  a  local  area network  (LAN).  Each  cell may comprise one or more processes  and/or contexts.   A  network  interface module (NIM) provides  the  interface between  any  individual  cell and  the  LAN.   To  facilitate  message transmission between processes resident on different cells, each NIM is provided  with  tables identifying the locations of resident  and  non-resident  processes,  respectively.   Cells may be added to or  deleted from the LAN without disrupting the LAN operations.
text: Network interface module with minimized data paths NETWORK INTERFACE MODULE WITH MINIMIZED DATA PATHS ABSTRACT A multi-processor, multi-tasking virtual machine comprises processes, messages, and contexts. Processes communicate only through messages. Contexts are groups of related processes. The virtual machine is implemented in a distributed data processing system comprising a plurality of individual cells coupled by a local area network (LAN). Each cell may comprise one or more processes and/or contexts. A network interface module (NIM) provides the interface between any individual cell and the LAN. To facilitate message transmission between processes resident on different cells, each NIM is provided with tables identifying the locations of resident and non-resident processes, respectively. Cells may be added to or deleted from the LAN without disrupting the LAN operations.

title: Method and apparatus for electronic filing of income tax returns by a taxpayer
abstract: The present invention is a unique business process system that looks like a free-standing ATM, internet access kiosk, video game, or check cashing kiosk. The present invention is a self-service tax preparation and electronic filing (e*file) device for Federal and State income tax returns. The Present invention allows consumers without access to a computer, the internet, a major credit card or a bank account to take advantage of electronic filing, direct deposit, refund anticipation loans (RAL), refund anticipation cashier's checks (RAC), and refund transfers (RT) without having to hire and pay a human tax preparer. The present invention will be placed in public locations, such as discount stores, grocery stores, postal service stores, malls, colleges and universities, and other retail or public locations. While using existing hardware and software that are in the public domain, the present invention's unique business process eliminates the need to pay live preparer fees, allows all taxpayers to access electronic filing and bank products, and reduces fee loads for lower income taxpayers while still allowing them access to now unavailable products such as e*file and RAL. The present invention is novel and unobvious in that all tax preparation has previously required either self preparation on paper, visiting a paid preparer, or owning a computer with access to the internet. It is useful in that it greatly expands access to e*filing and bank products (RAL, RAC, RT) and sharply reduces consumer costs for using these services.

title: Automated payment collection system and method
abstract: An automated system for electronic payment to one or more departments or agencies within a city, township, county, local or state government. The system has a plurality of separate agency or department databases and an icon or module menu of each department at a payment kiosk or payment computer connected to each database. Activating the icon or selecting the module directs a payor to the desired agency or department database. Inputting the payor information into the kiosk or payment computer generates an invoice to be paid. An integrated system provides the payor requested invoice of a bill, fee, tax or fine for that department or agency and simultaneously checks the payor information against each other database for any outstanding bills, fees, taxes or fines and generates a list of said outstanding bills, fees, taxes or fines.

title: Link usage
abstract: A method for providing usage data for links in a resource. The method involves maintaining a link usage data for each of the links within a resource, such as a web page, and adjusting a copy of the resource to incorporate the link usage data associated with each link. A user can access the adjusted copy of the resource from a device connected to a network, such as the Internet, to display the link usage data with each associated link. The link usage data can be that collected for a selected period of time by the user.

title: Apparatus and method for an electronic telephone wallet and/or communication device wallet
abstract: An apparatus and method for providing an electronic wallet device, including a memory device for storing payment identifier information associated with an account holder, a processing device for processing a payment command, wherein the processing device retrieves the payment identifier information from the memory device, and a transmitter for transmitting the payment identifier information to a merchant computer, wherein the merchant computer is associated with a merchant, and further wherein the payment identifier information is utilized in a transaction with the merchant.

title: Systems and methods for managing multiple accounts on a rf transaction instrument
abstract: Systems and methods are configured to manage data sets associated with a transaction instrument. For example, a method is provided for facilitating the management of distinct data sets on a transaction instrument that are provided by distinct data set owners, wherein the distinct data sets may include differing formats. The method includes the steps of: adding, by a read/write, a first data set to the financial transaction instrument, wherein the first data set is owned by a first owner; adding, by the read/write device, a second data set to the financial transaction instrument, wherein the second data set is owned by a second owner; and storing the first data set and the second data set on the financial transaction instrument in accordance with an owner defined format. The first and second data sets may each be stored as a Block of Binary. Furthermore, the first data set may be updated and/or deleted from the financial transaction instrument by the data owner or the transaction instrument user, in real-time or substantially real-time or at a later date. In another example, a financial transaction instrument comprises a data set management system for facilitating the management of more than one data set, the transaction instrument comprising at least one data storage area configured to store a first data set of a first format and a second data set of a second format different than the first format. The first and second data sets are associated with first and second owners, respectively, and are configured to be stored independent of each other. In yet another example, the data sets may be stored on a remote database under the identical arrangement as is stored on the transaction instrument.

title: Computer-controlled, unattended, automated checkout store outlet system and related method
abstract: An unattended, automated checkout, computer-controlled automated store outlet and system is disclosed. A customer's identification and payment information are inputted and verified and the customer qualified to remove items from the automated store outlet. Each bay of the automated store outlet is normally locked, and after the customer accesses the bay can remove one or more items from the bay, which are automatically detected and identified and charged to the customer as part of the purchase transaction. These events occur at the location of each automated store outlet. Each automated store outlet communicates with a central control center, which can be used for live customer service and real time surveillance.

title: Remote services delivery architecture
abstract:
The invention relates to a remote services architecture which includes: a
remote services infrastructure. The infrastructure controls remote service delivery
and provides remote services data management. The service module, interacts with
the remote services infrastructure to provide a specific service. The service module is
segmented from the remote services infrastructure. Additionally, the invention relates
to a remote services infrastructure architecture which includes: a remote services
proxy and an applications server. The remote services proxy provides
communications flow management. The applications server is coupled to the remote
services proxy module. The application server provides persistent storage of remote
services infrastructure information

title: System and method for maintaining a communication session over gatekeeper failure
abstract: The present invention provides a method for maintaining a communication session between telephony devices, which includes establishing a first TCP/IP signaling communication link between a first telephony device and a proxy. The first TCP/IP signaling communication link is operable to communicate first keep alive signals between the proxy and the first telephony device. A second TCP/IP signaling communication link is established between a primary gatekeeper and the proxy. The second TCP/IP signaling communication link is operable to communicate second keep alive signals between the proxy and the primary gatekeeper. The first and second TCP/IP signaling communication links are terminated at the proxy. Therefore, a communication session between the first telephony device and a second telephony device may be maintained even if the second keep alive signals are interrupted.

title: Dns name resolution system, override agent, and dns name resolution method
abstract: A DNS name resolution system according to the present invention has a DNS server; a terminal which generates and transmits a DNS query packet containing DNS name information described in accordance with a specific description method and whose destination is said DNS server; and an override agent which is disposed along a communication path between the terminal and the DNS server. The override agent has a capture unit which captures a DNS query packet transmitted from the terminal; an analysis unit which stores in advance information concerning the specific description method based on which the DNS name information was described by the terminal, analyzes the DNS name information contained in the DNS query packet captured by the capture unit based on the specific description method, and selects the information for reply to the terminal based on the analysis results; and a reply unit which generates and transmits a DNS response packet containing the information for reply selected by the analysis unit and whose destination is the terminal

title: Systems and methods for employing tagged types in a dynamic runtime environment
abstract: The present invention is directed to a system and method for facilitating dynamic programming language execution in a managed code environment. A class component is provided that declares an inheritance hierarchy for one or more tagged values associated with a dynamic programming language. During the execution of a tag value, a rule component mitigates the user-defined type from deriving or inheriting an attribute from the tag type value in order to support a type safe runtime environment. On one side of the tree, a branched class tree is provided that defines non-tagged type elements on the other branches of the tree. The rule component analyzes a runtime extension that allows to prevent data from one component of the tree from being derived or inherited from another component of the tree. The runtime extension includes cast class extensions, test class extensions, and conversion class extensions that convert data types from one class subtype to another.

title: Secure authentication of a user of a device during a session with a connected server
abstract: A computer-implemented method for secure authentication of a user to a service for executing a transaction, the method being implemented in a system including a user device including a FIDO-client, a FIDO-server of a relying party providing the service, a behaviometric server and a web server associated with the relying party, the method including a preparation stage and an authentication stage. In the preparation stage a TLS-connection is established between the user device and the web-server, behavioral input data is collected from user device, and a transaction initiation message is transmitted to the behaviometric server. In the authentication stage, behaviometric data received in the transaction initiation message is compared to a second set of behaviometric data to determine whether the data matches, and if the data matches, the transaction is authenticated by the FIDO server.

title: Method of reading guiding indicator for unattended track
abstract:
PURPOSE: To attain accurate detection of running distance by comparing a detection output with a prescribed threshold value in reading an index by a line segment detection means.  
     CONSTITUTION: A voltage signal from a metallic sensor 10 is fed to an negative input of a subtraction circuit 32 via an input terminal 31 of an interruption signal generating circuit 11 and a threshold value is fed to an positive input from a threshold value setting device 33. The subtraction circuit 32 applies subtraction of the two inputs, gives a subtraction signal to a Schmitt circuit 34 comprising an operational amplifier, a minute ripple noise eliminated and only the signal is outputted. When the output voltage of the Schmitt circuit 34 goes to an L level, a collector voltage of a transistor (TR) 35 goes to an H level, a one-shot multivibrator circuit 37 is triggered to output a leading interruption signal S 1 . When the output voltage goes to an H level, the collector voltage of a TR 36 goes to an H level, a one-shot circuit 38 is triggered to output a trailing interruption signal S 2 .

title: Ripple cancelling circuit of motor driving apparatus
abstract: (57) [Abstract] [Purpose] To provide a ripple cancel circuit that suitably cancels ripples in the same integrated circuit device regardless of the motor model and realizes smooth driving of the motor. A circuit 9 for generating a ripple cancellation signal for reducing a ripple generated when a motor is driven is provided in an integrated circuit device 1, and a terminal 14 to which a resistor R for setting the ripple cancellation rate can be externally attached. It is provided in the device 1. In this case, the output current I  2  of the current mirror circuit 8 having the servo current I  1  as an input current is supplied to the ripple cancel signal generation circuit 9, and the current I  2  is supplied.   Is determined by resistance R.

title: Component standardization management method and device, computer equipment and readable storage medium
abstract: The invention relates to artificial intelligence, and provides a component standardized management method, a device, computer equipment and a readable storage medium, wherein the method comprises the following steps: receiving a to-be-processed component sent by a providing user side and executing a providing end process so as to construct an interface in the to-be-processed component to obtain a standard component; receiving a calling request sent by an access user terminal and executing an access terminal process, so as to obtain a standard component according to the calling request sent by the access user terminal or assemble the standard component to form a standard module according to the calling request, and establishing communication connection between the standard component or the standard module and the access user terminal. The invention also relates to a blockchain technique, where information can be stored in blockchain nodes. The invention obtains the standard component for the component to be processed provided by the user side and obtains the corresponding standard component or standard module according to the calling request of the access user side, thereby avoiding the occurrence of the situation of repeated development of the computer system of the access user side.

title: Information diffusion system, information diffusion device, information diffusion method, and information diffusion program
abstract: To reduce the occurrence of information leakage in a network-connected information terminal.   A fake information generating apparatus includes a distributed network consisting of distributed nodes connected to each other and a fake information generating apparatus connected to the distributed network and providing information to the distributed node. The main unit 105 that collects information related to actual individuals, groups, and companies as specific information, and processing modification of the collected specific information is performed to generate individual processing information. title: Encryption and decryption method and system for chip authorization
abstract: The invention discloses an encryption method for chip authorization, which can encrypt a chip of an integrated circuit with a processing function, and comprises the following steps: and the chip encryption end acquires a ciphertext through a first set encryption algorithm according to the chip identification information and the private key information. And the chip encryption end stores the chip identification information, the ciphertext and the public key information in the chip so as to authorize the chip. The invention also discloses a decryption method of the chip authorization and an encryption and decryption system of the chip authorization. The completely offline authorization scheme of the method is suitable for how to finish authorization service when the memory resources of the chip are in shortage, and can avoid unnecessary resource waste caused by adding a BT/WIFI module for authorizing the IOT when the chip is considered to be fused with other modules, and the scheme also has certain safety, and ensures the safety of the algorithm aiming at different DSP firmware of each different product.

title: Distributed management of user privacy information
abstract: Methods and systems for managing user privacy information in a distributed fashion are provided. In one embodiment, a method is provided that may include receiving an identity with device information that is less sensitive and user information that is more sensitive. The user information may then be encrypted and stored on a repository, and indications of the encrypted device information and the encrypted user information may be stored on a distributed ledger. The method may further include enforcing a first access policy on the encrypted device information and a second access policy on encrypted user information.
text: Distributed management of user privacy information Methods and systems for managing user privacy information in a distributed fashion are provided. In one embodiment, a method is provided that may include receiving an identity with device information that is less sensitive and user information that is more sensitive. The user information may then be encrypted and stored on a repository, and indications of the encrypted device information and the encrypted user information may be stored on a distributed ledger. The method may further include enforcing a first access policy on the encrypted device information and a second access policy on encrypted user information.

title: Method for buying and selling a crypto currency based on artificial intelligence, and Terminal device performing the method
abstract: Disclosed are a method for selling a cryptocurrency and a method for buying a cryptocurrency based on artificial intelligence and a terminal device performing the same which efficiently buy and sell a cryptocurrency. The terminal device buys and sells a cryptocurrency based on artificial intelligence. The terminal device comprises: a memory to store commands readable by a computer; and a processor realized to execute the commands. The processor uses at least one between a moving average line for specific time zones calculated by using previous market price information of the cryptocurrency and an emotion of a cryptocurrency-related posting posed on SNS to determine whether to buy the cryptocurrency and uses a profit rate of the cryptocurrency if buying the cryptocurrency, a standard deviation of a closing price of the cryptocurrency in a preset time zone calculated by using the previous market price information of the cryptocurrency, and a slope in accordance with a current price of the cryptocurrency and a predicted closing price of the next day of the cryptocurrency to determine whether to sell the cryptocurrency.

title: Systems and methods to electronically sign a delivered package
abstract: A method comprising: receiving, on a smartphone (102; 504), authorization to receive a delivery of at least one physical package requested by a particular order part, where authorization includes receiving a private key associated with the part of particular order; identify (302) that at least one physical package is in transit; request (304) that at least one physical package be delivered to a location associated with the smartphone (102; 504); allow (308) a second party delivering the package to register at the location through the use of a mobile device (104; 506) that is associated with at least one physical package, where the registration comprises a near field communication stroke between the smartphone (102; 504) and the mobile device (104; 506), wherein the smartphone (102; 504) acts as a near field communication tag; receiving (310), on the smartphone (102; 504), an encrypted electronic token associated with at least one physical package designated for delivery to a destination, the electronic token that has been encrypted by a public key associated with the part of particular order, where the encrypted electronic token is received from the mobile device (104) during registration; electronically sign (312) at least one physical package by using the smart phone (102; 504), which includes decrypting the encrypted electronic token with a private key associated with the particular order part, where decryption is performed by the telephone smart (102; 504), and where the particular order part is different from a receiving part associated with the smart phone (102; 504) when the smart phone electronically signs the package; and send the decrypted electronic witness to a server (106) to verify that a party in possession of and / or accompanying the smartphone (102; 504) is authorized to receive the package.

title: System and method of providing a service of mission execution using the short message service
abstract: PURPOSE: A mission EXECUTION service system using a short message and a method thereof are provided to execute a mission according to a series of processes which is established through a short message, thereby extending the availability of a mobile oriented(MO) service. CONSTITUTION: A MO processing unit(230) transmits missions for each level to a corresponding user terminal. The MO processing unit receives a result from the user terminal. A mission management unit(250) manages mission progress of the user terminal following the beginning of a mission. The mission management unit processes the next level according to the mission progress. A mission evaluation unit(240) evaluates the mission execution result. title: Rainfall meter correction device
abstract:
The present invention relates to a device for calibrating the most widely used rainfall meter for accurate observation of rainfall in various water-related industries such as weather forecasting, weather statistics, water statistics, flood forecasts and alerts, reservoir operations. 
     The present invention enables precise calibration of the rainfall meter by supplying water to which the standard rainfall is calculated to the calibration rainfall meter and comparing it with the rainfall measured by the calibration rainfall meter. By providing various unloadable weights, the sensitivity of the balance can be corrected every time the measured object is measured, thereby increasing the reliability of the calibration accuracy and measuring the rainfall at the time of supplying water to the corrected rainfall meter. After that, by adopting the method of final weighing the water supplied at this time, it is possible to measure several times regardless of the number of times, it is possible to improve the accuracy of the calibration through this repeated measurement, and to control the pump for water supply By adjusting the intensity of water supplied to the rainfall meter to be calibrated, the It provides a rainfall-based calibration device that can perform the task. 
       
     Rain gauge, calibration device, calibration method, weight, balance

title: The matching service system with 3d printing company
abstract: The present invention relates to a 3D printing company matching service system and method, in a matching system for matching a user and 3D printing workers or businesses, the user is formed to select a user or 3D printing-related workers or companies to select terminal; A server connected with the user terminal and a company terminal connected with the server to match the user terminal,   The server provides the relevant company information for each 3D printing-related search request from the user terminal by index, receives the required request information, transmits the request information to the company terminal, receives the corresponding quotation, and provides the user terminal to the user terminal. Matching can be performed according to the judgment from the above.   In addition, a matching method of the 3D printing company matching service, the method comprising the steps of: searching for a keyword in the user terminal; Selecting an index displayed according to the keyword; Selecting a company through the company information presented for each index; Receiving the quotation by inputting and transmitting the request information to the selected companies; It may include the step of selecting a company and payment according to the quote.

title: Identifying user device status via rotating codes broadcast by a beacon device
abstract: A user enters a location with a user device. A beacon device broadcasts a first beacon device code comprising a hardware identifier via a local wireless network at the location. A service application of the user device receives the first beacon device hardware identifier, logs a check-in status of the user, and transmits the check-in status to a service provider system. The beacon device generates, after a predetermined period of time, a subsequent beacon device code comprising a random number to broadcast at the location via the local wireless network. In response to receiving the subsequent beacon device code broadcast by the beacon device, the user device logs and transmits a subsequent check in status to the service provider system via the network. The service provider system provides services to the user device or another device at the location in accordance with the check-in status of the user device.

title: Communication platform onboard a vehicle
abstract: The invention concerns a communication platform (8) onboard a vehicle designed to enable a user located in the vehicle to access, from the vehicle, services supplied in a domestic network (6) managed by a domestic server (4), and to enable remote monitoring and control by a distant user (3) of a vehicle network equipment (14). The invention is characterized in that the platform (8) comprises: a communication module (12) for providing a remote link between the vehicle network (14) and the domestic network (6); a locating module (14) for determining the position of the vehicle relative to the domestic network (6); and applicative module (16) for controlling and monitoring the operating conditions of the equipment of said vehicle.

title: Dynamic SLA Negotiation
abstract: A method for managing an automated service level agreement (SLA) negotiation between two providers (400a, 400b) belonging to different network domains, an initiating SLA negotiation manager (401a), a terminating SLA negotiation manager (401b), and a system for managing the negotiation. A negotiation is executed between two request handlers (40a, 402b) of the respective SLA negotiation managers. The request handler of the terminating SLA negotiation handler manages a policy checking procedure by interrogating an associated Policy Decision Point (PDP, 407) associated with the terminating SLA negotiation handler, via a resource handler (406b). A new or updated SLA, resulting from a successful negotiation is stored in an SLA database (SLA DB, 405a, 405), in the initiating, as well as in the terminating SLA negotiation manager.

title: Utility gateway
abstract: A remote gateway B3 for managing a network of utility devices A1-A5, e.g. utility meters, forms part of a system, the system also comprising utility management components D1-D3 and local gateways B2 in communication with the utility devices. The remote gateway communicates utility data between the local gateways and the management components over one or more secured wide area networks (WANs) C1, and manages digital certificates for certifying the communicated utility data. The management of secure communications at a remote gateway allows each local gateway to be a simple, low-complexity gateway or hub, resulting in infrastructure and cost savings. The remote gateway may communicate with a server B4 configured to secure the communication connection with the management components. The remote gateway may create, procure, manage and/or delete digital certificates for the utility devices. The utility data may be meter readings, domestic generation data, utility bill data etc. The WANs may be cellular or cable.

title: The settlement accounts system of open market and method thereof
abstract: PURPOSE: Open market adjustment system and method thereof are provided to circulate circulation right and execution right of a product by using an open market interoperating with a social network service (SNS) within an open market adjustment system. CONSTITUTION: A log system (100) transmits adjustment target log information to a collection server within an open adjustment unit. A contents management system (200) transmits adjustment reference information to the collection server within the open adjustment unit. The contents management system receives adjustment statements of an adjustment result for information providing fee, product-wise adjustment detailed statement and contract between selling members from the open adjustment unit. An open market adjustment system (300) receives the adjustment target log information of a product from the log system. An electronic payment agency server receives a member payment statement from the open adjustment unit within the open market adjustment system and transmits a remittance result. An enterprise resource management (500) receives issue of a tax bill about the sale of the selling member and issues the tax bill. A selling member terminal (600) inquires issue of the adjustment result and tax bill. title: Safe-Transfer Exchange Protocol Based on Trigger-Ready Envelopes Among Distributed Nodes.
abstract: A distributed exchange protocol method based on a safe transfer of envelopes among a distributed nodal network using a local ranking moderator comprising the steps of: authoring an envelope at one node, said envelope comprising at least a letter and a trigger, wherein said letter is any one of an execution algorithm and said trigger is any one of an event or algorithm that starts the execution of a logic; collecting information about at least one of an envelope or node (e/n) interacting with or interacted with another e/n by a ranking moderator and based on said collected information generate a ranking or listing of at least one of honest, dishonest, or unknown nodes and sharing this listing or ranking by at least one node to decide which nodes are eligible for envelopes to be transferred to or from; launching said envelope into the distributed network of nodes, whereby the envelope is transferred from at least the one node to at least another node that is moderator-approved and checking the trigger from at least one envelope at least once by at least the moderator-approved node and transferred further to another moderator-approved node if the trigger is not met and disabling trigger checking functionality of any one of nodes not actively checking for triggers to save resources; and analyzing the envelopes content upon trigger being fired to learn which node is eligible to execute the main logic of the envelope.

title: Techniques for securing supply chain electronic transactions
abstract: Techniques for authenticating the identity of shippers and receivers of goods at each point along a supply chain. A central hub repository issues shippers and receivers a pair of public and private keys for encrypting communications between the shippers and receivers and the hub repository and for authenticating the identity of shippers and receivers. The hub repository may also maintain a log of all transactions between shippers and receivers to provide an audit trail that may be used to track the progress of goods along a supply chain.

title: Systems and methods for malicious code detection
abstract: There is provided a computer implemented method for detection and prevention of an attempt at establishment of a network connection for malicious communication, comprising: detecting a connection establishment process for establishing a network connection, the connection establishment process initiated by code running on a client terminal; analyzing records in at least one stack trace of the initiating code managed at the client terminal, to detect a trial to establish a malicious communication wherein the network connection is used for malicious activity; and blocking establishment of the network connection when the analysis detects the trial to establish the malicious communication based on the network connection.

title: System and method for biometric protocol standards
abstract: Secure communications are provided between a user computing device and a server computing device. An enrollment request is received from a user computing device that is configured via a distributed client software application, and is processed. The enrollment request is usable to enroll the user computing device in a network and includes an encrypted partial initial biometric vector associated with a user. An authentication request is processed that is subsequently received that includes an encrypted partial second biometric vector and that is associated with a user of the user computing device. A comparison of the encrypted partial initial biometric vector and the encrypted partial second biometric vector is performed, and a value representing the comparison is generated and transmitted to the user computing device. The user computing device is authenticated where the value is above a minimum threshold.

title: Rotary electric machine
abstract:
PURPOSE: To reduce a skew amount without increasing the number of slots by performing the skew of S slots obtained by S=l/m (l is integer number in case of 1≤l≤m) when the relation of NS×(M+1)/P=n/m (n, m are integer numbers) holds among the number of slots (NS) and the number of poles (P), and the number of grooves (M) provided on tees.  
     CONSTITUTION: A 4-pole permanent magnet rotary electric machine is composed of a field core 1, permanent magnets 21∼24, an armature core 3, an armature winding 4, and tees 51∼59, etc. In the rotary poles having 9 of the number NS of slots 31, 4 of the number P of poles and NS/P=n/m=9/4, the S slots obtained by S=l/m=l/4 (where l is integer number in case of 1≤l<m) are skewed. Thus, when 1/4 slots is, for example, skewed, the positional relationship between the pole center line of permanent magnets 21∼24 and the center line of the tees 51∼59 is so skewed that 1/4 slot is displaced at the end of the axially opposite side, the pole center line is uniformly distributed on a tee pitch to reduce a slot ripple.

title: Trap lamp under fishpond water
abstract: The present invention discloses trap lamp under a kind of fishpond water, the fish pond trap lamp is immersed in below the water surface in fish pond, the transparent glass cover of trap lamp is spheroidal clear glass ghost under the fishpond water, there is blacklight trap pipe in spheroidal clear glass ghost, the inner face of the lower half of spheroidal clear glass ghost has diffusion disk reflector layer, sealing-plug is arranged at the outer bottom of spheroidal clear glass ghost, sealing-plug is the lamp socket of blacklight trap pipe, there is cable to pass through in sealing-plug, it is to have drawstring under sealing-plug, drawstring is tied up on the pendant block at fish pond bottom, powered by cable to blacklight trap pipe；Because the blacklight trap pipe of the trap lamp is the insect-attracting light ripple that is sent below fish pond, again after the diffusing reflection of diffusion disk and the refraction of fish pond ripples, irregularly penetrate peripherad sky again, insect much larger at this piece of launches insect-attracting light ripple with regard to that can see, therefore the insect attracted remotely can be lured, so luring borer population amount more.

title: Data encrypting method and encrypted data transmitting device
abstract: The invention provides a data encrypting method and an encrypted data transmitting device. The data encrypting method comprises the following steps: firstly, randomly capturing data W' with a reserved length k from transmission data W; generating a random number r by using the data W' as a seed, randomly calculating the length q and an initial point a of a data domain by using the r as the seed, and capturing the data from the transmission data W by using the q and the a as parameters so as to generate a data domain F; generating a public key E and a private key R by using the data domain F as a parameter; and finally, encoding the W by using the publish key E so as to obtain an encryption result Z. The invention further provides a data encrypting device, an encrypted data transmitting method, and the encrypted data transmitting device.

title: Permanent magnet rotor
abstract: Provided is a permanent magnet rotor of an embedded magnet type that can adopt means for satisfying conflicting demands for downsizing and characteristics improvement means.   A permanent magnet rotor in which a starting short-circuit bar and a magnet are provided in a rotor core, wherein the rotor core has two or more magnets per pole and V-shaped magnets, The magnet occupies a range of 65 to 85% for each pole at an angle as viewed from the origin, and the side surface of the magnet is disposed so as to substantially face the bottom surface of the short-circuit bar. Since the angle formed by the group of magnets falls within twice the angle as viewed from the origin, the flow of the main magnetic flux that induces the magnet torque and the reluctance torque can be sufficiently ensured. Since the distribution is close to a wave, it is possible to provide a rotating electric machine having high energy density and low torque ripple and high controllability.   [Selection diagram] Fig. 1

title: Radio frequency user recognition module, member card information processing method and processing system
abstract: The invention relates to a radio frequency user identification module, a processing system of membership card information and a method. The radio frequency user identification module comprises a user identification module which is used to identify the user identity, a radio frequency tag which is used to transmit and receive information by the radio frequency manner, a membership card memory module which is used to memorize the information of a membership card; a read-write module which is used to read the corresponding membership card identifier and write the information of the membership card into the membership card memory module according to the businessman identifier. The method of the invention comprises the following steps: receiving the businessman identifier which is transmitted by the radio frequency identification device; seeking the membership card identifier that corresponds to the businessman identifier by the memory module which is used to memorize the information of the membership card on the radio frequency user identification module; transmitting the membership card identifier to the radio frequency identification device. The radio frequency user identification module, the processing system of the membership card information and the method of the invention save the information of the membership card in the radio frequency user identification module, and have the advantages of taking conveniently, avoiding the trouble of taking many membership cards along, without providing physical cards and reducing the cost greatly.

title: Method and System for Secure Financial Transactions Using Mobile Communications Devices
abstract: The present invention employs public key infrastructure to electronically sign and encrypt important personal information on a mobile communications device (MCD), without disclosing private, personal information to the transaction counterparts and middleman, thus preserving highly elevated and enhanced security and fraud protection. In one embodiment, the present invention can use a mobile device identifier, such as a cell phone number or email address, for example, as an index/reference during the entire transaction, so that only the account holder and the account issuer know the underlying account number and other private information.

title: Methods and apparatus for providing an easy return, exchange and purchasing experience in a retail store environment
abstract: The present invention relates to a self-operating networked kiosk device for providing an easy return, exchange and purchasing experience in a retail store environment. The kiosk device includes a vision module communicably coupled to the computing device and at least one sensor, such that the vision module captures a raw data related to the said item via the at least one sensor, an object and character recognition (OCR) module configured to identify a primary data from the raw data based on at least one predefined parameter, wherein the AI module is configured to identifying at least one first block having a first fingerprint data related to the item, the first block stored on a networked distributed ledger and creating a second block including the first fingerprint data and the second fingerprint data on the networked distributed ledger.

title: Portable communication device with smart card functionality
abstract: The invention provides a portable communication device 4, 6, 8 such as a mobile phone, PDA or handheld PC with smart card functionality for use in a smart card system including a host 2. The smart card functionality may be achieved by way of a virtual smart card implemented as a software application, software module or firmware in a memory of the device. The device provides at least one smart card function from authentication, data encryption, access control, secure memory and the provision of digital signatures. A software application may provide one or more smart card functions with reference to data held in a secure data store. The device may be compatible with more than one host. By using a non-dedicated device to provide smartcard functions, users no longer need to carry dedicated smart cards. Furthermore, since the device communicates 10, 12 with the host, the system does not require a smart card reader.

title: Payment token mechanism
abstract: A method of obtaining tokenised payment card data at a computing device for use in a transaction, the computing device comprising a digital wallet containing a preregistered payment card, the method comprising: receiving, at the computing device, a request for tokenised payment card data corresponding to the preregistered payment card; sending, from the computing device to a token service provider, the request for tokenised payment card data; receiving, from the token service provider, tokenised payment data corresponding to the preregistered payment card, the tokenised payment card data being suitable for use in the transaction; using the received tokenised payment card data to complete the transaction

title: Determining a common secret for the secure exchange of information and hierarchical, deterministic cryptographic keys
abstract: A method (300) and system (1) of determining a common secret for two nodes (3, 7). Each node (3, 7) has a respective asymmetric cryptography pair, each pair including a master private key and a master public key. Respective second private and public keys may be determined based on the master private key, master public key and a deterministic key. A common secret may be determined at each of the nodes based on the second private and public keys. In one example, a node (3, 7) may determine the common secret based on (i) a second private key based on the node's own master private key and the deterministic key; and (ii) a second public key based on the other node's master public key and the deterministic key. The invention may be suited for use with, but not limited to, digital wallets, blockchain (e.g. Bitcoin) technologies and personal device security.

title: Quick charging payment method and charging equipment
abstract: The invention relates to the technical field of charging payment and discloses a quick charging payment method and charging equipment. The method comprises the following steps: determining whether a charging port is connected with equipment to be charged or not, and if the charging port is connected with the equipment to be charged, locking the charging equipment to the equipment to be charged; charging the equipment to be charged; acquiring a charging stopping request of a user, and stopping charging according to the charging stopping request; and if the user finishes charging payment, unlocking the equipment to be charged so that the user can take away the equipment to be charged. This kind of through confirming the mouth that charges and connecting the mode that waits the battery charging outfit and can charge, charge and finish the payment and can tak away the mode that waits the battery charging outfit, simplified user operation greatly to promote the user and use experience.

title: Method for Creating One Time Password
abstract: The present invention relates to a method to generate a one-time password (OTP), capable of preventing mobile payment from being illegally approved. According to the present invention, the method to generate an OTP through an integrated circuit (IC) chip comprises: a step of recognizing a user′s body to store biometric authentication information, which is generated in a data structure capable of being stored in an element file included in a predetermined storage area inside the IC chip, in the element file of the predetermined storage area; a step of receiving and processing user′s biometric recognition information, which is formed in a data structure capable of performing a predetermined verification operation with the biometric authentication information stored in the element file, in the inside of the IC chip when an OTP generation command is received; a step of performing a predetermined verification operation between the biometric authentication information stored in the element file included in the predetermined storage area inside the IC chip and the biometric recognition information before the OTP is generated in accordance with the OTP generation command, so as to authenticate bioavailability of the user; and a step of operating a function to dynamically generate an OTP of N digits (N >= 2) in accordance with the OTP generation command when the bioavailability of the user is authenticated.

title: System and method to display operational and revenue data for an airport facility
abstract: A system, comprising a first computing device receiving data from an input feed, the data corresponding to one of operations data and revenue data of an airport facility, the first computing device organizing the data into files which are viewable by users of the system and an additional computing device connected via a communication network to the first computing device, receiving the files organized by the first computing device and displaying the files to a user.

title: Method and system of automatic target date distribution of retirement funds
abstract: A method of making periodic retirement fund distributions executed automatically by a computer system comprises a predetermined start date, target end date and frequency of distribution that will provide the investor the exact time duration that the retirement funds will last. The method includes creating a periodic distribution schedule, calculating distribution percentage rate for each distribution, determining the shares to be sold at each distribution while maintaining the remaining funds fully invested. The total distribution time duration is predetermined and fixed. The distribution percentage rate is calculated to create a purchasing power equalized distribution amount in the entire distribution duration by factoring net investment return rate after inflation. The method also includes a cash buffering mechanism to smooth out market fluctuations while providing investment growth.

title: Two-dimension code scanning self-parking system and method oriented to unattended operation
abstract: The invention discloses a two-dimension code scanning self-parking system oriented to unattended operation. The two-dimension code scanning self-parking system comprises an intelligent parking big data center, an intelligent parking stall management terminal, a parking management system, and a two-dimension code scanning entrance guard. The invention also discloses a two-dimension code scanning self-parking method oriented to unattended operation. The method comprises the following steps that the intelligent parking big data center receives a parking reservation request given by a personal mobile communication device and current positional information; the intelligent parking big data center pushes an available parking stall to a user according to the user position; the intelligent parking big data center receives order information confirmed by the personal mobile communication device, generates a personal parking two-dimension code, and sends the personal parking two-dimension code to the personal mobile communication device and a parking management system; the entrance guard records user arriving information when a first-time entrance guard opening request is sent; the entrance guard is opened when a second-time entrance guard opening request is sent; after the user leaves a parking lot, the entrance guard records user leaving information and the intelligent parking big data center updates the states of parking stalls.

title: Systems and methods for third-party interoperability in secure network transactions using tokenized data
abstract: Embodiments include methods and systems for enabling third-party data service interoperability, comprising receiving, from an electronic data server, a request for a low-value token, the low-value token being associated with a subset of sensitive data associated with a user; providing the low-value token to the electronic data server; receiving a request for the subset of sensitive data, from a third-party data service server, the request comprising the low-value token; de-tokenizing the low-value token to obtain the subset of sensitive data; providing the subset of sensitive data to the third-party data service server; receiving, from an electronic data server, the low-value token and a transaction authorization request; determining, based on the low-value token and authorization request, an authorization response; and providing the authorization response to the electronic data server.

title: Authentication method using portable electronic device
abstract: According to another aspect of the present invention, there is provided an authentication method using a portable electronic device, comprising the steps of: (a) accessing authentication information or login information stored in a portable electronic device through wireless communication; And (b) transmitting the authentication information or login information from the terminal to the server. Specifically, in the step (a), the terminal transmits the access information to the portable electronic device using identification information of the portable electronic device set in advance.   According to the authentication method using the portable electronic device of the preferred embodiment of the present invention, by using a portable electronic device that can be wirelessly connected to the terminal used by the user, various kinds of login ID, password , Certificates, etc., but it is possible to restrict security by copying certificates and blocking hacking.

title: Systems and methods for transaction triggered cycling of financial accounts
abstract: Systems and methods are provided for setting a cycle date for a financial account. For instance, a cycling module may be provided to set a default cycle date for cycling the financial account, and an account monitoring module may be provided to determine whether a transaction is posted on the financial account within a first predetermined period before the default cycle date. If a transaction is posted on the financial account within the first predetermined period, then the cycling module sets a new cycle date. The new cycle date can be set to a date that follows the transaction post date by a second predetermined period. Alternatively, the new cycle date may be set to other dates, such as a date corresponding to the next qualifying date.

title: System and method for annuity processing
abstract: The present invention provides a system, apparatus, and method for annuity processing. In some embodiments, an annuity processing module is used in conjunction with an internet-based patent- and trademark-application management system. This annuity-processing module reflects a software implementation of various business rules or methods associated with paying the annuity due on a patent. These rules are, in some embodiments, derived from various laws relating to the payment of annuities. In some embodiments, these rules are provided to a workflow engine via a DTD or XML schema. The work-flow engine manages the execution of the various business rules and states associated with this execution. These rules, including the decision to make a payment, can be manually executed or automatically executed by a member of an organization implementing the annuity payment module as a part of a larger system. This larger application could, in some embodiments, be an internet-based patent- and trademark-application management system.

title: A kind of sanitary sewage disposal hanger
abstract: The utility model relates to a kind of sanitary sewage disposal hanger, including installation top plate and handling grabbing device, the handling grabbing device is mounted on the bottom of installation top plate, is installed and is symmetrically arranged with mounting hole on top plate；The handling grabbing device includes crawl regulating mechanism, crawl top plate, press mechanism, support mechanism and position-limit mechanism；The press mechanism includes pushing telescopic rod, lower pressing spring, pushing and win in succession and three pushing branches.The utility model can solve it is existing existing working efficiency is low when installing to septic tank, septic tank handling when will appear shakings, human assistance cooperation needed the problems such as to fall in septic tank to the handling of septic tank, without being directed to sundries during the special hanger of septic tank, septic tank handling；The function that the fixed septic tank of automatically firm crawl is carried out to the rippled fiber glass reinforced plastic septic tank of different lines may be implemented.

title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR REDUCING TORQUE RIPPLEs IN AN INTERIOR PERMANENT MAGNET MOTOR
abstract: The invention relates to a sYSTEM AND a METHOD FOR REDUCING TORQUE RIPPLEs IN AN INTERIOR PERMANENT MAGNET MOTOR and specifically relates to an interior permanent magnet motor comprises a rotor assembly disposed within a stator assembly. The rotor assembly is configured for rotating about a central axis relatively to the stator assembly. The rotor assembly defines a plurality of magnet pockets within the rotor assembly along a radially outboard surface of the rotor assembly. Each magnet pocket is substantially rectangular in cross-sectional shape, and each magnet pocket is configured to facilitate insertion of a plurality of permanent magnets into and retention of the plurality of permanent magnets within, the magnet pocket. The rotor assembly further comprises a plurality of permanent magnet segments disposed in each magnet pocket.

title: Dichroic thin film, designing method for the film and production of dichroic thin film
abstract: PURPOSE: To reduce the ripple of a dichroic film by controlling the optical film thickness of a high refractive index layer in the substrate side and a first layer of low refractive index layers to >90nm to control peak. CONSTITUTION: At the time of producing the dichroic thin film by alternately laminating the high refractive index layers and the low refractive index layers plural times on a substrate, the film thickness of the first layer of respective high refractive index layer and low refractive index layer in the substrate side is controlled to >=90nm to control peak on the basis of the peak of reflectance or transmissivity, which appears by the use of monochromatic light having 4nd wave length every time the thickness of r/4 is formed when the refractive index of the thin film is (n) and the physical film thickness of the thin film is (d).

title: Device and method for authenticating user and obtaining user signature using user's biometrics
abstract: The present invention relates to a device and method for authenticating users and obtaining user signatures, which can be provided in business services using networks and various user information devices including information devices equipped with touch displays such as smartphones, or desktop PCs, laptops, tablet PCs, CCTVs, IoT, self-driving cars, drones, etc. and, more specifically, to a device and method for authenticating users and obtaining user digital signatures which, as an encryption key/password generation and verification system for user authentication to be provided in various web-based businesses in which various information devices are serviced in a client-server or peer-to-peer model network environment and in app-based businesses running on a specific platform, is simpler and ensures confidentiality and security.

title: Detection plate, detection assembly and detection method for detecting ripples of touch screen
abstract: A detection method for detecting ripples of a touch screen, and a detection plate and a detection assembly used in the method are disclosed by embodiments of the present invention, the detection method comprising steps of: manufacturing a detection plate, one surface of which is provided with a plurality of grids arranged in a regular array, which grids are formed by intersecting a plurality of grid lines extending in a first direction and a plurality of grid lines extending in a second direction; placing the surface of the detection plate at a predetermined angle with respect to a surface of one side of the touch screen where the a glass plate is located, such that the grid lines on the detection plate are imaged on the touch screen; and observing grid lines imaged on the touch screen, and determining the existence of ripples at a position of the touch screen corresponding to a curved portion of the imaged grid lines in case of the curved portion of the imaged grid lines. According to the embodiments of the invention, conditions of the ripples on the touch screen can be determined intuitively and easily according to curved conditions of the grid lines imaged on the touch screen, by imaging the grid lines on the detection plate onto the touch screen, such that the accuracy of detection is enhanced.

title: Transparent caller name authentication for authorized third party callers
abstract: Transparent caller name authentication is provided to authorized third parties by creating an Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) certificate chain. An owner of a registered caller name can authorize third parties to use the caller name by issuing a PKI sub-certificate to each authorized third party. An authenticated caller name displays the owner's name to the called party. Outsourcing and mobile employment is thereby facilitated, and called party confusion is reduced.

title: Turbo-molecular pump
abstract:
PURPOSE: To increase the performance of a DC motor, reduce the vibration of the rotor and produce torque with a high efficiency by constituting a coreless brushless motor with an externally mounted magnet of a shaft, a yoke magnetically connected with the magnet, and a stationary coil interposed in a gap between both of the components.  
     CONSTITUTION: A turbo-molecular pump(TMP) is provided with a shaft 2 enabling the attachment and detachment of a rotor 1 having an opening 1a, a magnet 3 externally mounted on the shaft, and a yoke 4 press-fitted into the opening 1a at a position facing the magnet 3 and magnetically connected with the magnet 3. A fixed coil 5 for imparting torque to the rotor 1 is also provided. The TMP incorporating a coreless brushless motor of this constitution does not produce, unlike an inverter, torque ripples at the time of rotary drive, and stabilizes the rotation and reduces vibration at the time of starting and steady state operation of the TMP. No eddy current loss is produced because of the lack of a core even if the rotor 1 rotates. As a result, operations of acceleration, steady state, or deceleration of the TMP are made at high speeds, and a control power source is made small and simple.

title: Methods and systems for activating an electronic payments infrastructure
abstract: Methods and systems for activating an electronic payments infrastructure employ, for example, a token consisting at least in part of a unique identifier assigned to an inactive header account which is provided on a customer's electronic device. The unique identifier is processable via a transaction processing network. A request, which includes customer information, is received to verify that activation of the header account for the customer is compliant with predefined customer identification rules. A determination is made that activation of the header account for the customer is compliant with the predefined customer identification rules. An activation message is sent to the customer's device using the interface processor, the header account is linked to a digital wallet on a database, and the customer's designation of a source account for the digital wallet is received on the database.

abstract: The generation and verification method and system of the invention proposes a kind of credible label based on rivest, shamir, adelman, by the way that credible label raw information, tag identifier, commodity sign, the public key information of rivest, shamir, adelman, digital certificate information, digital signature information and trusted timestamp or trusted identity timestamp information are generated credible label；When needing to use or verify the credible label, ensure that credible label generates the validity and integrality of time and content by verifying trusted timestamp in credible label or trusted identity timestamp information, by verifying the validity of the digital certificate in credible label or the legitimacy of public-key cryptography, to authenticate the identity of credible label owner, and by verifying the digital signature in credible label, so that it is determined that the integrality of the credible label substance, realizes the antiforge function to commodity by the uniqueness of verifying tag identifier and the uniqueness of commodity sign.

title: Systems and methods for stored-value exchange within social networking environments
abstract: An electronic social networking environment enables the transfer of stored value between users of the environment. A transfer may be in the form of a gift from one user to another. The stored value may represent actual currency or virtual currency. The stored value may be redeemed within or outside the electronic social networking environment, and may be redeemed with one or more merchants. The stored value may be redeemed for a physical item or service or for a virtual item or service.

title: System and method for self-checkout of video media in a rental store
abstract: A system enables consumers to perform self-checkout and self-check-in of rental articles, especially rental video media. The system includes a scanner, a payment module, and an article transporter. The article transporter carries scanned articles having an attached, permanent EAS tag outside of an EAS tag interrogating zone. The self-checkout station of the present invention permits a consumer to identify his or her account and scan various video media for rental. The consumer may provide payment through the payment module and, once payment is accepted, the article transporter may be activated to carry the rented articles outside of an EAS tag interrogation zone adjacent to the self-checkout station.

title: Information processing apparatus and method of information distribution
abstract: A system reduces the process load in information distribution from a particular processor to a plurality of processors. One or more storage devices are connected with a plurality of processors through a network. The processor of the information distributor stores information in the storage device. The storage device detects the information and notifies the processors of the destinations. The processors of the destinations read distributed information from the memory in accordance with the notification from the storage device.

title: Architecture for an extensible real-time collaboration system
abstract: An architecture for an extensible real-time collaboration system providing a unified interface is provided. The architecture presents a unified application program interface for writing application programs that use communications protocols. The architecture has presence and activity objects, multiple endpoint objects, and a collaboration service object. These objects may use various communications protocols, such as Session Initiation Protocol or Real-Time Transport Protocol, to send and receive messages. The presence and activities objects, multiple endpoint objects, and collaboration service object may each have one or more APIs that an application developer can use to access or provide various functionalities. These objects map the API to the underlying implementation provided by other objects.

title: Method and system for providing moving picture diary service
abstract: The present invention discloses a method and system for providing a video diary service. The method of providing a video diary service of the present invention can easily generate a video diary of a registered member such as a celebrity or a sports star who are interested in the public by using a mobile phone equipped with a camera and a microphone. Registered on the video diary providing server, fans who like the star by connecting to the video diary providing server with their mobile phone, and receives and plays the video registered by the star on their mobile phone, such as the conventional star of their favorite star It can solve the problem of spending a lot of time searching for images. In addition, in the position of a star that registers his own video diary, it is effective to provide an efficient means for promoting the public to the public.

title: Method and apparatus for exchanging electronic business cards in a point-to-point or a multi-point personal computer conference
abstract: The conference manager of a general purpose personal conference application is enhanced, including a request management and a send/receive function for exchanging "business cards" electronically using a two-phase approach, a request phase and an answer phase. While request for another participant is automatic responsive to a connect/joint event, answering a request is conditionally depending on whether the receiving system is "in conference". The external manifestation of an electronic "business card" (bizcard) is a visual presentation of information commonly found on physical business cards in a format that resembles a physical business card. Preferably, the visual presentation also includes a picture of the person named. Internally, the information including the data necessary to render the picture are maintained in data structures.

title: Multi-protocol communication circuit
abstract: Peer-to-peer type communications are facilitated in a secure communication device. As consistent with one or more example embodiments, near-field communications are effected ( 150, 152 ) using a secure payment protocol conforming to a predefined certification standard for the secure payment protocol ( 100 ). Communication operability is transmitted ( 152 ) under the secure payment protocol and used to identify other protocols/applications under which communications can be effected. This information is used to effect P2P protocol communications ( 160 ), where applicable, and to do so while complying with the secure payment protocol.

title: Trusted cloud computing and services framework
abstract: A digital escrow pattern is provided for network data services including searchable encryption techniques for data stored in a cloud, distributing trust across multiple entities to avoid a single point of data compromise. In one embodiment, a key generator, a cryptographic technology provider and a cloud services provider are each provided as separate entities, enabling a publisher of data to publish data confidentially (encrypted) to a cloud services provider, and then expose the encrypted data selectively to subscribers requesting that data based on subscriber identity information encoded in key information generated in response to the subscriber requests, e.g., a role of the subscriber.

title: Generation systems and methods for transaction identifiers having biometric keys associated therewith
abstract: A system for generating transaction settlement identifiers includes an arrangement configured to receive a biometric sample from a customer and an arrangement configured to use the biometric sample to select the transaction settlement identifier from a pool of predetermined transaction settlements. A mapping arrangement configured to map the selected financial transaction settlement identifier to an identifier of the customer also may be included.

title: Method for authentication and key establishment with forward secrecy in wireless communication system
abstract: PURPOSE: A certification and key setting method in a wireless communication system providing forward privacy is provided to provide forward privacy assuring the privacy of a temporary secret key set on a protocol even if a permanent secret key is exposed in a wireless communication system. CONSTITUTION: A terminal receives network public key certification(BCert) broadcasted on a network and a network certification authority identifier(CA_B) in 201. The terminal decides whether a new position is registered on the network and thus certification is being performed in 202. The terminal generates a random number(rA) and encodes the random number(rA) generated from the terminal by a network publick key(BPubKey) in 203. The terminal generates a temporary public key(APubKeyX) in 204. Message 1 is sent to the network in 205. The terminal receives message 2 in 206. A temporary secret key(SessKeyAB) is generated by using random number(rB) generated from the network the temporary public key(APubKeyX) generated from the terminal in 207.

title: method, device and equipment for realizing calibration of test equipment
abstract: according to the method, the device and the equipment for realizing the calibration of the test equipment, the equipment information (including the equipment position information) of each test equipment is stored in the block chain network, the network nodes in the block chain network can monitor the test equipment in the node range of the network nodes according to the equipment information and the calibration conditions of each test equipment, the target calibration test equipment meeting the calibration conditions is timely, accurately and automatically screened out, then, corresponding calibration notification information is generated and sent to the preset terminal to notify a preset calibrator to timely carry out calibration test on the target calibration test equipment, the calibrator is not required to carry out regular calibration, and the calibration flexibility is improved; in addition, the calibration data obtained by the method can be synchronized to the blockchain network, so that any subsequent user can conveniently visit any network node of the blockchain network at any time, know the calibration process and result of any test equipment, realize the transparence of the calibration process and ensure the calibration fairness of the test equipment.

title: Virtual formula keyboard setting method and device, readable storage medium and terminal equipment
abstract: The invention belongs to the technical field of computers, and particularly relates to a virtual formula keyboard setting method and device, a computer readable storage medium and terminal equipment. The method comprises the steps of receiving a virtual formula keyboard calling instruction, and extracting a user identity of a current user from the virtual formula keyboard calling instruction; inquiring a target school section in a preset school section information base according to the user identity; acquiring an optimal selection symbol packet from a preset formula symbol library according to the target school section, wherein the formula symbol library comprises more than two formula symbol packets, each formula symbol packet comprises more than two formula symbols, and the optimal selection symbol packet is a formula symbol packet corresponding to the target school section; and distributing each formula symbol in the optimized symbol packet on each virtual key of a preset virtual formula keyboard head interface, and displaying the virtual formula keyboard head interface on a preset human-computer interaction interface, thereby greatly improving the operation efficiency of a user.

title: Method for accurately measuring impedance of transmission line
abstract:
PURPOSE: To accurately measure the impedance of a transmission line or cable by measuring the length and DC loop resistance of the line.  
     CONSTITUTION: One end E1 of the transmission line TL is coupled to an inspecting unit 1. Then, first, the length L and DC loop resistance of the line TL are measured. Then, a pulse is transmitted to the line TL, and the pulse and the pulse reflected at the end E2 of the line TL are monitored. The width of the pulse to be transmitted is larger than the time of the pulse transmitted from a pulse source, reflected at the end E2 of the line and returned to the source. The monitored indication is converted into an entire impedance value, which is corrected with respect to a ripple-up effect. The correction is conducted in terms of the function of the DC resistance, and the corrected measured value is the accurately measured value of the line TL. 
     COPYRIGHT: (C)1992,JPO

title: Solar battery power unit
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a compact power unit capable of performing the maximum power follow-up control by reducing the ripple currents of a solar battery array. SOLUTION: A DC power source 10 is serially connected between a solar battery array 1 and a battery 7, and an output voltage Vc of the DC power source 10 is changed so that a difference between an output voltage Vp of the solar battery array 1 and an output voltage Vs of the battery 7 can be adjusted. Thus, it is possible to supply the ripple currents of the DC power source 10 from the battery 7, and to reduce any ripple appearing in the output currents of the solar battery array 1. Therefore, it is necessary for the DC power source 10 only to generate the output voltage Vc equivalent to the difference between the output voltage Vp of the solar battery array 1 and the output voltage Vs of the battery 7, and it is possible to supply the ripple currents from the battery 7, and it is possible to sufficiently miniaturize this solar battery power source.

title: Method, device and equipment for providing corresponding service for users of different user equipment
abstract: The objective of the invention is to provide a method, a device and equipment for providing corresponding services for users of different user equipment. The technical scheme of the invention comprises the following steps: acquiring hardware identifying information of one or more hardware in the user equipment, which is sent by the user equipment; acquiring service scope information corresponding to the user equipment according to the hardware identifying information; and providing the services corresponding to the service scope information to the user equipment. According the technical scheme of the invention, a user can acquire a pay service without inputting a user name and a password, therefore, the operation of the user is simplified, and the user experience is optimized. In addition, the hardware identifying information is adopted to determine the service scope information so that the risks caused by the condition that user identity information including user names, passwords and the like is stolen are avoided, and the safety factor is increased.
