title: Inhibit the device of speed ripple in gear train assembly tap test
abstract: The invention discloses the devices for inhibiting speed ripple in a kind of gear train assembly tap test, including dynamometer machine, the transmission shaft that connect with the dynamometer machine and for the damped flywheel of the transfer of torque between the output end and transmission shaft of measured object for providing measured object load torque, damped flywheel be driven axis connection.Inhibit the device of speed ripple in gear train assembly tap test of the present invention, structure is simple, and easily fabricated, securely and reliably, setting inhibits the damped flywheel of the fluctuation of speed, it is ensured that the accuracy of gear train assembly beat noise test result.

title: Hydraulic device
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a hydraulic device capable of lowering the unnecessary loss to be generated by lowering the pulse of the discharge pressure and capable of improving the efficiency to the maximum. SOLUTION: A pump 1 and a motor 2 are assembled so that a peak position of a desirable pulse torque τδR to be determined in response to type of the pump 1 and the motor torque ripple τδM coincide with each other. The pulse torque of the pump 1 and the torque ripple of the motor 2 thereby match with each other, and discharge pressure of a hydraulic pump can be fixed without lowering the efficiency.

title: Multiple user accounts for managing stored information in an implantable medical device system
abstract: Techniques for managing stored information in an implantable medical device system using multiple user accounts are described. An implantable medical device system may provide a general user account and a set of authenticable user accounts. In some examples, the general user account does not require a user of a programmer in an implantable medical device system to enter user identity information to manage information stored in the implantable medical device system. The general user account may be permitted to perform a subset of actions available to an authenticable user account. In some examples, an authenticable user account may rollback changes made to the stored information by the general user account. An authenticable user account may also be able to synchronize changes made to the stored information across all or some of the user accounts.

title: Permanent magnet motor and rotor magnetizing device
abstract: (57) [Problem] To provide a high efficiency, low vibration structure permanent magnet motor with reduced torque ripple. SOLUTION: A first magnetized portion 11a at the center in one magnetic pole of the rotor is magnetized along a normal direction γ of the outer peripheral surface of the rotor, and a first magnetized portion in one magnetic pole of the rotor is formed. The second magnetized portions 11b on both sides of the magnetized portion 11a are magnetized toward the center 8 of the magnetic pole. The change in magnetic flux due to the change in the magnetic poles of the N pole and the S pole becomes smooth, and a permanent magnet motor having a high efficiency and a low vibration structure with reduced cogging torque and torque ripple can be realized.

title: Digital currency (virtual payment cards) issued by central bank for mobile and wearable devices
abstract: Provided is a method for digital currency transfers via a mobile and wearable device. The method may include receiving a transfer request with a transfer amount in digital currency and user identification data associated with the user, retrieving payment data of the user associated with the identification data, generating an optical code encoding the payment data and the transfer amount. The method may continue with providing the optical code on a screen of the mobile and wearable device. On scanning of the optical code, a transfer receiving request is created. The method may continue with receiving a transfer receiving request to perform a payment transaction associated with the user, accessing a user account maintained by a currency issuance unit, and transferring the transfer amount in the digital currency from the user account to a recipient account associated with the recipient identification data.

title: Weight monitoring based article detection system and article detection method
abstract: The weight monitoring-based article detection system includes an article database creation unit 301, a weight value collection unit 302, a picking and positioning status determination unit 303, and an article database update unit 304. The article detection method includes an article database creation step (S101), a weight value collection step (S102), a picking and placing state determination step (S103), and an article database update step (S104). The present invention monitors the real-time weight sensing value of an article on a display stand in real time, detects a change in weight of each shelf in real time, and picks or places any kind of article by changing the weight of all shelves on the display stand. By estimating whether it has been done, it is possible to determine the type and number of articles picked or placed.

title: Faster digital wallet processing
abstract: The present disclosure relates to increasing the speed of usage of digital wallets. A method of processing a digital wallet transaction comprises: receiving a transaction authorisation request message comprising a transaction value and payment credentials for a holding credit line; and responsive thereto, comparing the transaction value to the holding credit line's current balance. A method of conducting a digital wallet transaction comprises: in response to receiving a push notification of a transaction approval indicating that a holding credit line balance is determined to be equal to or to exceed a transaction value, presenting a digital wallet holder with a plurality of funding options for the transaction. The holding credit line balance is the sum of a plurality of account balances for a plurality of accounts associated with the digital wallet. The funding options comprise funding the transaction from one or more of those accounts.

title: Precalculated encryption key
abstract: An authenticated encryption method includes receiving, by an Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) engine, a cipher key and computing a hash key using the received cipher key. The computed hash key is stored in a storage memory. The AES engine then receives a packet of data and encrypts the packet of data using the received cipher key. The hash key from the storage memory is sent to a GHASH engine which is used to authenticate the packet of data. Encrypting the packet of data is performed after the hash key is stored in the storage memory. Input flow of the packet of data is enabled after the hash key is stored in the storage memory.

title: Virtual currency transaction through payment card
abstract: A method of conducting a virtual currency transaction through payment cards, which comprises steps of: a payer providing a payment card with an encrypted address; associating said encrypted address to at least one virtual wallet having crypto currencies; a payee receiving a predetermined amount of crypto currencies from said virtual wallet by scanning the encrypted address; and said payee depositing the crypto currencies into payee's virtual wallet. In one embodiment, the payment card can be, but not limited to a credit card and a debit card. In another embodiment, the crypto currency can be, but not limited to Bitcoin. In a further embodiment, the encrypted address can be shown as, but not limited to a QR code.

title: Multi-service transmission platform equipment managing system
abstract: The invention discloses a multi-business transmission platform equipment management system, which is characterized by the following: separating data realm and transmission realm to realize respective network management; binding data realm functional solid and transmission realm functional sold to VCG port through VC channel; proceeding image connection between relative function solid of data business and data realm functional solid through dynamic allocation; realizing more complex one-to-many or many-to-one connection for connecting array.

title: System and method for one touch payment and application therefor
abstract: When the one-touch payment system receives the purchase information on the service provided by the unattended environment collected through the selected payment means among the plurality of payment means installed in the unmanned environment, the one-touch payment system displays the settlement object information on the basis of the purchase information And receives a purchase decision signal for the settlement object information. When the purchase decision signal is inputted, the settlement is performed by subtracting the settlement amount from the remaining charge that has been charged without further input of the settlement information.

title: Apparatus for locking a portion of a computer memory
abstract: An apparatus for incorporation in each memory-using component of a data processing system permits locking of a portion of the memory, which portion may be as small as a single location, for atomic read-modify-write operations while permitting unlimited access to the memory for read operations and access to all but the locked portion for non-atomic write operations.

title: Systems and methods for providing personalized delivery services
abstract: Systems and methods are disclosed for providing personalized delivery services by a carrier providing a package delivery service. Typically, the consignee indicates a delivery preference to be applied to delivery of a package, such as indicating a specific location where the package is to be left upon delivery, if the consignee is not present to accept the package. In one embodiment, the consignee may be notified by the carrier of the scheduled delivery of the package, and may be linked to the carrier's web site to indicate a delivery preference. Alternatively, the delivery preference may be indicated by the consignee proactively accessing the web site. After conveying a delivery preference, the carrier's systems communicate the delivery preference at the appropriate time to a portable computing device which informs the delivery personnel of the consignee's delivery preference. Other embodiments allow the consignor to indicate delivery preferences.

title: Pre-printed and pre-selected lottery tickets for point-of-sale purchase
abstract: A method including receiving an activation request including an identifier uniquely identifying the pre-printed lottery ticket for a pre-printed lottery ticket from a point-of-sale terminal, accessing a record associated with the pre-printed lottery ticket, determining if the activation request is valid, determining a set of attributes associated with the pre-printed lottery ticket based upon the identifier uniquely identifying the pre-printed lottery ticket, determining a central gaming system responsible for administering a lottery with which the pre-printed lottery ticket is associated, and enrolling the set of attributes associated with the pre-printed lottery ticket in the lottery with the central gaming system.

title: Application security policy actions based on security profile exchange
abstract: In one embodiment, a method includes receiving, at a first host, a security profile related to a first data socket descriptor indicating risk to data security of a second host. The method also includes, in response to the risk indicated by the security profile, performing by the first host, at least one action selected from a group of actions. The group of actions includes a cache flush on a cache of the first host according to a cache flush policy, cache locking on data stored in the cache of the first host, data redaction on data of a payload prior to being sent by the first host, memory locking of data stored in an in-memory database of the first host, and encryption of data stored in the in-memory database of the first host or encryption of selected data fields of a payload prior to being sent from the first host.

title: Monitoring point of sale peripheral devices
abstract: A system includes a machine readable storage medium storing instructions and a processor to execute the instructions. The processor executes the instructions to monitor software calls between a point of sale application and a sharable point of sale peripheral device, wherein each software call defines a type of access to the sharable point of sale peripheral device. The processor executes the instructions to collect management data for the sharable point of sale peripheral device based on the monitored software calls. The processor executes the instructions to store the collected management data to create a record of the usage of the sharable point of sale peripheral device.

title: Cipher safety inputting method in POS machine and device
abstract: Cipher safety inputting method and device in a kind of POS machine, the method includes：When POS machine operating system based on POS machine operation processor receives password input instruction, the input signal of touch screen is switched in safety chip (S1)；The encrypted message (S2) of the touch screen input is obtained by the safety chip；POS machine operation processor (S3) is sent to after the encrypted message is encrypted after the completion of Password Input.The method avoids encrypted message from being stolen, and enhances the safety in utilization of POS machine.

title: Manipulating rights-to-execute in connection with a software copy protection mechanism
abstract: A software asset protection mechanism segregates the right to execute software from the software itself. The rights to execute, when installed on a composite computing system, are stored in a coprocessor element of the composite computing system. The software asset protection mechanism is enhanced as described herein by providing for the manipulation of those rights to execute. More particularly, the rights to execute can be conditioned at least in terms of a valid period of execution at least in terms of a valid period of execution or a valid number of executions. The rights to execute can be safely transferred from one coprocessor to another, or can be returned to the software vendor. Finally, a method of backing up the rights to execute to provide the user with the rights to execute in case the coprocessor element of the composite computing system fails.

title: Logging in secure enclaves
abstract: Embodiments of an invention for logging in secure enclaves are disclosed. In one embodiment, a processor includes an instruction unit and an execution unit. The instruction unit is to receive an instruction having an associated enclave page cache address. The execution unit is to execute the instruction without causing a virtual machine exit, wherein execution of the instruction includes logging the instruction and the associated enclave page cache address.

title: Domain name server(dns), system and method for transmitting contents using the dns
abstract: PURPOSE: A DNS(Domain Name server), a system and a method for transmitting contents using the DNS are provided to dynamically assign an IP address of accessible contents server based on member information thereby efficiently managing a wireless Internet service. CONSTITUTION: A DNS(Domain Name Server)(30) receives domain name of contents server(50) from a terminal(20). The domain name server receives IP(Internet Protocol) address query of the contents server from the terminal. Based on received subscriber information, the domain name server selects specific contents server by the member information of the terminal among at least one contents server which is accessible with the domain name. The domain name server transmits IP address of the selected contents server.

title: Prepaid money payment method and system for managing children's consumption
abstract: The present invention relates to a prepaid charging payment method and system. In the prepaid charging payment method of the present invention, the mother terminal and the child terminal are interlocked using a customer number, and the cache corresponding to the amount paid by the mother terminal is charged to the account of the mother terminal. Step, receiving the use destination available to the child terminal set in the mother terminal, and the charge cache amount for the use destination, cache payment for the merchant terminal included in the destination from the child terminal And receiving a request, performing a requested payment within the charge cache amount, and calculating an amount corresponding to the cache accumulated after payment is completed, and paying the account to the merchant terminal.

title: One-Time Use Password Systems And Methods
abstract: According to the invention, a method of using a one-time password for a transaction between a user and a merchant is disclosed. The method may include generating the one-time password. The method may also include authenticating the user by the authentication server in response to a request from the user to use the one-time password. The method may further include authorizing the use of the one-time password for the transaction in response to authenticating the user by the authentication server. The method may moreover include using the one-time password in combination with an account number to settle the transaction between the user and the merchant. The method may additionally include sending a message to the authentication server originating from the merchant, wherein the message comprises the one-time password, and wherein the message requests a determination whether the one-time password is authorized for use in the transaction. The method may also include sending a message to the merchant originating from the authentication server, wherein the message includes a determination whether the transaction should be approved in response to the authentication server determining whether the one-time password is authorized for use in the transaction.

title: multi-application identity authentication system and method
abstract: The invention provides  multi-application identity authentication system and method, the system comprises a client, an application end and an agent service center, the client establishes connection with the application end through the agent service center, the client and the agent service center respectively generate a public key and a private key pair, the client receives an agent public key sent by the agent service center, the client requests to log in a certain  application end, encrypts an information packet by using the agent public key and sends the information packet to the agent service center, the agent service center decrypts the information packet by using the agent private key and sends the client public key to a corresponding application end, the application end verifies the client public key and returns authorization information to the client through the agent service center according to a verification result.

title: A Method of Heterogenous Network Management Scheme based on Static TTP.
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for managing a heterogeneous network based on a tipipi, and more particularly, to secure a network in a heterogeneous network environment, using a secure mutual authentication and a 1-out-2 lost communication path based on a static TTP. The present invention relates to a TITP-based heterogeneous network management method that provides not only safety but efficiency of a network by performing communication.   The heterogeneous network management method of the present invention Titipi,   Generating an independent value of the mobile entity, generating a public key in the intermediate entity to generate mutual authentication values between the mobile entities, and verifying the mutual authentication value;    A second step of generating an initial value for initializing a group between arbitrary moving objects and registering a public key of the moving object in the intermediate object;   And a third step of performing mutual authentication between arbitrary mobile entities.    According to the present invention, an independent value assigned from a central entity and an arbitrary public key can be generated and verified based on this, and then mutually authenticated communication can be performed.   Ubiquitous environment, heterogeneous network security, overlay network, user authentication.

title: System and method for autonomous sustenance of digital assets
abstract: A system and method for autonomous sustenance of digital assets, including but not limited to digital media, is described. The system may include one or more smart contracts which provide terms for executing a provision of a digital asset to a user on a permanent or duration limited basis. The method may include ensuring the terms of the smart contract are executed such that digital rights holders in the digital assets are paid for access to the digital asset.

title: A method for providing services for actual economic values according to a cryptocurrency and an apparatus using it
abstract: According to an embodiment of the present invention, a method for processing cryptocurrency based on a blockchain network of a service device comprises the steps of: paying second cryptocurrency issued to a trader terminal in a condition that the second cryptocurrency may be incinerated by payment of gold corresponding to a real economic value in response to a request for conversion from first cryptocurrency from the trader terminal; receiving a gold payment request corresponding to the second cryptocurrency from the trader terminal; and generating gold payment request information corresponding to the second cryptocurrency to transmit the gold payment request information to a gold provision device.

title: Dynamic payment authorization system and method
abstract: A computer program, system, and method for facilitating payment processing, including requesting authorization information from a user, with the authorization information confirming that the user intends to complete a payment transaction at a payment terminal. After initial authorization information is received, transaction information is received, with the transaction information being indicative of the payment transaction being initiated at the payment terminal. Finally, the authorization information is compared with transaction information, and based on the result of the comparison, the payment transaction is either allowed or disallowed.

title: System for the operation of a financial account
abstract: A financial system for managing the asset accounts (16) and credit facilities (18) within a client account (10) is disclosed. The system accepts the client's financial objectives/related information and suggests the best realized investments and credit facilities. In the preferred embodiment, a mortgage (12) secured by the client's home (14) and asset account(s) (16) is managed. Funds used to amortize the mortgage are used to increase the designated asset account (16). When the client's borrowing power is less than a threshold value, the client's account (10) is imbalanced and the client may reallocate the distribution of assets (16) and liabilities (18) and/or modify a set of constraints of the client account (10). If the client's account (10) is still imbalanced, the system initiates a liquidation procedure.

title: System and method for ecommerce ticket sales based on seat occupancy
abstract: A system and method for sensing a seat occupancy by an individual and executing an ecommerce transaction via the individual's mobile device for the cost of a ticket based on the occupied seat. For example, an attendee enters a multiplex and chooses a theater and a seat from which to watch a movie, or a passenger enters a station and chooses a train and a seat in which to travel. In both cases, the occupancy of the seat is detected, an amount owed is determined based on the occupancy of the seat, and an ecommerce transaction is initiated via the mobile device to pay the amount. The determination of the amount may be delayed for a period after the individual has stopped moving to ensure they have made their final choice. The individual may be required to verify a relevant characteristic, such as age or membership in a discounted group.

title: Safe payment method and device based on eID
abstract: The invention provides a kind of safe payment method and device based on eID.The method includes：The payment request from user is received, Pay Bill is generated on the interface for paying class application；When user confirms to pay according to Pay Bill, generation prompting user carries out the message of eID certifications, and has adjusted the reader of the eID information that can be read in eID terminals；Obtain the eID information that reader reads from eID terminals；Payment accounts and the eID information for obtaining are sent to eID unified certifications server carries out authentification of message, and receives the authentication result of eID unified certifications server return；Determined whether to carry out follow-up delivery operation according to authentication result.The embodiment of the present invention realizes the physical isolation of eID information and internet using eID terminals, before delivery operation is carried out, secure payment certification can be carried out to payment accounts according to eID information, such that it is able to improve payment safety.

title: Mobile payment system
abstract: The present invention relates to a mobile card payment system. The mobile card settlement system includes a mobile card settlement terminal for receiving card information having any one of a magnetic type, an IC chip and a bar code, a card acceptance means for receiving the card information from the mobile card settlement terminal, A mobile communication terminal having a card payment program for transferring the card acceptance signal generated to a remote card payment server through a mobile communication network, and a communication unit mounted with the mobile card payment terminal and the mobile communication terminal, And a terminal mounting unit for communicating the mobile communication terminal with the mobile card payment terminal. Accordingly, the card information received by the mobile card settlement terminal is transmitted to the mobile communication terminal, the mobile communication terminal performs communication with the remote server to proceed with the card settlement, and the mobile communication terminal, By replacing the terminal with a terminal, the manufacturing cost can be reduced.

title: Data stage-in for network nodes
abstract: A method is described of downloading a data item from a source to each node of a plurality of nodes of a data center, wherein the data item is split in a plurality of disjoint chunks. The method includes receiving each chunk of the plurality of chunks from the source by only one node of the plurality of nodes; and distributing the plurality of chunks among the plurality of nodes within the data center until each node of the plurality of nodes has the plurality of chunks forming the data item.

title: A network-based payment system and method
abstract: The present invention provides a payment system comprising a server apparatus, wherein data on a payment with installment transferred from a POS terminal by means of a communication network is read by at least one electronic control unit and is entered into a database under an account of future receivables records in which the data on payment with installment is matched with a unique first creditor record corresponding to that POS terminal. In the payment system, the electronic control unit (22) is configured to address in the database (24) a unique second creditor information which it transfers from a receivable assignment terminal 50 to which it provides encrypted connection with the server apparatus (22) such that the first creditor access is verified, and to select a future receivables record (26) according to a model sent from the receivable assignment terminal (50) and to match it with the second creditor record.

title: Method for remote determination of characteristics of surface water body environment
abstract:
FIELD: physics. 
     SUBSTANCE: surface of an investigated water body is continuously irradiated with a laser and mirror reflection glitters from the surface are detected. Upon detecting mirror reflection glitters, the laser radiation power is increased to a level which enables to measure the Raman spectrum from the water column. The Raman spectrum from the water column is measured and then used to determine characteristics of the environment of the water body, e.g., chemical and biological parameters and temperature. 
     EFFECT: high accuracy of determining vertical distribution of characteristics of an investigated water environment by eliminating the effect on measurement results of surface perturbations generated by wind waves and ripples.

title: Electric rotary machine
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an electric rotary machine capable of high quality rotary driving with less vibration and noise by reducing a torque ripple without causing reduction in torque.SOLUTION: An electric rotary machine includes a stator 11 having a plurality of teeth 15 facing a rotor 12, and a plurality of slots as spaces each for winding a coil around the teeth, the rotor having a pair of permanent magnets for applying magnetic force to the teeth, the magnets being embedded in the rotor in a V shape. When a pair of the permanent magnets in the rotor, corresponding to six slots in the stator, is defined as one magnetic pole, long teeth 15 L and short teeth 15S are alternately formed, and there are formed adjustment grooves 21 including deepest portions 21a positioned 56° (an electrical angle) equally away from a d-axis passing through the center of the one magnetic pole in forward and backward directions so that a width of each of the grooves is equal to that of each of facing teeth.

title: Earthquake triggering underwater landslide disaster simulation test platform
abstract: The utility model discloses a kind of Earthquake triggering underwater landslide disaster simulation test platforms, it is made of shake table, sink, sedimentation basin, the vibration table of shake table and sink are connected as an entirety, in table vibration, sink will not vibrate therewith, landslide body Model only on vibration table vibrates therewith, then causes to destroy.Because water does not transmit shearing force, shake table size only needs to meet test model size, saves space and cost, is more avoided that the influence that ripples are turned back to experimental phenomena and test result.And the test method of sink is placed on a vibration table, it is difficult to eliminate the water disturbance generated because of sink wall vibrations, the water body of disturbance will form ripples of turning back and act on the body Model of landslide, and model is caused to destroy.

title: Low noise low ripple type chopper-stabilized instrumentation amplifier circuit
abstract: The utility model relates to a kind of low noise low ripple type chopper-stabilized instrumentation amplifier circuits.Including low gain high frequency channel, high-gain low frequency channel and remnants ripple cancellation loop, the low gain high frequency channel is by amplifier G m3 With amplifier G m4 Composition, the high-gain low frequency channel is by chopper CH1, amplifier G m1 , chopper CH2, amplifier G m2 , switched capacitor notch filter NOTCH and amplifier G m4 Composition, the remnants ripple cancellation loop is by inductance capacitance C 41 And C 42 , cascade buffer Cascode Buffer1, chopper CH3, cascade buffer Casccode Buffer2, integrating capacitor C int , amplifier G m5 Composition.

title: User attaching verification method, device and computer equipment based on group ranking
abstract: This application discloses a kind of user attaching verification method, device, computer equipment and storage medium based on group ranking, which comprises receive the home authentication application Jing Guo the first private key encryption that user terminal is sent；Using home authentication application described in the first public key decryptions corresponding with first private key, to obtain the end message of user's signature ownership side corresponding with the user；The requirement for obtaining group ranking is sent to the terminal of ownership side；The group ranking that the terminal of ownership side is sent is received, and utilizes the second public key decryptions group ranking corresponding with second private key, obtains group ranking in plain text；Judge whether the group ranking matches the user's signature in plain text；If the group ranking matches the user's signature in plain text, determine the user attaching in the ownership side.Home authentication is precisely, automatically carried out to realize.

title: A kind of gear pump informationization intelligent test system and method for testing
abstract: The present invention relates to a kind of gear pump informationization intelligent test system and method for testing.Test system includes：Computer processing system, keyboard and display man-machine interactive system, two-dimensional code scanning system, data acquisition controller, sensing and detecting system, secondary meter system, alarm system, shift knob system system.Method of testing includes：Carry out user identity identification and test product identification；Start real time data sampling automatic detection pressure, flow, rotating speed equivalent, and show real-time curve；Valid data are recorded in test, oil temperature monitoring and oil leak/oil-proof identification is carried out；Properties of product calculating and information alert are carried out after completing single test, it is automatic to draw trial curve and output test report, complete test data storage.Steady-state behaviour intelligence test and the information process- of result of the test of gear pump product can be realized using system and method for the invention, the high efficiency and accuracy of product testing is substantially increased, the human cost that product export tests link is reduced.

title: Database storage and retrieval method using a declining stage size and repetitive searches
abstract: A hashing database system that efficiently handles collisions comprises a list of data blocks divided into a plurality of stages, each of which is geometrically smaller than the preceding stage. The key of the data to be stored or retrieved (the "desired key") is hashed and, along with the stage number, used as an input into a staging algorithm to derive an offset into the list. One or more data blocks in the list surrounding the hashed-to data block are checked to determine whether the key field in the data block matches the desired key. If the keys match, then the desired data block is found. If the desired key is not found, then the hashed key is again used as an input into a staging algorithm along with the stage, and a new offset is derived and used as an index into the next stage of the index list. These steps are repeated until the key is found or the last stage is reached. The last stage is an overflow where the data is guaranteed to be found or space is guaranteed to be found for insertion of new data if not found in one of the stages.

title: Method for proving contents of printout and apparatus thereof
abstract: PURPOSE: A method and a device for certifying the contents of an output matter using a digital signature and the encryption based on a public key are provided to clearly verify a writer, a holder, and a publisher of the output matter, and verify that the contents are not forged by using the digital signature and the encryption based on the public key. CONSTITUTION: A certified contents generator/appointer(221) receives the summary information and the additional data of the certified contents forming the contents of the output matter from a user. A certified contents digital signature/certification performing part(222) includes an extracting module, an encoding module, a transmitting module, a receiving module, and a decoding module. A certification code generator(223) generates a certification code by combining a certification result value, a receiving value, and an ID distinguishing a certification server. An output file certification code integrator(224) inserts the certification code to the original contents and outputs the data to an output device(230).

title: A kind of fault detection method, system and controller
abstract: The embodiment of the invention discloses a kind of fault detection method, system and controller.The method comprise the steps that to utilize when electronic equipment is in soft start or operational mode and continue the charger iterative cycles behavioral characteristic after staying diode or capacitance short-circuit to carry out fault detect, and in electronic equipment running, utilize the feature of capacitance voltage and cell voltage to carry out fault detect, different characteristics before and after the present embodiment starts according to electronic equipment have employed different detection schemes, on the basis of not increasing device cost, all can effectively detect under various running statuses, and will not report by mistake, fail to report, and the present embodiment uses detection over-current signal to seal the action of ripple in time, while detection fault, the timely protection to device can be accomplished, and fault coverage will not be expanded, can avoid causing the damage of other adjacent devices, detection is the most effectively.

title: Method and device for testing blockchain in a computer-assisted manner
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for testing a blockchain in a computer-assisted manner, comprising the following method steps: generating a specified transaction and / or a specified smart contract—specific transaction and / or specified smart Contracts are paired with individual specific values; Adding the specified transaction and / or the specified smart contract to the blockchain; Performing the specified transaction and / or the specified smart contract, wherein a measurement of the specified transaction and / or the specified smart contract is detected; And testing the measured value using a specific value, wherein a control signal is provided upon occurrence of a deviation from the specific value.

title: Method for Providing Asynchronous Reverse Direction Payment based on Application Interlocking by using Radio Signal Device and Cryptocurrency
abstract: According to a method for asynchronous payment in a reverse direction based on application interlocking using a wireless apparatus and cryptocurrency, the method comprises: a first step that an operating server receives transaction registration information from an affiliate terminal; a second step that the operating server separately and uniquely identifies an affiliate and generates one time identification (OTID) at the same time; a third step that the operating server links and stores the transaction registration information and OTID; a fourth step that the operating server provides the OTID to the affiliate terminal; a fifth step that the operating server receives recognition information; a sixth step that the operating server uniquely identifies and authenticates the affiliate and confirms any one piece of transaction registration information only identified through the OTID of the transaction registration information at the same time; a seventh step that the operating server provides transaction information; an eight step that the operating server receives request information; a ninth step that the operating server processes payment information to be provided to a payment application of the user wireless terminal; a tenth step that the operating server confirms a result of a cryptocurrency transaction procedure; and an eleventh step that the operating server payment result information based on cryptocurrency for the cryptocurrency transaction procedure to the user wireless terminal and affiliate terminal.

title: Method and apparatus for non-interactive information dispersal
abstract: Methods and apparatus for use in a dispersed storage network (DSN) to enable non-interactive information dispersal. In various examples, a computing device dispersed storage error encodes a data segment of a data object to produce a set of encoded data slices. Utilizing a secret key, the computing device encrypts an encoded data slice of the set of encoded data slices to produce an encrypted data slice. The computing device also encrypts the secret key, utilizing a public key of a storage unit of the DSN. The encrypted data slice and the encrypted secret key are combined by the computing device to create a package. A signature operation is performed on the package to generate a signed package, which is sent to the DSN storage unit. The signature operation can include generating a hash digest of the package and encrypting the hash digest utilizing a private key of the computing device.

title: Method for Providing Asynchronous Reverse Direction Payment by using Sound Signal Device and Cryptocurrency
abstract: The present invention relates to an asynchronous reverse direction payment method using a sound wave device and cryptocurrency. More specifically, a method is implemented by means of an operation server which communicates with a terminal of a member store and is communicable with a wireless terminal of a user who visited the member store. The method comprises the steps of: allowing the operation server to receive transaction registration information and a uniquely generated identification (UGID) from the terminal of the member store; allowing the operation server to store the transaction registration information in association with the UGID; allowing the operation server to receive recognition information from a management server in association with a payment application executed in the wireless terminal of the user; allowing the operation server to check one transaction registration information; allowing the operation server to check the result of procedures of a cryptocurrency transaction; and providing payment result information based on cryptocurrency to the wireless terminal of the user and the terminal of the member store.

title: Over-the-air delivery of metering certificates and data
abstract: Metering is enabled through an arrangement in which a metering certificate is communicated to a mobile device using an over-the-air protocol. A metering trigger provides the metering certificate that includes a location to which metering data is posted by the mobile device and a public key of a public-private key pair, or alternatively provides a link to such metering certificate. A metering helper passes the metering certificate to a DRM system on the mobile device which collects metering data associated with the metering ID and uses the public key to encrypt the metering data into a metering challenge. The metering helper posts the metering challenge to the location. The metering service extracts the metering data from the metering challenge using a private key and generates a metering response that is received by the metering helper which prompts the DRM system to reset at least a portion of a data store in which the metering data is stored.

title: Security control method and apparatus for two-dimensional code payment
abstract: The embodiments of the present description provide a security control method and apparatus for two-dimensional code payment, wherein the method may comprise: a two-dimensional code service module receiving a two-dimensional code payment request, wherein the request carries a two-dimensional code value encrypted by a private key in an SE chip on a two-dimensional code display device; the two-dimensional code service module acquiring a chip identifier corresponding to an account identifier; the two-dimensional code service module requesting that an SE management service module decrypts the two-dimensional code value, and sending the chip identifier and the two-dimensional code value to the SE management service module; the SE management service module acquiring a public key in the digital certificate corresponding to the chip identifier according to a stored correlation between the chip identifier and a digital certificate, and decrypting the two-dimensional code value by using the public key; the two-dimensional code service module receiving the two-dimensional code value decrypted by the SE management service module, and performing signature verification on the two-dimensional code value; and after the signature verification is passed, the two-dimensional code service module sending the account identifier of a payment account to a service processing module to execute payment service processing.

title: Dynamic provisioning of virtual systems
abstract: A method for dynamic provisioning of virtual systems includes, with a server system that hosts virtual systems, detecting a new virtual system on the server system, and with the server system, using a physical address of the new virtual system to perform network authentication on behalf of the new virtual system.

title: System and method for providing internet services to sports enthusiasts such as tennis players
abstract: A system and method of providing internet services to sports enthusiasts such as tennis players. According to the method, an electronic communication from a tennis player is transmitted over the internet to a virtual tennis center web site which determines whether the tennis player is an authorized user of the web site. A password prompt can be displayed to allow the authorized user to obtain full access to various screens on the web site. The web site determines whether the electronic communication is an e-mail or search request and conducts a search in a searchable database if the electronic communication is a search request. Alternatively, a notification is sent to one or more authorized users of the web site if the electronic communication is an e-mail intended for the one or more authorized users or a notification is forwarded to one or more authorized business entities if the electronic communication is an e-mail inquiring about tennis goods and/or services.

title: Tamper-proof restaurant cash register system
abstract: A cash register System, comprising RFID-antennas, is built into counters for handing out meals or drinks. Disposable RFID-labels are printed as to orders which waiters register on a transmittal device, (e.g. a small tablet computer), by which he is firstly identified while wearing a RFID token ring. The RFID-Labels are adhesively attached to the downside of glasses and meal plates, where they are read and compared at the hand-out counter together with the RFID identification tokens, which the waiter wears, to confirm wether it is for his order. The system communicates with a computer for clearing, so that the waiter only has to put the cleared amount, that he has to deliver, into the cash box at the end of his shift.

title: bus card reader
abstract: This design is an external transportation card and reader composed of a 24 pin terminal that can connect to a mobile phone to solve the inconvenience that can not be confirmed if it is not a transportation card charging station or a subway charger. It can be connected to a mobile phone like a usual accessory, System, and a user's mobile phone input for using a traffic card inquiry, etc.   And an RF processor for supplying power to the IC chip of the traffic card by radiating RF frequency and transmitting and receiving data   An antenna box, an RF interface in which an RF traffic card reading and writing module and a charge and settlement module are installed,   A display and an output unit indicating the inquiry result or guidance information, and usually one hour after getting off the bus   The transfer time is informed of the correct transfer time from the transfer time within the transfer time   Thereby saving transportation costs.

title: A kind of method, apparatus and terminal of wirelessly transmitting data storage
abstract: The embodiment of the invention discloses the method, apparatus and terminal of a kind of wirelessly transmitting data storage, wherein this method includes：Receive wirelessly transmitting data；The wirelessly transmitting data includes：Data to be stored and secure ID；The secure ID is used to indicate whether the data to be stored are secure data；According to the secure ID of the wirelessly transmitting data, the data to be stored are determined as after secure data, the data to be stored are converted into corresponding safe data storage by default data conversion strategy；According to default storage strategy, secure memory space is arrived into safe data storage storage.In this way, the embodiment of the present invention is by setting the secure ID of wirelessly transmitting data, to recognize secure data, so as to improve the security of wirelessly transmitting data storage.

title: Portable vehicle telematics systems and methods
abstract: A portable sensing and telematics device senses one or more conditions with respect to a vehicle and/or its occupant(s) and can communicate regarding, or in response to, the sensed condition to a remote entity (e.g., emergency responders, law enforcement agencies, other entities that monitor vehicle occupants or usage). An exemplary device can be integrated in, for example, a cigarette lighter adapter (CLA) configured to be connected to a vehicle cigarette lighter socket or auxiliary power socket. The portable sensing and telematics device can be connected to a tethered smartphone, interface with an in-vehicle modem or cellular phone, or incorporate smartphone or similar functionality within. Other form factors are possible. An exemplary device can be used in a wide variety of emergency sensing and response applications, as well as various monitoring applications and scenarios.

An exemplary device can be integrated in, for example, a cigarette lighter adapter (CLA) configured to be connected to a vehicle cigarette lighter socket or auxiliary power socket. title: Barreled liquefied petroleum gas distribution system and barreled liquefied petroleum gas distribution method
abstract: A barreled liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) distribution system has a system infrastructure with a vehicle dispatch device (30) communicatively connected to multiple consumer ends and multiple vehicle ends. The consumer ends and the vehicle ends are equipped with multiple first and second electronic devices (20). When one of the consumer ends orders barreled LPG, a corresponding first electronic device (10) is used to transmit an order message. The vehicle dispatch device (30) performs a scheduled order mode, an instant order mode or a self-pickup order mode according to the order message. By the self-pickup order mode, barreled LPG can be delivered to consumers at non-fixed premises. Different discounts are given to consumers for choosing the scheduled order mode or the self-pickup order mode. Meanwhile, free spots within a delivery schedule can be utilized for the instant order mode. Accordingly, distribution efficiency and consumer interaction can be enhanced.

title: Wearable computing device gift registry system
abstract: Gift registry systems, user interfaces, and methods are described that provide a registry owner a way to complete a gift registry. The method includes providing an application for a wearable computing device, the wearable computing device having a camera and a display, the application permitting a user to capture an image of one of a product and a product advertisement using the camera of the wearable computing device. The method includes receiving a captured image from the wearable computing device and identifying the product from the captured image. The method further includes generating a user interface for displaying details about the product from the captured image and providing the user interface for display on the wearable computing device.

title: Method and apparatus for operating a configurable remote supervisor terminal of a self-service retail checkout system
abstract: A method of operating a retail system which includes a plurality of self-service checkout terminals, a first remote supervisor terminal, and a second remote supervisor terminal includes the step of operating the first remote supervisor terminal such that the first remote supervisor terminal monitors operation of each of the plurality of self-service checkout terminals during a first period of time. The method also includes the step of maintaining the second remote supervisor terminal in an idle mode of operation such that the second remote supervisor terminal does not monitor operation of any of the plurality of self-service checkout terminals during the first period of time. Yet further, the method includes the step of operating the first remote supervisor terminal such that the first remote supervisor terminal monitors operation of a first group of the plurality of self-service checkout terminals during a second period of time. In addition, the method includes the step of operating the second remote supervisor terminal such that the second remote supervisor terminal monitors operation of a second group of the plurality of self-service checkout terminals during the second period of time. A self-service retail system is also disclosed.

title: System and Method for Product Authentication
abstract: Techniques for product authentication are disclosed which employ both identification tags affixed to products and a central server to validate scanned tag codes. To verify authenticity of a product, a user may peel off a cover label from the identification tag to reveal a scannable or readable code/symbol, use a device to scan or read the code/symbol, and then transmit it to the central server for authentication. The central server determines, based on database records, whether the code/symbol is genuine and never scanned by another device before. If so, the product is deemed authentic, and a corresponding token is created and stored based on the unique combination of the code/symbol and an identifier of the device used to scan/submit the code/symbol. Any subsequent authentication request originating from a different device to the central server with the same code/symbol may receive a negative response about the authenticity of the underlying product.

title: Remote control method, device and system based on HTTP (hyper text transport protocol)
abstract: The application relates to the technical field of data processing, and provides a remote control method, a device and a system based on an HTTP (hyper text transport protocol), wherein the method comprises the following steps: a user terminal scans a bar code displayed by a controlled terminal and enters a control page corresponding to the bar code through a preset browser; the user terminal receives the triggered control operation through the control page and generates a control instruction corresponding to the control operation; the user terminal sends a control instruction to the server through an HTTP (hyper text transport protocol); the server receives the control instruction and sends the control instruction to the controlled terminal through the HTTP; the controlled terminal receives a control instruction through a preset control module; the controlled terminal converts the control instruction into a corresponding control handle through the control module; and the controlled terminal controls the control object corresponding to the control instruction through the control handle. The scheme can be applied to smart cities, and the remote control of the controlled terminal can be realized by utilizing the user terminal. Further, the present application relates to blockchain techniques, and the control handle may be stored in a blockchain.

title: Single layered touch screen and method for determining touch position in the same
abstract: Disclosed are a single layered capacitive touch screen and a method for determining a touch point thereof. The method of the present invention sequentially applies a predetermined pulse to a plurality of pattern electrodes disposed on a panel made of a predetermined material in a longitudinal direction or a width direction, determines whether there are ripples on a reflected wave received from the plurality of pattern electrodes, and determines a touch point from the time when the ripples in the reflected wave are generated.

title: Dynamic distributed Brillouin light fiber sensing equipment and method
abstract: Dynamic distributed Brillouin light fiber sensing equipment and method, belong to optical field, and the present invention solves based on the little problem of the strain measurement scope of brillouin gain Slope Method dynamic sensitive technology.The present invention includes laser instrument, coupling mechanism, polarization maintaining optical fibre to be measured, Erbium-Doped Fiber Amplifier, adjustable optical attenuator, data acquisition module, first Polarization Controller PC1, second Polarization Controller PC2, 3rd Polarization Controller PC3, 4th Polarization Controller PC4, probe light intensity modulator IM1, pump light intensities modulator IM2, AWG (Arbitrary Waveform Generator) AWG, first circulator R1, second circulator R2, first signal amplifier Amp1 and secondary signal amplifier Amp2, any ripple is utilized to drive the mode of intensity modulator, achieve the frequency agility of probe light, solve the rapid scanning problem of frequency, achieve distributed Brillouin's dynamic sensitive, measure the strain of polarization maintaining optical fibre to be measured.

title: Corrugated stuffing aluminizing and multi element copermeation technology
abstract: Corrugated stuffing aluminizing and multi element copermeation technology relate to a kind ofly implements the processing method of hot aluminising or multiple permeation to soft steel ripple packing surface, comprises oil removing, eliminates rust and be coated with operation such as oozing.It is at first waiting to ooze the hot bleed slurry of ripple packing surface applied one deck that being coated with wherein oozed operation, carries out diffusion annealing then under protective atmosphere.The ripple packing that adopts this technology to obtain torsional deformation can not occur, and its infiltration layer evenly, continuously, and surperficial aluminum content can reach more than 30%, has solidity to corrosion preferably.So the present invention is specially adapted to hot aluminising or multiple permeation are implemented in soft steel ripple packing surface.

title: Information storage system, information storage device, method therefor, and program
abstract: PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an information storage system, an information storage device, a method therefor and a program which can follow an instruction given by a user to prevent information from being leaked from the information device.SOLUTION: An information storage system comprises: a key device which discloses a public key of a public key encryption method and secretly stores a secret key; and an information storage device which can exchange information with the key device via a communication line. The information storage device comprises: an encryption unit which encrypts target information by using the public key, stores the encrypted texts, and deletes information which is not the target of encryption; and a decryption request unit which requests the key device to decrypt the information corresponding to the encrypted text. The key device comprises a decryption unit which, when a user of the information storage device has not requested to stop processing, decrypts the information corresponding to the encrypted text by using the secret key, and transmits the decryption result to the information storage device.

title: Sealing tools manufacturing method for e.g. thermoforming machine, involves producing force that is induced in sealing tools for surface unit of tools and determining force for defined piercing depths of required ripple surface
abstract: The method involves carrying out compensation of tolerances of sealing tools (1, 2) and foils (3) by defined immersion depths (5, 6) of respective opposite ripple (4) in an assembly of foils consisting of the foils. A distance (T) of the ripple is provided, where experimental measurement of compression stress is carried for defined piercing depth of testing body with common geometry in the assembly of foils. Force that is induced in the tools is produced for a surface unit of the tools and is determined for defined piercing depths of a required ripple surface.

title: Systems and methods for securing data at third-party storage services
abstract: A computer-implemented method for securing data at third-party storage services may include (1) receiving, at a server-side computing system, a request to provide a user with access to a file that is encrypted, (2) determining, in response to the request, whether a transitory symmetric key of the user is available to encrypt a decryption key with which the file may be decrypted, (3) encrypting the decryption key with the transitory symmetric key of the user if the transitory symmetric key of the user is available or encrypting the decryption key with the public key of an asymmetric key pair designated for the user if the transitory symmetric key of the user is unavailable, and (4) storing the encrypted decryption key. Various other methods, systems, and computer-readable media are also disclosed.

title: Rectifier
abstract: (57) [Summary] [Composition] When the commercial AC power source from the AC power source 1 is rectified by the bridge rectifier circuit 3 and smoothed by the smoothing capacitor 4 to form and output the DC power source, the smoothing capacitor 4 is charged. A ripple current detection circuit 14 is a capacitor input type rectifier for controlling discharge so as to improve power factor by controlling ON / OFF of a switching transistor 8.   Detects the ripple voltage of the output DC power supply and controls the switching transistor 8 on / off by a pulse width modulation signal formed according to the difference between the ripple voltage and the reference voltage. Further, the input voltage detection circuit 11 detects the input voltage and variably controls the reference voltage according to the input voltage. [Effect] The ripple voltage can be controlled to be constant irrespective of variations in the input voltage and the load connected to the rectifying device, and the power factor improved by the on / off control of the switching transistor 8 can be maintained constant.

title: Vehicle fee deduction method and related device
abstract: The embodiment of the application discloses a vehicle fee deduction method and a device, wherein the method comprises the following steps: acquiring a use request aiming at a vehicle, wherein the use request comprises target user identity information; determining a target deduction account corresponding to the target user identity information from a plurality of deduction accounts corresponding to the ETC configured by the vehicle; in the plurality of deduction account numbers, different deduction account numbers correspond to different user identity information; and when the fee deduction request is acquired, determining the target fee deduction account number as a specified account number for the fee deduction. Therefore, in the embodiment of the invention, one ETC can correspond to a plurality of accounts of a plurality of users, each user only corresponds to one account, and the user can accurately deduct fees from the corresponding account after using a vehicle and generating ETC toll.

title: Data system and method
abstract: A data system for providing data communication and data storage includes at least one user device and a configuration of nodal elements which is operable to communicate with the at least one user device. The data system is operable to communicate data therein in a format which includes data chunks which have been encrypted and obfuscated and are defined by one or more data maps. Moreover, the data system is susceptible to being configured for providing secure data communication and storage, simultaneously with providing a high degree of user privacy. The data system has potential widespread use in a wide spectrum of applications.

title: Systems and methods for processing mobile payments by provisioning credentials to mobile devices without secure elements
abstract: A method for generating and provisioning payment credentials to a mobile device lacking a secure element includes: generating a card profile associated with a payment account, wherein the card profile includes at least payment credentials corresponding to the associated payment account and a profile identifier; provisioning, to a mobile device lacking a secure element, the generated card profile; receiving, from the mobile device, a key request, wherein the key request includes at least a mobile identification number (PIN) and the profile identifier; using the mobile PIN; generating a single use key, wherein the single use key includes at least the profile identifier, an application transaction counter, and a generating key for use in generating a payment cryptogram valid for a single financial transaction; and transmitting the generated single use key to the mobile device.

title: Determining identities for executing cloud processing and approvers of the executing
abstract: A method includes configuring, by a cloud provisioning server, a first user identity to execute a provisioning to provision an instance. The instance to be provisioned includes one of an instantiated software resource and a computing service. The method also includes configuring a second user identity to be an approver of the provisioning. The method also includes performing provisioning of the instance. The provisioning is executed under the first user identity, and the second user identity has provided approval of the provisioning.

title: Authentication method, apparatus and computer-readable storage medium
abstract: The disclosure relates to a verification method, a verification device and a computer readable storage medium, and relates to the technical field of computers. The method of the present disclosure comprises: acquiring hardware equipment configuration information of a user; generating identity authentication information of a user according to the configuration information of the hardware equipment; and comparing the generated authentication information with the stored authentication information to authenticate the identity of the user. In the method, the hardware equipment configuration information of the user is utilized to generate the authentication information of the user, and the user is authenticated through the authentication information. Because the configuration information of the hardware equipment is different due to different preferences, identities and the like of each user, and the hardware equipment used by the user is usually fixed and is not easy to be tampered or acquired, the security of user identity authentication can be improved by using the configuration information of the hardware equipment of the user.

title: System for monitoring and managing operational and performance parameters of a cryptocurrency mining farm
abstract: The invention is a system aimed at ensuring the safe and efficient operation of cryptocurrency mining farms based on bitcoin payment systems (hereinafter referred to as "farms"), which in particular manage the functions of the farms and the operating parameters of the farm equipment. The technical effect of the present invention will be to more reliably protect cryptocurrency mining farms against damage to important work nodes in emergency situations, stable farm operation and sustainable performance levels throughout the mining process.
